authors_text: Ijaz Ahmad,Seokjoo Shin
title: A Pixel-based Encryption Method for Privacy-Preserving Deep Learning Models
title_zh: 一种基于像素的隐私保护深度学习模型加密方法
comment: in the proceedings of the Korean Institute of Communications and Information Sciences (KICS) Winter Conference, Pyeongchang, Korea, Feb 2022
comments: in the proceedings of the Korean Institute of Communications and Information Sciences (KICS) Winter Conference, Pyeongchang, Korea, Feb 2022
abstract: In the recent years, pixel-based perceptual algorithms have been successfully applied for privacy-preserving deep learning (DL) based applications. However, their security has been broken in subsequent works by demonstrating a chosen-plaintext attack. In this paper, we propose an efficient pixel-based perceptual encryption method. The method provides a necessary level of security while preserving the intrinsic properties of the original image. Thereby, can enable deep learning (DL) applications in the encryption domain. The method is substitution based where pixel values are XORed with a sequence (as opposed to a single value used in the existing methods) generated by a chaotic map. We have used logistic maps for their low computational requirements. In addition, to compensate for any inefficiency because of the logistic maps, we use a second key to shuffle the sequence. We have compared the proposed method in terms of encryption efficiency and classification accuracy of the DL models on them. We have validated the proposed method with CIFAR datasets. The analysis shows that when classification is performed on the cipher images, the model preserves accuracy of the existing methods while provides better security.
summary: In the recent years, pixel-based perceptual algorithms have been successfully applied for privacy-preserving deep learning (DL) based applications. However, their security has been broken in subsequent works by demonstrating a chosen-plaintext attack. In this paper, we propose an efficient pixel-based perceptual encryption method. The method provides a necessary level of security while preserving the intrinsic properties of the original image. Thereby, can enable deep learning (DL) applications in the encryption domain. The method is substitution based where pixel values are XORed with a sequence (as opposed to a single value used in the existing methods) generated by a chaotic map. We have used logistic maps for their low computational requirements. In addition, to compensate for any inefficiency because of the logistic maps, we use a second key to shuffle the sequence. We have compared the proposed method in terms of encryption efficiency and classification accuracy of the DL models on them. We have validated the proposed method with CIFAR datasets. The analysis shows that when classification is performed on the cipher images, the model preserves accuracy of the existing methods while provides better security.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于像素的感知算法已成功应用于基于隐私保护的深度学习（DL）应用。然而，他们的安全性在随后的作品中通过展示选择明文攻击而被破坏。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的基于像素的感知加密方法。该方法提供了必要的安全级别，同时保留了原始图像的固有属性。从而，可以实现加密领域的深度学习（DL）应用。该方法是基于替换的，其中像素值与由混沌图生成的序列（与现有方法中使用的单个值相反）进行异或。我们使用逻辑地图是因为它们的计算要求较低。此外，为了弥补逻辑映射造成的低效率，我们使用第二个键来打乱序列。我们比较了所提出的方法的加密效率和深度学习模型的分类精度。我们已经使用 CIFAR 数据集验证了所提出的方法。分析表明，在对密码图像进行分类时，该模型在保持现有方法准确性的同时，提供了更好的安全性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于像素的加密方法，用于在隐私保护的深度学习模型中保持图像的内在属性并提高安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有的像素级感知算法在深度学习应用中存在安全漏洞，容易受到选择明文攻击，因此需要一种更安全的加密方法。
AI.method: 该方法基于像素替换，通过使用混沌映射生成的序列对像素值进行异或操作，并利用第二个密钥对序列进行洗牌以提高效率。
AI.result: 在CIFAR数据集上的实验表明，该方法在保持分类准确率的同时，提供了比现有方法更好的安全性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的加密方法在保证深度学习模型分类性能的同时，有效提升了图像数据的安全性。

search_text: A Pixel-based Encryption Method for Privacy-Preserving Deep Learning Models 一种基于像素的隐私保护深度学习模型加密方法 In the recent years, pixel-based perceptual algorithms have been successfully applied for privacy-preserving deep learning (DL) based applications. However, their security has been broken in subsequent works by demonstrating a chosen-plaintext attack. In this paper, we propose an efficient pixel-based perceptual encryption method. The method provides a necessary level of security while preserving the intrinsic properties of the original image. Thereby, can enable deep learning (DL) applications in the encryption domain. The method is substitution based where pixel values are XORed with a sequence (as opposed to a single value used in the existing methods) generated by a chaotic map. We have used logistic maps for their low computational requirements. In addition, to compensate for any inefficiency because of the logistic maps, we use a second key to shuffle the sequence. We have compared the proposed method in terms of encryption efficiency and classification accuracy of the DL models on them. We have validated the proposed method with CIFAR datasets. The analysis shows that when classification is performed on the cipher images, the model preserves accuracy of the existing methods while provides better security. 近年来，基于像素的感知算法已成功应用于基于隐私保护的深度学习（DL）应用。然而，他们的安全性在随后的作品中通过展示选择明文攻击而被破坏。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的基于像素的感知加密方法。该方法提供了必要的安全级别，同时保留了原始图像的固有属性。从而，可以实现加密领域的深度学习（DL）应用。该方法是基于替换的，其中像素值与由混沌图生成的序列（与现有方法中使用的单个值相反）进行异或。我们使用逻辑地图是因为它们的计算要求较低。此外，为了弥补逻辑映射造成的低效率，我们使用第二个键来打乱序列。我们比较了所提出的方法的加密效率和深度学习模型的分类精度。我们已经使用 CIFAR 数据集验证了所提出的方法。分析表明，在对密码图像进行分类时，该模型在保持现有方法准确性的同时，提供了更好的安全性。 本文提出了一种基于像素的加密方法，用于在隐私保护的深度学习模型中保持图像的内在属性并提高安全性。 Ijaz Ahmad,Seokjoo Shin cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.MM

authors_text: Mengjun Cheng,Yipeng Sun,Longchao Wang,Xiongwei Zhu,Kun Yao,Jie Chen,Guoli Song,Junyu Han,Jingtuo Liu,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang
title: ViSTA: Vision and Scene Text Aggregation for Cross-Modal Retrieval
title_zh: ViSTA：用于跨模式检索的视觉和场景文本聚合
abstract: Visual appearance is considered to be the most important cue to understand images for cross-modal retrieval, while sometimes the scene text appearing in images can provide valuable information to understand the visual semantics. Most of existing cross-modal retrieval approaches ignore the usage of scene text information and directly adding this information may lead to performance degradation in scene text free scenarios. To address this issue, we propose a full transformer architecture to unify these cross-modal retrieval scenarios in a single $\textbf{Vi}$sion and $\textbf{S}$cene $\textbf{T}$ext $\textbf{A}$ggregation framework (ViSTA). Specifically, ViSTA utilizes transformer blocks to directly encode image patches and fuse scene text embedding to learn an aggregated visual representation for cross-modal retrieval. To tackle the modality missing problem of scene text, we propose a novel fusion token based transformer aggregation approach to exchange the necessary scene text information only through the fusion token and concentrate on the most important features in each modality. To further strengthen the visual modality, we develop dual contrastive learning losses to embed both image-text pairs and fusion-text pairs into a common cross-modal space. Compared to existing methods, ViSTA enables to aggregate relevant scene text semantics with visual appearance, and hence improve results under both scene text free and scene text aware scenarios. Experimental results show that ViSTA outperforms other methods by at least $\bf{8.4}\%$ at Recall@1 for scene text aware retrieval task. Compared with state-of-the-art scene text free retrieval methods, ViSTA can achieve better accuracy on Flicker30K and MSCOCO while running at least three times faster during the inference stage, which validates the effectiveness of the proposed framework.
summary: Visual appearance is considered to be the most important cue to understand images for cross-modal retrieval, while sometimes the scene text appearing in images can provide valuable information to understand the visual semantics. Most of existing cross-modal retrieval approaches ignore the usage of scene text information and directly adding this information may lead to performance degradation in scene text free scenarios. To address this issue, we propose a full transformer architecture to unify these cross-modal retrieval scenarios in a single $\textbf{Vi}$sion and $\textbf{S}$cene $\textbf{T}$ext $\textbf{A}$ggregation framework (ViSTA). Specifically, ViSTA utilizes transformer blocks to directly encode image patches and fuse scene text embedding to learn an aggregated visual representation for cross-modal retrieval. To tackle the modality missing problem of scene text, we propose a novel fusion token based transformer aggregation approach to exchange the necessary scene text information only through the fusion token and concentrate on the most important features in each modality. To further strengthen the visual modality, we develop dual contrastive learning losses to embed both image-text pairs and fusion-text pairs into a common cross-modal space. Compared to existing methods, ViSTA enables to aggregate relevant scene text semantics with visual appearance, and hence improve results under both scene text free and scene text aware scenarios. Experimental results show that ViSTA outperforms other methods by at least $\bf{8.4}\%$ at Recall@1 for scene text aware retrieval task. Compared with state-of-the-art scene text free retrieval methods, ViSTA can achieve better accuracy on Flicker30K and MSCOCO while running at least three times faster during the inference stage, which validates the effectiveness of the proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 视觉外观被认为是理解跨模态检索图像的最重要线索，而有时图像中出现的场景文本可以提供有价值的信息来理解视觉语义。大多数现有的跨模态检索方法忽略了场景文本信息的使用，直接添加该信息可能会导致无场景文本场景中的性能下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个完整的转换器架构，将这些跨模式检索场景统一在单个 $\textbf{Vi}$sion 和 $\textbf{S}$cene $\textbf{T}$ext $\textbf{A}$聚合框架（ViSTA）中。具体来说，ViSTA 利用转换器块直接编码图像块并融合场景文本嵌入，以学习跨模式检索的聚合视觉表示。为了解决场景文本的模态缺失问题，我们提出了一种基于融合令牌的变压器聚合方法，仅通过融合令牌交换必要的场景文本信息，并集中于每种模态中最重要的特征。为了进一步强化视觉模态，我们开发了双重对比学习损失，将图像文本对和融合文本对嵌入到公共的跨模态空间中。与现有方法相比，ViSTA 能够将相关场景文本语义与视觉外观聚合，从而改善场景文本自由和场景文本感知场景下的结果。实验结果表明，在场景文本感知检索任务的 Recall@1 中，ViSTA 的性能至少优于其他方法 $\bf{8.4}\%$。与最先进的场景文本免费检索方法相比，ViSTA 在 Flicker30K 和 MSCOCO 上可以实现更好的准确性，同时在推理阶段的运行速度至少快三倍，这验证了所提出框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViSTA框架，通过整合视觉信息与场景文本信息提升跨模态检索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态检索方法忽略场景文本信息，直接添加可能影响无文本场景性能，需统一处理不同场景。
AI.method: 采用全变压器架构编码图像块并融合场景文本嵌入，提出融合标记聚合方法及双重对比学习损失。
AI.result: 在场景文本感知任务中Recall@1提升8.4%，在Flickr30K和MSCOCO数据集上准确率优于现有方法且推理速度提高3倍。
AI.conclusion: ViSTA通过聚合视觉与文本信息验证了框架有效性，在多种场景下均表现优异。

Most of existing cross-modal retrieval approaches ignore the usage of scene text information and directly adding this information may lead to performance degradation in scene text free scenarios. To address this issue, we propose a full transformer architecture to unify these cross-modal retrieval scenarios in a single $\textbf{Vi}$sion and $\textbf{S}$cene $\textbf{T}$ext $\textbf{A}$ggregation framework (ViSTA). authors_text: Yang Shao,Quan Kong,Tadayuki Matsumura,Taiki Fuji,Kiyoto Ito,Hiroyuki Mizuno
title: Mask Atari for Deep Reinforcement Learning as POMDP Benchmarks
title_zh: Mask Atari 用于深度强化学习作为 POMDP 基准
abstract: We present Mask Atari, a new benchmark to help solve partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) problems with Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL)-based approaches. To achieve a simulation environment for the POMDP problems, Mask Atari is constructed based on Atari 2600 games with controllable, moveable, and learnable masks as the observation area for the target agent, especially with the active information gathering (AIG) setting in POMDPs. Given that one does not yet exist, Mask Atari provides a challenging, efficient benchmark for evaluating the methods that focus on the above problem. Moreover, the mask operation is a trial for introducing the receptive field in the human vision system into a simulation environment for an agent, which means the evaluations are not biased from the sensing ability and purely focus on the cognitive performance of the methods when compared with the human baseline. We describe the challenges and features of our benchmark and evaluate several baselines with Mask Atari.
summary: We present Mask Atari, a new benchmark to help solve partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) problems with Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL)-based approaches. To achieve a simulation environment for the POMDP problems, Mask Atari is constructed based on Atari 2600 games with controllable, moveable, and learnable masks as the observation area for the target agent, especially with the active information gathering (AIG) setting in POMDPs. Given that one does not yet exist, Mask Atari provides a challenging, efficient benchmark for evaluating the methods that focus on the above problem. Moreover, the mask operation is a trial for introducing the receptive field in the human vision system into a simulation environment for an agent, which means the evaluations are not biased from the sensing ability and purely focus on the cognitive performance of the methods when compared with the human baseline. We describe the challenges and features of our benchmark and evaluate several baselines with Mask Atari.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Mask Atari，这是一个新基准，可帮助使用基于深度强化学习 (DRL) 的方法解决部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP) 问题。为了实现POMDP问题的模拟环境，基于Atari 2600游戏构建了Mask Atari，以可控、可移动、可学习的掩模作为目标代理的观察区域，特别是POMDP中的主动信息收集（AIG）设置。鉴于目前还不存在，Mask Atari 提供了一个具有挑战性的、有效的基准来评估针对上述问题的方法。此外，掩模操作是将人类视觉系统中的感受野引入到代理的模拟环境中的尝试，这意味着评估不偏向于感知能力，而纯粹关注与人类基线相比的方法的认知性能。我们描述了基准测试的挑战和特点，并使用 Mask Atari 评估了几个基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mask Atari基准，用于评估基于深度强化学习的POMDP问题解决方法。
AI.motivation: 现有缺乏针对POMDP问题的深度强化学习基准，且需避免感知能力偏差以公平评估认知性能。
AI.method: 基于Atari 2600游戏构建可控、可移动、可学习的掩码机制，模拟代理的观察区域，并引入人类视觉感受野概念。
AI.result: 通过Mask Atari评估多个基线方法，验证了基准的挑战性与有效性，展示了方法在认知性能上的表现。

search_text: Mask Atari for Deep Reinforcement Learning as POMDP Benchmarks Mask Atari 用于深度强化学习作为 POMDP 基准 We present Mask Atari, a new benchmark to help solve partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) problems with Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL)-based approaches. To achieve a simulation environment for the POMDP problems, Mask Atari is constructed based on Atari 2600 games with controllable, moveable, and learnable masks as the observation area for the target agent, especially with the active information gathering (AIG) setting in POMDPs. Given that one does not yet exist, Mask Atari provides a challenging, efficient benchmark for evaluating the methods that focus on the above problem. Moreover, the mask operation is a trial for introducing the receptive field in the human vision system into a simulation environment for an agent, which means the evaluations are not biased from the sensing ability and purely focus on the cognitive performance of the methods when compared with the human baseline. We describe the challenges and features of our benchmark and evaluate several baselines with Mask Atari. 我们推出了 Mask Atari，这是一个新基准，可帮助使用基于深度强化学习 (DRL) 的方法解决部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP) 问题。为了实现POMDP问题的模拟环境，基于Atari 2600游戏构建了Mask Atari，以可控、可移动、可学习的掩模作为目标代理的观察区域，特别是POMDP中的主动信息收集（AIG）设置。鉴于目前还不存在，Mask Atari 提供了一个具有挑战性的、有效的基准来评估针对上述问题的方法。此外，掩模操作是将人类视觉系统中的感受野引入到代理的模拟环境中的尝试，这意味着评估不偏向于感知能力，而纯粹关注与人类基线相比的方法的认知性能。我们描述了基准测试的挑战和特点，并使用 Mask Atari 评估了几个基准。 本文提出Mask Atari基准，用于评估基于深度强化学习的POMDP问题解决方法。 Yang Shao,Quan Kong,Tadayuki Matsumura,Taiki Fuji,Kiyoto Ito,Hiroyuki Mizuno cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Huahuan Zheng,Keyu An,Zhijian Ou,Chen Huang,Ke Ding,Guanglu Wan
title: An Empirical Study of Language Model Integration for Transducer based Speech Recognition
title_zh: 基于换能器的语音识别语言模型集成的实证研究
abstract: Utilizing text-only data with an external language model (ELM) in end-to-end RNN-Transducer (RNN-T) for speech recognition is challenging. Recently, a class of methods such as density ratio (DR) and internal language model estimation (ILME) have been developed, outperforming the classic shallow fusion (SF) method. The basic idea behind these methods is that RNN-T posterior should first subtract the implicitly learned internal language model (ILM) prior, in order to integrate the ELM. While recent studies suggest that RNN-T only learns some low-order language model information, the DR method uses a well-trained neural language model with full context, which may be inappropriate for the estimation of ILM and deteriorate the integration performance. Based on the DR method, we propose a low-order density ratio method (LODR) by replacing the estimation with a low-order weak language model. Extensive empirical experiments are conducted on both in-domain and cross-domain scenarios on English LibriSpeech & Tedlium-2 and Chinese WenetSpeech & AISHELL-1 datasets. It is shown that LODR consistently outperforms SF in all tasks, while performing generally close to ILME and better than DR in most tests.
summary: Utilizing text-only data with an external language model (ELM) in end-to-end RNN-Transducer (RNN-T) for speech recognition is challenging. Recently, a class of methods such as density ratio (DR) and internal language model estimation (ILME) have been developed, outperforming the classic shallow fusion (SF) method. The basic idea behind these methods is that RNN-T posterior should first subtract the implicitly learned internal language model (ILM) prior, in order to integrate the ELM. While recent studies suggest that RNN-T only learns some low-order language model information, the DR method uses a well-trained neural language model with full context, which may be inappropriate for the estimation of ILM and deteriorate the integration performance. Based on the DR method, we propose a low-order density ratio method (LODR) by replacing the estimation with a low-order weak language model. Extensive empirical experiments are conducted on both in-domain and cross-domain scenarios on English LibriSpeech & Tedlium-2 and Chinese WenetSpeech & AISHELL-1 datasets. It is shown that LODR consistently outperforms SF in all tasks, while performing generally close to ILME and better than DR in most tests.
abstract_zh: 在端到端 RNN-Transducer (RNN-T) 中利用纯文本数据和外部语言模型 (ELM) 进行语音识别具有挑战性。最近，开发了密度比（DR）和内部语言模型估计（ILME）等一类方法，其性能优于经典的浅层融合（SF）方法。这些方法背后的基本思想是，RNN-T 后验应该首先减去隐式学习的内部语言模型（ILM）先验，以便整合 ELM。虽然最近的研究表明 RNN-T 仅学习一些低阶语言模型信息，但 DR 方法使用训练有素的具有完整上下文的神经语言模型，这可能不适合 ILM 的估计并恶化集成性能。基于DR方法，我们提出了一种低阶密度比方法（LODR），用低阶弱语言模型代替估计。在英语 LibriSpeech & Tedlium-2 和中文 WenetSpeech & AISHELL-1 数据集上对域内和跨域场景进行了广泛的实证实验。结果表明，LODR 在所有任务中始终优于 SF，同时在大多数测试中表现通常接近 ILME，且优于 DR。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过引入低阶密度比方法（LODR）改进基于RNN-Transducer的语音识别系统中外部语言模型（ELM）的集成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如密度比（DR）使用全上下文神经语言模型估计隐式语言模型（ILM），可能与RNN-T的低阶语言模型特性不匹配，导致集成性能下降。
AI.method: 提出低阶密度比方法（LODR），用低阶弱语言模型替代DR中的全上下文模型，以更贴合RNN-T的ILM特性。
AI.result: 在英文和中文多个数据集上，LODR在所有任务中均优于浅层融合（SF），且在多数测试中表现接近ILME并优于DR。
AI.conclusion: LODR通过适配RNN-T的低阶语言模型特性，有效提升了ELM集成效果，为语音识别模型优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Amit Kumar Das,Abdullah Al Asif,Anik Paul,Md. Nur Hossain
title: Bangla hate speech detection on social media using attention-based recurrent neural network
title_zh: 使用基于注意力的循环神经网络检测社交媒体上的孟加拉仇恨言论
comment: ef:Type: Journal Language: English Publisher: De Gruyter First published: September 1, 1991 Publication Frequency: 1 Issue per Year Audience: researchers in the field of intelligent systems
comments: ef:Type: Journal Language: English Publisher: De Gruyter First published: September 1, 1991 Publication Frequency: 1 Issue per Year Audience: researchers in the field of intelligent systems
abstract: Hate speech has spread more rapidly through the daily use of technology and, most notably, by sharing your opinions or feelings on social media in a negative aspect. Although numerous works have been carried out in detecting hate speeches in English, German, and other languages, very few works have been carried out in the context of the Bengali language. In contrast, millions of people communicate on social media in Bengali. The few existing works that have been carried out need improvements in both accuracy and interpretability. This article proposed encoder decoder based machine learning model, a popular tool in NLP, to classify user's Bengali comments on Facebook pages. A dataset of 7,425 Bengali comments, consisting of seven distinct categories of hate speeches, was used to train and evaluate our model. For extracting and encoding local features from the comments, 1D convolutional layers were used. Finally, the attention mechanism, LSTM, and GRU based decoders have been used for predicting hate speech categories. Among the three encoder decoder algorithms, the attention-based decoder obtained the best accuracy (77%).
summary: Hate speech has spread more rapidly through the daily use of technology and, most notably, by sharing your opinions or feelings on social media in a negative aspect. Although numerous works have been carried out in detecting hate speeches in English, German, and other languages, very few works have been carried out in the context of the Bengali language. In contrast, millions of people communicate on social media in Bengali. The few existing works that have been carried out need improvements in both accuracy and interpretability. This article proposed encoder decoder based machine learning model, a popular tool in NLP, to classify user's Bengali comments on Facebook pages. A dataset of 7,425 Bengali comments, consisting of seven distinct categories of hate speeches, was used to train and evaluate our model. For extracting and encoding local features from the comments, 1D convolutional layers were used. Finally, the attention mechanism, LSTM, and GRU based decoders have been used for predicting hate speech categories. Among the three encoder decoder algorithms, the attention-based decoder obtained the best accuracy (77%).
abstract_zh: 通过技术的日常使用，尤其是通过在社交媒体上分享负面的观点或感受，仇恨言论传播得更快。尽管在检测英语、德语和其他语言的仇恨言论方面已经开展了大量工作，但在孟加拉语背景下开展的工作却很少。相比之下，数百万人在社交媒体上用孟加拉语进行交流。已经开展的少数现有工作需要在准确性和可解释性方面进行改进。本文提出了基于编码器解码器的机器学习模型，这是 NLP 中的一种流行工具，用于对 Facebook 页面上用户的孟加拉语评论进行分类。使用包含 7,425 条孟加拉语评论的数据集（包含七个不同类别的仇恨言论）来训练和评估我们的模型。为了从评论中提取和编码局部特征，使用了一维卷积层。最后，注意力机制、LSTM 和基于 GRU 的解码器已用于预测仇恨言论类别。在三种编码器解码器算法中，基于注意力的解码器获得了最好的准确率（77%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于注意力机制的循环神经网络模型，用于检测孟加拉语社交媒体中的仇恨言论。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在英语等语言的仇恨言论检测较为成熟，但孟加拉语相关研究稀缺，且现有方法在准确率和可解释性上存在不足。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构，结合1D卷积层提取特征，并使用注意力机制、LSTM和GRU解码器进行分类。
AI.result: 基于注意力机制的解码器在77%的测试数据上达到最佳准确率。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型有效提升了孟加拉语仇恨言论分类性能，未来需进一步优化模型结构和扩展数据集。

search_text: Bangla hate speech detection on social media using attention-based recurrent neural network 使用基于注意力的循环神经网络检测社交媒体上的孟加拉仇恨言论 Hate speech has spread more rapidly through the daily use of technology and, most notably, by sharing your opinions or feelings on social media in a negative aspect. Although numerous works have been carried out in detecting hate speeches in English, German, and other languages, very few works have been carried out in the context of the Bengali language. In contrast, millions of people communicate on social media in Bengali. The few existing works that have been carried out need improvements in both accuracy and interpretability. This article proposed encoder decoder based machine learning model, a popular tool in NLP, to classify user's Bengali comments on Facebook pages. A dataset of 7,425 Bengali comments, consisting of seven distinct categories of hate speeches, was used to train and evaluate our model. For extracting and encoding local features from the comments, 1D convolutional layers were used. Finally, the attention mechanism, LSTM, and GRU based decoders have been used for predicting hate speech categories. Among the three encoder decoder algorithms, the attention-based decoder obtained the best accuracy (77%). 通过技术的日常使用，尤其是通过在社交媒体上分享负面的观点或感受，仇恨言论传播得更快。尽管在检测英语、德语和其他语言的仇恨言论方面已经开展了大量工作，但在孟加拉语背景下开展的工作却很少。相比之下，数百万人在社交媒体上用孟加拉语进行交流。已经开展的少数现有工作需要在准确性和可解释性方面进行改进。本文提出了基于编码器解码器的机器学习模型，这是 NLP 中的一种流行工具，用于对 Facebook 页面上用户的孟加拉语评论进行分类。使用包含 7,425 条孟加拉语评论的数据集（包含七个不同类别的仇恨言论）来训练和评估我们的模型。为了从评论中提取和编码局部特征，使用了一维卷积层。最后，注意力机制、LSTM 和基于 GRU 的解码器已用于预测仇恨言论类别。在三种编码器解码器算法中，基于注意力的解码器获得了最好的准确率（77%）。 本文提出基于注意力机制的循环神经网络模型，用于检测孟加拉语社交媒体中的仇恨言论。 Amit Kumar Das,Abdullah Al Asif,Anik Paul,Md. Nur Hossain cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Kai-Wei Chang,Wei-Cheng Tseng,Shang-Wen Li,Hung-yi Lee
title: SpeechPrompt: An Exploration of Prompt Tuning on Generative Spoken Language Model for Speech Processing Tasks
title_zh: SpeechPrompt：针对语音处理任务的生成口语模型的提示调整探索
comment: Accepted to be published in the Proceedings of Interspeech 2022
comments: Accepted to be published in the Proceedings of Interspeech 2022
abstract: Speech representations learned from Self-supervised learning (SSL) models can benefit various speech processing tasks. However, utilizing SSL representations usually requires fine-tuning the pre-trained models or designing task-specific downstream models and loss functions, causing much memory usage and human labor. Recently, prompting in Natural Language Processing (NLP) has been found to be an efficient technique to leverage pre-trained language models (LMs). Specifically, prompt tuning optimizes a limited number of task-specific parameters with a fixed pre-trained model; as a result, only a small set of parameters is needed to be stored for each task. Prompt tuning improves computation and memory efficiency by leveraging the pre-trained LM's prediction ability. Nevertheless, such a paradigm is little studied in the speech community. We report in this paper the first exploration of the prompt tuning paradigm for speech processing tasks based on Generative Spoken Language Model (GSLM). Experiment results show that the prompt tuning technique achieves competitive performance in speech classification tasks with fewer trainable parameters than fine-tuning specialized downstream models. We further study the technique in challenging sequence generation tasks. Prompt tuning also demonstrates its potential, while the limitation and possible research directions are discussed in this paper. The source code is available on https://github.com/ga642381/SpeechPrompt.
summary: Speech representations learned from Self-supervised learning (SSL) models can benefit various speech processing tasks. However, utilizing SSL representations usually requires fine-tuning the pre-trained models or designing task-specific downstream models and loss functions, causing much memory usage and human labor. Recently, prompting in Natural Language Processing (NLP) has been found to be an efficient technique to leverage pre-trained language models (LMs). Specifically, prompt tuning optimizes a limited number of task-specific parameters with a fixed pre-trained model; as a result, only a small set of parameters is needed to be stored for each task. Prompt tuning improves computation and memory efficiency by leveraging the pre-trained LM's prediction ability. Nevertheless, such a paradigm is little studied in the speech community. We report in this paper the first exploration of the prompt tuning paradigm for speech processing tasks based on Generative Spoken Language Model (GSLM). Experiment results show that the prompt tuning technique achieves competitive performance in speech classification tasks with fewer trainable parameters than fine-tuning specialized downstream models. We further study the technique in challenging sequence generation tasks. Prompt tuning also demonstrates its potential, while the limitation and possible research directions are discussed in this paper. The source code is available on https://github.com/ga642381/SpeechPrompt.
abstract_zh: 从自监督学习 (SSL) 模型中学习的语音表示可以使各种语音处理任务受益。然而，利用 SSL 表示通常需要对预先训练的模型进行微调或设计特定于任务的下游模型和损失函数，从而导致大量的内存使用和人力劳动。最近，人们发现自然语言处理 (NLP) 中的提示是利用预训练语言模型 (LM) 的有效技术。具体来说，即时调优通过固定的预训练模型优化有限数量的特定于任务的参数；因此，每个任务只需要存储一小部分参数。通过利用预训练的 LM 的预测能力，及时调整可提高计算和内存效率。然而，这种范式在语音界却很少被研究。我们在本文中报告了基于生成口语模型（GSLM）的语音处理任务提示调整范式的首次探索。实验结果表明，与微调专门的下游模型相比，即时调整技术在语音分类任务中以更少的可训练参数实现了具有竞争力的性能。我们进一步研究了具有挑战性的序列生成任务的技术。即时调整也展示了其潜力，同时本文讨论了其局限性和可能的​​研究方向。源代码可在 https://github.com/ga642381/SpeechPrompt 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文探索了基于生成式语音语言模型（GSLM）的提示调优（Prompt Tuning）方法，以提高语音处理任务的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统SSL模型在语音任务中需大量参数微调或设计下游模型，导致内存和人力成本高。NLP中的提示调优通过少量参数优化实现高效计算，但尚未在语音领域充分研究。
AI.method: 基于GSLM框架，固定预训练模型参数，仅优化少量任务特定参数，应用于语音分类和序列生成任务。
AI.result: 在语音分类任务中，提示调优的参数量少于微调方法且性能相当；在序列生成任务中展现潜力，但存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 提示调优为语音处理提供高效方案，但需进一步研究其局限性及优化方向。

authors_text: Li Wang,Rongzhi Gu,Weiji Zhuang,Peng Gao,Yujun Wang,Yuexian Zou
title: Learning Decoupling Features Through Orthogonality Regularization
title_zh: 通过正交正则化学习解耦特征
abstract: Keyword spotting (KWS) and speaker verification (SV) are two important tasks in speech applications. Research shows that the state-of-art KWS and SV models are trained independently using different datasets since they expect to learn distinctive acoustic features. However, humans can distinguish language content and the speaker identity simultaneously. Motivated by this, we believe it is important to explore a method that can effectively extract common features while decoupling task-specific features. Bearing this in mind, a two-branch deep network (KWS branch and SV branch) with the same network structure is developed and a novel decoupling feature learning method is proposed to push up the performance of KWS and SV simultaneously where speaker-invariant keyword representations and keyword-invariant speaker representations are expected respectively. Experiments are conducted on Google Speech Commands Dataset (GSCD). The results demonstrate that the orthogonality regularization helps the network to achieve SOTA EER of 1.31% and 1.87% on KWS and SV, respectively.
summary: Keyword spotting (KWS) and speaker verification (SV) are two important tasks in speech applications. Research shows that the state-of-art KWS and SV models are trained independently using different datasets since they expect to learn distinctive acoustic features. However, humans can distinguish language content and the speaker identity simultaneously. Motivated by this, we believe it is important to explore a method that can effectively extract common features while decoupling task-specific features. Bearing this in mind, a two-branch deep network (KWS branch and SV branch) with the same network structure is developed and a novel decoupling feature learning method is proposed to push up the performance of KWS and SV simultaneously where speaker-invariant keyword representations and keyword-invariant speaker representations are expected respectively. Experiments are conducted on Google Speech Commands Dataset (GSCD). The results demonstrate that the orthogonality regularization helps the network to achieve SOTA EER of 1.31% and 1.87% on KWS and SV, respectively.
abstract_zh: 关键词识别（KWS）和说话人验证（SV）是语音应用中的两项重要任务。研究表明，最先进的 KWS 和 SV 模型是使用不同的数据集独立训练的，因为它们希望学习独特的声学特征。然而，人类可以同时区分语言内容和说话者身份。受此启发，我们认为探索一种能够有效提取共同特征同时解耦特定任务特征的方法非常重要。考虑到这一点，开发了具有相同网络结构的两分支深度网络（KWS分支和SV分支），并提出了一种新颖的解耦特征学习方法，以同时提高KWS和SV的性能，其中分别期望说话人不变的关键字表示和关键字不变的说话人表示。实验是在 Google 语音命令数据集 (GSCD) 上进行的。结果表明，正交正则化帮助网络在 KWS 和 SV 上分别实现 1.31% 和 1.87% 的 SOTA EER。

AI.tldr: 通过正交性正则化学习解耦特征以提升关键词识别和说话人验证性能
AI.motivation: 现有关键词识别(KWS)和说话人验证(SV)模型独立训练导致特征学习受限，而人类能同时区分语言内容和说话人身份，需探索共性特征与任务特异性特征解耦方法
AI.method: 设计双分支深度网络结构(含KWS分支和SV分支)，引入正交性正则化约束，强制学习说话人无关的关键词表征和关键词无关的说话人表征
AI.result: 在Google Speech Commands数据集上达到KWS 1.31%和SV 1.87%的最优EER指标
AI.conclusion: 正交性正则化有效实现了特征解耦，显著提升了KWS和SV的联合性能，验证了多任务协同学习的可行性

authors_text: Junshu Tang,Zhijun Gong,Ran Yi,Yuan Xie,Lizhuang Ma
title: LAKe-Net: Topology-Aware Point Cloud Completion by Localizing Aligned Keypoints
title_zh: LAKe-Net：通过本地化对齐关键点完成拓扑感知点云
abstract: Point cloud completion aims at completing geometric and topological shapes from a partial observation. However, some topology of the original shape is missing, existing methods directly predict the location of complete points, without predicting structured and topological information of the complete shape, which leads to inferior performance. To better tackle the missing topology part, we propose LAKe-Net, a novel topology-aware point cloud completion model by localizing aligned keypoints, with a novel Keypoints-Skeleton-Shape prediction manner. Specifically, our method completes missing topology using three steps: 1) Aligned Keypoint Localization. An asymmetric keypoint locator, including an unsupervised multi-scale keypoint detector and a complete keypoint generator, is proposed for localizing aligned keypoints from complete and partial point clouds. We theoretically prove that the detector can capture aligned keypoints for objects within a sub-category. 2) Surface-skeleton Generation. A new type of skeleton, named Surface-skeleton, is generated from keypoints based on geometric priors to fully represent the topological information captured from keypoints and better recover the local details. 3) Shape Refinement. We design a refinement subnet where multi-scale surface-skeletons are fed into each recursive skeleton-assisted refinement module to assist the completion process. Experimental results show that our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on point cloud completion.
summary: Point cloud completion aims at completing geometric and topological shapes from a partial observation. However, some topology of the original shape is missing, existing methods directly predict the location of complete points, without predicting structured and topological information of the complete shape, which leads to inferior performance. To better tackle the missing topology part, we propose LAKe-Net, a novel topology-aware point cloud completion model by localizing aligned keypoints, with a novel Keypoints-Skeleton-Shape prediction manner. Specifically, our method completes missing topology using three steps: 1) Aligned Keypoint Localization. An asymmetric keypoint locator, including an unsupervised multi-scale keypoint detector and a complete keypoint generator, is proposed for localizing aligned keypoints from complete and partial point clouds. We theoretically prove that the detector can capture aligned keypoints for objects within a sub-category. 2) Surface-skeleton Generation. A new type of skeleton, named Surface-skeleton, is generated from keypoints based on geometric priors to fully represent the topological information captured from keypoints and better recover the local details. 3) Shape Refinement. We design a refinement subnet where multi-scale surface-skeletons are fed into each recursive skeleton-assisted refinement module to assist the completion process. Experimental results show that our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on point cloud completion.
abstract_zh: 点云补全旨在从部分观察中补全几何和拓扑形状。然而，原始形状的一些拓扑缺失，现有方法直接预测完整点的位置，而没有预测完整形状的结构和拓扑信息，这导致性能较差。为了更好地解决缺失的拓扑部分，我们提出了 LAKe-Net，这是一种新颖的拓扑感知点云补全模型，通过定位对齐的关键点，并采用新颖的关键点-骨架-形状预测方式。具体来说，我们的方法使用三个步骤完成缺失的拓扑：1）对齐关键点定位。提出了一种非对称关键点定位器，包括无监督的多尺度关键点检测器和完整的关键点生成器，用于从完整和部分点云中定位对齐的关键点。我们从理论上证明，检测器可以捕获子类别内对象的对齐关键点。 2）表面骨架生成。基于几何先验的关键点生成一种新型骨架，称为表面骨架，以充分表示从关键点捕获的拓扑信息并更好地恢复局部细节。 3）形状细化。我们设计了一个细化子网，其中多尺度表面骨架被输入到每个递归骨架辅助细化模块中以协助完成过程。实验结果表明，我们的方法在点云补全方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LAKe-Net，一种通过定位对齐关键点实现拓扑感知的点云补全模型，解决现有方法在拓扑结构恢复上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有点云补全方法直接预测完整点位置，忽略对完整形状的结构化拓扑信息预测，导致缺失拓扑部分补全效果不佳。
AI.method: 分三步完成：1）使用非对称关键点定位器（含多尺度检测器和生成器）定位对齐关键点；2）基于几何先验生成表征拓扑信息的Surface-skeleton；3）设计多尺度骨架辅助的递归细化子网络进行形状优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在点云补全任务上达到最先进水平，有效恢复了复杂拓扑结构和局部细节。
AI.conclusion: 通过关键点-骨架-形状的预测范式，LAKe-Net实现了对缺失拓扑结构的精准建模，为点云补全提供了新思路。

search_text: LAKe-Net: Topology-Aware Point Cloud Completion by Localizing Aligned Keypoints LAKe-Net：通过本地化对齐关键点完成拓扑感知点云 Point cloud completion aims at completing geometric and topological shapes from a partial observation. However, some topology of the original shape is missing, existing methods directly predict the location of complete points, without predicting structured and topological information of the complete shape, which leads to inferior performance. To better tackle the missing topology part, we propose LAKe-Net, a novel topology-aware point cloud completion model by localizing aligned keypoints, with a novel Keypoints-Skeleton-Shape prediction manner. Specifically, our method completes missing topology using three steps: 1) Aligned Keypoint Localization. An asymmetric keypoint locator, including an unsupervised multi-scale keypoint detector and a complete keypoint generator, is proposed for localizing aligned keypoints from complete and partial point clouds. We theoretically prove that the detector can capture aligned keypoints for objects within a sub-category. 2) Surface-skeleton Generation. A new type of skeleton, named Surface-skeleton, is generated from keypoints based on geometric priors to fully represent the topological information captured from keypoints and better recover the local details. 3) Shape Refinement. We design a refinement subnet where multi-scale surface-skeletons are fed into each recursive skeleton-assisted refinement module to assist the completion process. Experimental results show that our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on point cloud completion. 点云补全旨在从部分观察中补全几何和拓扑形状。然而，原始形状的一些拓扑缺失，现有方法直接预测完整点的位置，而没有预测完整形状的结构和拓扑信息，这导致性能较差。为了更好地解决缺失的拓扑部分，我们提出了 LAKe-Net，这是一种新颖的拓扑感知点云补全模型，通过定位对齐的关键点，并采用新颖的关键点-骨架-形状预测方式。具体来说，我们的方法使用三个步骤完成缺失的拓扑：1）对齐关键点定位。提出了一种非对称关键点定位器，包括无监督的多尺度关键点检测器和完整的关键点生成器，用于从完整和部分点云中定位对齐的关键点。我们从理论上证明，检测器可以捕获子类别内对象的对齐关键点。 2）表面骨架生成。基于几何先验的关键点生成一种新型骨架，称为表面骨架，以充分表示从关键点捕获的拓扑信息并更好地恢复局部细节。 3）形状细化。我们设计了一个细化子网，其中多尺度表面骨架被输入到每个递归骨架辅助细化模块中以协助完成过程。实验结果表明，我们的方法在点云补全方面实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出LAKe-Net，一种通过定位对齐关键点实现拓扑感知的点云补全模型，解决现有方法在拓扑结构恢复上的不足。 Junshu Tang,Zhijun Gong,Ran Yi,Yuan Xie,Lizhuang Ma cs.CV

authors_text: Namyup Kim,Dongwon Kim,Cuiling Lan,Wenjun Zeng,Suha Kwak
title: ReSTR: Convolution-free Referring Image Segmentation Using Transformers
title_zh: ReSTR：使用 Transformer 进行无卷积参考图像分割
abstract: Referring image segmentation is an advanced semantic segmentation task where target is not a predefined class but is described in natural language. Most of existing methods for this task rely heavily on convolutional neural networks, which however have trouble capturing long-range dependencies between entities in the language expression and are not flexible enough for modeling interactions between the two different modalities. To address these issues, we present the first convolution-free model for referring image segmentation using transformers, dubbed ReSTR. Since it extracts features of both modalities through transformer encoders, it can capture long-range dependencies between entities within each modality. Also, ReSTR fuses features of the two modalities by a self-attention encoder, which enables flexible and adaptive interactions between the two modalities in the fusion process. The fused features are fed to a segmentation module, which works adaptively according to the image and language expression in hand. ReSTR is evaluated and compared with previous work on all public benchmarks, where it outperforms all existing models.
summary: Referring image segmentation is an advanced semantic segmentation task where target is not a predefined class but is described in natural language. Most of existing methods for this task rely heavily on convolutional neural networks, which however have trouble capturing long-range dependencies between entities in the language expression and are not flexible enough for modeling interactions between the two different modalities. To address these issues, we present the first convolution-free model for referring image segmentation using transformers, dubbed ReSTR. Since it extracts features of both modalities through transformer encoders, it can capture long-range dependencies between entities within each modality. Also, ReSTR fuses features of the two modalities by a self-attention encoder, which enables flexible and adaptive interactions between the two modalities in the fusion process. The fused features are fed to a segmentation module, which works adaptively according to the image and language expression in hand. ReSTR is evaluated and compared with previous work on all public benchmarks, where it outperforms all existing models.
abstract_zh: 参考图像分割是一种高级语义分割任务，其中目标不是预定义的类，而是用自然语言描述的。用于此任务的大多数现有方法严重依赖于卷积神经网络，然而，卷积神经网络难以捕获语言表达中实体之间的远程依赖关系，并且对于两种不同模态之间的交互建模不够灵活。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了第一个使用转换器进行参考图像分割的无卷积模型，称为 ReSTR。由于它通过变压器编码器提取两种模态的特征，因此它可以捕获每种模态内实体之间的远程依赖关系。此外，ReSTR 通过自注意力编码器融合两种模态的特征，从而在融合过程中实现两种模态之间灵活且自适应的交互。融合的特征被馈送到分割模块，该模块根据手中的图像和语言表达自适应地工作。 ReSTR 在所有公共基准上进行了评估并与之前的工作进行了比较，其性能优于所有现有模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需卷积神经网络的指称图像分割方法ReSTR，利用Transformer模型处理自然语言描述与图像之间的交互。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖卷积网络，难以捕捉语言描述中的长距离依赖关系，并且在多模态交互建模上不够灵活。
AI.method: 通过Transformer编码器提取图像和语言模态特征，利用自注意力机制融合两种模态特征，最终通过自适应分割模块生成结果。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准测试中，ReSTR性能优于所有现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的卷积-free架构能有效建模多模态交互，为指称图像分割任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Liyu Wu,Can Zhang,Yuexian Zou
title: SpatioTemporal Focus for Skeleton-based Action Recognition
title_zh: 基于骨架的动作识别的时空焦点
abstract: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) are widely adopted in skeleton-based action recognition due to their powerful ability to model data topology. We argue that the performance of recent proposed skeleton-based action recognition methods is limited by the following factors. First, the predefined graph structures are shared throughout the network, lacking the flexibility and capacity to model the multi-grain semantic information. Second, the relations among the global joints are not fully exploited by the graph local convolution, which may lose the implicit joint relevance. For instance, actions such as running and waving are performed by the co-movement of body parts and joints, e.g., legs and arms, however, they are located far away in physical connection. Inspired by the recent attention mechanism, we propose a multi-grain contextual focus module, termed MCF, to capture the action associated relation information from the body joints and parts. As a result, more explainable representations for different skeleton action sequences can be obtained by MCF. In this study, we follow the common practice that the dense sample strategy of the input skeleton sequences is adopted and this brings much redundancy since number of instances has nothing to do with actions. To reduce the redundancy, a temporal discrimination focus module, termed TDF, is developed to capture the local sensitive points of the temporal dynamics. MCF and TDF are integrated into the standard GCN network to form a unified architecture, named STF-Net. It is noted that STF-Net provides the capability to capture robust movement patterns from these skeleton topology structures, based on multi-grain context aggregation and temporal dependency. Extensive experimental results show that our STF-Net significantly achieves state-of-the-art results on three challenging benchmarks NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and Kinetics-skeleton.
summary: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) are widely adopted in skeleton-based action recognition due to their powerful ability to model data topology. We argue that the performance of recent proposed skeleton-based action recognition methods is limited by the following factors. First, the predefined graph structures are shared throughout the network, lacking the flexibility and capacity to model the multi-grain semantic information. Second, the relations among the global joints are not fully exploited by the graph local convolution, which may lose the implicit joint relevance. For instance, actions such as running and waving are performed by the co-movement of body parts and joints, e.g., legs and arms, however, they are located far away in physical connection. Inspired by the recent attention mechanism, we propose a multi-grain contextual focus module, termed MCF, to capture the action associated relation information from the body joints and parts. As a result, more explainable representations for different skeleton action sequences can be obtained by MCF. In this study, we follow the common practice that the dense sample strategy of the input skeleton sequences is adopted and this brings much redundancy since number of instances has nothing to do with actions. To reduce the redundancy, a temporal discrimination focus module, termed TDF, is developed to capture the local sensitive points of the temporal dynamics. MCF and TDF are integrated into the standard GCN network to form a unified architecture, named STF-Net. It is noted that STF-Net provides the capability to capture robust movement patterns from these skeleton topology structures, based on multi-grain context aggregation and temporal dependency. Extensive experimental results show that our STF-Net significantly achieves state-of-the-art results on three challenging benchmarks NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and Kinetics-skeleton.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）由于其强大的数据拓扑建模能力而被广泛应用于基于骨架的动作识别。我们认为，最近提出的基于骨架的动作识别方法的性能受到以下因素的限制。首先，预定义的图结构在整个网络中共享，缺乏对多粒度语义信息进行建模的灵活性和能力。其次，全局关节之间的关系没有被图局部卷积充分利用，这可能会失去隐式的关节相关性。例如，跑步和挥手等动作是通过身体部位和关节（例如腿和手臂）的共同运动来完成的，然而，它们在物理连接上距离很远。受最近注意力机制的启发，我们提出了一种多粒度上下文焦点模块，称为 MCF，用于从身体关节和部位捕获动作相关的关系信息。因此，MCF 可以获得不同骨架动作序列的更可解释的表示。在本研究中，我们遵循常见的做法，采用输入骨架序列的密集样本策略，这带来了很多冗余，因为实例的数量与动作无关。为了减少冗余，开发了称为 TDF 的时间辨别焦点模块来捕获时间动态的局部敏感点。 MCF和TDF集成到标准GCN网络中，形成统一的架构，命名为STF-Net。值得注意的是，STF-Net 提供了基于多粒度上下文聚合和时间依赖性从这些骨架拓扑结构捕获鲁棒运动模式的能力。大量的实验结果表明，我们的 STF-Net 在三个具有挑战性的基准 NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120 和 Kinetics-sculpture 上显着取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于骨架的动作识别方法STF-Net，通过引入多粒度上下文焦点模块（MCF）和时间判别焦点模块（TDF）改进图卷积网络（GCN）以提升动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于骨架的动作识别方法受限于固定图结构无法建模多粒度语义信息，且局部图卷积未能充分挖掘全局关节间的隐含相关性，导致动作特征表达不足。
AI.method: 设计多粒度上下文焦点模块（MCF）捕捉关节间的动作相关关系，结合时间判别焦点模块（TDF）提取时间动态敏感点，将二者集成至GCN框架形成STF-Net，实现时空特征联合建模。
AI.result: 在NTU RGB+D 60/120和Kinetics-skeleton三个基准数据集上，STF-Net均取得当时最先进的动作识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: STF-Net通过多粒度上下文聚合与时间依赖建模，有效提升了骨架序列的运动模式表达能力，验证了其在复杂动作识别任务中的优越性。

search_text: SpatioTemporal Focus for Skeleton-based Action Recognition 基于骨架的动作识别的时空焦点 Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) are widely adopted in skeleton-based action recognition due to their powerful ability to model data topology. We argue that the performance of recent proposed skeleton-based action recognition methods is limited by the following factors. First, the predefined graph structures are shared throughout the network, lacking the flexibility and capacity to model the multi-grain semantic information. Second, the relations among the global joints are not fully exploited by the graph local convolution, which may lose the implicit joint relevance. For instance, actions such as running and waving are performed by the co-movement of body parts and joints, e.g., legs and arms, however, they are located far away in physical connection. Inspired by the recent attention mechanism, we propose a multi-grain contextual focus module, termed MCF, to capture the action associated relation information from the body joints and parts. As a result, more explainable representations for different skeleton action sequences can be obtained by MCF. In this study, we follow the common practice that the dense sample strategy of the input skeleton sequences is adopted and this brings much redundancy since number of instances has nothing to do with actions. To reduce the redundancy, a temporal discrimination focus module, termed TDF, is developed to capture the local sensitive points of the temporal dynamics. MCF and TDF are integrated into the standard GCN network to form a unified architecture, named STF-Net. It is noted that STF-Net provides the capability to capture robust movement patterns from these skeleton topology structures, based on multi-grain context aggregation and temporal dependency. Extensive experimental results show that our STF-Net significantly achieves state-of-the-art results on three challenging benchmarks NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and Kinetics-skeleton. 图卷积网络（GCN）由于其强大的数据拓扑建模能力而被广泛应用于基于骨架的动作识别。我们认为，最近提出的基于骨架的动作识别方法的性能受到以下因素的限制。首先，预定义的图结构在整个网络中共享，缺乏对多粒度语义信息进行建模的灵活性和能力。其次，全局关节之间的关系没有被图局部卷积充分利用，这可能会失去隐式的关节相关性。例如，跑步和挥手等动作是通过身体部位和关节（例如腿和手臂）的共同运动来完成的，然而，它们在物理连接上距离很远。受最近注意力机制的启发，我们提出了一种多粒度上下文焦点模块，称为 MCF，用于从身体关节和部位捕获动作相关的关系信息。因此，MCF 可以获得不同骨架动作序列的更可解释的表示。在本研究中，我们遵循常见的做法，采用输入骨架序列的密集样本策略，这带来了很多冗余，因为实例的数量与动作无关。为了减少冗余，开发了称为 TDF 的时间辨别焦点模块来捕获时间动态的局部敏感点。 MCF和TDF集成到标准GCN网络中，形成统一的架构，命名为STF-Net。值得注意的是，STF-Net 提供了基于多粒度上下文聚合和时间依赖性从这些骨架拓扑结构捕获鲁棒运动模式的能力。大量的实验结果表明，我们的 STF-Net 在三个具有挑战性的基准 NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120 和 Kinetics-sculpture 上显着取得了最先进的结果。 本文提出了一种基于骨架的动作识别方法STF-Net，通过引入多粒度上下文焦点模块（MCF）和时间判别焦点模块（TDF）改进图卷积网络（GCN）以提升动作识别性能。 Liyu Wu,Can Zhang,Yuexian Zou cs.CV

authors_text: Ziqi Zhang,Yuxin Chen,Zongyang Ma,Zhongang Qi,Chunfeng Yuan,Bing Li,Ying Shan,Weiming Hu
title: CREATE: A Benchmark for Chinese Short Video Retrieval and Title Generation
title_zh: CREATE：中文短视频检索和标题生成的基准
abstract: Previous works of video captioning aim to objectively describe the video's actual content, which lacks subjective and attractive expression, limiting its practical application scenarios. Video titling is intended to achieve this goal, but there is a lack of a proper benchmark. In this paper, we propose to CREATE, the first large-scale Chinese shoRt vidEo retrievAl and Title gEneration benchmark, to facilitate research and application in video titling and video retrieval in Chinese. CREATE consists of a high-quality labeled 210K dataset and two large-scale 3M/10M pre-training datasets, covering 51 categories, 50K+ tags, 537K manually annotated titles and captions, and 10M+ short videos. Based on CREATE, we propose a novel model ALWIG which combines video retrieval and video titling tasks to achieve the purpose of multi-modal ALignment WIth Generation with the help of video tags and a GPT pre-trained model. CREATE opens new directions for facilitating future research and applications on video titling and video retrieval in the field of Chinese short videos.
summary: Previous works of video captioning aim to objectively describe the video's actual content, which lacks subjective and attractive expression, limiting its practical application scenarios. Video titling is intended to achieve this goal, but there is a lack of a proper benchmark. In this paper, we propose to CREATE, the first large-scale Chinese shoRt vidEo retrievAl and Title gEneration benchmark, to facilitate research and application in video titling and video retrieval in Chinese. CREATE consists of a high-quality labeled 210K dataset and two large-scale 3M/10M pre-training datasets, covering 51 categories, 50K+ tags, 537K manually annotated titles and captions, and 10M+ short videos. Based on CREATE, we propose a novel model ALWIG which combines video retrieval and video titling tasks to achieve the purpose of multi-modal ALignment WIth Generation with the help of video tags and a GPT pre-trained model. CREATE opens new directions for facilitating future research and applications on video titling and video retrieval in the field of Chinese short videos.
abstract_zh: 以往的视频字幕工作旨在客观地描述视频的实际内容，缺乏主观性和吸引力的表达，限制了其实际应用场景。视频标题旨在实现这一目标，但缺乏适当的基准。在本文中，我们建议创建第一个大规模中文短视频检索和标题生成基准，以促进中文视频标题和视频检索的研究和应用。 CREATE由一个高质量标记的210K数据集和两个大规模3M/10M预训练数据集组成，涵盖51个类别、50K+标签、537K手动标注标题和字幕以及10M+短视频。基于CREATE，我们提出了一种新颖的模型ALWIG，它结合了视频检索和视频标题任务，借助视频标签和GPT预训练模型来实现多模态对齐与生成的目的。 CREATE为中文短视频领域的视频标题和视频检索的未来研究和应用开辟了新的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CREATE基准，用于中文短视频检索与标题生成，并设计ALWIG模型结合多模态对齐与生成技术。
AI.motivation: 现有视频字幕缺乏主观吸引力，而视频标题生成缺乏有效基准，限制了中文短视频实际应用。
AI.method: 构建包含21万标注数据、3M/10M预训练数据的CREATE基准，设计ALWIG模型通过视频标签与GPT模型实现检索与标题生成任务的多模态对齐。
AI.result: CREATE涵盖51类、5万+标签、53万手动标注标题，ALWIG模型在基准上验证了多任务联合训练的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CREATE为中文短视频标题生成与检索研究提供了首个大规模基准，推动了多模态生成技术的发展。

authors_text: Jiarui Cai,Mingze Xu,Wei Li,Yuanjun Xiong,Wei Xia,Zhuowen Tu,Stefano Soatto
title: MeMOT: Multi-Object Tracking with Memory
title_zh: MeMOT：带记忆的多目标跟踪
abstract: We propose an online tracking algorithm that performs the object detection and data association under a common framework, capable of linking objects after a long time span. This is realized by preserving a large spatio-temporal memory to store the identity embeddings of the tracked objects, and by adaptively referencing and aggregating useful information from the memory as needed. Our model, called MeMOT, consists of three main modules that are all Transformer-based: 1) Hypothesis Generation that produce object proposals in the current video frame; 2) Memory Encoding that extracts the core information from the memory for each tracked object; and 3) Memory Decoding that solves the object detection and data association tasks simultaneously for multi-object tracking. When evaluated on widely adopted MOT benchmark datasets, MeMOT observes very competitive performance.
summary: We propose an online tracking algorithm that performs the object detection and data association under a common framework, capable of linking objects after a long time span. This is realized by preserving a large spatio-temporal memory to store the identity embeddings of the tracked objects, and by adaptively referencing and aggregating useful information from the memory as needed. Our model, called MeMOT, consists of three main modules that are all Transformer-based: 1) Hypothesis Generation that produce object proposals in the current video frame; 2) Memory Encoding that extracts the core information from the memory for each tracked object; and 3) Memory Decoding that solves the object detection and data association tasks simultaneously for multi-object tracking. When evaluated on widely adopted MOT benchmark datasets, MeMOT observes very competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在线跟踪算法，该算法在通用框架下执行对象检测和数据关联，能够在长时间跨度后链接对象。这是通过保留一个大的时空内存来存储跟踪对象的身份嵌入，并根据需要自适应地引用和聚合内存中的有用信息来实现的。我们的模型称为 MeMOT，由三个主要模块组成，这些模块均基于 Transformer：1）假设生成，在当前视频帧中生成对象建议； 2）Memory Encoding，从内存中提取每个跟踪对象的核心信息； 3）内存解码，同时解决多目标跟踪的目标检测和数据关联任务。在广泛采用的 MOT 基准数据集上进行评估时，MeMOT 表现出非常有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MeMOT的在线多目标跟踪算法，通过结合时空记忆模块和Transformer架构，实现跨长时间跨度的对象关联。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标跟踪方法在处理长时间跨度的对象关联时存在困难，尤其在复杂场景下容易丢失目标身份信息。
AI.method: MeMOT包含三个Transformer模块：1) 假设生成模块生成当前帧的目标提案；2) 记忆编码模块提取存储在时空记忆中的目标核心信息；3) 记忆解码模块同时解决目标检测和数据关联任务。
AI.result: 在广泛使用的MOT基准数据集上，MeMOT表现出非常有竞争力的跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过将时空记忆机制与Transformer架构结合，MeMOT有效提升了多目标跟踪中长期身份保持能力，为在线跟踪任务提供了新思路。

search_text: MeMOT: Multi-Object Tracking with Memory MeMOT：带记忆的多目标跟踪 We propose an online tracking algorithm that performs the object detection and data association under a common framework, capable of linking objects after a long time span. This is realized by preserving a large spatio-temporal memory to store the identity embeddings of the tracked objects, and by adaptively referencing and aggregating useful information from the memory as needed. Our model, called MeMOT, consists of three main modules that are all Transformer-based: 1) Hypothesis Generation that produce object proposals in the current video frame; 2) Memory Encoding that extracts the core information from the memory for each tracked object; and 3) Memory Decoding that solves the object detection and data association tasks simultaneously for multi-object tracking. When evaluated on widely adopted MOT benchmark datasets, MeMOT observes very competitive performance. 我们提出了一种在线跟踪算法，该算法在通用框架下执行对象检测和数据关联，能够在长时间跨度后链接对象。这是通过保留一个大的时空内存来存储跟踪对象的身份嵌入，并根据需要自适应地引用和聚合内存中的有用信息来实现的。我们的模型称为 MeMOT，由三个主要模块组成，这些模块均基于 Transformer：1）假设生成，在当前视频帧中生成对象建议； 2）Memory Encoding，从内存中提取每个跟踪对象的核心信息； 3）内存解码，同时解决多目标跟踪的目标检测和数据关联任务。在广泛采用的 MOT 基准数据集上进行评估时，MeMOT 表现出非常有竞争力的性能。 本文提出了一种名为MeMOT的在线多目标跟踪算法，通过结合时空记忆模块和Transformer架构，实现跨长时间跨度的对象关联。 Jiarui Cai,Mingze Xu,Wei Li,Yuanjun Xiong,Wei Xia,Zhuowen Tu,Stefano Soatto cs.CV

authors_text: Ayako Yamamoto,Toshio Irino,Shoko Araki,Kenichi Arai,Atsunori Ogawa,Keisuke Kinoshita,Tomohiro Nakatani
title: Effective data screening technique for crowdsourced speech intelligibility experiments: Evaluation with IRM-based speech enhancement
title_zh: 众包语音清晰度实验的有效数据筛选技术：基于 IRM 的语音增强评估
comment: This paper was submitted to APSIPA ASC 2022 (https://www.apsipa2022.org). The original title [v1] was "Subjective intelligibility of speech sounds enhanced by ideal ratio mask via crowdsourced remote experiments with effective data screening."
comments: This paper was submitted to APSIPA ASC 2022 (https://www.apsipa2022.org). The original title [v1] was "Subjective intelligibility of speech sounds enhanced by ideal ratio mask via crowdsourced remote experiments with effective data screening."
abstract: It is essential to perform speech intelligibility (SI) experiments with human listeners in order to evaluate objective intelligibility measures for developing effective speech enhancement and noise reduction algorithms. Recently, crowdsourced remote testing has become a popular means for collecting a massive amount and variety of data at a relatively small cost and in a short time. However, careful data screening is essential for attaining reliable SI data. We performed SI experiments on speech enhanced by an "oracle" ideal ratio mask (IRM) in a well-controlled laboratory and in crowdsourced remote environments that could not be controlled directly. We introduced simple tone pip tests, in which participants were asked to report the number of audible tone pips, to estimate their listening levels above audible thresholds. The tone pip tests were very effective for data screening to reduce the variability of crowdsourced remote results so that the laboratory results would become similar. The results also demonstrated the SI of an oracle IRM, giving us the upper limit of the mask-based single-channel speech enhancement.
summary: It is essential to perform speech intelligibility (SI) experiments with human listeners in order to evaluate objective intelligibility measures for developing effective speech enhancement and noise reduction algorithms. Recently, crowdsourced remote testing has become a popular means for collecting a massive amount and variety of data at a relatively small cost and in a short time. However, careful data screening is essential for attaining reliable SI data. We performed SI experiments on speech enhanced by an "oracle" ideal ratio mask (IRM) in a well-controlled laboratory and in crowdsourced remote environments that could not be controlled directly. We introduced simple tone pip tests, in which participants were asked to report the number of audible tone pips, to estimate their listening levels above audible thresholds. The tone pip tests were very effective for data screening to reduce the variability of crowdsourced remote results so that the laboratory results would become similar. The results also demonstrated the SI of an oracle IRM, giving us the upper limit of the mask-based single-channel speech enhancement.
abstract_zh: 有必要对人类听众进行语音清晰度 (SI) 实验，以评估客观的清晰度测量，从而开发有效的语音增强和降噪算法。近年来，众包远程测试已成为一种流行的手段，可以在短时间内以相对较低的成本收集大量、多种数据。然而，仔细的数据筛选对于获得可靠的 SI 数据至关重要。我们在控制良好的实验室和无法直接控制的众包远程环境中对通过“oracle”理想比率掩模 (IRM) 增强的语音进行了 SI 实验。我们引入了简单的音调测试，其中参与者被要求报告可听音调的数量，以估计他们的听力水平高于可听阈值。音点测试对于数据筛选非常有效，可以减少众包远程结果的可变性，从而使实验室结果变得相似。结果还证明了 oracle IRM 的 SI，为我们提供了基于掩码的单通道语音增强的上限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种有效的数据筛选技术，用于众包语音可理解性实验，并评估基于理想比率掩码（IRM）的语音增强效果。
AI.motivation: 众包远程测试虽能高效收集数据，但数据可靠性低，需筛选方法确保结果有效性，同时需评估IRM在语音增强中的性能上限。
AI.method: 通过实验室与远程环境对比实验，引入音调pip测试筛选参与者听力水平，减少数据变异并验证IRM增强效果。
AI.result: 音调测试显著降低远程数据变异，使实验室与远程结果趋近；验证了IRM在单通道语音增强中的可理解性上限。
AI.conclusion: 音调pip测试有效提升众包数据可靠性，且明确了IRM作为语音增强性能上限的参考价值。

authors_text: Keyu An,Huahuan Zheng,Zhijian Ou,Hongyu Xiang,Ke Ding,Guanglu Wan
title: CUSIDE: Chunking, Simulating Future Context and Decoding for Streaming ASR
title_zh: CUSIDE：流式 ASR 的分块、模拟未来上下文和解码
abstract: History and future contextual information are known to be important for accurate acoustic modeling. However, acquiring future context brings latency for streaming ASR. In this paper, we propose a new framework - Chunking, Simulating Future Context and Decoding (CUSIDE) for streaming speech recognition. A new simulation module is introduced to recursively simulate the future contextual frames, without waiting for future context. The simulation module is jointly trained with the ASR model using a self-supervised loss; the ASR model is optimized with the usual ASR loss, e.g., CTC-CRF as used in our experiments. Experiments show that, compared to using real future frames as right context, using simulated future context can drastically reduce latency while maintaining recognition accuracy. With CUSIDE, we obtain new state-of-the-art streaming ASR results on the AISHELL-1 dataset.
summary: History and future contextual information are known to be important for accurate acoustic modeling. However, acquiring future context brings latency for streaming ASR. In this paper, we propose a new framework - Chunking, Simulating Future Context and Decoding (CUSIDE) for streaming speech recognition. A new simulation module is introduced to recursively simulate the future contextual frames, without waiting for future context. The simulation module is jointly trained with the ASR model using a self-supervised loss; the ASR model is optimized with the usual ASR loss, e.g., CTC-CRF as used in our experiments. Experiments show that, compared to using real future frames as right context, using simulated future context can drastically reduce latency while maintaining recognition accuracy. With CUSIDE, we obtain new state-of-the-art streaming ASR results on the AISHELL-1 dataset.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，历史和未来的上下文信息对于准确的声学建模非常重要。然而，获取未来上下文会给流式 ASR 带来延迟。在本文中，我们提出了一个用于流式语音识别的新框架 - 分块、模拟未来上下文和解码（CUSIDE）。引入了一个新的模拟模块来递归地模拟未来的上下文框架，而无需等待未来的上下文。模拟模块使用自监督损失与ASR模型联合训练； ASR 模型使用通常的 ASR 损失进行优化，例如我们实验中使用的 CTC-CRF。实验表明，与使用真实的未来帧作为正确的上下文相比，使用模拟的未来上下文可以大大减少延迟，同时保持识别准确性。借助 CUSIDE，我们在 AISHELL-1 数据集上获得了最新的流式 ASR 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CUSIDE框架，通过模拟未来上下文解决流式语音识别中的延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 流式ASR需要平衡实时性与准确性，传统方法依赖真实未来上下文导致延迟，而获取未来信息会增加计算负担。
AI.method: 设计递归模拟模块生成未来上下文帧，与ASR模型联合训练，使用自监督损失优化模拟模块，CTC-CRF损失训练识别模型。
AI.result: 在AISHELL-1数据集上实现新SOTA结果，相比真实未来上下文方法显著降低延迟且保持识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: CUSIDE通过模拟未来上下文有效缓解流式ASR延迟问题，在实时性与准确性间取得平衡。

authors_text: Keyu An,Ji Xiao,Zhijian Ou
title: Exploiting Single-Channel Speech for Multi-Channel End-to-End Speech Recognition: A Comparative Study
title_zh: 利用单通道语音进行多通道端到端语音识别：比较研究
comment: Accepted by ISCSLP 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.02670
comments: Accepted by ISCSLP 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.02670
abstract: Recently, the end-to-end training approach for multi-channel ASR has shown its effectiveness, which usually consists of a beamforming front-end and a recognition back-end. However, the end-to-end training becomes more difficult due to the integration of multiple modules, particularly considering that multi-channel speech data recorded in real environments are limited in size. This raises the demand to exploit the single-channel data for multi-channel end-to-end ASR. In this paper, we systematically compare the performance of three schemes to exploit external single-channel data for multi-channel end-to-end ASR, namely back-end pre-training, data scheduling, and data simulation, under different settings such as the sizes of the single-channel data and the choices of the front-end. Extensive experiments on CHiME-4 and AISHELL-4 datasets demonstrate that while all three methods improve the multi-channel end-to-end speech recognition performance, data simulation outperforms the other two, at the cost of longer training time. Data scheduling outperforms back-end pre-training marginally but nearly consistently, presumably because that in the pre-training stage, the back-end tends to overfit on the single-channel data, especially when the single-channel data size is small.
summary: Recently, the end-to-end training approach for multi-channel ASR has shown its effectiveness, which usually consists of a beamforming front-end and a recognition back-end. However, the end-to-end training becomes more difficult due to the integration of multiple modules, particularly considering that multi-channel speech data recorded in real environments are limited in size. This raises the demand to exploit the single-channel data for multi-channel end-to-end ASR. In this paper, we systematically compare the performance of three schemes to exploit external single-channel data for multi-channel end-to-end ASR, namely back-end pre-training, data scheduling, and data simulation, under different settings such as the sizes of the single-channel data and the choices of the front-end. Extensive experiments on CHiME-4 and AISHELL-4 datasets demonstrate that while all three methods improve the multi-channel end-to-end speech recognition performance, data simulation outperforms the other two, at the cost of longer training time. Data scheduling outperforms back-end pre-training marginally but nearly consistently, presumably because that in the pre-training stage, the back-end tends to overfit on the single-channel data, especially when the single-channel data size is small.
abstract_zh: 最近，多通道 ASR 的端到端训练方法已显示出其有效性，该方法通常由波束成形前端和识别后端组成。然而，由于多个模块的集成，端到端训练变得更加困难，特别是考虑到真实环境中记录的多通道语音数据的大小有限。这就提出了利用单通道数据进行多通道端到端 ASR 的需求。在本文中，我们系统地比较了在单通道数据大小和前端选择等不同设置下，利用外部单通道数据进行多通道端到端 ASR 的三种方案（即后端预训练、数据调度和数据模拟）的性能。对 CHiME-4 和 AISHELL-4 数据集的大量实验表明，虽然所有三种方法都提高了多通道端到端语音识别性能，但数据模拟优于其他两种方法，但代价是训练时间更长。数据调度稍微优于后端预训练，但几乎一致，可能是因为在预训练阶段，后端往往对单通道数据过度拟合，特别是当单通道数据量较小时。

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了三种利用单通道数据提升多通道端到端语音识别性能的方案，包括后端预训练、数据调度和数据模拟。
AI.motivation: 多通道语音识别数据在真实环境中有限，而端到端训练因模块集成复杂度高，需探索如何有效利用单通道数据提升性能。
AI.method: 在CHiME-4和AISHELL-4数据集上，对比分析了三种方法：后端预训练、数据调度和数据模拟，并测试不同单通道数据规模及前端选择的影响。
AI.result: 数据模拟方法性能最优但训练耗时更长；数据调度在小规模单通道数据下略优于后端预训练，因预训练易导致过拟合。
AI.conclusion: 数据模拟是提升多通道端到端语音识别的有效方案，但需权衡训练成本；数据调度在单通道数据有限时表现更稳健。

search_text: Exploiting Single-Channel Speech for Multi-Channel End-to-End Speech Recognition: A Comparative Study 利用单通道语音进行多通道端到端语音识别：比较研究 Recently, the end-to-end training approach for multi-channel ASR has shown its effectiveness, which usually consists of a beamforming front-end and a recognition back-end. However, the end-to-end training becomes more difficult due to the integration of multiple modules, particularly considering that multi-channel speech data recorded in real environments are limited in size. This raises the demand to exploit the single-channel data for multi-channel end-to-end ASR. In this paper, we systematically compare the performance of three schemes to exploit external single-channel data for multi-channel end-to-end ASR, namely back-end pre-training, data scheduling, and data simulation, under different settings such as the sizes of the single-channel data and the choices of the front-end. Extensive experiments on CHiME-4 and AISHELL-4 datasets demonstrate that while all three methods improve the multi-channel end-to-end speech recognition performance, data simulation outperforms the other two, at the cost of longer training time. Data scheduling outperforms back-end pre-training marginally but nearly consistently, presumably because that in the pre-training stage, the back-end tends to overfit on the single-channel data, especially when the single-channel data size is small. 最近，多通道 ASR 的端到端训练方法已显示出其有效性，该方法通常由波束成形前端和识别后端组成。然而，由于多个模块的集成，端到端训练变得更加困难，特别是考虑到真实环境中记录的多通道语音数据的大小有限。这就提出了利用单通道数据进行多通道端到端 ASR 的需求。在本文中，我们系统地比较了在单通道数据大小和前端选择等不同设置下，利用外部单通道数据进行多通道端到端 ASR 的三种方案（即后端预训练、数据调度和数据模拟）的性能。对 CHiME-4 和 AISHELL-4 数据集的大量实验表明，虽然所有三种方法都提高了多通道端到端语音识别性能，但数据模拟优于其他两种方法，但代价是训练时间更长。数据调度稍微优于后端预训练，但几乎一致，可能是因为在预训练阶段，后端往往对单通道数据过度拟合，特别是当单通道数据量较小时。 本文系统比较了三种利用单通道数据提升多通道端到端语音识别性能的方案，包括后端预训练、数据调度和数据模拟。 Keyu An,Ji Xiao,Zhijian Ou eess.AS,cs.CL

authors_text: Rongsen Chen,Fang-Lue Zhang,Simon Finnie,Andrew Chalmers,Teahyun Rhee
title: Casual 6-DoF: free-viewpoint panorama using a handheld 360 camera
title_zh: 休闲 6-DoF：使用手持式 360 度相机拍摄自由视角全景
abstract: Six degrees-of-freedom (6-DoF) video provides telepresence by enabling users to move around in the captured scene with a wide field of regard. Compared to methods requiring sophisticated camera setups, the image-based rendering method based on photogrammetry can work with images captured with any poses, which is more suitable for casual users. However, existing image-based rendering methods are based on perspective images. When used to reconstruct 6-DoF views, it often requires capturing hundreds of images, making data capture a tedious and time-consuming process. In contrast to traditional perspective images, 360° images capture the entire surrounding view in a single shot, thus, providing a faster capturing process for 6-DoF view reconstruction. This paper presents a novel method to provide 6-DoF experiences over a wide area using an unstructured collection of 360° panoramas captured by a conventional 360° camera. Our method consists of 360° data capturing, novel depth estimation to produce a high-quality spherical depth panorama, and high-fidelity free-viewpoint generation. We compared our method against state-of-the-art methods, using data captured in various environments. Our method shows better visual quality and robustness in the tested scenes.
summary: Six degrees-of-freedom (6-DoF) video provides telepresence by enabling users to move around in the captured scene with a wide field of regard. Compared to methods requiring sophisticated camera setups, the image-based rendering method based on photogrammetry can work with images captured with any poses, which is more suitable for casual users. However, existing image-based rendering methods are based on perspective images. When used to reconstruct 6-DoF views, it often requires capturing hundreds of images, making data capture a tedious and time-consuming process. In contrast to traditional perspective images, 360° images capture the entire surrounding view in a single shot, thus, providing a faster capturing process for 6-DoF view reconstruction. This paper presents a novel method to provide 6-DoF experiences over a wide area using an unstructured collection of 360° panoramas captured by a conventional 360° camera. Our method consists of 360° data capturing, novel depth estimation to produce a high-quality spherical depth panorama, and high-fidelity free-viewpoint generation. We compared our method against state-of-the-art methods, using data captured in various environments. Our method shows better visual quality and robustness in the tested scenes.
abstract_zh: 六自由度 (6-DoF) 视频使用户能够在捕获的场景中以广阔的视野移动，从而提供远程呈现效果。与需要复杂相机设置的方法相比，基于摄影测量的图像渲染方法可以处理以任何姿势捕获的图像，这更适合休闲用户。然而，现有的基于图像的渲染方法是基于透视图像的。当用于重建 6-DoF 视图时，通常需要捕获数百张图像，使得数据捕获成为一个繁琐且耗时的过程。与传统的透视图像相比，360° 图像在一次拍摄中捕获整个周围视图，从而为 6-DoF 视图重建提供更快的捕获过程。本文提出了一种新颖的方法，使用传统 360° 相机捕获的非结构化 360° 全景图集合在广阔的区域内提供 6-DoF 体验。我们的方法包括 360° 数据捕获、用于生成高质量球形深度全景图的新颖深度估计以及高保真自由视点生成。我们使用在各种环境中捕获的数据将我们的方法与最先进的方法进行比较。我们的方法在测试场景中显示出更好的视觉质量和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于手持360相机的非结构化全景图像集合，实现大范围6自由度（6-DoF）自由视角全景体验的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于透视图像的6-DoF重建方法需拍摄数百张图像，过程繁琐；而360°图像单次拍摄可覆盖全视角，能显著提升6-DoF重建效率。
AI.method: 包含360°数据采集、新型深度估计生成高质量球面深度图，以及高保真自由视角图像生成三个核心步骤。
AI.result: 在多种场景测试中，该方法在视觉质量和鲁棒性方面优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过360°全景图像实现了更高效、更高质量的6-DoF自由视角重建，适合普通用户使用常规360相机进行大范围场景捕捉。

authors_text: Feng Cheng,Mingze Xu,Yuanjun Xiong,Hao Chen,Xinyu Li,Wei Li,Wei Xia
title: Stochastic Backpropagation: A Memory Efficient Strategy for Training Video Models
title_zh: 随机反向传播：训练视频模型的内存高效策略
abstract: We propose a memory efficient method, named Stochastic Backpropagation (SBP), for training deep neural networks on videos. It is based on the finding that gradients from incomplete execution for backpropagation can still effectively train the models with minimal accuracy loss, which attributes to the high redundancy of video. SBP keeps all forward paths but randomly and independently removes the backward paths for each network layer in each training step. It reduces the GPU memory cost by eliminating the need to cache activation values corresponding to the dropped backward paths, whose amount can be controlled by an adjustable keep-ratio. Experiments show that SBP can be applied to a wide range of models for video tasks, leading to up to 80.0% GPU memory saving and 10% training speedup with less than 1% accuracy drop on action recognition and temporal action detection.
summary: We propose a memory efficient method, named Stochastic Backpropagation (SBP), for training deep neural networks on videos. It is based on the finding that gradients from incomplete execution for backpropagation can still effectively train the models with minimal accuracy loss, which attributes to the high redundancy of video. SBP keeps all forward paths but randomly and independently removes the backward paths for each network layer in each training step. It reduces the GPU memory cost by eliminating the need to cache activation values corresponding to the dropped backward paths, whose amount can be controlled by an adjustable keep-ratio. Experiments show that SBP can be applied to a wide range of models for video tasks, leading to up to 80.0% GPU memory saving and 10% training speedup with less than 1% accuracy drop on action recognition and temporal action detection.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种名为随机反向传播（SBP）的内存高效方法，用于在视频上训练深度神经网络。它基于这样的发现：反向传播不完整执行的梯度仍然可以以最小的精度损失有效地训练模型，这归因于视频的高冗余度。 SBP 在每个训练步骤中保留所有前向路径，但随机且独立地删除每个网络层的后向路径。它无需缓存与删除的反向路径相对应的激活值，从而降低了 GPU 内存成本，其数量可以通过可调整的保留比率来控制。实验表明，SBP 可应用于多种视频任务模型，在动作识别和时间动作检测方面，可节省高达 80.0% 的 GPU 内存和 10% 的训练加速，而准确率下降不到 1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为随机反向传播（SBP）的内存高效方法，用于训练视频模型。
AI.motivation: 视频数据具有高冗余性，传统反向传播需缓存所有激活值导致GPU内存消耗过大，亟需更高效的训练策略。
AI.method: SBP在每次训练步骤中随机独立移除各网络层的反向传播路径，保留所有前向路径，通过可调保留比例控制内存占用。
AI.result: 实验表明，SBP在动作识别和时序动作检测任务中实现最高80.0%的GPU内存节省和10%的训练加速，准确率下降不足1%。
AI.conclusion: SBP通过利用视频冗余性有效平衡了内存效率与模型性能，为大规模视频模型训练提供了可行方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为随机反向传播（SBP）的内存高效方法，用于训练视频模型。
motivation: 视频数据具有高冗余性，传统反向传播需缓存所有激活值导致GPU内存消耗过大，亟需更高效的训练策略。
method: SBP在每次训练步骤中随机独立移除各网络层的反向传播路径，保留所有前向路径，通过可调保留比例控制内存占用。
result: 实验表明，SBP在动作识别和时序动作检测任务中实现最高80.0%的GPU内存节省和10%的训练加速，准确率下降不足1%。
conclusion: SBP通过利用视频冗余性有效平衡了内存效率与模型性能，为大规模视频模型训练提供了可行方案。
search_text: Stochastic Backpropagation: A Memory Efficient Strategy for Training Video Models 随机反向传播：训练视频模型的内存高效策略 We propose a memory efficient method, named Stochastic Backpropagation (SBP), for training deep neural networks on videos. It is based on the finding that gradients from incomplete execution for backpropagation can still effectively train the models with minimal accuracy loss, which attributes to the high redundancy of video. SBP keeps all forward paths but randomly and independently removes the backward paths for each network layer in each training step. It reduces the GPU memory cost by eliminating the need to cache activation values corresponding to the dropped backward paths, whose amount can be controlled by an adjustable keep-ratio. Experiments show that SBP can be applied to a wide range of models for video tasks, leading to up to 80.0% GPU memory saving and 10% training speedup with less than 1% accuracy drop on action recognition and temporal action detection. 我们提出了一种名为随机反向传播（SBP）的内存高效方法，用于在视频上训练深度神经网络。它基于这样的发现：反向传播不完整执行的梯度仍然可以以最小的精度损失有效地训练模型，这归因于视频的高冗余度。 SBP 在每个训练步骤中保留所有前向路径，但随机且独立地删除每个网络层的后向路径。它无需缓存与删除的反向路径相对应的激活值，从而降低了 GPU 内存成本，其数量可以通过可调整的保留比率来控制。实验表明，SBP 可应用于多种视频任务模型，在动作识别和时间动作检测方面，可节省高达 80.0% 的 GPU 内存和 10% 的训练加速，而准确率下降不到 1%。 本文提出了一种名为随机反向传播（SBP）的内存高效方法，用于训练视频模型。 Feng Cheng,Mingze Xu,Yuanjun Xiong,Hao Chen,Xinyu Li,Wei Li,Wei Xia cs.CV

authors_text: Yuzhe Yang,Liwu Xu,Leida Li,Nan Qie,Yaqian Li,Peng Zhang,Yandong Guo
title: Personalized Image Aesthetics Assessment with Rich Attributes
title_zh: 丰富属性的个性化形象美学评估
abstract: Personalized image aesthetics assessment (PIAA) is challenging due to its highly subjective nature. People's aesthetic tastes depend on diversified factors, including image characteristics and subject characters. The existing PIAA databases are limited in terms of annotation diversity, especially the subject aspect, which can no longer meet the increasing demands of PIAA research. To solve the dilemma, we conduct so far, the most comprehensive subjective study of personalized image aesthetics and introduce a new Personalized image Aesthetics database with Rich Attributes (PARA), which consists of 31,220 images with annotations by 438 subjects. PARA features wealthy annotations, including 9 image-oriented objective attributes and 4 human-oriented subjective attributes. In addition, desensitized subject information, such as personality traits, is also provided to support study of PIAA and user portraits. A comprehensive analysis of the annotation data is provided and statistic study indicates that the aesthetic preferences can be mirrored by proposed subjective attributes. We also propose a conditional PIAA model by utilizing subject information as conditional prior. Experimental results indicate that the conditional PIAA model can outperform the control group, which is also the first attempt to demonstrate how image aesthetics and subject characters interact to produce the intricate personalized tastes on image aesthetics. We believe the database and the associated analysis would be useful for conducting next-generation PIAA study. The project page of PARA can be found at: https://cv-datasets.institutecv.com/#/data-sets.

In addition, desensitized subject information, such as personality traits, is also provided to support study of PIAA and user portraits. A comprehensive analysis of the annotation data is provided and statistic study indicates that the aesthetic preferences can be mirrored by proposed subjective attributes. We also propose a conditional PIAA model by utilizing subject information as conditional prior. Experimental results indicate that the conditional PIAA model can outperform the control group, which is also the first attempt to demonstrate how image aesthetics and subject characters interact to produce the intricate personalized tastes on image aesthetics. We believe the database and the associated analysis would be useful for conducting next-generation PIAA study. The project page of PARA can be found at: https://cv-datasets.institutecv.com/#/data-sets.
abstract_zh: 个性化图像美学评估（PIAA）由于其高度主观性而具有挑战性。人们的审美趣味取决于多种因素，包括形象特征和主体特征。现有的PIAA数据库在注释多样性方面受到限制，尤其是学科方面，已经不能满足PIAA研究日益增长的需求。为了解决这个困境，我们进行了迄今为止最全面的个性化图像美学主观研究，并引入了一个新的具有丰富属性的个性化图像美学数据库（PARA），该数据库由 31,220 张图像组成，并由 438 名受试者进行注释。 PARA具有丰富的标注功能，包括9个面向图像的客观属性和4个面向人的主观属性。此外，还提供脱敏的受试者信息，例如人格特征，以支持PIAA和用户画像的研究。提供了对注释数据的综合分析，统计研究表明审美偏好可以通过提出的主观属性来反映。我们还利用主题信息作为条件先验提出了一个条件 PIAA 模型。实验结果表明，条件PIAA模型可以优于对照组，这也是首次尝试展示图像美学和主体特征如何相互作用以产生复杂的图像美学个性化品味。我们相信该数据库和相关分析将有助于开展下一代 PIAA 研究。 PARA 的项目页面可以在：https://cv-datasets.institutecv.com/#/data-sets 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个包含丰富属性的个性化图像美学评估数据库PARA，并设计条件化模型以提升个性化美学评估效果。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化图像美学评估数据集在标注多样性（尤其是主体属性）方面存在局限，难以满足研究需求。
AI.method: 通过大规模主观实验构建包含31,220张图像的PARA数据库，标注9个客观属性和4个主观属性，并提出利用主体信息作为条件先验的条件化评估模型。
AI.result: 统计分析验证主观属性可反映审美偏好，条件化模型在对照实验中表现更优，首次揭示图像美学与主体特征的交互作用机制。
AI.conclusion: PARA数据库及分析方法为下一代个性化图像美学研究提供了重要基础。
