authors_text: Jie Song,Meiyu Liang,Zhe Xue,Junping Du,Kou Feifei
title: An unsupervised cluster-level based method for learning node representations of heterogeneous graphs in scientific papers
title_zh: 一种基于无监督簇级的方法，用于学习科学论文中异构图的节点表示
abstract: Learning knowledge representation of scientific paper data is a problem to be solved, and how to learn the representation of paper nodes in scientific paper heterogeneous network is the core to solve this problem. This paper proposes an unsupervised cluster-level scientific paper heterogeneous graph node representation learning method (UCHL), aiming at obtaining the representation of nodes (authors, institutions, papers, etc.) in the heterogeneous graph of scientific papers. Based on the heterogeneous graph representation, this paper performs link prediction on the entire heterogeneous graph and obtains the relationship between the edges of the nodes, that is, the relationship between papers and papers. Experiments results show that the proposed method achieves excellent performance on multiple evaluation metrics on real scientific paper datasets.
summary: Learning knowledge representation of scientific paper data is a problem to be solved, and how to learn the representation of paper nodes in scientific paper heterogeneous network is the core to solve this problem. This paper proposes an unsupervised cluster-level scientific paper heterogeneous graph node representation learning method (UCHL), aiming at obtaining the representation of nodes (authors, institutions, papers, etc.) in the heterogeneous graph of scientific papers. Based on the heterogeneous graph representation, this paper performs link prediction on the entire heterogeneous graph and obtains the relationship between the edges of the nodes, that is, the relationship between papers and papers. Experiments results show that the proposed method achieves excellent performance on multiple evaluation metrics on real scientific paper datasets.
abstract_zh: 学习科学论文数据的知识表示是一个需要解决的问题，而如何学习科学论文异构网络中论文节点的表示是解决该问题的核心。本文提出一种无监督集群级科技论文异构图节点表示学习方法（UCHL），旨在获取科技论文异构图中节点（作者、机构、论文等）的表示。本文基于异构图表示，对整个异构图进行链路预测，得到节点边之间的关系，即论文与论文之间的关系。实验结果表明，该方法在真实科学论文数据集上的多个评估指标上取得了优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无监督聚类方法，用于学习科学论文异构图中节点（如作者、机构、论文）的表示
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效捕捉科学论文异构网络中多类型节点的复杂关系，需改进表示学习方法以提高性能
AI.method: 提出无监督聚类级方法UCHL，结合异构图表示与链接预测，学习节点表示并预测节点间关系
AI.result: 在真实科学论文数据集上，UCHL在多个评估指标中表现优异
AI.conclusion: UCHL方法有效提升了科学论文异构图节点表示学习的效果，为相关研究提供新思路

authors_text: Yuma Koizumi,Heiga Zen,Kohei Yatabe,Nanxin Chen,Michiel Bacchiani
title: SpecGrad: Diffusion Probabilistic Model based Neural Vocoder with Adaptive Noise Spectral Shaping
title_zh: SpecGrad：基于扩散概率模型的神经声码器，具有自适应噪声频谱整形
abstract: Neural vocoder using denoising diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) has been improved by adaptation of the diffusion noise distribution to given acoustic features. In this study, we propose SpecGrad that adapts the diffusion noise so that its time-varying spectral envelope becomes close to the conditioning log-mel spectrogram. This adaptation by time-varying filtering improves the sound quality especially in the high-frequency bands. It is processed in the time-frequency domain to keep the computational cost almost the same as the conventional DDPM-based neural vocoders. Experimental results showed that SpecGrad generates higher-fidelity speech waveform than conventional DDPM-based neural vocoders in both analysis-synthesis and speech enhancement scenarios. Audio demos are available at wavegrad.github.io/specgrad/.
summary: Neural vocoder using denoising diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) has been improved by adaptation of the diffusion noise distribution to given acoustic features. In this study, we propose SpecGrad that adapts the diffusion noise so that its time-varying spectral envelope becomes close to the conditioning log-mel spectrogram. This adaptation by time-varying filtering improves the sound quality especially in the high-frequency bands. It is processed in the time-frequency domain to keep the computational cost almost the same as the conventional DDPM-based neural vocoders. Experimental results showed that SpecGrad generates higher-fidelity speech waveform than conventional DDPM-based neural vocoders in both analysis-synthesis and speech enhancement scenarios. Audio demos are available at wavegrad.github.io/specgrad/.
abstract_zh: 通过使扩散噪声分布适应给定的声学特征，使用去噪扩散概率模型 (DDPM) 的神经声码器得到了改进。在这项研究中，我们提出了 SpecGrad 来适应扩散噪声，使其时变频谱包络变得接近条件对数梅尔频谱图。这种时变滤波的适应提高了声音质量，尤其是在高频段。它在时频域中进行处理，以保持计算成本与传统的基于 DDPM 的神经声码器几乎相同。实验结果表明，在分析合成和语音增强场景中，SpecGrad 都能比传统的基于 DDPM 的神经声码器生成更高保真度的语音波形。音频演示可在wavegrad.github.io/specgrad/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散概率模型的神经声码器SpecGrad，通过自适应噪声频谱成形提高语音波形的保真度。
AI.motivation: 传统DDPM声码器在高频段音质不足，需通过自适应噪声频谱成形提升语音质量。
AI.method: 通过时间变化的频谱包络适应，利用时频域处理保持计算成本与传统DDPM相当。

search_text: SpecGrad: Diffusion Probabilistic Model based Neural Vocoder with Adaptive Noise Spectral Shaping SpecGrad：基于扩散概率模型的神经声码器，具有自适应噪声频谱整形 Neural vocoder using denoising diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) has been improved by adaptation of the diffusion noise distribution to given acoustic features. In this study, we propose SpecGrad that adapts the diffusion noise so that its time-varying spectral envelope becomes close to the conditioning log-mel spectrogram. This adaptation by time-varying filtering improves the sound quality especially in the high-frequency bands. It is processed in the time-frequency domain to keep the computational cost almost the same as the conventional DDPM-based neural vocoders. Experimental results showed that SpecGrad generates higher-fidelity speech waveform than conventional DDPM-based neural vocoders in both analysis-synthesis and speech enhancement scenarios. Audio demos are available at wavegrad.github.io/specgrad/. 通过使扩散噪声分布适应给定的声学特征，使用去噪扩散概率模型 (DDPM) 的神经声码器得到了改进。在这项研究中，我们提出了 SpecGrad 来适应扩散噪声，使其时变频谱包络变得接近条件对数梅尔频谱图。这种时变滤波的适应提高了声音质量，尤其是在高频段。它在时频域中进行处理，以保持计算成本与传统的基于 DDPM 的神经声码器几乎相同。实验结果表明，在分析合成和语音增强场景中，SpecGrad 都能比传统的基于 DDPM 的神经声码器生成更高保真度的语音波形。音频演示可在wavegrad.github.io/specgrad/ 获取。 本文提出了一种基于扩散概率模型的神经声码器SpecGrad，通过自适应噪声频谱成形提高语音波形的保真度。 Yuma Koizumi,Heiga Zen,Kohei Yatabe,Nanxin Chen,Michiel Bacchiani eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD,stat.ML

authors_text: Lauri Tavi,Tomi Kinnunen,Rosa González Hautamäki
title: Improving speaker de-identification with functional data analysis of f0 trajectories
title_zh: 通过 f0 轨迹的功能数据分析改进说话人去识别
abstract: Due to a constantly increasing amount of speech data that is stored in different types of databases, voice privacy has become a major concern. To respond to such concern, speech researchers have developed various methods for speaker de-identification. The state-of-the-art solutions utilize deep learning solutions which can be effective but might be unavailable or impractical to apply for, for example, under-resourced languages. Formant modification is a simpler, yet effective method for speaker de-identification which requires no training data. Still, remaining intonational patterns in formant-anonymized speech may contain speaker-dependent cues. This study introduces a novel speaker de-identification method, which, in addition to simple formant shifts, manipulates f0 trajectories based on functional data analysis. The proposed speaker de-identification method will conceal plausibly identifying pitch characteristics in a phonetically controllable manner and improve formant-based speaker de-identification up to 25%.
summary: Due to a constantly increasing amount of speech data that is stored in different types of databases, voice privacy has become a major concern. To respond to such concern, speech researchers have developed various methods for speaker de-identification. The state-of-the-art solutions utilize deep learning solutions which can be effective but might be unavailable or impractical to apply for, for example, under-resourced languages. Formant modification is a simpler, yet effective method for speaker de-identification which requires no training data. Still, remaining intonational patterns in formant-anonymized speech may contain speaker-dependent cues. This study introduces a novel speaker de-identification method, which, in addition to simple formant shifts, manipulates f0 trajectories based on functional data analysis. The proposed speaker de-identification method will conceal plausibly identifying pitch characteristics in a phonetically controllable manner and improve formant-based speaker de-identification up to 25%.
abstract_zh: 由于存储在不同类型数据库中的语音数据量不断增加，语音隐私已成为一个主要问题。为了应对这种担忧，语音研究人员开发了各种说话人去识别方法。最先进的解决方案利用深度学习解决方案，该解决方案可能有效，但可能无法或不切实际地应用于例如资源贫乏的语言。共振峰修改是一种更简单但有效的说话人去识别方法，不需要训练数据。尽管如此，共振峰匿名语音中剩余的语调模式可能包含依赖于说话者的线索。本研究引入了一种新颖的说话人去识别方法，该方法除了简单的共振峰移位之外，还基于功能数据分析来操纵 f0 轨迹。所提出的说话人去识别方法将以语音可控的方式隐藏合理识别的音调特征，并将基于共振峰的说话人去识别提高高达 25%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合共振峰修改与f0轨迹功能数据分析的说话人去标识化方法，通过操控音高特征提升隐私保护效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法对低资源语言不适用，传统共振峰修改无法完全消除语音中的说话人特定线索，需更有效的去标识化方案。
AI.method: 在共振峰频移基础上，采用功能数据分析技术对基频轨迹进行建模与变换，以语音学可控方式消除可识别的音高特征。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法使共振峰去标识化性能提升最高25%，有效降低说话人识别风险。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无监督方法通过音高轨迹操控增强了去标识化效果，为资源受限场景提供了更安全的语音隐私保护方案。

authors_text: Mahdi S. Hosseini,Mathieu Tuli,Konstantinos N. Plataniotis
title: Exploiting Explainable Metrics for Augmented SGD
title_zh: 利用可解释的指标来增强 SGD
comment: Accepted in IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR2022)
comments: Accepted in IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR2022)
abstract: Explaining the generalization characteristics of deep learning is an emerging topic in advanced machine learning. There are several unanswered questions about how learning under stochastic optimization really works and why certain strategies are better than others. In this paper, we address the following question: \textit{can we probe intermediate layers of a deep neural network to identify and quantify the learning quality of each layer?} With this question in mind, we propose new explainability metrics that measure the redundant information in a network's layers using a low-rank factorization framework and quantify a complexity measure that is highly correlated with the generalization performance of a given optimizer, network, and dataset. We subsequently exploit these metrics to augment the Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) optimizer by adaptively adjusting the learning rate in each layer to improve in generalization performance. Our augmented SGD -- dubbed RMSGD -- introduces minimal computational overhead compared to SOTA methods and outperforms them by exhibiting strong generalization characteristics across application, architecture, and dataset.
summary: Explaining the generalization characteristics of deep learning is an emerging topic in advanced machine learning. There are several unanswered questions about how learning under stochastic optimization really works and why certain strategies are better than others. In this paper, we address the following question: \textit{can we probe intermediate layers of a deep neural network to identify and quantify the learning quality of each layer?} With this question in mind, we propose new explainability metrics that measure the redundant information in a network's layers using a low-rank factorization framework and quantify a complexity measure that is highly correlated with the generalization performance of a given optimizer, network, and dataset. We subsequently exploit these metrics to augment the Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) optimizer by adaptively adjusting the learning rate in each layer to improve in generalization performance. Our augmented SGD -- dubbed RMSGD -- introduces minimal computational overhead compared to SOTA methods and outperforms them by exhibiting strong generalization characteristics across application, architecture, and dataset.
abstract_zh: 解释深度学习的泛化特征是高级机器学习中的一个新兴课题。关于随机优化下的学习如何真正发挥作用以及为什么某些策略比其他策略更好，还有几个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们解决了以下问题：\textit{我们可以探测深度神经网络的中间层来识别和量化每一层的学习质量吗？}考虑到这个问题，我们提出了新的可解释性指标，使用低秩分解框架来测量网络层中的冗余信息，并量化与给定优化器、网络和数据集的泛化性能高度相关的复杂性度量。随后，我们利用这些指标通过自适应调整每层的学习率来增强随机梯度下降（SGD）优化器，以提高泛化性能。与 SOTA 方法相比，我们的增强 SGD（称为 RMSGD）引入了最小的计算开销，并通过在应用程序、架构和数据集上表现出强大的泛化特征来超越它们。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过可解释性指标增强随机梯度下降法（SGD），以提升深度神经网络的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习的泛化机制尚不明确，现有优化方法缺乏对网络中间层学习质量的量化分析，难以针对性改进优化策略。
AI.method: 设计基于低秩分解框架的可解释性指标，量化网络层冗余信息与复杂度，并据此自适应调整SGD各层学习率，构建RMSGD优化器。
AI.result: RMSGD在保持低计算开销的同时，于多场景、多架构和多数据集上均表现出优于现有方法的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过可解释性指标驱动的优化器改进，为提升深度学习模型泛化性能提供了有效路径。

authors_text: Junyu Liu,Khadijeh Najafi,Kunal Sharma,Francesco Tacchino,Liang Jiang,Antonio Mezzacapo
title: Analytic theory for the dynamics of wide quantum neural networks
title_zh: 宽量子神经网络动力学的解析理论
comment: 37 pages, many figures. v2, v3: adding learning supervised perspectives and new results, close to published version
comments: 37 pages, many figures. v2, v3: adding learning supervised perspectives and new results, close to published version
abstract: Parameterized quantum circuits can be used as quantum neural networks and have the potential to outperform their classical counterparts when trained for addressing learning problems. To date, much of the results on their performance on practical problems are heuristic in nature. In particular, the convergence rate for the training of quantum neural networks is not fully understood. Here, we analyze the dynamics of gradient descent for the training error of a class of variational quantum machine learning models. We define wide quantum neural networks as parameterized quantum circuits in the limit of a large number of qubits and variational parameters. We then find a simple analytic formula that captures the average behavior of their loss function and discuss the consequences of our findings. For example, for random quantum circuits, we predict and characterize an exponential decay of the residual training error as a function of the parameters of the system. We finally validate our analytic results with numerical experiments.
summary: Parameterized quantum circuits can be used as quantum neural networks and have the potential to outperform their classical counterparts when trained for addressing learning problems. To date, much of the results on their performance on practical problems are heuristic in nature. In particular, the convergence rate for the training of quantum neural networks is not fully understood. Here, we analyze the dynamics of gradient descent for the training error of a class of variational quantum machine learning models. We define wide quantum neural networks as parameterized quantum circuits in the limit of a large number of qubits and variational parameters. We then find a simple analytic formula that captures the average behavior of their loss function and discuss the consequences of our findings. For example, for random quantum circuits, we predict and characterize an exponential decay of the residual training error as a function of the parameters of the system. We finally validate our analytic results with numerical experiments.
abstract_zh: 参数化量子电路可以用作量子神经网络，并且在经过训练来解决学习问题时有可能超越经典网络。迄今为止，他们在实际问题上的表现的大部分结果本质上都是启发式的。特别是，量子神经网络训练的收敛速度尚不完全清楚。在这里，我们分析了一类变分量子机器学习模型的训练误差的梯度下降动态。我们将宽量子神经网络定义为在大量量子位和变分参数的限制下的参数化量子电路。然后，我们找到一个简单的分析公式来捕获损失函数的平均行为，并讨论我们的发现的后果。例如，对于随机量子电路，我们预测并表征残余训练误差的指数衰减作为系统参数的函数。我们最终通过数值实验验证了我们的分析结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究宽量子神经网络训练过程中的梯度下降动力学，建立解析理论以描述其损失函数行为并验证收敛特性。
AI.motivation: 现有量子神经网络训练研究多依赖启发式方法，缺乏对训练收敛速率的理论分析，需建立解析框架以指导模型设计与优化。
AI.method: 定义宽量子神经网络为量子比特数和参数量趋于无穷的参数化量子电路，推导损失函数的平均行为解析公式，并通过数值实验验证理论预测。
AI.result: 发现随机量子电路的残差训练误差随参数呈指数衰减，解析公式准确刻画了损失函数动态，数值实验与理论结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为理解量子神经网络训练动态提供了新视角，揭示了宽网络的收敛特性，为后续优化算法设计与应用开发奠定基础。

Here, we analyze the dynamics of gradient descent for the training error of a class of variational quantum machine learning models. We define wide quantum neural networks as parameterized quantum circuits in the limit of a large number of qubits and variational parameters. We then find a simple analytic formula that captures the average behavior of their loss function and discuss the consequences of our findings. For example, for random quantum circuits, we predict and characterize an exponential decay of the residual training error as a function of the parameters of the system. authors_text: Matthew Wallingford,Hao Li,Alessandro Achille,Avinash Ravichandran,Charless Fowlkes,Rahul Bhotika,Stefano Soatto
title: Task Adaptive Parameter Sharing for Multi-Task Learning
title_zh: 多任务学习的任务自适应参数共享
abstract: Adapting pre-trained models with broad capabilities has become standard practice for learning a wide range of downstream tasks. The typical approach of fine-tuning different models for each task is performant, but incurs a substantial memory cost. To efficiently learn multiple downstream tasks we introduce Task Adaptive Parameter Sharing (TAPS), a general method for tuning a base model to a new task by adaptively modifying a small, task-specific subset of layers. This enables multi-task learning while minimizing resources used and competition between tasks. TAPS solves a joint optimization problem which determines which layers to share with the base model and the value of the task-specific weights. Further, a sparsity penalty on the number of active layers encourages weight sharing with the base model. Compared to other methods, TAPS retains high accuracy on downstream tasks while introducing few task-specific parameters. Moreover, TAPS is agnostic to the model architecture and requires only minor changes to the training scheme. We evaluate our method on a suite of fine-tuning tasks and architectures (ResNet, DenseNet, ViT) and show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance while being simple to implement.
summary: Adapting pre-trained models with broad capabilities has become standard practice for learning a wide range of downstream tasks. The typical approach of fine-tuning different models for each task is performant, but incurs a substantial memory cost. To efficiently learn multiple downstream tasks we introduce Task Adaptive Parameter Sharing (TAPS), a general method for tuning a base model to a new task by adaptively modifying a small, task-specific subset of layers. This enables multi-task learning while minimizing resources used and competition between tasks. TAPS solves a joint optimization problem which determines which layers to share with the base model and the value of the task-specific weights. Further, a sparsity penalty on the number of active layers encourages weight sharing with the base model. Compared to other methods, TAPS retains high accuracy on downstream tasks while introducing few task-specific parameters. Moreover, TAPS is agnostic to the model architecture and requires only minor changes to the training scheme. We evaluate our method on a suite of fine-tuning tasks and architectures (ResNet, DenseNet, ViT) and show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance while being simple to implement.
abstract_zh: 采用具有广泛功能的预训练模型已成为学习各种下游任务的标准做法。为每个任务微调不同模型的典型方法是高性能的，但会产生大量的内存成本。为了有效地学习多个下游任务，我们引入了任务自适应参数共享（TAPS），这是一种通过自适应修改小的、特定于任务的层子集来将基本模型调整为新任务的通用方法。这使得多任务学习成为可能，同时最大限度地减少资源使用和任务之间的竞争。 TAPS 解决了联合优化问题，该问题确定与基础模型共享哪些层以及特定于任务的权重值。此外，对活动层数量的稀疏性惩罚鼓励与基础模型共享权重。与其他方法相比，TAPS 在下游任务上保持了高精度，同时引入了很少的特定于任务的参数。此外，TAPS 与模型架构无关，只需要对训练方案进行微小的更改。我们在一套微调任务和架构（ResNet、DenseNet、ViT）上评估我们的方法，并表明它实现了最先进的性能，同时易于实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为任务自适应参数共享（TAPS）的方法，用于在多任务学习中高效地调整预训练模型，通过自适应修改少量任务特定层来减少资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统微调方法为每个任务单独训练模型会导致显存成本高昂且任务间竞争激烈，需寻找一种既能保持高精度又能减少任务特定参数的方法。
AI.method: TAPS通过联合优化确定哪些层与基模型共享，并引入稀疏性惩罚以鼓励参数共享，仅需对训练方案进行微小调整且适用于任意模型架构。
AI.result: 在ResNet、DenseNet和ViT等多种架构及下游任务中，TAPS在保持高精度的同时引入极少任务参数，达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: TAPS为多任务学习提供了高效且通用的解决方案，在减少资源消耗的同时保持了模型性能，具有广泛的适用性。

search_text: Task Adaptive Parameter Sharing for Multi-Task Learning 多任务学习的任务自适应参数共享 Adapting pre-trained models with broad capabilities has become standard practice for learning a wide range of downstream tasks. The typical approach of fine-tuning different models for each task is performant, but incurs a substantial memory cost. To efficiently learn multiple downstream tasks we introduce Task Adaptive Parameter Sharing (TAPS), a general method for tuning a base model to a new task by adaptively modifying a small, task-specific subset of layers. This enables multi-task learning while minimizing resources used and competition between tasks. TAPS solves a joint optimization problem which determines which layers to share with the base model and the value of the task-specific weights. Further, a sparsity penalty on the number of active layers encourages weight sharing with the base model. Compared to other methods, TAPS retains high accuracy on downstream tasks while introducing few task-specific parameters. Moreover, TAPS is agnostic to the model architecture and requires only minor changes to the training scheme. We evaluate our method on a suite of fine-tuning tasks and architectures (ResNet, DenseNet, ViT) and show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance while being simple to implement. 采用具有广泛功能的预训练模型已成为学习各种下游任务的标准做法。为每个任务微调不同模型的典型方法是高性能的，但会产生大量的内存成本。为了有效地学习多个下游任务，我们引入了任务自适应参数共享（TAPS），这是一种通过自适应修改小的、特定于任务的层子集来将基本模型调整为新任务的通用方法。这使得多任务学习成为可能，同时最大限度地减少资源使用和任务之间的竞争。 TAPS 解决了联合优化问题，该问题确定与基础模型共享哪些层以及特定于任务的权重值。此外，对活动层数量的稀疏性惩罚鼓励与基础模型共享权重。与其他方法相比，TAPS 在下游任务上保持了高精度，同时引入了很少的特定于任务的参数。此外，TAPS 与模型架构无关，只需要对训练方案进行微小的更改。我们在一套微调任务和架构（ResNet、DenseNet、ViT）上评估我们的方法，并表明它实现了最先进的性能，同时易于实现。 本文提出了一种名为任务自适应参数共享（TAPS）的方法，用于在多任务学习中高效地调整预训练模型，通过自适应修改少量任务特定层来减少资源消耗。 Matthew Wallingford,Hao Li,Alessandro Achille,Avinash Ravichandran,Charless Fowlkes,Rahul Bhotika,Stefano Soatto cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Jiachen Lian,Chunlei Zhang,Dong Yu
title: Robust Disentangled Variational Speech Representation Learning for Zero-shot Voice Conversion
title_zh: 用于零样本语音转换的鲁棒解缠变分语音表示学习
abstract: Traditional studies on voice conversion (VC) have made progress with parallel training data and known speakers. Good voice conversion quality is obtained by exploring better alignment modules or expressive mapping functions. In this study, we investigate zero-shot VC from a novel perspective of self-supervised disentangled speech representation learning. Specifically, we achieve the disentanglement by balancing the information flow between global speaker representation and time-varying content representation in a sequential variational autoencoder (VAE). A zero-shot voice conversion is performed by feeding an arbitrary speaker embedding and content embeddings to the VAE decoder. Besides that, an on-the-fly data augmentation training strategy is applied to make the learned representation noise invariant. On TIMIT and VCTK datasets, we achieve state-of-the-art performance on both objective evaluation, i.e., speaker verification (SV) on speaker embedding and content embedding, and subjective evaluation, i.e., voice naturalness and similarity, and remains to be robust even with noisy source/target utterances.
summary: Traditional studies on voice conversion (VC) have made progress with parallel training data and known speakers. Good voice conversion quality is obtained by exploring better alignment modules or expressive mapping functions. In this study, we investigate zero-shot VC from a novel perspective of self-supervised disentangled speech representation learning. Specifically, we achieve the disentanglement by balancing the information flow between global speaker representation and time-varying content representation in a sequential variational autoencoder (VAE). A zero-shot voice conversion is performed by feeding an arbitrary speaker embedding and content embeddings to the VAE decoder. Besides that, an on-the-fly data augmentation training strategy is applied to make the learned representation noise invariant. On TIMIT and VCTK datasets, we achieve state-of-the-art performance on both objective evaluation, i.e., speaker verification (SV) on speaker embedding and content embedding, and subjective evaluation, i.e., voice naturalness and similarity, and remains to be robust even with noisy source/target utterances.
abstract_zh: 语音转换（VC）的传统研究在并行训练数据和已知说话人方面取得了进展。良好的语音转换质量是通过探索更好的对齐模块或表达映射函数来获得的。在这项研究中，我们从自监督解纠缠语音表示学习的新角度研究了零样本 VC。具体来说，我们通过平衡顺序变分自动编码器（VAE）中的全局说话者表示和时变内容表示之间的信息流来实现解缠结。通过将任意说话者嵌入和内容嵌入提供给 VAE 解码器来执行零样本语音转换。除此之外，应用动态数据增强训练策略来使学习到的表示噪声不变。在 TIMIT 和 VCTK 数据集上，我们在客观评估（即说话者嵌入和内容嵌入的说话者验证（SV））和主观评估（即语音自然度和相似性）方面都实现了最先进的性能，并且即使在有噪声的源/目标话语的情况下仍然保持鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督解耦语音表征学习的零样本语音转换方法，通过平衡全局说话人表示和时变内容表示实现鲁棒的语音转换。
AI.motivation: 传统语音转换依赖平行训练数据和已知说话人，难以实现零样本转换。本文旨在通过解耦语音表征学习，无需平行数据即可完成跨说话人的语音转换，并提升对噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用序列变分自编码器（VAE）分离全局说话人表示与内容表示，通过动态输入任意说话人嵌入和内容嵌入实现零样本转换，并引入实时数据增强策略提升表征的噪声不变性。
AI.result: 在TIMIT和VCTK数据集上，客观评价（说话人验证）和主观评价（语音自然度与相似度）均达到最先进水平，且在噪声环境下仍保持稳定性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过解耦表征学习有效实现了零样本语音转换，验证了自监督学习与变分自编码框架结合在语音转换任务中的有效性与鲁棒性。

search_text: Robust Disentangled Variational Speech Representation Learning for Zero-shot Voice Conversion 用于零样本语音转换的鲁棒解缠变分语音表示学习 Traditional studies on voice conversion (VC) have made progress with parallel training data and known speakers. Good voice conversion quality is obtained by exploring better alignment modules or expressive mapping functions. In this study, we investigate zero-shot VC from a novel perspective of self-supervised disentangled speech representation learning. Specifically, we achieve the disentanglement by balancing the information flow between global speaker representation and time-varying content representation in a sequential variational autoencoder (VAE). A zero-shot voice conversion is performed by feeding an arbitrary speaker embedding and content embeddings to the VAE decoder. Besides that, an on-the-fly data augmentation training strategy is applied to make the learned representation noise invariant. On TIMIT and VCTK datasets, we achieve state-of-the-art performance on both objective evaluation, i.e., speaker verification (SV) on speaker embedding and content embedding, and subjective evaluation, i.e., voice naturalness and similarity, and remains to be robust even with noisy source/target utterances. 语音转换（VC）的传统研究在并行训练数据和已知说话人方面取得了进展。良好的语音转换质量是通过探索更好的对齐模块或表达映射函数来获得的。在这项研究中，我们从自监督解纠缠语音表示学习的新角度研究了零样本 VC。具体来说，我们通过平衡顺序变分自动编码器（VAE）中的全局说话者表示和时变内容表示之间的信息流来实现解缠结。通过将任意说话者嵌入和内容嵌入提供给 VAE 解码器来执行零样本语音转换。除此之外，应用动态数据增强训练策略来使学习到的表示噪声不变。在 TIMIT 和 VCTK 数据集上，我们在客观评估（即说话者嵌入和内容嵌入的说话者验证（SV））和主观评估（即语音自然度和相似性）方面都实现了最先进的性能，并且即使在有噪声的源/目标话语的情况下仍然保持鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种基于自监督解耦语音表征学习的零样本语音转换方法，通过平衡全局说话人表示和时变内容表示实现鲁棒的语音转换。 Jiachen Lian,Chunlei Zhang,Dong Yu eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.CL,eess.SP

authors_text: Alan Baade,Puyuan Peng,David Harwath
title: MAE-AST: Masked Autoencoding Audio Spectrogram Transformer
title_zh: MAE-AST：屏蔽自动编码音频频谱图转换器
comment: Submitted to INTERSPEECH. 5 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables
comments: Submitted to INTERSPEECH. 5 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables
abstract: In this paper, we propose a simple yet powerful improvement over the recent Self-Supervised Audio Spectrogram Transformer (SSAST) model for speech and audio classification. Specifically, we leverage the insight that the SSAST uses a very high masking ratio (75%) during pretraining, meaning that the vast majority of self-attention compute is performed on mask tokens. We address this by integrating the encoder-decoder architecture from Masked Autoencoders are Scalable Vision Learners (MAE) into the SSAST, where a deep encoder operates on only unmasked input, and a shallow decoder operates on encoder outputs and mask tokens. We find that MAE-like pretraining can provide a 3x speedup and 2x memory usage reduction over the vanilla SSAST using current audio pretraining strategies with ordinary model and input sizes. When fine-tuning on downstream tasks, which only uses the encoder, we find that our approach outperforms the SSAST on a variety of downstream tasks. We further conduct comprehensive evaluations into different strategies of pretraining and explore differences in MAE-style pretraining between the visual and audio domains.
summary: In this paper, we propose a simple yet powerful improvement over the recent Self-Supervised Audio Spectrogram Transformer (SSAST) model for speech and audio classification. Specifically, we leverage the insight that the SSAST uses a very high masking ratio (75%) during pretraining, meaning that the vast majority of self-attention compute is performed on mask tokens. We address this by integrating the encoder-decoder architecture from Masked Autoencoders are Scalable Vision Learners (MAE) into the SSAST, where a deep encoder operates on only unmasked input, and a shallow decoder operates on encoder outputs and mask tokens. We find that MAE-like pretraining can provide a 3x speedup and 2x memory usage reduction over the vanilla SSAST using current audio pretraining strategies with ordinary model and input sizes. When fine-tuning on downstream tasks, which only uses the encoder, we find that our approach outperforms the SSAST on a variety of downstream tasks. We further conduct comprehensive evaluations into different strategies of pretraining and explore differences in MAE-style pretraining between the visual and audio domains.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了对最近用于语音和音频分类的自监督音频频谱图变换器（SSAST）模型的简单而强大的改进。具体来说，我们利用了 SSAST 在预训练期间使用非常高的掩蔽率 (75%) 的见解，这意味着绝大多数自注意力计算是在掩码标记上执行的。我们通过将 Masked Autoencoders is Scalable Vision Learners (MAE) 的编码器-解码器架构集成到 SSAST 中来解决这个问题，其中深度编码器仅对未屏蔽的输入进行操作，而浅层解码器对编码器输出和屏蔽令牌进行操作。我们发现，使用当前的音频预训练策略和普通模型和输入大小，与普通 SSAST 相比，类似 MAE 的预训练可以提供 3 倍的加速和 2 倍的内存使用量减少。当对仅使用编码器的下游任务进行微调时，我们发现我们的方法在各种下游任务上都优于 SSAST。我们进一步对不同的预训练策略进行综合评估，并探索 MAE 式预训练在视觉和音频领域之间的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAE-AST模型，通过改进SSAST的预训练策略，提升音频分类任务的效率和性能。
AI.motivation: SSAST模型在预训练时使用75%的masking ratio，导致大量计算资源浪费在mask tokens上，影响效率。
AI.method: 将MAE的编码器-解码器架构整合到SSAST中，深层编码器处理未被mask的输入，浅层解码器处理编码器输出和mask tokens。
AI.result: 预训练速度提升3倍，内存减少2倍；微调下游任务时性能优于SSAST，且全面评估了不同预训练策略的差异。
AI.conclusion: MAE-AST通过优化预训练策略，在音频领域实现了更高效的模型训练和更好的下游任务表现。

authors_text: Chih-Yuan Chiu,David Fridovich-Keil
title: GTP-SLAM: Game-Theoretic Priors for Simultaneous Localization and Mapping in Multi-Agent Scenarios
title_zh: GTP-SLAM：多智能体场景中同时定位和建图的博弈论先验
abstract: Robots operating in multi-player settings must simultaneously model the environment and the behavior of human or robotic agents who share that environment. This modeling is often approached using Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM); however, SLAM algorithms usually neglect multi-player interactions. In contrast, the motion planning literature often uses dynamic game theory to explicitly model noncooperative interactions of multiple agents in a known environment with perfect localization. Here, we present GTP-SLAM, a novel, iterative best response-based SLAM algorithm that accurately performs state localization and map reconstruction, while using game theoretic priors to capture the inherent non-cooperative interactions among multiple agents in an uncharted scene. By formulating the underlying SLAM problem as a potential game, we inherit a strong convergence guarantee. Empirical results indicate that, when deployed in a realistic traffic simulation, our approach performs localization and mapping more accurately than a standard bundle adjustment algorithm across a wide range of noise levels.
summary: Robots operating in multi-player settings must simultaneously model the environment and the behavior of human or robotic agents who share that environment. This modeling is often approached using Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM); however, SLAM algorithms usually neglect multi-player interactions. In contrast, the motion planning literature often uses dynamic game theory to explicitly model noncooperative interactions of multiple agents in a known environment with perfect localization. Here, we present GTP-SLAM, a novel, iterative best response-based SLAM algorithm that accurately performs state localization and map reconstruction, while using game theoretic priors to capture the inherent non-cooperative interactions among multiple agents in an uncharted scene. By formulating the underlying SLAM problem as a potential game, we inherit a strong convergence guarantee. Empirical results indicate that, when deployed in a realistic traffic simulation, our approach performs localization and mapping more accurately than a standard bundle adjustment algorithm across a wide range of noise levels.
abstract_zh: 在多人游戏环境中运行的机器人必须同时对环境以及共享该环境的人类或机器人代理的行为进行建模。这种建模通常使用同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 来实现；然而，SLAM 算法通常忽略多人交互。相比之下，运动规划文献通常使用动态博弈论来明确地模拟已知环境中具有完美定位的多个智能体的非合作交互。在这里，我们提出了 GTP-SLAM，一种新颖的、基于迭代最佳响应的 SLAM 算法，它可以准确地执行状态定位和地图重建，同时使用博弈论先验来捕获未知场景中多个代理之间固有的非合作交互。通过将底层 SLAM 问题表述为潜在博弈，我们继承了强大的收敛保证。经验结果表明，当部署在实际交通模拟中时，我们的方法在各种噪声水平上比标准束调整算法更准确地执行定位和映射。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合博弈论先验的SLAM算法GTP-SLAM，用于多智能体场景中的同时定位与地图构建。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM算法忽视多智能体间的非合作交互，而动态博弈理论在已知环境中研究多智能体行为，需将两者结合以解决未知场景下的多智能体SLAM问题。
AI.method: 将SLAM问题建模为潜在博弈，通过迭代最佳响应算法结合博弈论先验，捕捉多智能体非合作交互并保证收敛性。
AI.result: 在真实交通模拟中，GTP-SLAM在多种噪声水平下均优于标准捆集调整算法，定位与地图构建精度更高。
AI.conclusion: GTP-SLAM通过融合博弈论与SLAM，有效解决了多智能体场景下的定位与地图构建问题，为相关研究提供了新思路。

method: 将SLAM问题建模为潜在博弈，通过迭代最佳响应算法结合博弈论先验，捕捉多智能体非合作交互并保证收敛性。
result: 在真实交通模拟中，GTP-SLAM在多种噪声水平下均优于标准捆集调整算法，定位与地图构建精度更高。
conclusion: GTP-SLAM通过融合博弈论与SLAM，有效解决了多智能体场景下的定位与地图构建问题，为相关研究提供了新思路。
search_text: GTP-SLAM: Game-Theoretic Priors for Simultaneous Localization and Mapping in Multi-Agent Scenarios GTP-SLAM：多智能体场景中同时定位和建图的博弈论先验 Robots operating in multi-player settings must simultaneously model the environment and the behavior of human or robotic agents who share that environment. This modeling is often approached using Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM); however, SLAM algorithms usually neglect multi-player interactions. In contrast, the motion planning literature often uses dynamic game theory to explicitly model noncooperative interactions of multiple agents in a known environment with perfect localization. Here, we present GTP-SLAM, a novel, iterative best response-based SLAM algorithm that accurately performs state localization and map reconstruction, while using game theoretic priors to capture the inherent non-cooperative interactions among multiple agents in an uncharted scene. By formulating the underlying SLAM problem as a potential game, we inherit a strong convergence guarantee. Empirical results indicate that, when deployed in a realistic traffic simulation, our approach performs localization and mapping more accurately than a standard bundle adjustment algorithm across a wide range of noise levels. 在多人游戏环境中运行的机器人必须同时对环境以及共享该环境的人类或机器人代理的行为进行建模。这种建模通常使用同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 来实现；然而，SLAM 算法通常忽略多人交互。相比之下，运动规划文献通常使用动态博弈论来明确地模拟已知环境中具有完美定位的多个智能体的非合作交互。在这里，我们提出了 GTP-SLAM，一种新颖的、基于迭代最佳响应的 SLAM 算法，它可以准确地执行状态定位和地图重建，同时使用博弈论先验来捕获未知场景中多个代理之间固有的非合作交互。通过将底层 SLAM 问题表述为潜在博弈，我们继承了强大的收敛保证。经验结果表明，当部署在实际交通模拟中时，我们的方法在各种噪声水平上比标准束调整算法更准确地执行定位和映射。 本文提出了一种结合博弈论先验的SLAM算法GTP-SLAM，用于多智能体场景中的同时定位与地图构建。 Chih-Yuan Chiu,David Fridovich-Keil cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Naoyuki Kanda,Jian Wu,Yu Wu,Xiong Xiao,Zhong Meng,Xiaofei Wang,Yashesh Gaur,Zhuo Chen,Jinyu Li,Takuya Yoshioka
title: Streaming Speaker-Attributed ASR with Token-Level Speaker Embeddings
title_zh: 具有令牌级说话人嵌入的流式说话人属性 ASR
abstract: This paper presents a streaming speaker-attributed automatic speech recognition (SA-ASR) model that can recognize ``who spoke what'' with low latency even when multiple people are speaking simultaneously. Our model is based on token-level serialized output training (t-SOT) which was recently proposed to transcribe multi-talker speech in a streaming fashion. To further recognize speaker identities, we propose an encoder-decoder based speaker embedding extractor that can estimate a speaker representation for each recognized token not only from non-overlapping speech but also from overlapping speech. The proposed speaker embedding, named t-vector, is extracted synchronously with the t-SOT ASR model, enabling joint execution of speaker identification (SID) or speaker diarization (SD) with the multi-talker transcription with low latency. We evaluate the proposed model for a joint task of ASR and SID/SD by using LibriSpeechMix and LibriCSS corpora. The proposed model achieves substantially better accuracy than a prior streaming model and shows comparable or sometimes even superior results to the state-of-the-art offline SA-ASR model.
summary: This paper presents a streaming speaker-attributed automatic speech recognition (SA-ASR) model that can recognize ``who spoke what'' with low latency even when multiple people are speaking simultaneously. Our model is based on token-level serialized output training (t-SOT) which was recently proposed to transcribe multi-talker speech in a streaming fashion. To further recognize speaker identities, we propose an encoder-decoder based speaker embedding extractor that can estimate a speaker representation for each recognized token not only from non-overlapping speech but also from overlapping speech. The proposed speaker embedding, named t-vector, is extracted synchronously with the t-SOT ASR model, enabling joint execution of speaker identification (SID) or speaker diarization (SD) with the multi-talker transcription with low latency. We evaluate the proposed model for a joint task of ASR and SID/SD by using LibriSpeechMix and LibriCSS corpora. The proposed model achieves substantially better accuracy than a prior streaming model and shows comparable or sometimes even superior results to the state-of-the-art offline SA-ASR model.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种流式说话人归属自动语音识别 (SA-ASR) 模型，即使多人同时说话，也能以低延迟识别“谁说了什么”。我们的模型基于令牌级序列化输出训练（t-SOT），最近提出以流方式转录多说话者语音。为了进一步识别说话人身份，我们提出了一种基于编码器-解码器的说话人嵌入提取器，它不仅可以从非重叠语音中估计每个识别标记的说话人表示，还可以从重叠语音中估计说话人表示。所提出的说话人嵌入（称为 t-向量）与 t-SOT ASR 模型同步提取，从而能够以低延迟联合执行说话人识别（SID）或说话人二值化（SD）与多说话人转录。我们使用 LibriSpeechMix 和 LibriCSS 语料库评估了所提出的 ASR 和 SID/SD 联合任务模型。所提出的模型比之前的流模型具有更高的准确性，并且显示出与最先进的离线 SA-ASR 模型相当甚至有时甚至更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于令牌级说话人嵌入的流式说话人归属自动语音识别（SA-ASR）模型，能够在多人同时说话时实时识别‘谁说了什么’。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理多人重叠语音时存在延迟高、说话人识别精度不足的问题，需开发低延迟且能同步处理语音识别与说话人识别的模型。
AI.method: 基于令牌级序列输出训练（t-SOT）框架，设计编码器-解码器结构的说话人嵌入提取器，生成与语音识别同步的t-vector嵌入，实现语音识别与说话人识别的联合优化。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeechMix和LibriCSS数据集上，模型在流式任务中显著优于先前方法，且在部分指标上达到或超越最先进的离线SA-ASR模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过令牌级嵌入实现低延迟的多说话人语音识别与归属，为实时语音应用提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Yiran Luo,Pratyay Banerjee,Tejas Gokhale,Yezhou Yang,Chitta Baral
title: To Find Waldo You Need Contextual Cues: Debiasing Who's Waldo
title_zh: 要找到 Waldo，您需要上下文提示：消除 Waldo 是谁的偏见
abstract: We present a debiased dataset for the Person-centric Visual Grounding (PCVG) task first proposed by Cui et al. (2021) in the Who's Waldo dataset. Given an image and a caption, PCVG requires pairing up a person's name mentioned in a caption with a bounding box that points to the person in the image. We find that the original Who's Waldo dataset compiled for this task contains a large number of biased samples that are solvable simply by heuristic methods; for instance, in many cases the first name in the sentence corresponds to the largest bounding box, or the sequence of names in the sentence corresponds to an exact left-to-right order in the image. Naturally, models trained on these biased data lead to over-estimation of performance on the benchmark. To enforce models being correct for the correct reasons, we design automated tools to filter and debias the original dataset by ruling out all examples of insufficient context, such as those with no verb or with a long chain of conjunct names in their captions. Our experiments show that our new sub-sampled dataset contains less bias with much lowered heuristic performances and widened gaps between heuristic and supervised methods. We also demonstrate the same benchmark model trained on our debiased training set outperforms that trained on the original biased (and larger) training set on our debiased test set. We argue our debiased dataset offers the PCVG task a more practical baseline for reliable benchmarking and future improvements.
summary: We present a debiased dataset for the Person-centric Visual Grounding (PCVG) task first proposed by Cui et al. (2021) in the Who's Waldo dataset. Given an image and a caption, PCVG requires pairing up a person's name mentioned in a caption with a bounding box that points to the person in the image. We find that the original Who's Waldo dataset compiled for this task contains a large number of biased samples that are solvable simply by heuristic methods; for instance, in many cases the first name in the sentence corresponds to the largest bounding box, or the sequence of names in the sentence corresponds to an exact left-to-right order in the image. Naturally, models trained on these biased data lead to over-estimation of performance on the benchmark. To enforce models being correct for the correct reasons, we design automated tools to filter and debias the original dataset by ruling out all examples of insufficient context, such as those with no verb or with a long chain of conjunct names in their captions. Our experiments show that our new sub-sampled dataset contains less bias with much lowered heuristic performances and widened gaps between heuristic and supervised methods. We also demonstrate the same benchmark model trained on our debiased training set outperforms that trained on the original biased (and larger) training set on our debiased test set. We argue our debiased dataset offers the PCVG task a more practical baseline for reliable benchmarking and future improvements.
abstract_zh: 我们为 Cui 等人首次提出的以人为中心的视觉基础（PCVG）任务提供了一个去偏数据集。 (2021) 在 Who's Waldo 数据集中。给定图像和标题，PCVG 需要将标题中提到的人名与指向图像中的人的边界框配对。我们发现为此任务编译的原始 Who's Waldo 数据集包含大量有偏差的样本，只需通过启发式方法即可解决；例如，在许多情况下，句子中的第一个名字对应于最大的边界框，或者句子中的名字序列对应于图像中从左到右的精确顺序。当然，根据这些有偏差的数据训练的模型会导致对基准性能的高估。为了强制模型因正确的原因而正确，我们设计了自动化工具来过滤和消除原始数据集的偏差，方法是排除所有上下文不足的示例，例如那些没有动词或标题中带有长链连接名称的示例。我们的实验表明，我们新的子采样数据集包含的偏差更少，启发式性能大大降低，启发式方法和监督方法之间的差距扩大了。我们还展示了在我们的去偏训练集上训练的相同基准模型优于在我们的去偏测试集上在原始有偏（和更大）训练集上训练的模型。我们认为，我们的去偏数据集为 PCVG 任务提供了更实用的基准，以实现可靠的基准测试和未来的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个去偏的Person-centric Visual Grounding数据集，通过消除原始数据集中的启发式偏差，提升模型在人物定位任务中的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 原始Who's Waldo数据集存在大量启发式可解样本（如名字顺序与图像布局直接对应），导致模型性能被高估，需建立更可靠的基准测试集。
AI.method: 设计自动化工具过滤缺乏上下文线索的样本（如无动词、长并列名字序列），构建去偏子集并验证启发式与监督方法的性能差距。
AI.result: 新数据集显著降低启发式方法性能，模型在去偏测试集上表现优于原始数据集训练的模型，验证了去偏的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该去偏数据集为PCVG任务提供了更实用的基准，有助于推动未来研究关注上下文线索而非数据偏差。

We argue our debiased dataset offers the PCVG task a more practical baseline for reliable benchmarking and future improvements. 我们为 Cui 等人首次提出的以人为中心的视觉基础（PCVG）任务提供了一个去偏数据集。 (2021) 在 Who's Waldo 数据集中。给定图像和标题，PCVG 需要将标题中提到的人名与指向图像中的人的边界框配对。我们发现为此任务编译的原始 Who's Waldo 数据集包含大量有偏差的样本，只需通过启发式方法即可解决；例如，在许多情况下，句子中的第一个名字对应于最大的边界框，或者句子中的名字序列对应于图像中从左到右的精确顺序。当然，根据这些有偏差的数据训练的模型会导致对基准性能的高估。为了强制模型因正确的原因而正确，我们设计了自动化工具来过滤和消除原始数据集的偏差，方法是排除所有上下文不足的示例，例如那些没有动词或标题中带有长链连接名称的示例。我们的实验表明，我们新的子采样数据集包含的偏差更少，启发式性能大大降低，启发式方法和监督方法之间的差距扩大了。我们还展示了在我们的去偏训练集上训练的相同基准模型优于在我们的去偏测试集上在原始有偏（和更大）训练集上训练的模型。我们认为，我们的去偏数据集为 PCVG 任务提供了更实用的基准，以实现可靠的基准测试和未来的改进。 本文提出一个去偏的Person-centric Visual Grounding数据集，通过消除原始数据集中的启发式偏差，提升模型在人物定位任务中的可靠性。 Yiran Luo,Pratyay Banerjee,Tejas Gokhale,Yezhou Yang,Chitta Baral cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Andrew Hou,Michel Sarkis,Ning Bi,Yiying Tong,Xiaoming Liu
title: Face Relighting with Geometrically Consistent Shadows
title_zh: 具有几何一致阴影的面部重新照明
abstract: Most face relighting methods are able to handle diffuse shadows, but struggle to handle hard shadows, such as those cast by the nose. Methods that propose techniques for handling hard shadows often do not produce geometrically consistent shadows since they do not directly leverage the estimated face geometry while synthesizing them. We propose a novel differentiable algorithm for synthesizing hard shadows based on ray tracing, which we incorporate into training our face relighting model. Our proposed algorithm directly utilizes the estimated face geometry to synthesize geometrically consistent hard shadows. We demonstrate through quantitative and qualitative experiments on Multi-PIE and FFHQ that our method produces more geometrically consistent shadows than previous face relighting methods while also achieving state-of-the-art face relighting performance under directional lighting. In addition, we demonstrate that our differentiable hard shadow modeling improves the quality of the estimated face geometry over diffuse shading models.
summary: Most face relighting methods are able to handle diffuse shadows, but struggle to handle hard shadows, such as those cast by the nose. Methods that propose techniques for handling hard shadows often do not produce geometrically consistent shadows since they do not directly leverage the estimated face geometry while synthesizing them. We propose a novel differentiable algorithm for synthesizing hard shadows based on ray tracing, which we incorporate into training our face relighting model. Our proposed algorithm directly utilizes the estimated face geometry to synthesize geometrically consistent hard shadows. We demonstrate through quantitative and qualitative experiments on Multi-PIE and FFHQ that our method produces more geometrically consistent shadows than previous face relighting methods while also achieving state-of-the-art face relighting performance under directional lighting. In addition, we demonstrate that our differentiable hard shadow modeling improves the quality of the estimated face geometry over diffuse shading models.
abstract_zh: 大多数面部重新照明方法都能够处理漫射阴影，但很难处理硬阴影，例如鼻子投射的阴影。提出处理硬阴影技术的方法通常不会产生几何一致的阴影，因为它们在合成估计的面部几何形状时不直接利用它们。我们提出了一种新颖的可微分算法，用于基于光线追踪合成硬阴影，并将其纳入训练我们的面部重新照明模型中。我们提出的算法直接利用估计的面部几何形状来合成几何一致的硬阴影。我们通过在 Multi-PIE 和 FFHQ 上进行的定量和定性实验证明，我们的方法比以前的面部重新照明方法产生更几何一致的阴影，同时还在定向照明下实现了最先进的面部重新照明性能。此外，我们还证明了我们的可微分硬阴影建模比漫反射着色模型提高了估计面部几何形状的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于光线追踪的可微算法，解决人脸重光照中硬阴影几何不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以生成几何一致的硬阴影，且未直接利用估计的面部几何信息导致阴影不真实。
AI.method: 设计可微分硬阴影合成算法，通过光线追踪直接结合估计的面部几何信息进行训练优化。
AI.result: 在Multi-PIE和FFHQ数据集上实现更几何一致的阴影效果，同时达到方向光下最先进的人脸重光照性能。
AI.conclusion: 可微分硬阴影建模显著提升阴影真实性与面部几何估计质量，推动人脸重光照技术发展。

authors_text: Andrew Hoopes,Malte Hoffmann,Douglas N. Greve,Bruce Fischl,John Guttag,Adrian V. Dalca
title: Learning the Effect of Registration Hyperparameters with HyperMorph
title_zh: 使用 HyperMorph 了解配准超参数的效果
comment: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) at https://www.melba-journal.org
comments: Accepted for publication at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA) at https://www.melba-journal.org
abstract: We introduce HyperMorph, a framework that facilitates efficient hyperparameter tuning in learning-based deformable image registration. Classical registration algorithms perform an iterative pair-wise optimization to compute a deformation field that aligns two images. Recent learning-based approaches leverage large image datasets to learn a function that rapidly estimates a deformation for a given image pair. In both strategies, the accuracy of the resulting spatial correspondences is strongly influenced by the choice of certain hyperparameter values. However, an effective hyperparameter search consumes substantial time and human effort as it often involves training multiple models for different fixed hyperparameter values and may lead to suboptimal registration. We propose an amortized hyperparameter learning strategy to alleviate this burden by learning the impact of hyperparameters on deformation fields. We design a meta network, or hypernetwork, that predicts the parameters of a registration network for input hyperparameters, thereby comprising a single model that generates the optimal deformation field corresponding to given hyperparameter values. This strategy enables fast, high-resolution hyperparameter search at test-time, reducing the inefficiency of traditional approaches while increasing flexibility. We also demonstrate additional benefits of HyperMorph, including enhanced robustness to model initialization and the ability to rapidly identify optimal hyperparameter values specific to a dataset, image contrast, task, or even anatomical region, all without the need to retrain models. We make our code publicly available at http://hypermorph.voxelmorph.net.
summary: We introduce HyperMorph, a framework that facilitates efficient hyperparameter tuning in learning-based deformable image registration. Classical registration algorithms perform an iterative pair-wise optimization to compute a deformation field that aligns two images. Recent learning-based approaches leverage large image datasets to learn a function that rapidly estimates a deformation for a given image pair. In both strategies, the accuracy of the resulting spatial correspondences is strongly influenced by the choice of certain hyperparameter values. However, an effective hyperparameter search consumes substantial time and human effort as it often involves training multiple models for different fixed hyperparameter values and may lead to suboptimal registration. We propose an amortized hyperparameter learning strategy to alleviate this burden by learning the impact of hyperparameters on deformation fields. We design a meta network, or hypernetwork, that predicts the parameters of a registration network for input hyperparameters, thereby comprising a single model that generates the optimal deformation field corresponding to given hyperparameter values. This strategy enables fast, high-resolution hyperparameter search at test-time, reducing the inefficiency of traditional approaches while increasing flexibility. We also demonstrate additional benefits of HyperMorph, including enhanced robustness to model initialization and the ability to rapidly identify optimal hyperparameter values specific to a dataset, image contrast, task, or even anatomical region, all without the need to retrain models. We make our code publicly available at http://hypermorph.voxelmorph.net.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 HyperMorph，这是一个有助于在基于学习的可变形图像配准中进行高效超参数调整的框架。经典配准算法执行迭代成对优化来计算对齐两个图像的变形场。最近基于学习的方法利用大型图像数据集来学习快速估计给定图像对的变形的函数。在这两种策略中，所得到的空间对应的准确性很大程度上受到某些超参数值的选择的影响。然而，有效的超参数搜索会消耗大量时间和人力，因为它通常涉及针对不同的固定超参数值训练多个模型，并可能导致配准不理想。我们提出了一种摊销超参数学习策略，通过学习超参数对变形场的影响来减轻这种负担。我们设计了一个元网络或超网络，它预测输入超参数的配准网络的参数，从而包含一个生成与给定超参数值相对应的最佳变形场的模型。该策略可以在测试时进行快速、高分辨率的超参数搜索，减少传统方法的低效率，同时提高灵活性。我们还展示了 HyperMorph 的其他优势，包括增强模型初始化的鲁棒性，以及快速识别特定于数据集、图像对比度、任务甚至解剖区域的最佳超参数值的能力，所有这些都无需重新训练模型。我们在 http://hypermorph.voxelmorph.net 上公开提供我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperMorph框架，通过元网络学习变形场超参数的影响，实现基于学习的可变形图像配准中高效超参数调优。
AI.motivation: 传统配准算法依赖耗时的手动超参数搜索，且易导致次优结果；学习方法虽快速但缺乏对超参数影响的系统建模，限制了配准精度和灵活性。
AI.method: 设计元网络（hypernetwork）预测配准网络参数，将超参数作为输入直接生成最优变形场，实现单模型多超参数组合的端到端学习与测试时快速搜索。
AI.result: 实验表明HyperMorph显著提升配准鲁棒性，可针对不同数据集/解剖区域快速确定最优超参数，且无需重新训练模型。
AI.conclusion: HyperMorph通过超参数显式建模解决了传统方法效率与灵活性的矛盾，为可变形图像配准提供了更智能的参数优化范式。

authors_text: Xiaotian Li,Xiang Zhang,Taoyue Wang,Lijun Yin
title: Knowledge-Spreader: Learning Facial Action Unit Dynamics with Extremely Limited Labels
title_zh: 知识传播者：使用极其有限的标签学习面部动作单元动态
abstract: Recent studies on the automatic detection of facial action unit (AU) have extensively relied on large-sized annotations. However, manually AU labeling is difficult, time-consuming, and costly. Most existing semi-supervised works ignore the informative cues from the temporal domain, and are highly dependent on densely annotated videos, making the learning process less efficient. To alleviate these problems, we propose a deep semi-supervised framework Knowledge-Spreader (KS), which differs from conventional methods in two aspects. First, rather than only encoding human knowledge as constraints, KS also learns the Spatial-Temporal AU correlation knowledge in order to strengthen its out-of-distribution generalization ability. Second, we approach KS by applying consistency regularization and pseudo-labeling in multiple student networks alternately and dynamically. It spreads the spatial knowledge from labeled frames to unlabeled data, and completes the temporal information of partially labeled video clips. Thus, the design allows KS to learn AU dynamics from video clips with only one label allocated, which significantly reduce the requirements of using annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed KS achieves competitive performance as compared to the state of the arts under the circumstances of using only 2% labels on BP4D and 5% labels on DISFA. In addition, we test it on our newly developed large-scale comprehensive emotion database, which contains considerable samples across well-synchronized and aligned sensor modalities for easing the scarcity issue of annotations and identities in human affective computing. The new database will be released to the research community.
summary: Recent studies on the automatic detection of facial action unit (AU) have extensively relied on large-sized annotations. However, manually AU labeling is difficult, time-consuming, and costly. Most existing semi-supervised works ignore the informative cues from the temporal domain, and are highly dependent on densely annotated videos, making the learning process less efficient. To alleviate these problems, we propose a deep semi-supervised framework Knowledge-Spreader (KS), which differs from conventional methods in two aspects. First, rather than only encoding human knowledge as constraints, KS also learns the Spatial-Temporal AU correlation knowledge in order to strengthen its out-of-distribution generalization ability. Second, we approach KS by applying consistency regularization and pseudo-labeling in multiple student networks alternately and dynamically. It spreads the spatial knowledge from labeled frames to unlabeled data, and completes the temporal information of partially labeled video clips. Thus, the design allows KS to learn AU dynamics from video clips with only one label allocated, which significantly reduce the requirements of using annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed KS achieves competitive performance as compared to the state of the arts under the circumstances of using only 2% labels on BP4D and 5% labels on DISFA. In addition, we test it on our newly developed large-scale comprehensive emotion database, which contains considerable samples across well-synchronized and aligned sensor modalities for easing the scarcity issue of annotations and identities in human affective computing. The new database will be released to the research community.
abstract_zh: 最近关于面部动作单元（AU）自动检测的研究广泛依赖于大尺寸注释。然而，手动 AU 标记非常困难、耗时且成本高昂。大多数现有的半监督作品忽略了来自时域的信息线索，并且高度依赖于密集注释的视频，使得学习过程效率较低。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了一种深度半监督框架Knowledge-Spreader（KS），它在两个方面与传统方法不同。首先，KS不仅仅将人类知识编码为约束，还学习时空AU相关知识，以增强其分布外泛化能力。其次，我们通过在多个学生网络中交替动态地应用一致性正则化和伪标签来实现 KS。它将空间知识从标记帧传播到未标记数据，并完成部分标记视频剪辑的时间信息。因此，该设计允许 KS 从仅分配一个标签的视频片段中学习 AU 动态，这显着降低了使用注释的要求。大量实验表明，在 BP4D 上仅使用 2% 标签和 DISFA 上仅使用 5% 标签的情况下，与现有技术相比，所提出的 KS 实现了有竞争力的性能。此外，我们还在新开发的大规模综合情感数据库上进行了测试，该数据库包含跨良好同步和对齐的传感器模式的大量样本，以缓解人类情感计算中注释和身份的稀缺问题。新数据库将发布给研究界。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Knowledge-Spreader（KS）的深度半监督框架，用于在极少量标注数据下学习面部动作单元（AU）动态。
AI.motivation: 现有AU检测方法依赖大量标注数据，而人工标注成本高且效率低；半监督方法未充分利用时序信息，依赖密集标注视频，学习效率不足。
AI.method: KS框架通过学习时空AU相关性知识增强分布外泛化能力，并交替动态应用一致性正则化和伪标签机制，将标注帧的空间知识传播至未标注数据，补全部分标注视频的时序信息。
AI.result: 在仅使用2% BP4D标注和5% DISFA标注时，KS性能与现有最佳方法相当；并在新开发的多模态情感数据库上验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: KS通过时空知识传播和半监督学习显著降低标注需求，为解决情感计算中的标注稀缺问题提供了新方案，新数据库将促进相关研究。

search_text: Knowledge-Spreader: Learning Facial Action Unit Dynamics with Extremely Limited Labels 知识传播者：使用极其有限的标签学习面部动作单元动态 Recent studies on the automatic detection of facial action unit (AU) have extensively relied on large-sized annotations. However, manually AU labeling is difficult, time-consuming, and costly. Most existing semi-supervised works ignore the informative cues from the temporal domain, and are highly dependent on densely annotated videos, making the learning process less efficient. To alleviate these problems, we propose a deep semi-supervised framework Knowledge-Spreader (KS), which differs from conventional methods in two aspects. First, rather than only encoding human knowledge as constraints, KS also learns the Spatial-Temporal AU correlation knowledge in order to strengthen its out-of-distribution generalization ability. Second, we approach KS by applying consistency regularization and pseudo-labeling in multiple student networks alternately and dynamically. It spreads the spatial knowledge from labeled frames to unlabeled data, and completes the temporal information of partially labeled video clips. Thus, the design allows KS to learn AU dynamics from video clips with only one label allocated, which significantly reduce the requirements of using annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed KS achieves competitive performance as compared to the state of the arts under the circumstances of using only 2% labels on BP4D and 5% labels on DISFA. In addition, we test it on our newly developed large-scale comprehensive emotion database, which contains considerable samples across well-synchronized and aligned sensor modalities for easing the scarcity issue of annotations and identities in human affective computing. The new database will be released to the research community. 最近关于面部动作单元（AU）自动检测的研究广泛依赖于大尺寸注释。然而，手动 AU 标记非常困难、耗时且成本高昂。大多数现有的半监督作品忽略了来自时域的信息线索，并且高度依赖于密集注释的视频，使得学习过程效率较低。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了一种深度半监督框架Knowledge-Spreader（KS），它在两个方面与传统方法不同。首先，KS不仅仅将人类知识编码为约束，还学习时空AU相关知识，以增强其分布外泛化能力。其次，我们通过在多个学生网络中交替动态地应用一致性正则化和伪标签来实现 KS。它将空间知识从标记帧传播到未标记数据，并完成部分标记视频剪辑的时间信息。因此，该设计允许 KS 从仅分配一个标签的视频片段中学习 AU 动态，这显着降低了使用注释的要求。大量实验表明，在 BP4D 上仅使用 2% 标签和 DISFA 上仅使用 5% 标签的情况下，与现有技术相比，所提出的 KS 实现了有竞争力的性能。此外，我们还在新开发的大规模综合情感数据库上进行了测试，该数据库包含跨良好同步和对齐的传感器模式的大量样本，以缓解人类情感计算中注释和身份的稀缺问题。新数据库将发布给研究界。 本文提出一种名为Knowledge-Spreader（KS）的深度半监督框架，用于在极少量标注数据下学习面部动作单元（AU）动态。 Xiaotian Li,Xiang Zhang,Taoyue Wang,Lijun Yin cs.CV

authors_text: Partha Das,Sezer Karaoglu,Theo Gevers
title: PIE-Net: Photometric Invariant Edge Guided Network for Intrinsic Image Decomposition
title_zh: PIE-Net：用于本征图像分解的光度不变边缘引导网络
abstract: Intrinsic image decomposition is the process of recovering the image formation components (reflectance and shading) from an image. Previous methods employ either explicit priors to constrain the problem or implicit constraints as formulated by their losses (deep learning). These methods can be negatively influenced by strong illumination conditions causing shading-reflectance leakages. Therefore, in this paper, an end-to-end edge-driven hybrid CNN approach is proposed for intrinsic image decomposition. Edges correspond to illumination invariant gradients. To handle hard negative illumination transitions, a hierarchical approach is taken including global and local refinement layers. We make use of attention layers to further strengthen the learning process. An extensive ablation study and large scale experiments are conducted showing that it is beneficial for edge-driven hybrid IID networks to make use of illumination invariant descriptors and that separating global and local cues helps in improving the performance of the network. Finally, it is shown that the proposed method obtains state of the art performance and is able to generalise well to real world images. The project page with pretrained models, finetuned models and network code can be found at https://ivi.fnwi.uva.nl/cv/pienet/.
summary: Intrinsic image decomposition is the process of recovering the image formation components (reflectance and shading) from an image. Previous methods employ either explicit priors to constrain the problem or implicit constraints as formulated by their losses (deep learning). These methods can be negatively influenced by strong illumination conditions causing shading-reflectance leakages. Therefore, in this paper, an end-to-end edge-driven hybrid CNN approach is proposed for intrinsic image decomposition. Edges correspond to illumination invariant gradients. To handle hard negative illumination transitions, a hierarchical approach is taken including global and local refinement layers. We make use of attention layers to further strengthen the learning process. An extensive ablation study and large scale experiments are conducted showing that it is beneficial for edge-driven hybrid IID networks to make use of illumination invariant descriptors and that separating global and local cues helps in improving the performance of the network. Finally, it is shown that the proposed method obtains state of the art performance and is able to generalise well to real world images. The project page with pretrained models, finetuned models and network code can be found at https://ivi.fnwi.uva.nl/cv/pienet/.
abstract_zh: 本征图像分解是从图像中恢复图像形成成分（反射率和阴影）的过程。以前的方法要么采用显式先验来约束问题，要么采用由损失制定的隐式约束（深度学习）。这些方法可能会受到强照明条件的负面影响，导致阴影反射泄漏。因此，本文提出了一种端到端边缘驱动的混合 CNN 方法来进行本征图像分解。边缘对应于照明不变梯度。为了处理硬负照明过渡，采用了包括全局和局部细化层的分层方法。我们利用注意力层来进一步加强学习过程。广泛的消融研究和大规模实验表明，边缘驱动的混合 IID 网络利用光照不变描述符是有益的，并且分离全局和局部线索有助于提高网络的性能。最后，结果表明，所提出的方法获得了最先进的性能，并且能够很好地推广到现实世界的图像。包含预训练模型、微调模型和网络代码的项目页面可以在 https://ivi.fnwi.uva.nl/cv/pienet/ 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于光度不变边缘引导的混合卷积神经网络（PIE-Net），用于解决固有图像分解中的光照条件导致的阴影-反射率泄漏问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在强光照条件下易出现阴影与反射率信息混淆（泄漏），需通过更鲁棒的网络结构提升分解准确性。
AI.method: 设计端到端边缘驱动混合CNN，结合全局与局部细化层，并引入注意力机制，利用光照不变边缘描述符分离全局与局部特征。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在固有图像分解任务中达到SOTA性能，且能有效泛化至真实场景图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合光照不变边缘信息与分层特征分离，PIE-Net显著提升了复杂光照条件下固有图像分解的鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: Yiqun Mei,Pengfei Guo,Vishal M. Patel
title: Escaping Data Scarcity for High-Resolution Heterogeneous Face Hallucination
title_zh: 摆脱高分辨率异构面部幻觉的数据稀缺
abstract: In Heterogeneous Face Recognition (HFR), the objective is to match faces across two different domains such as visible and thermal. Large domain discrepancy makes HFR a difficult problem. Recent methods attempting to fill the gap via synthesis have achieved promising results, but their performance is still limited by the scarcity of paired training data. In practice, large-scale heterogeneous face data are often inaccessible due to the high cost of acquisition and annotation process as well as privacy regulations. In this paper, we propose a new face hallucination paradigm for HFR, which not only enables data-efficient synthesis but also allows to scale up model training without breaking any privacy policy. Unlike existing methods that learn face synthesis entirely from scratch, our approach is particularly designed to take advantage of rich and diverse facial priors from visible domain for more faithful hallucination. On the other hand, large-scale training is enabled by introducing a new federated learning scheme to allow institution-wise collaborations while avoiding explicit data sharing. Extensive experiments demonstrate the advantages of our approach in tackling HFR under current data limitations. In a unified framework, our method yields the state-of-the-art hallucination results on multiple HFR datasets.
summary: In Heterogeneous Face Recognition (HFR), the objective is to match faces across two different domains such as visible and thermal. Large domain discrepancy makes HFR a difficult problem. Recent methods attempting to fill the gap via synthesis have achieved promising results, but their performance is still limited by the scarcity of paired training data. In practice, large-scale heterogeneous face data are often inaccessible due to the high cost of acquisition and annotation process as well as privacy regulations. In this paper, we propose a new face hallucination paradigm for HFR, which not only enables data-efficient synthesis but also allows to scale up model training without breaking any privacy policy. Unlike existing methods that learn face synthesis entirely from scratch, our approach is particularly designed to take advantage of rich and diverse facial priors from visible domain for more faithful hallucination. On the other hand, large-scale training is enabled by introducing a new federated learning scheme to allow institution-wise collaborations while avoiding explicit data sharing. Extensive experiments demonstrate the advantages of our approach in tackling HFR under current data limitations. In a unified framework, our method yields the state-of-the-art hallucination results on multiple HFR datasets.
abstract_zh: 在异构人脸识别 (HFR) 中，目标是跨两个不同域（例如可见光域和热域）匹配人脸。较大的域差异使 HFR 成为一个难题。最近尝试通过合成来填补空白的方法已经取得了有希望的结果，但它们的性能仍然受到配对训练数据稀缺的限制。在实践中，由于获取和标注过程的成本高昂以及隐私法规的原因，大规模异构人脸数据往往无法访问。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 HFR 面部幻觉范式，它不仅能够实现数据高效的合成，而且还允许在不违反任何隐私政策的情况下扩大模型训练规模。与完全从头开始学习面部合成的现有方法不同，我们的方法专门设计用于利用可见域中丰富多样的面部先验来实现更忠实的幻觉。另一方面，通过引入新的联邦学习方案来实现大规模培训，以允许机构之间的协作，同时避免显式的数据共享。大量实验证明了我们的方法在当前数据限制下解决 HFR 的优势。在统一的框架中，我们的方法在多个 HFR 数据集上产生了最先进的幻觉结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的高分辨率异构人脸幻影生成方法，解决跨域人脸识别中因数据稀缺导致的性能限制问题。
AI.motivation: 异构人脸识别（HFR）因领域差异大且缺乏配对训练数据而难以取得理想效果，现有方法受限于数据获取成本高、隐私政策严格等问题。
AI.method: 设计结合可见域人脸先验知识的幻影生成框架，并引入联邦学习方案实现机构间协作训练而无需直接共享数据。
AI.result: 在多个HFR数据集上达到最先进幻影生成效果，验证了方法在数据稀缺场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用可见域先验知识与联邦学习机制，本文方法在保证隐私的前提下有效缓解了HFR任务中的数据稀缺问题。

search_text: Escaping Data Scarcity for High-Resolution Heterogeneous Face Hallucination 摆脱高分辨率异构面部幻觉的数据稀缺 In Heterogeneous Face Recognition (HFR), the objective is to match faces across two different domains such as visible and thermal. Large domain discrepancy makes HFR a difficult problem. Recent methods attempting to fill the gap via synthesis have achieved promising results, but their performance is still limited by the scarcity of paired training data. In practice, large-scale heterogeneous face data are often inaccessible due to the high cost of acquisition and annotation process as well as privacy regulations. In this paper, we propose a new face hallucination paradigm for HFR, which not only enables data-efficient synthesis but also allows to scale up model training without breaking any privacy policy. Unlike existing methods that learn face synthesis entirely from scratch, our approach is particularly designed to take advantage of rich and diverse facial priors from visible domain for more faithful hallucination. On the other hand, large-scale training is enabled by introducing a new federated learning scheme to allow institution-wise collaborations while avoiding explicit data sharing. Extensive experiments demonstrate the advantages of our approach in tackling HFR under current data limitations. In a unified framework, our method yields the state-of-the-art hallucination results on multiple HFR datasets. 在异构人脸识别 (HFR) 中，目标是跨两个不同域（例如可见光域和热域）匹配人脸。较大的域差异使 HFR 成为一个难题。最近尝试通过合成来填补空白的方法已经取得了有希望的结果，但它们的性能仍然受到配对训练数据稀缺的限制。在实践中，由于获取和标注过程的成本高昂以及隐私法规的原因，大规模异构人脸数据往往无法访问。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 HFR 面部幻觉范式，它不仅能够实现数据高效的合成，而且还允许在不违反任何隐私政策的情况下扩大模型训练规模。与完全从头开始学习面部合成的现有方法不同，我们的方法专门设计用于利用可见域中丰富多样的面部先验来实现更忠实的幻觉。另一方面，通过引入新的联邦学习方案来实现大规模培训，以允许机构之间的协作，同时避免显式的数据共享。大量实验证明了我们的方法在当前数据限制下解决 HFR 的优势。在统一的框架中，我们的方法在多个 HFR 数据集上产生了最先进的幻觉结果。 本文提出一种新的高分辨率异构人脸幻影生成方法，解决跨域人脸识别中因数据稀缺导致的性能限制问题。 Yiqun Mei,Pengfei Guo,Vishal M. Patel cs.CV

authors_text: Yu-Huai Peng,Hung-Shin Lee,Pin-Tuan Huang,Hsin-Min Wang
title: Generation of Speaker Representations Using Heterogeneous Training Batch Assembly
title_zh: 使用异构训练批量组装生成说话者表示
abstract: In traditional speaker diarization systems, a well-trained speaker model is a key component to extract representations from consecutive and partially overlapping segments in a long speech session. To be more consistent with the back-end segmentation and clustering, we propose a new CNN-based speaker modeling scheme, which takes into account the heterogeneity of the speakers in each training segment and batch. We randomly and synthetically augment the training data into a set of segments, each of which contains more than one speaker and some overlapping parts. A soft label is imposed on each segment based on its speaker occupation ratio, and the standard cross entropy loss is implemented in model training. In this way, the speaker model should have the ability to generate a geometrically meaningful embedding for each multi-speaker segment. Experimental results show that our system is superior to the baseline system using x-vectors in two speaker diarization tasks. In the CALLHOME task trained on the NIST SRE and Switchboard datasets, our system achieves a relative reduction of 12.93% in DER. In Track 2 of CHiME-6, our system provides 13.24%, 12.60%, and 5.65% relative reductions in DER, JER, and WER, respectively.
summary: In traditional speaker diarization systems, a well-trained speaker model is a key component to extract representations from consecutive and partially overlapping segments in a long speech session. To be more consistent with the back-end segmentation and clustering, we propose a new CNN-based speaker modeling scheme, which takes into account the heterogeneity of the speakers in each training segment and batch. We randomly and synthetically augment the training data into a set of segments, each of which contains more than one speaker and some overlapping parts. A soft label is imposed on each segment based on its speaker occupation ratio, and the standard cross entropy loss is implemented in model training. In this way, the speaker model should have the ability to generate a geometrically meaningful embedding for each multi-speaker segment. Experimental results show that our system is superior to the baseline system using x-vectors in two speaker diarization tasks. In the CALLHOME task trained on the NIST SRE and Switchboard datasets, our system achieves a relative reduction of 12.93% in DER. In Track 2 of CHiME-6, our system provides 13.24%, 12.60%, and 5.65% relative reductions in DER, JER, and WER, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在传统的说话人分类系统中，训练有素的说话人模型是从长语音会话中的连续和部分重叠片段中提取表示的关键组件。为了与后端分割和聚类更加一致，我们提出了一种新的基于 CNN 的说话人建模方案，该方案考虑了每个训练片段和批次中说话人的异质性。我们随机地、综合地将训练数据增强为一组片段，每个片段包含多个说话者和一些重叠的部分。根据说话人占据比例对每个片段进行软标签，并在模型训练中实现标准交叉熵损失。通过这种方式，说话者模型应该能够为每个多说话者片段生成具有几何意义的嵌入。实验结果表明，我们的系统在两个说话人二值化任务中优于使用 x 向量的基线系统。在 NIST SRE 和 Switchboard 数据集上训练的 CALLHOME 任务中，我们的系统实现了 DER 相对减少 12.93%。在 CHiME-6 的轨道 2 中，我们的系统分别使 DER、JER 和 WER 相对降低了 13.24%、12.60% 和 5.65%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于异构训练批次组装的CNN说话人建模方法，用于生成更符合后端分割和聚类需求的说话人表示。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人模型未充分考虑训练段内说话人异质性和重叠部分，导致分割聚类效果受限。
AI.method: 通过随机合成多说话人段落并引入软标签（基于说话人占比），结合交叉熵损失训练CNN模型，生成几何意义明确的嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在CALLHOME和CHiME-6任务中，相较x-vector基线分别实现DER降低12.93%、DER/JER/WER降低13.24%/12.60%/5.65%。
AI.conclusion: 异构训练策略有效提升了说话人表示的鲁棒性，验证了该方法在说话人分割任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Gioele Zardini,Zelio Suter,Andrea Censi,Emilio Frazzoli
title: Task-driven Modular Co-design of Vehicle Control Systems
title_zh: 任务驱动的车辆控制系统模块化协同设计
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures. Proceedings of the 2022 IEEE 61th Conference on Decision and Control
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures. Proceedings of the 2022 IEEE 61th Conference on Decision and Control
abstract: When designing autonomous systems, we need to consider multiple trade-offs at various abstraction levels, and the choices of single (hardware and software) components need to be studied jointly. In this work we consider the problem of designing the control algorithm as well as the platform on which it is executed. In particular, we focus on vehicle control systems, and formalize state-of-the-art control schemes as monotone feasibility relations. We then show how, leveraging a monotone theory of co-design, we can study the embedding of control synthesis problems into the task-driven co-design problem of a robotic platform. The properties of the proposed approach are illustrated by considering urban driving scenarios. We show how, given a particular task, we can efficiently compute Pareto optimal design solutions.
summary: When designing autonomous systems, we need to consider multiple trade-offs at various abstraction levels, and the choices of single (hardware and software) components need to be studied jointly. In this work we consider the problem of designing the control algorithm as well as the platform on which it is executed. In particular, we focus on vehicle control systems, and formalize state-of-the-art control schemes as monotone feasibility relations. We then show how, leveraging a monotone theory of co-design, we can study the embedding of control synthesis problems into the task-driven co-design problem of a robotic platform. The properties of the proposed approach are illustrated by considering urban driving scenarios. We show how, given a particular task, we can efficiently compute Pareto optimal design solutions.
abstract_zh: 在设计自治系统时，我们需要考虑不同抽象级别的多重权衡，并且需要共同研究单个（硬件和软件）组件的选择。在这项工作中，我们考虑设计控制算法及其执行平台的问题。我们特别关注车辆控制系统，并将最先进的控制方案形式化为单调可行性关系。然后，我们展示如何利用协同设计的单调理论，研究将控制综合问题嵌入到机器人平台的任务驱动协同设计问题中。通过考虑城市驾驶场景来说明所提出方法的特性。我们展示了如何在给定特定任务的情况下有效地计算帕累托最优设计解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种任务驱动的车辆控制系统模块化协同设计方法，将控制算法与硬件平台联合优化。
AI.motivation: 传统自动驾驶系统设计存在硬件与软件分离导致的次优问题，需通过协同设计平衡多层级权衡。
AI.method: 将控制方案形式化为单调可行性关系，基于单调理论构建协同设计框架，嵌入任务驱动的控制合成问题求解。
AI.result: 通过城市驾驶场景验证，可高效计算满足任务需求的帕累托最优设计解。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新框架实现了任务需求与系统资源的动态平衡，为自动驾驶系统设计提供理论支持与实用工具。

method: 将控制方案形式化为单调可行性关系，基于单调理论构建协同设计框架，嵌入任务驱动的控制合成问题求解。
result: 通过城市驾驶场景验证，可高效计算满足任务需求的帕累托最优设计解。
conclusion: 提出的新框架实现了任务需求与系统资源的动态平衡，为自动驾驶系统设计提供理论支持与实用工具。
search_text: Task-driven Modular Co-design of Vehicle Control Systems 任务驱动的车辆控制系统模块化协同设计 When designing autonomous systems, we need to consider multiple trade-offs at various abstraction levels, and the choices of single (hardware and software) components need to be studied jointly. In this work we consider the problem of designing the control algorithm as well as the platform on which it is executed. In particular, we focus on vehicle control systems, and formalize state-of-the-art control schemes as monotone feasibility relations. We then show how, leveraging a monotone theory of co-design, we can study the embedding of control synthesis problems into the task-driven co-design problem of a robotic platform. The properties of the proposed approach are illustrated by considering urban driving scenarios. We show how, given a particular task, we can efficiently compute Pareto optimal design solutions. 在设计自治系统时，我们需要考虑不同抽象级别的多重权衡，并且需要共同研究单个（硬件和软件）组件的选择。在这项工作中，我们考虑设计控制算法及其执行平台的问题。我们特别关注车辆控制系统，并将最先进的控制方案形式化为单调可行性关系。然后，我们展示如何利用协同设计的单调理论，研究将控制综合问题嵌入到机器人平台的任务驱动协同设计问题中。通过考虑城市驾驶场景来说明所提出方法的特性。我们展示了如何在给定特定任务的情况下有效地计算帕累托最优设计解决方案。 本文提出一种任务驱动的车辆控制系统模块化协同设计方法，将控制算法与硬件平台联合优化。 Gioele Zardini,Zelio Suter,Andrea Censi,Emilio Frazzoli eess.SY,cs.RO

authors_text: Lingjie Mei,Jiayuan Mao,Ziqi Wang,Chuang Gan,Joshua B. Tenenbaum
title: FALCON: Fast Visual Concept Learning by Integrating Images, Linguistic descriptions, and Conceptual Relations
title_zh: FALCON：通过整合图像、语言描述和概念关系进行快速视觉概念学习
comment: First two authors contributed equally. Project page: http://people.csail.mit.edu/jerrymei/projects/falcon/
comments: First two authors contributed equally. Project page: http://people.csail.mit.edu/jerrymei/projects/falcon/
abstract: We present a meta-learning framework for learning new visual concepts quickly, from just one or a few examples, guided by multiple naturally occurring data streams: simultaneously looking at images, reading sentences that describe the objects in the scene, and interpreting supplemental sentences that relate the novel concept with other concepts. The learned concepts support downstream applications, such as answering questions by reasoning about unseen images. Our model, namely FALCON, represents individual visual concepts, such as colors and shapes, as axis-aligned boxes in a high-dimensional space (the "box embedding space"). Given an input image and its paired sentence, our model first resolves the referential expression in the sentence and associates the novel concept with particular objects in the scene. Next, our model interprets supplemental sentences to relate the novel concept with other known concepts, such as "X has property Y" or "X is a kind of Y". Finally, it infers an optimal box embedding for the novel concept that jointly 1) maximizes the likelihood of the observed instances in the image, and 2) satisfies the relationships between the novel concepts and the known ones. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our model on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
summary: We present a meta-learning framework for learning new visual concepts quickly, from just one or a few examples, guided by multiple naturally occurring data streams: simultaneously looking at images, reading sentences that describe the objects in the scene, and interpreting supplemental sentences that relate the novel concept with other concepts. The learned concepts support downstream applications, such as answering questions by reasoning about unseen images. Our model, namely FALCON, represents individual visual concepts, such as colors and shapes, as axis-aligned boxes in a high-dimensional space (the "box embedding space"). Given an input image and its paired sentence, our model first resolves the referential expression in the sentence and associates the novel concept with particular objects in the scene. Next, our model interprets supplemental sentences to relate the novel concept with other known concepts, such as "X has property Y" or "X is a kind of Y". Finally, it infers an optimal box embedding for the novel concept that jointly 1) maximizes the likelihood of the observed instances in the image, and 2) satisfies the relationships between the novel concepts and the known ones. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our model on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种元学习框架，用于在多个自然发生的数据流的指导下，仅从一个或几个示例快速学习新的视觉概念：同时查看图像，阅读描述场景中对象的句子，并解释将新概念与其他概念相关的补充句子。学到的概念支持下游应用，例如通过推理未见过的图像来回答问题。我们的模型，即 FALCON，将单独的视觉概念（例如颜色和形状）表示为高维空间（“框嵌入空间”）中的轴对齐框。给定输入图像及其配对句子，我们的模型首先解析句子中的指称表达，并将新概念与场景中的特定对象相关联。接下来，我们的模型解释补充句子，将新概念与其他已知概念联系起来，例如“X 具有属性 Y”或“X 是 Y 的一种”。最后，它推断出新概念的最佳框嵌入，该框嵌入共同：1）最大化图像中观察到的实例的可能性，2）满足新概念与已知概念之间的关系。我们证明了我们的模型在合成数据集和真实数据集上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FALCON框架，通过整合图像、语言描述和概念关系，实现从少量示例中快速学习视觉概念。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉学习方法在少量样本下表现不佳，且难以结合多模态信息与概念间关系进行有效推理。
AI.method: 模型将视觉概念表示为高维空间中的轴对齐框嵌入，通过解析图像-句子对中的指代关系，并利用补充句子建立新概念与已知概念的关联，联合优化嵌入以满足实例似然与关系约束。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证了模型有效性，支持基于未见过图像的问答等下游任务。
AI.conclusion: 多模态与关系引导的联合学习显著提升少样本视觉概念学习能力，为认知推理提供新范式。
