authors_text: Gasser Elbanna,Alice Biryukov,Neil Scheidwasser-Clow,Lara Orlandic,Pablo Mainar,Mikolaj Kegler,Pierre Beckmann,Milos Cernak
title: Hybrid Handcrafted and Learnable Audio Representation for Analysis of Speech Under Cognitive and Physical Load
title_zh: 用于认知和身体负荷下语音分析的混合手工制作和可学习的音频表示
abstract: As a neurophysiological response to threat or adverse conditions, stress can affect cognition, emotion and behaviour with potentially detrimental effects on health in the case of sustained exposure. Since the affective content of speech is inherently modulated by an individual's physical and mental state, a substantial body of research has been devoted to the study of paralinguistic correlates of stress-inducing task load. Historically, voice stress analysis (VSA) has been conducted using conventional digital signal processing (DSP) techniques. Despite the development of modern methods based on deep neural networks (DNNs), accurately detecting stress in speech remains difficult due to the wide variety of stressors and considerable variability in the individual stress perception. To that end, we introduce a set of five datasets for task load detection in speech. The voice recordings were collected as either cognitive or physical stress was induced in the cohort of volunteers, with a cumulative number of more than a hundred speakers. We used the datasets to design and evaluate a novel self-supervised audio representation that leverages the effectiveness of handcrafted features (DSP-based) and the complexity of data-driven DNN representations. Notably, the proposed approach outperformed both extensive handcrafted feature sets and novel DNN-based audio representation learning approaches.
summary: As a neurophysiological response to threat or adverse conditions, stress can affect cognition, emotion and behaviour with potentially detrimental effects on health in the case of sustained exposure. Since the affective content of speech is inherently modulated by an individual's physical and mental state, a substantial body of research has been devoted to the study of paralinguistic correlates of stress-inducing task load. Historically, voice stress analysis (VSA) has been conducted using conventional digital signal processing (DSP) techniques. Despite the development of modern methods based on deep neural networks (DNNs), accurately detecting stress in speech remains difficult due to the wide variety of stressors and considerable variability in the individual stress perception. To that end, we introduce a set of five datasets for task load detection in speech. The voice recordings were collected as either cognitive or physical stress was induced in the cohort of volunteers, with a cumulative number of more than a hundred speakers. We used the datasets to design and evaluate a novel self-supervised audio representation that leverages the effectiveness of handcrafted features (DSP-based) and the complexity of data-driven DNN representations. Notably, the proposed approach outperformed both extensive handcrafted feature sets and novel DNN-based audio representation learning approaches.
abstract_zh: 作为对威胁或不利条件的神经生理反应，压力会影响认知、情绪和行为，如果持续暴露，可能会对健康产生不利影响。由于言语的情感内容本质上是由个人的身体和精神状态调节的，因此大量的研究致力于研究引起压力的任务负荷的副语言相关性。历史上，语音压力分析 (VSA) 是使用传统的数字信号处理 (DSP) 技术进行的。尽管基于深度神经网络 (DNN) 的现代方法得到了发展，但由于压力源多种多样且个体压力感知存在很大差异，准确检测言语中的压力仍然很困难。为此，我们引入了一组五个数据集，用于语音中的任务负载检测。这些录音是在志愿者群体受到认知或身体压力时收集的，累计人数超过一百人。我们使用这些数据集来设计和评估一种新颖的自监督音频表示，该表示利用了手工制作的特征（基于 DSP）的有效性和数据驱动的 DNN 表示的复杂性。值得注意的是，所提出的方法优于广泛的手工特征集和新颖的基于 DNN 的音频表示学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合手工特征与可学习音频表示的混合方法，用于检测语音中的认知和体力负荷压力。
AI.motivation: 传统数字信号处理（DSP）和深度神经网络（DNN）方法在检测压力时存在局限性，因个体对压力的感知差异大且压力源多样，需更有效的音频表征方法。
AI.method: 设计并评估了一种自监督音频表示方法，融合手工特征（DSP）与数据驱动的DNN表示，构建了包含超过百名受试者的五个语音数据集。
AI.result: 所提方法在任务负荷检测中优于传统手工特征集和新型DNN音频表示方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合手工与可学习音频表示能有效提升压力相关语音分析的准确性。

authors_text: Adi Haviv,Ori Ram,Ofir Press,Peter Izsak,Omer Levy
title: Transformer Language Models without Positional Encodings Still Learn Positional Information
title_zh: 没有位置编码的 Transformer 语言模型仍然可以学习位置信息
abstract: Causal transformer language models (LMs), such as GPT-3, typically require some form of positional encoding, such as positional embeddings. However, we show that LMs without any explicit positional encoding are still competitive with standard models, and that this phenomenon is robust across different datasets, model sizes, and sequence lengths. Probing experiments reveal that such models acquire an implicit notion of absolute positions throughout the network, effectively compensating for the missing information. We conjecture that causal attention enables the model to infer the number of predecessors that each token can attend to, thereby approximating its absolute position. Our findings indicate that causal LMs might derive positional awareness not only from the explicit positioning mechanism, but also from the effects of the causal mask.
summary: Causal transformer language models (LMs), such as GPT-3, typically require some form of positional encoding, such as positional embeddings. However, we show that LMs without any explicit positional encoding are still competitive with standard models, and that this phenomenon is robust across different datasets, model sizes, and sequence lengths. Probing experiments reveal that such models acquire an implicit notion of absolute positions throughout the network, effectively compensating for the missing information. We conjecture that causal attention enables the model to infer the number of predecessors that each token can attend to, thereby approximating its absolute position. Our findings indicate that causal LMs might derive positional awareness not only from the explicit positioning mechanism, but also from the effects of the causal mask.
abstract_zh: 因果变换语言模型 (LM)，例如 GPT-3，通常需要某种形式的位置编码，例如位置嵌入。然而，我们表明，没有任何显式位置编码的 LM 仍然与标准模型具有竞争力，并且这种现象在不同的​​数据集、模型大小和序列长度上都很稳健。探测实验表明，此类模型获得了整个网络中绝对位置的隐式概念，有效地补偿了缺失的信息。我们推测因果注意力使模型能够推断出每个标记可以关注的前趋的数量，从而近似其绝对位置。我们的研究结果表明，因果 LM 不仅可以从显式定位机制中获得位置意识，还可以从因果掩模的影响中获得位置意识。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在没有显式位置编码的情况下，因果Transformer语言模型是否仍能学习位置信息，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer模型依赖显式位置编码（如位置嵌入）来处理序列顺序，但作者质疑是否必须依赖此类设计，并探索模型是否能通过其他机制隐式学习位置信息。
AI.method: 训练无显式位置编码的因果Transformer模型，通过不同数据集、模型规模和序列长度测试其性能；利用探针实验分析模型内部是否隐式学习绝对位置信息，并结合因果注意力机制的特性进行理论推测。
AI.result: 无显式位置编码的模型在多个任务中表现与标准模型相当，探针实验表明模型通过隐式方式获取了绝对位置信息，因果注意力机制使模型能根据可关注的前序标记数量近似推断位置。
AI.conclusion: 因果Transformer模型的位置感知不仅依赖显式编码，还可通过因果掩码和注意力机制隐式学习位置信息，为简化模型设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dylan M. Asmar,Ransalu Senanayake,Shawn Manuel,Mykel J. Kochenderfer
title: Model Predictive Optimized Path Integral Strategies
title_zh: 模型预测优化路径积分策略
abstract: We generalize the derivation of model predictive path integral control (MPPI) to allow for a single joint distribution across controls in the control sequence. This reformation allows for the implementation of adaptive importance sampling (AIS) algorithms into the original importance sampling step while still maintaining the benefits of MPPI such as working with arbitrary system dynamics and cost functions. The benefit of optimizing the proposal distribution by integrating AIS at each control step is demonstrated in simulated environments including controlling multiple cars around a track. The new algorithm is more sample efficient than MPPI, achieving better performance with fewer samples. This performance disparity grows as the dimension of the action space increases. Results from simulations suggest the new algorithm can be used as an anytime algorithm, increasing the value of control at each iteration versus relying on a large set of samples.
summary: We generalize the derivation of model predictive path integral control (MPPI) to allow for a single joint distribution across controls in the control sequence. This reformation allows for the implementation of adaptive importance sampling (AIS) algorithms into the original importance sampling step while still maintaining the benefits of MPPI such as working with arbitrary system dynamics and cost functions. The benefit of optimizing the proposal distribution by integrating AIS at each control step is demonstrated in simulated environments including controlling multiple cars around a track. The new algorithm is more sample efficient than MPPI, achieving better performance with fewer samples. This performance disparity grows as the dimension of the action space increases. Results from simulations suggest the new algorithm can be used as an anytime algorithm, increasing the value of control at each iteration versus relying on a large set of samples.
abstract_zh: 我们概括了模型预测路径积分控制（MPPI）的推导，以允许控制序列中的控制之间的单一联合分布。这一改革允许在原始重要性采样步骤中实施自适应重要性采样 (AIS) 算法，同时仍然保持 MPPI 的优点，例如处理任意系统动态和成本函数。通过在每个控制步骤集成 AIS 来优化提案分配的好处在模拟环境中得到了证明，包括控制赛道周围的多辆汽车。新算法比 MPPI 的样本效率更高，可以用更少的样本获得更好的性能。随着动作空间维度的增加，这种性能差异也会扩大。模拟结果表明，新算法可以用作随时算法，与依赖大量样本相比，可以增加每次迭代的控制值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的模型预测路径积分控制（MPPI）方法，通过整合自适应重要性抽样（AIS）优化控制序列的提议分布，提升样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统MPPI在高维动作空间中样本效率较低，且依赖大量样本实现性能优化，需改进以适应复杂控制场景。
AI.method: 将MPPI推广至单一联合控制分布，结合AIS算法动态优化每步控制的提议分布，保留MPPI对任意系统动态和成本函数的适应性。
AI.result: 新算法在模拟环境中（如多车赛道控制）表现出更高的样本效率，尤其在动作空间维度增加时性能优势显著，并可作为任何时间算法逐步提升控制效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过AIS优化显著提升了MPPI的样本效率与性能，尤其适用于高维控制问题，具有实际应用价值。

Asmar,Ransalu Senanayake,Shawn Manuel,Mykel J. Kochenderfer eess.SY,cs.RO

authors_text: Rui Qian,Weiyao Lin,John See,Dian Li
title: Controllable Augmentations for Video Representation Learning
title_zh: 视频表示学习的可控增强
abstract: This paper focuses on self-supervised video representation learning. Most existing approaches follow the contrastive learning pipeline to construct positive and negative pairs by sampling different clips. However, this formulation tends to bias to static background and have difficulty establishing global temporal structures. The major reason is that the positive pairs, i.e., different clips sampled from the same video, have limited temporal receptive field, and usually share similar background but differ in motions. To address these problems, we propose a framework to jointly utilize local clips and global videos to learn from detailed region-level correspondence as well as general long-term temporal relations. Based on a set of controllable augmentations, we achieve accurate appearance and motion pattern alignment through soft spatio-temporal region contrast. Our formulation is able to avoid the low-level redundancy shortcut by mutual information minimization to improve the generalization. We also introduce local-global temporal order dependency to further bridge the gap between clip-level and video-level representations for robust temporal modeling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework is superior on three video benchmarks in action recognition and video retrieval, capturing more accurate temporal dynamics.
summary: This paper focuses on self-supervised video representation learning. Most existing approaches follow the contrastive learning pipeline to construct positive and negative pairs by sampling different clips. However, this formulation tends to bias to static background and have difficulty establishing global temporal structures. The major reason is that the positive pairs, i.e., different clips sampled from the same video, have limited temporal receptive field, and usually share similar background but differ in motions. To address these problems, we propose a framework to jointly utilize local clips and global videos to learn from detailed region-level correspondence as well as general long-term temporal relations. Based on a set of controllable augmentations, we achieve accurate appearance and motion pattern alignment through soft spatio-temporal region contrast. Our formulation is able to avoid the low-level redundancy shortcut by mutual information minimization to improve the generalization. We also introduce local-global temporal order dependency to further bridge the gap between clip-level and video-level representations for robust temporal modeling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework is superior on three video benchmarks in action recognition and video retrieval, capturing more accurate temporal dynamics.
abstract_zh: 本文重点关注自监督视频表示学习。大多数现有方法遵循对比学习流程，通过对不同的剪辑进行采样来构建正负对。然而，这种表述往往偏向于静态背景，并且难以建立全局时间结构。主要原因是正对，即从同一视频采样的不同剪辑，具有有限的时间感受野，并且通常共享相似的背景但运动不同。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个框架，联合利用本地剪辑和全局视频来学习详细的区域级对应关系以及一般的长期时间关系。基于一组可控增强，我们通过软时空区域对比度实现精确的外观和运动模式对齐。我们的公式能够通过互信息最小化来避免低级冗余捷径，从而提高泛化能力。我们还引入了局部-全局时间顺序依赖性，以进一步弥合剪辑级和视频级表示之间的差距，以实现稳健的时间建模。大量实验表明，我们的框架在动作识别和视频检索方面的三个视频基准测试中表现出色，能够捕获更准确的时间动态。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可控增强框架，通过结合局部片段与全局视频信息，解决视频表征学习中静态背景偏向与全局时间结构建模不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法因正样本对时间感受野有限，导致模型过度关注静态背景而难以捕捉全局时序关系。
AI.method: 设计可控增强策略，联合利用局部剪辑与全局视频信息，通过软时空区域对比对齐外观与运动模式，并引入局部-全局时序依赖关系建模。
AI.result: 在三个视频基准测试中，该框架在动作识别与视频检索任务中均取得优于现有方法的性能，有效捕捉时序动态特征。
AI.conclusion: 通过可控增强与多粒度时序建模，该方法显著提升了视频表征学习的准确性与鲁棒性。

tldr: 本文提出一种可控增强框架，通过结合局部片段与全局视频信息，解决视频表征学习中静态背景偏向与全局时间结构建模不足的问题。
motivation: 现有对比学习方法因正样本对时间感受野有限，导致模型过度关注静态背景而难以捕捉全局时序关系。
method: 设计可控增强策略，联合利用局部剪辑与全局视频信息，通过软时空区域对比对齐外观与运动模式，并引入局部-全局时序依赖关系建模。
result: 在三个视频基准测试中，该框架在动作识别与视频检索任务中均取得优于现有方法的性能，有效捕捉时序动态特征。
conclusion: 通过可控增强与多粒度时序建模，该方法显著提升了视频表征学习的准确性与鲁棒性。
search_text: Controllable Augmentations for Video Representation Learning 视频表示学习的可控增强 This paper focuses on self-supervised video representation learning. Most existing approaches follow the contrastive learning pipeline to construct positive and negative pairs by sampling different clips. However, this formulation tends to bias to static background and have difficulty establishing global temporal structures. The major reason is that the positive pairs, i.e., different clips sampled from the same video, have limited temporal receptive field, and usually share similar background but differ in motions. To address these problems, we propose a framework to jointly utilize local clips and global videos to learn from detailed region-level correspondence as well as general long-term temporal relations. Based on a set of controllable augmentations, we achieve accurate appearance and motion pattern alignment through soft spatio-temporal region contrast. Our formulation is able to avoid the low-level redundancy shortcut by mutual information minimization to improve the generalization. We also introduce local-global temporal order dependency to further bridge the gap between clip-level and video-level representations for robust temporal modeling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework is superior on three video benchmarks in action recognition and video retrieval, capturing more accurate temporal dynamics. 本文重点关注自监督视频表示学习。大多数现有方法遵循对比学习流程，通过对不同的剪辑进行采样来构建正负对。然而，这种表述往往偏向于静态背景，并且难以建立全局时间结构。主要原因是正对，即从同一视频采样的不同剪辑，具有有限的时间感受野，并且通常共享相似的背景但运动不同。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个框架，联合利用本地剪辑和全局视频来学习详细的区域级对应关系以及一般的长期时间关系。基于一组可控增强，我们通过软时空区域对比度实现精确的外观和运动模式对齐。我们的公式能够通过互信息最小化来避免低级冗余捷径，从而提高泛化能力。我们还引入了局部-全局时间顺序依赖性，以进一步弥合剪辑级和视频级表示之间的差距，以实现稳健的时间建模。大量实验表明，我们的框架在动作识别和视频检索方面的三个视频基准测试中表现出色，能够捕获更准确的时间动态。 本文提出一种可控增强框架，通过结合局部片段与全局视频信息，解决视频表征学习中静态背景偏向与全局时间结构建模不足的问题。 Rui Qian,Weiyao Lin,John See,Dian Li cs.CV

authors_text: David Dadon,Ohad Fried,Yacov Hel-Or
title: DDNeRF: Depth Distribution Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: DDNeRF：深度分布神经辐射场
abstract: In recent years, the field of implicit neural representation has progressed significantly. Models such as neural radiance fields (NeRF), which uses relatively small neural networks, can represent high-quality scenes and achieve state-of-the-art results for novel view synthesis. Training these types of networks, however, is still computationally very expensive. We present depth distribution neural radiance field (DDNeRF), a new method that significantly increases sampling efficiency along rays during training while achieving superior results for a given sampling budget. DDNeRF achieves this by learning a more accurate representation of the density distribution along rays. More specifically, we train a coarse model to predict the internal distribution of the transparency of an input volume in addition to the volume's total density. This finer distribution then guides the sampling procedure of the fine model. This method allows us to use fewer samples during training while reducing computational resources.
summary: In recent years, the field of implicit neural representation has progressed significantly. Models such as neural radiance fields (NeRF), which uses relatively small neural networks, can represent high-quality scenes and achieve state-of-the-art results for novel view synthesis. Training these types of networks, however, is still computationally very expensive. We present depth distribution neural radiance field (DDNeRF), a new method that significantly increases sampling efficiency along rays during training while achieving superior results for a given sampling budget. DDNeRF achieves this by learning a more accurate representation of the density distribution along rays. More specifically, we train a coarse model to predict the internal distribution of the transparency of an input volume in addition to the volume's total density. This finer distribution then guides the sampling procedure of the fine model. This method allows us to use fewer samples during training while reducing computational resources.
abstract_zh: 近年来，隐式神经表示领域取得了显着进展。神经辐射场（NeRF）等模型使用相对较小的神经网络，可以表示高质量的场景，并为新颖的视图合成实现最先进的结果。然而，训练这些类型的网络在计算上仍然非常昂贵。我们提出了深度分布神经辐射场（DDNeRF），这是一种新方法，可以显着提高训练过程中沿光线的采样效率，同时在给定的采样预算下取得优异的结果。 DDNeRF 通过学习沿射线的密度分布的更准确表示来实现这一点。更具体地说，我们训练一个粗略模型来预测输入体积的透明度的内部分布以及体积的总密度。然后，这种更精细的分布指导精细模型的采样过程。这种方法允许我们在训练期间使用更少的样本，同时减少计算资源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DDNeRF方法，通过优化深度分布采样提升神经辐射场（NeRF）的训练效率并保持高质量场景重建。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF模型训练过程计算成本高，需大量样本才能达到理想效果，亟需更高效的采样策略以降低资源消耗。
AI.method: 训练粗模型预测体积透明度分布及总密度，利用该分布指导细模型的采样过程，实现更少样本下的高效训练。
AI.result: 在相同采样预算下，DDNeRF相比现有方法显著提升场景重建质量，同时减少计算资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度分布建模优化采样策略，DDNeRF为高效训练高质量神经辐射场提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Ujjwal Baid,Sarthak Pati,Tahsin M. Kurc,Rajarsi Gupta,Erich Bremer,Shahira Abousamra,Siddhesh P. Thakur,Joel H. Saltz,Spyridon Bakas
title: Federated Learning for the Classification of Tumor Infiltrating Lymphocytes
title_zh: 肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞分类的联邦学习
abstract: We evaluate the performance of federated learning (FL) in developing deep learning models for analysis of digitized tissue sections. A classification application was considered as the example use case, on quantifiying the distribution of tumor infiltrating lymphocytes within whole slide images (WSIs). A deep learning classification model was trained using 50*50 square micron patches extracted from the WSIs. We simulated a FL environment in which a dataset, generated from WSIs of cancer from numerous anatomical sites available by The Cancer Genome Atlas repository, is partitioned in 8 different nodes. Our results show that the model trained with the federated training approach achieves similar performance, both quantitatively and qualitatively, to that of a model trained with all the training data pooled at a centralized location. Our study shows that FL has tremendous potential for enabling development of more robust and accurate models for histopathology image analysis without having to collect large and diverse training data at a single location.
summary: We evaluate the performance of federated learning (FL) in developing deep learning models for analysis of digitized tissue sections. A classification application was considered as the example use case, on quantifiying the distribution of tumor infiltrating lymphocytes within whole slide images (WSIs). A deep learning classification model was trained using 50*50 square micron patches extracted from the WSIs. We simulated a FL environment in which a dataset, generated from WSIs of cancer from numerous anatomical sites available by The Cancer Genome Atlas repository, is partitioned in 8 different nodes. Our results show that the model trained with the federated training approach achieves similar performance, both quantitatively and qualitatively, to that of a model trained with all the training data pooled at a centralized location. Our study shows that FL has tremendous potential for enabling development of more robust and accurate models for histopathology image analysis without having to collect large and diverse training data at a single location.
abstract_zh: 我们评估联邦学习（FL）在开发用于分析数字化组织切片的深度学习模型方面的性能。分类应用程序被视为示例用例，用于量化整个幻灯片图像 (WSI) 内肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞的分布。使用从 WSI 中提取的 50*50 平方微米块来训练深度学习分类模型。我们模拟了一个 FL 环境，其中从癌症基因组图谱存储库提供的众多解剖部位的癌症 WSI 生成的数据集被划分为 8 个不同的节点。我们的结果表明，使用联合训练方法训练的模型在数量和质量上都达到了与使用集中在集中位置的所有训练数据训练的模型类似的性能。我们的研究表明，FL 具有巨大的潜力，可以开发更强大、更准确的组织病理学图像分析模型，而无需在单个位置收集大量且多样化的训练数据。

AI.tldr: 本文评估联邦学习在开发深度学习模型用于分析数字化组织切片中的分类任务，具体针对全切片图像中肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞分布的量化。
AI.motivation: 传统病理图像分析需集中大量数据，存在隐私和实际可行性问题。联邦学习可在不集中数据的前提下训练模型，提升模型鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.method: 基于TCGA数据库的WSI数据，生成50×50微米补丁并划分至8个节点模拟联邦学习环境，训练深度学习分类模型。
AI.result: 联邦学习训练的模型在定量和定性表现上与集中式训练模型相当，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习为病理图像分析提供新途径，无需集中收集大规模数据即可开发更精准的模型。

authors_text: Mingfei Chen,Yue Liao,Si Liu,Fei Wang,Jenq-Neng Hwang
title: TR-MOT: Multi-Object Tracking by Reference
title_zh: TR-MOT：通过参考进行多目标跟踪
abstract: Multi-object Tracking (MOT) generally can be split into two sub-tasks, i.e., detection and association. Many previous methods follow the tracking by detection paradigm, which first obtain detections at each frame and then associate them between adjacent frames. Though with an impressive performance by utilizing a strong detector, it will degrade their detection and association performance under scenes with many occlusions and large motion if not using temporal information. In this paper, we propose a novel Reference Search (RS) module to provide a more reliable association based on the deformable transformer structure, which is natural to learn the feature alignment for each object among frames. RS takes previous detected results as references to aggregate the corresponding features from the combined features of the adjacent frames and makes a one-to-one track state prediction for each reference in parallel. Therefore, RS can attain a reliable association coping with unexpected motions by leveraging visual temporal features while maintaining the strong detection performance by decoupling from the detector. Our RS module can also be compatible with the structure of the other tracking by detection frameworks. Furthermore, we propose a joint training strategy and an effective matching pipeline for our online MOT framework with the RS module. Our method achieves competitive results on MOT17 and MOT20 datasets.
summary: Multi-object Tracking (MOT) generally can be split into two sub-tasks, i.e., detection and association. Many previous methods follow the tracking by detection paradigm, which first obtain detections at each frame and then associate them between adjacent frames. Though with an impressive performance by utilizing a strong detector, it will degrade their detection and association performance under scenes with many occlusions and large motion if not using temporal information. In this paper, we propose a novel Reference Search (RS) module to provide a more reliable association based on the deformable transformer structure, which is natural to learn the feature alignment for each object among frames. RS takes previous detected results as references to aggregate the corresponding features from the combined features of the adjacent frames and makes a one-to-one track state prediction for each reference in parallel. Therefore, RS can attain a reliable association coping with unexpected motions by leveraging visual temporal features while maintaining the strong detection performance by decoupling from the detector. Our RS module can also be compatible with the structure of the other tracking by detection frameworks. Furthermore, we propose a joint training strategy and an effective matching pipeline for our online MOT framework with the RS module. Our method achieves competitive results on MOT17 and MOT20 datasets.
abstract_zh: 多目标跟踪（MOT）通常可以分为两个子任务，即检测和关联。以前的许多方法都遵循检测跟踪范式，首先在每一帧获得检测，然后将它们在相邻帧之间关联起来。尽管利用强大的检测器具有令人印象深刻的性能，但如果不使用时间信息，在具有许多遮挡和大运动的场景下，它会降低其检测和关联性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的参考搜索（RS）模块，以基于可变形变压器结构提供更可靠的关联，这可以自然地学习帧间每个对象的特征对齐。 RS以之前的检测结果作为参考，从相邻帧的组合特征中聚合相应的特征，并对每个参考并行地进行一对一的轨迹状态预测。因此，RS可以通过利用视觉时间特征来获得应对意外运动的可靠关联，同时通过与检测器解耦来保持强大的检测性能。我们的RS模块还可以与其他跟踪检测框架的结构兼容。此外，我们为我们的在线 MOT 框架与 RS 模块提出了联合训练策略和有效的匹配管道。我们的方法在 MOT17 和 MOT20 数据集上取得了有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TR-MOT方法，通过引入参考搜索模块改进多目标跟踪中的关联可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统检测-关联范式在遮挡和大运动场景下表现不佳，需利用时序信息提升关联鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于可变形Transformer结构设计参考搜索模块（RS），利用前帧检测结果作为参考，聚合相邻帧特征实现并行轨迹预测，并提出联合训练策略与匹配流程。
AI.result: 在MOT17和MOT20数据集上取得具有竞争力的跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: RS模块通过解耦检测与关联流程，在保持检测性能的同时提升了运动场景下的跟踪鲁棒性，且具有框架兼容性。

search_text: TR-MOT: Multi-Object Tracking by Reference TR-MOT：通过参考进行多目标跟踪 Multi-object Tracking (MOT) generally can be split into two sub-tasks, i.e., detection and association. Many previous methods follow the tracking by detection paradigm, which first obtain detections at each frame and then associate them between adjacent frames. Though with an impressive performance by utilizing a strong detector, it will degrade their detection and association performance under scenes with many occlusions and large motion if not using temporal information. In this paper, we propose a novel Reference Search (RS) module to provide a more reliable association based on the deformable transformer structure, which is natural to learn the feature alignment for each object among frames. RS takes previous detected results as references to aggregate the corresponding features from the combined features of the adjacent frames and makes a one-to-one track state prediction for each reference in parallel. Therefore, RS can attain a reliable association coping with unexpected motions by leveraging visual temporal features while maintaining the strong detection performance by decoupling from the detector. Our RS module can also be compatible with the structure of the other tracking by detection frameworks. Furthermore, we propose a joint training strategy and an effective matching pipeline for our online MOT framework with the RS module. Our method achieves competitive results on MOT17 and MOT20 datasets. 多目标跟踪（MOT）通常可以分为两个子任务，即检测和关联。以前的许多方法都遵循检测跟踪范式，首先在每一帧获得检测，然后将它们在相邻帧之间关联起来。尽管利用强大的检测器具有令人印象深刻的性能，但如果不使用时间信息，在具有许多遮挡和大运动的场景下，它会降低其检测和关联性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的参考搜索（RS）模块，以基于可变形变压器结构提供更可靠的关联，这可以自然地学习帧间每个对象的特征对齐。 RS以之前的检测结果作为参考，从相邻帧的组合特征中聚合相应的特征，并对每个参考并行地进行一对一的轨迹状态预测。因此，RS可以通过利用视觉时间特征来获得应对意外运动的可靠关联，同时通过与检测器解耦来保持强大的检测性能。我们的RS模块还可以与其他跟踪检测框架的结构兼容。此外，我们为我们的在线 MOT 框架与 RS 模块提出了联合训练策略和有效的匹配管道。我们的方法在 MOT17 和 MOT20 数据集上取得了有竞争力的结果。 本文提出TR-MOT方法，通过引入参考搜索模块改进多目标跟踪中的关联可靠性。 Mingfei Chen,Yue Liao,Si Liu,Fei Wang,Jenq-Neng Hwang cs.CV

authors_text: Brian Davis,Bryan Morse,Bryan Price,Chris Tensmeyer,Curtis Wigington,Vlad Morariu
title: End-to-end Document Recognition and Understanding with Dessurt
title_zh: 使用 Dessurt 进行端到端文档识别和理解
abstract: We introduce Dessurt, a relatively simple document understanding transformer capable of being fine-tuned on a greater variety of document tasks than prior methods. It receives a document image and task string as input and generates arbitrary text autoregressively as output. Because Dessurt is an end-to-end architecture that performs text recognition in addition to the document understanding, it does not require an external recognition model as prior methods do. Dessurt is a more flexible model than prior methods and is able to handle a variety of document domains and tasks. We show that this model is effective at 9 different dataset-task combinations.
summary: We introduce Dessurt, a relatively simple document understanding transformer capable of being fine-tuned on a greater variety of document tasks than prior methods. It receives a document image and task string as input and generates arbitrary text autoregressively as output. Because Dessurt is an end-to-end architecture that performs text recognition in addition to the document understanding, it does not require an external recognition model as prior methods do. Dessurt is a more flexible model than prior methods and is able to handle a variety of document domains and tasks. We show that this model is effective at 9 different dataset-task combinations.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 Dessurt，这是一种相对简单的文档理解转换器，与之前的方法相比，它能够针对更多种类的文档任务进行微调。它接收文档图像和任务字符串作为输入，并以自回归方式生成任意文本作为输出。由于 Dessurt 是一种端到端架构，除了文档理解之外还执行文本识别，因此它不需要像现有方法那样需要外部识别模型。 Dessurt 是一种比以前的方法更灵活的模型，能够处理各种文档域和任务。我们证明该模型在 9 种不同的数据集-任务组合中是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dessurt，一种端到端的文档识别与理解模型，无需依赖外部识别模块即可处理多种文档任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需依赖外部识别模型，限制了灵活性和跨领域适应性，亟需统一处理文档识别与理解的端到端方案。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构设计Dessurt，输入文档图像及任务描述字符串，通过自回归方式直接生成文本输出，整合识别与理解流程。
AI.result: 模型在9种不同数据集-任务组合中均表现出有效性，验证了其跨领域和多任务处理能力。
AI.conclusion: Dessurt通过端到端设计实现了更灵活的文档处理，为多任务文档分析提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Ruwan Wickramarachchi,Cory Henson,Amit Sheth
title: Knowledge-based Entity Prediction for Improved Machine Perception in Autonomous Systems
title_zh: 基于知识的实体预测可改善自主系统中的机器感知
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, in IEEE Intelligent Systems, 2022
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures, in IEEE Intelligent Systems, 2022
abstract: Knowledge-based entity prediction (KEP) is a novel task that aims to improve machine perception in autonomous systems. KEP leverages relational knowledge from heterogeneous sources in predicting potentially unrecognized entities. In this paper, we provide a formal definition of KEP as a knowledge completion task. Three potential solutions are then introduced, which employ several machine learning and data mining techniques. Finally, the applicability of KEP is demonstrated on two autonomous systems from different domains; namely, autonomous driving and smart manufacturing. We argue that in complex real-world systems, the use of KEP would significantly improve machine perception while pushing the current technology one step closer to achieving full autonomy.
summary: Knowledge-based entity prediction (KEP) is a novel task that aims to improve machine perception in autonomous systems. KEP leverages relational knowledge from heterogeneous sources in predicting potentially unrecognized entities. In this paper, we provide a formal definition of KEP as a knowledge completion task. Three potential solutions are then introduced, which employ several machine learning and data mining techniques. Finally, the applicability of KEP is demonstrated on two autonomous systems from different domains; namely, autonomous driving and smart manufacturing. We argue that in complex real-world systems, the use of KEP would significantly improve machine perception while pushing the current technology one step closer to achieving full autonomy.
abstract_zh: 基于知识的实体预测（KEP）是一项新颖的任务，旨在改善自主系统中的机器感知。 KEP 利用来自异构源的关系知识来预测潜在的无法识别的实体。在本文中，我们提供了 KEP 作为知识完成任务的正式定义。然后介绍了三种潜在的解决方案，它们采用了多种机器学习和数据挖掘技术。最后，在来自不同领域的两个自治系统上证明了 KEP 的适用性；即自动驾驶和智能制造。我们认为，在复杂的现实系统中，KEP 的使用将显着改善机器感知，同时推动当前技术更接近实现完全自主。

AI.tldr: 提出基于知识的实体预测（KEP）作为知识补全任务，以提升自主系统的机器感知能力，预测未识别实体。
AI.motivation: 在复杂现实系统中，机器感知需要更准确的实体识别，而传统方法难以处理异构数据中的潜在实体，KEP通过整合多源关系知识来弥补这一缺陷。
AI.method: 提出三种基于机器学习和数据挖掘技术的解决方案，利用异构数据中的关系知识进行实体预测。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶和智能制造系统中验证了KEP的有效性，表明其能显著提升机器感知性能，推动自主技术发展。
AI.conclusion: KEP通过整合多源知识提升机器感知，是实现自主系统全面自主的关键步骤。

authors_text: Saurabh Kataria,Jesús Villalba,Laureano Moro-Velázquez,Najim Dehak
title: Joint domain adaptation and speech bandwidth extension using time-domain GANs for speaker verification
title_zh: 使用时域 GAN 进行联合域自适应和语音带宽扩展进行说话人验证
abstract: Speech systems developed for a particular choice of acoustic domain and sampling frequency do not translate easily to others. The usual practice is to learn domain adaptation and bandwidth extension models independently. Contrary to this, we propose to learn both tasks together. Particularly, we learn to map narrowband conversational telephone speech to wideband microphone speech. We developed parallel and non-parallel learning solutions which utilize both paired and unpaired data. First, we first discuss joint and disjoint training of multiple generative models for our tasks. Then, we propose a two-stage learning solution where we use a pre-trained domain adaptation system for pre-processing in bandwidth extension training. We evaluated our schemes on a Speaker Verification downstream task. We used the JHU-MIT experimental setup for NIST SRE21, which comprises SRE16, SRE-CTS Superset and SRE21. Our results provide the first evidence that learning both tasks is better than learning just one. On SRE16, our best system achieves 22% relative improvement in Equal Error Rate w.r.t. a direct learning baseline and 8% w.r.t. a strong bandwidth expansion system.
summary: Speech systems developed for a particular choice of acoustic domain and sampling frequency do not translate easily to others. The usual practice is to learn domain adaptation and bandwidth extension models independently. Contrary to this, we propose to learn both tasks together. Particularly, we learn to map narrowband conversational telephone speech to wideband microphone speech. We developed parallel and non-parallel learning solutions which utilize both paired and unpaired data. First, we first discuss joint and disjoint training of multiple generative models for our tasks. Then, we propose a two-stage learning solution where we use a pre-trained domain adaptation system for pre-processing in bandwidth extension training. We evaluated our schemes on a Speaker Verification downstream task. We used the JHU-MIT experimental setup for NIST SRE21, which comprises SRE16, SRE-CTS Superset and SRE21. Our results provide the first evidence that learning both tasks is better than learning just one. On SRE16, our best system achieves 22% relative improvement in Equal Error Rate w.r.t. a direct learning baseline and 8% w.r.t. a strong bandwidth expansion system.
abstract_zh: 为特定声学域和采样频率选择而开发的语音系统不容易转换到其他系统。通常的做法是独立学习域适应和带宽扩展模型。与此相反，我们建议一起学习这两项任务。特别是，我们学习将窄带会话电话语音映射到宽带麦克风语音。我们开发了并行和非并行学习解决方案，它们利用配对和不配对数据。首先，我们首先讨论针对我们的任务的多个生成模型的联合和不相交训练。然后，我们提出了一个两阶段学习解决方案，其中我们使用预训练的域适应系统在带宽扩展训练中进行预处理。我们在说话人验证下游任务中评估了我们的方案。我们使用 JHU-MIT 的 NIST SRE21 实验装置，其中包括 SRE16、SRE-CTS Superset 和 SRE21。我们的结果提供了第一个证据，证明学习这两项任务比只学习一项任务更好。在 SRE16 上，我们最好的系统在等错误率方面实现了 22% 的相对改进。直接学习基线和 8% w.r.t.强大的带宽扩展系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合领域自适应和语音带宽扩展的联合学习方法，使用时域GANs提升说话人验证性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将领域自适应与带宽扩展作为独立任务处理，导致性能受限，需探索联合学习以提升跨域语音系统的适应性。
AI.method: 基于时域GANs设计联合训练框架，利用配对和非配对数据，提出并行与非并行学习方案，并采用两阶段训练策略（先预训练领域自适应模型再进行带宽扩展）。
AI.result: 在NIST SRE16数据集上，最佳系统相较直接学习基线相对降低22%的等错误率（EER），优于强带宽扩展系统8%。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化领域自适应与带宽扩展任务能显著提升说话人验证性能，验证了任务协同学习的有效性。

authors_text: Shahab Aslani,Pavan Alluri,Eyjolfur Gudmundsson,Edward Chandy,John McCabe,Anand Devaraj,Carolyn Horst,Sam M Janes,Rahul Chakkara,Arjun Nair,Daniel C Alexander,SUMMIT consortium,Joseph Jacob
title: Enhancing Cancer Prediction in Challenging Screen-Detected Incident Lung Nodules Using Time-Series Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用时间序列深度学习增强对具有挑战性的屏幕检测事件肺结节的癌症预测
abstract: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer-related mortality worldwide. Lung cancer screening (LCS) using annual low-dose computed tomography (CT) scanning has been proven to significantly reduce lung cancer mortality by detecting cancerous lung nodules at an earlier stage. Improving risk stratification of malignancy risk in lung nodules can be enhanced using machine/deep learning algorithms. However most existing algorithms: a) have primarily assessed single time-point CT data alone thereby failing to utilize the inherent advantages contained within longitudinal imaging datasets; b) have not integrated into computer models pertinent clinical data that might inform risk prediction; c) have not assessed algorithm performance on the spectrum of nodules that are most challenging for radiologists to interpret and where assistance from analytic tools would be most beneficial. Here we show the performance of our time-series deep learning model (DeepCAD-NLM-L) which integrates multi-model information across three longitudinal data domains: nodule-specific, lung-specific, and clinical demographic data. We compared our time-series deep learning model to a) radiologist performance on CTs from the National Lung Screening Trial enriched with the most challenging nodules for diagnosis; b) a nodule management algorithm from a North London LCS study (SUMMIT). Our model demonstrated comparable and complementary performance to radiologists when interpreting challenging lung nodules and showed improved performance (AUC=88\%) against models utilizing single time-point data only. The results emphasise the importance of time-series, multi-modal analysis when interpreting malignancy risk in LCS.
summary: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer-related mortality worldwide. Lung cancer screening (LCS) using annual low-dose computed tomography (CT) scanning has been proven to significantly reduce lung cancer mortality by detecting cancerous lung nodules at an earlier stage. Improving risk stratification of malignancy risk in lung nodules can be enhanced using machine/deep learning algorithms. However most existing algorithms: a) have primarily assessed single time-point CT data alone thereby failing to utilize the inherent advantages contained within longitudinal imaging datasets; b) have not integrated into computer models pertinent clinical data that might inform risk prediction; c) have not assessed algorithm performance on the spectrum of nodules that are most challenging for radiologists to interpret and where assistance from analytic tools would be most beneficial. Here we show the performance of our time-series deep learning model (DeepCAD-NLM-L) which integrates multi-model information across three longitudinal data domains: nodule-specific, lung-specific, and clinical demographic data. We compared our time-series deep learning model to a) radiologist performance on CTs from the National Lung Screening Trial enriched with the most challenging nodules for diagnosis; b) a nodule management algorithm from a North London LCS study (SUMMIT). Our model demonstrated comparable and complementary performance to radiologists when interpreting challenging lung nodules and showed improved performance (AUC=88\%) against models utilizing single time-point data only. The results emphasise the importance of time-series, multi-modal analysis when interpreting malignancy risk in LCS.
abstract_zh: 肺癌是全球癌症相关死亡的主要原因。每年使用低剂量计算机断层扫描 (CT) 进行肺癌筛查 (LCS) 已被证明可以通过在早期检测癌性肺结节来显着降低肺癌死亡率。使用机器/深度学习算法可以增强改善肺结节恶性肿瘤风险的风险分层。然而，大多数现有算法：a）主要仅评估单时间点 CT 数据，因此未能利用纵向成像数据集中包含的固有优势； b) 尚未将可能为风险预测提供信息的相关临床数据集成到计算机模型中； c) 尚未评估算法在对放射科医生解释最具挑战性以及分析工具的帮助最有益的结节谱上的性能。在这里，我们展示了时间序列深度学习模型 (DeepCAD-NLM-L) 的性能，该模型集成了三个纵向数据域的多模型信息：结节特定、肺部特定和临床人口统计数据。我们将时间序列深度学习模型与国家肺部筛查试验中的放射科医生在 CT 上的表现进行了比较，该试验富含诊断最具挑战性的结节； b) 来自北伦敦 LCS 研究 (SUMMIT) 的结核管理算法。我们的模型在解释具有挑战性的肺结节时，与放射科医生展示了可比较和互补的性能，并且与仅使用单个时间点数据的模型相比，表现出更好的性能（AUC=88%）。结果强调了时间序列、多模式分析在解释 LCS 恶性肿瘤风险时的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间序列的深度学习模型（DeepCAD-NLM-L），通过整合多模态纵向数据（结节特异性、肺部特异性及临床人口学数据）来提升对筛查中难以诊断的肺结节恶性风险的预测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有算法主要依赖单时间点CT数据，未整合临床数据，且未针对放射科医生难以判断的复杂结节进行优化，导致风险分层效果有限。
AI.method: 构建时间序列深度学习模型，融合纵向影像数据与临床信息，对比放射科医生及现有结节管理算法（SUMMIT）的性能。
AI.result: 模型在挑战性结节上的AUC达88%，优于单时间点模型，且与放射科医生表现相当，具备互补性。
AI.conclusion: 时间序列多模态分析对提升肺癌筛查中恶性风险预测具有重要意义，可为临床决策提供辅助支持。

authors_text: Jonathan Álvarez Ariza,Heyson Baez
title: Understanding the role of single-board computers in engineering and computer science education: A systematic literature review
title_zh: 了解单板计算机在工程和计算机科学教育中的作用：系统文献综述
abstract: In the last decade, Single-Board Computers (SBCs) have been employed more frequently in engineering and computer science both to technical and educational levels. Several factors such as the versatility, the low-cost, and the possibility to enhance the learning process through technology have contributed to the educators and students usually employ these devices. However, the implications, possibilities, and constraints of these devices in engineering and Computer Science (CS) education have not been explored in detail. In this systematic literature review, we explore how the SBCs are employed in engineering and computer science and what educational results are derived from their usage in the period 2010-2020 at tertiary education. For that, 154 studies were selected out of n=605 collected from the academic databases Ei Compendex, ERIC, and Inspec. The analysis was carried-out in two phases, identifying, e.g., areas of application, learning outcomes, and students and researchers' perceptions. The results mainly indicate the following aspects: (1) The areas of laboratories and e-learning, computing education, robotics, Internet of Things (IoT), and persons with disabilities gather the studies in the review. (2) Researchers highlight the importance of the SBCs to transform the curricula in engineering and CS for the students to learn complex topics through experimentation in hands-on activities. (3) The typical cognitive learning outcomes reported by the authors are the improvement of the students' grades and the technical skills regarding the topics in the courses. Concerning the affective learning outcomes, the increase of interest, motivation, and engagement are commonly reported by the authors.
summary: In the last decade, Single-Board Computers (SBCs) have been employed more frequently in engineering and computer science both to technical and educational levels. Several factors such as the versatility, the low-cost, and the possibility to enhance the learning process through technology have contributed to the educators and students usually employ these devices. However, the implications, possibilities, and constraints of these devices in engineering and Computer Science (CS) education have not been explored in detail. In this systematic literature review, we explore how the SBCs are employed in engineering and computer science and what educational results are derived from their usage in the period 2010-2020 at tertiary education. For that, 154 studies were selected out of n=605 collected from the academic databases Ei Compendex, ERIC, and Inspec. The analysis was carried-out in two phases, identifying, e.g., areas of application, learning outcomes, and students and researchers' perceptions. The results mainly indicate the following aspects: (1) The areas of laboratories and e-learning, computing education, robotics, Internet of Things (IoT), and persons with disabilities gather the studies in the review. (2) Researchers highlight the importance of the SBCs to transform the curricula in engineering and CS for the students to learn complex topics through experimentation in hands-on activities. (3) The typical cognitive learning outcomes reported by the authors are the improvement of the students' grades and the technical skills regarding the topics in the courses. Concerning the affective learning outcomes, the increase of interest, motivation, and engagement are commonly reported by the authors.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，单板计算机 (SBC) 在工程和计算机科学的技术和教育层面上得到了更频繁的使用。多功能性、低成本以及通过技术增强学习过程的可能性等几个因素促使教育工作者和学生通常使用这些设备。然而，这些设备在工程和计算机科学 (CS) 教育中的影响、可能性和限制尚未得到详细探讨。在这篇系统文献综述中，我们探讨了 SBC 在工程和计算机科学领域的应用情况，以及 2010-2020 年高等教育中使用 SBC 产生的教育成果。为此，我们从学术数据库 Ei Compendex、ERIC 和 Inspec 收集的 n=605 项研究中选出了 154 项。分析分两个阶段进行，确定应用领域、学习成果以及学生和研究人员的看法等。结果主要表明以下几个方面：（1）实验室和电子学习、计算机教育、机器人、物联网和残疾人等领域的研究集中在综述中。 (2) 研究人员强调了 SBC 对工程和计算机科学课程改革的重要性，以便学生通过实践活动中的实验来学习复杂的主题。 (3) 作者报告的典型认知学习成果是学生成绩和课程主题技术技能的提高。关于情感学习成果，作者通常报告兴趣、动机和参与度的增加。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统文献综述分析单板计算机（SBC）在工程与计算机科学教育中的应用及其教育效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管单板计算机因低成本和多功能性被广泛使用，但其在教育领域的具体影响、潜力及限制尚未被详细探讨。
AI.method: 从Ei Compendex、ERIC和Inspec数据库中筛选2010-2020年的605篇文献，最终选取154篇进行两阶段分析，聚焦应用领域、学习成果及师生认知。
AI.result: 研究发现SBC主要用于实验室、在线学习、物联网及特殊教育领域，显著提升学生技术技能与成绩，同时增强学习兴趣与参与度。
AI.conclusion: SBC通过实践教学有效促进复杂概念的理解，建议将其纳入工程与计算机科学课程体系，并需进一步探索其长期教育价值。

search_text: Understanding the role of single-board computers in engineering and computer science education: A systematic literature review 了解单板计算机在工程和计算机科学教育中的作用：系统文献综述 In the last decade, Single-Board Computers (SBCs) have been employed more frequently in engineering and computer science both to technical and educational levels. Several factors such as the versatility, the low-cost, and the possibility to enhance the learning process through technology have contributed to the educators and students usually employ these devices. However, the implications, possibilities, and constraints of these devices in engineering and Computer Science (CS) education have not been explored in detail. In this systematic literature review, we explore how the SBCs are employed in engineering and computer science and what educational results are derived from their usage in the period 2010-2020 at tertiary education. For that, 154 studies were selected out of n=605 collected from the academic databases Ei Compendex, ERIC, and Inspec. The analysis was carried-out in two phases, identifying, e.g., areas of application, learning outcomes, and students and researchers' perceptions. The results mainly indicate the following aspects: (1) The areas of laboratories and e-learning, computing education, robotics, Internet of Things (IoT), and persons with disabilities gather the studies in the review. (2) Researchers highlight the importance of the SBCs to transform the curricula in engineering and CS for the students to learn complex topics through experimentation in hands-on activities. (3) The typical cognitive learning outcomes reported by the authors are the improvement of the students' grades and the technical skills regarding the topics in the courses. Concerning the affective learning outcomes, the increase of interest, motivation, and engagement are commonly reported by the authors. 在过去的十年中，单板计算机 (SBC) 在工程和计算机科学的技术和教育层面上得到了更频繁的使用。多功能性、低成本以及通过技术增强学习过程的可能性等几个因素促使教育工作者和学生通常使用这些设备。然而，这些设备在工程和计算机科学 (CS) 教育中的影响、可能性和限制尚未得到详细探讨。在这篇系统文献综述中，我们探讨了 SBC 在工程和计算机科学领域的应用情况，以及 2010-2020 年高等教育中使用 SBC 产生的教育成果。为此，我们从学术数据库 Ei Compendex、ERIC 和 Inspec 收集的 n=605 项研究中选出了 154 项。分析分两个阶段进行，确定应用领域、学习成果以及学生和研究人员的看法等。结果主要表明以下几个方面：（1）实验室和电子学习、计算机教育、机器人、物联网和残疾人等领域的研究集中在综述中。 (2) 研究人员强调了 SBC 对工程和计算机科学课程改革的重要性，以便学生通过实践活动中的实验来学习复杂的主题。 (3) 作者报告的典型认知学习成果是学生成绩和课程主题技术技能的提高。关于情感学习成果，作者通常报告兴趣、动机和参与度的增加。 本文通过系统文献综述分析单板计算机（SBC）在工程与计算机科学教育中的应用及其教育效果。 Jonathan Álvarez Ariza,Heyson Baez cs.CY,cs.PL,cs.RO

authors_text: Jichao Fan,Yingheng Tang,Weilu Gao
title: Perfectly Perform Machine Learning Task with Imperfect Optical Hardware Accelerator
title_zh: 用不完美的光学硬件加速器完美执行机器学习任务
abstract: Optical architectures have been emerging as an energy-efficient and high-throughput hardware platform to accelerate computationally intensive general matrix-matrix multiplications (GEMMs) in modern machine learning (ML) algorithms. However, the inevitable imperfection and non-uniformity in large-scale optoelectronic devices prevent the scalable deployment of optical architectures, particularly those with innovative nano-devices. Here, we report an optical ML hardware to accelerate GEMM operations based on cascaded spatial light modulators and present a calibration procedure that enables accurate calculations despite the non-uniformity and imperfection in devices and system. We further characterize the hardware calculation accuracy under different configurations of electrical-optical interfaces. Finally, we deploy the developed optical hardware and calibration procedure to perform a ML task of predicting the intersubband plasmon frequency in single-wall carbon nanotubes. The obtained prediction accuracy from the optical hardware agrees well with that obtained using a general purpose electronic graphic process unit.
summary: Optical architectures have been emerging as an energy-efficient and high-throughput hardware platform to accelerate computationally intensive general matrix-matrix multiplications (GEMMs) in modern machine learning (ML) algorithms. However, the inevitable imperfection and non-uniformity in large-scale optoelectronic devices prevent the scalable deployment of optical architectures, particularly those with innovative nano-devices. Here, we report an optical ML hardware to accelerate GEMM operations based on cascaded spatial light modulators and present a calibration procedure that enables accurate calculations despite the non-uniformity and imperfection in devices and system. We further characterize the hardware calculation accuracy under different configurations of electrical-optical interfaces. Finally, we deploy the developed optical hardware and calibration procedure to perform a ML task of predicting the intersubband plasmon frequency in single-wall carbon nanotubes. The obtained prediction accuracy from the optical hardware agrees well with that obtained using a general purpose electronic graphic process unit.
abstract_zh: 光学架构已成为一种节能、高吞吐量的硬件平台，可加速现代机器学习 (ML) 算法中的计算密集型通用矩阵-矩阵乘法 (GEMM)。然而，大规模光电器件中不可避免的缺陷和不均匀性阻碍了光学架构的可扩展部署，特别是那些具有创新纳米器件的光学架构。在这里，我们报告了一种光学 ML 硬件，可加速基于级联空间光调制器的 GEMM 操作，并提出了一种校准程序，尽管设备和系统存在不均匀性和缺陷，但仍能实现精确计算。我们进一步表征了不同电光接口配置下的硬件计算精度。最后，我们部署开发的光学硬件和校准程序来执行预测单壁碳纳米管中子带间等离子体频率的机器学习任务。从光学硬件获得的预测精度与使用通用电子图形处理单元获得的预测精度非常一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于级联空间光调制器的光学机器学习硬件加速器，并通过校准方法克服设备非均匀性问题，成功完成机器学习任务。
AI.motivation: 光学架构虽具高能效和高吞吐量优势，但大规模光电子器件的非均匀性与缺陷阻碍了其在机器学习中的可扩展应用。
AI.method: 设计级联空间光调制器实现GEMM加速，开发校准流程补偿器件缺陷，并通过电光接口配置分析硬件精度。
AI.result: 光学硬件在预测单壁碳纳米管间子带等离子体频率任务中，预测精度与电子GPU结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 通过校准方法可有效利用缺陷光学硬件完成机器学习任务，为光学计算提供可行方案。

authors_text: Priyanshi Shah,Harveen Singh Chadha,Anirudh Gupta,Ankur Dhuriya,Neeraj Chhimwal,Rishabh Gaur,Vivek Raghavan
title: Is Word Error Rate a good evaluation metric for Speech Recognition in Indic Languages?
title_zh: 单词错误率是印度语言语音识别的良好评估指标吗？
comment: Need to upgrade the content completely
comments: Need to upgrade the content completely
abstract: We propose a new method for the calculation of error rates in Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). This new metric is for languages that contain half characters and where the same character can be written in different forms. We implement our methodology in Hindi which is one of the main languages from Indic context and we think this approach is scalable to other similar languages containing a large character set. We call our metrics Alternate Word Error Rate (AWER) and Alternate Character Error Rate (ACER). We train our ASR models using wav2vec 2.0\cite{baevski2020wav2vec} for Indic languages. Additionally we use language models to improve our model performance. Our results show a significant improvement in analyzing the error rates at word and character level and the interpretability of the ASR system is improved upto $3$\% in AWER and $7$\% in ACER for Hindi. Our experiments suggest that in languages which have complex pronunciation, there are multiple ways of writing words without changing their meaning. In such cases AWER and ACER will be more useful rather than WER and CER as metrics. Further, we open source a new benchmarking dataset of 21 hours for Hindi with the new metric scripts.
summary: We propose a new method for the calculation of error rates in Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). This new metric is for languages that contain half characters and where the same character can be written in different forms. We implement our methodology in Hindi which is one of the main languages from Indic context and we think this approach is scalable to other similar languages containing a large character set. We call our metrics Alternate Word Error Rate (AWER) and Alternate Character Error Rate (ACER). We train our ASR models using wav2vec 2.0\cite{baevski2020wav2vec} for Indic languages. Additionally we use language models to improve our model performance. Our results show a significant improvement in analyzing the error rates at word and character level and the interpretability of the ASR system is improved upto $3$\% in AWER and $7$\% in ACER for Hindi. Our experiments suggest that in languages which have complex pronunciation, there are multiple ways of writing words without changing their meaning. In such cases AWER and ACER will be more useful rather than WER and CER as metrics. Further, we open source a new benchmarking dataset of 21 hours for Hindi with the new metric scripts.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种计算自动语音识别（ASR）中错误率的新方法。这个新指标适用于包含半个字符且相同字符可以以不同形式书写的语言。我们用印地语实施我们的方法，印地语是印度语环境中的主要语言之一，我们认为这种方法可以扩展到包含大字符集的其他类似语言。我们将我们的指标称为替代字错误率 (AWER) 和替代字符错误率 (ACER)。我们使用印度语的 wav2vec 2.0\cite{baevski2020wav2vec} 训练我们的 ASR 模型。此外，我们使用语言模型来提高模型性能。我们的结果表明，在分析单词和字符级别的错误率方面有了显着改进，并且 ASR 系统的可解释性在 AWER 中提高了 3$\%，在 ACER 中提高了 7$\%。我们的实验表明，在具有复杂发音的语言中，有多种书写单词的方式而不改变其含义。在这种情况下，作为指标，AWER 和 ACER 将比 WER 和 CER 更有用。此外，我们还使用新的指标脚本开源了 21 小时印地语的新基准测试数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对印地语等复杂字符集语言的自动语音识别（ASR）错误率计算新方法，即Alternate Word Error Rate（AWER）和Alternate Character Error Rate（ACER）。
AI.motivation: 传统词错误率（WER）和字符错误率（CER）无法准确评估包含半字符且同一字符有多种写法的印度语言ASR系统，需改进评估指标以适应复杂拼写特性。
AI.method: 基于wav2vec 2.0训练印地语ASR模型，并结合语言模型优化；设计AWER和ACER指标，考虑同义异形词的多样性，构建21小时印地语开源基准数据集。
AI.result: 在印地语测试中，AWER和ACER指标分别提升3%和7%，显著增强错误分析可解释性，验证了新指标对复杂发音语言的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 对于存在多写法且不改变语义的语言，AWER和ACER比传统WER/CER更有效，为印度语言及其他类似语言的ASR评估提供新思路。

search_text: Is Word Error Rate a good evaluation metric for Speech Recognition in Indic Languages? 单词错误率是印度语言语音识别的良好评估指标吗？ We propose a new method for the calculation of error rates in Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). This new metric is for languages that contain half characters and where the same character can be written in different forms. We implement our methodology in Hindi which is one of the main languages from Indic context and we think this approach is scalable to other similar languages containing a large character set. We call our metrics Alternate Word Error Rate (AWER) and Alternate Character Error Rate (ACER). We train our ASR models using wav2vec 2.0\cite{baevski2020wav2vec} for Indic languages. Additionally we use language models to improve our model performance. Our results show a significant improvement in analyzing the error rates at word and character level and the interpretability of the ASR system is improved upto $3$\% in AWER and $7$\% in ACER for Hindi. Our experiments suggest that in languages which have complex pronunciation, there are multiple ways of writing words without changing their meaning. In such cases AWER and ACER will be more useful rather than WER and CER as metrics. Further, we open source a new benchmarking dataset of 21 hours for Hindi with the new metric scripts. 我们提出了一种计算自动语音识别（ASR）中错误率的新方法。这个新指标适用于包含半个字符且相同字符可以以不同形式书写的语言。我们用印地语实施我们的方法，印地语是印度语环境中的主要语言之一，我们认为这种方法可以扩展到包含大字符集的其他类似语言。我们将我们的指标称为替代字错误率 (AWER) 和替代字符错误率 (ACER)。我们使用印度语的 wav2vec 2.0\cite{baevski2020wav2vec} 训练我们的 ASR 模型。此外，我们使用语言模型来提高模型性能。我们的结果表明，在分析单词和字符级别的错误率方面有了显着改进，并且 ASR 系统的可解释性在 AWER 中提高了 3$\%，在 ACER 中提高了 7$\%。我们的实验表明，在具有复杂发音的语言中，有多种书写单词的方式而不改变其含义。在这种情况下，作为指标，AWER 和 ACER 将比 WER 和 CER 更有用。此外，我们还使用新的指标脚本开源了 21 小时印地语的新基准测试数据集。 本文提出针对印地语等复杂字符集语言的自动语音识别（ASR）错误率计算新方法，即Alternate Word Error Rate（AWER）和Alternate Character Error Rate（ACER）。 Priyanshi Shah,Harveen Singh Chadha,Anirudh Gupta,Ankur Dhuriya,Neeraj Chhimwal,Rishabh Gaur,Vivek Raghavan cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Yida Wang,David Joseph Tan,Nassir Navab,Federico Tombari
title: Learning Local Displacements for Point Cloud Completion
title_zh: 学习局部位移以完成点云
comment: Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022
comments: Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022
abstract: We propose a novel approach aimed at object and semantic scene completion from a partial scan represented as a 3D point cloud. Our architecture relies on three novel layers that are used successively within an encoder-decoder structure and specifically developed for the task at hand. The first one carries out feature extraction by matching the point features to a set of pre-trained local descriptors. Then, to avoid losing individual descriptors as part of standard operations such as max-pooling, we propose an alternative neighbor-pooling operation that relies on adopting the feature vectors with the highest activations. Finally, up-sampling in the decoder modifies our feature extraction in order to increase the output dimension. While this model is already able to achieve competitive results with the state of the art, we further propose a way to increase the versatility of our approach to process point clouds. To this aim, we introduce a second model that assembles our layers within a transformer architecture. We evaluate both architectures on object and indoor scene completion tasks, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
summary: We propose a novel approach aimed at object and semantic scene completion from a partial scan represented as a 3D point cloud. Our architecture relies on three novel layers that are used successively within an encoder-decoder structure and specifically developed for the task at hand. The first one carries out feature extraction by matching the point features to a set of pre-trained local descriptors. Then, to avoid losing individual descriptors as part of standard operations such as max-pooling, we propose an alternative neighbor-pooling operation that relies on adopting the feature vectors with the highest activations. Finally, up-sampling in the decoder modifies our feature extraction in order to increase the output dimension. While this model is already able to achieve competitive results with the state of the art, we further propose a way to increase the versatility of our approach to process point clouds. To this aim, we introduce a second model that assembles our layers within a transformer architecture. We evaluate both architectures on object and indoor scene completion tasks, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，旨在从表示为 3D 点云的部分扫描中完成对象和语义场景。我们的架构依赖于三个新颖的层，这些层在编码器-解码器结构中连续使用，并且专门针对当前的任务而开发。第一个通过将点特征与一组预先训练的局部描述符进行匹配来进行特征提取。然后，为了避免在最大池化等标准操作中丢失单个描述符，我们提出了一种替代的邻居池化操作，该操作依赖于采用具有最高激活值的特征向量。最后，解码器中的上采样修改了我们的特征提取以增加输出维度。虽然该模型已经能够与最先进的技术相比取得有竞争力的结果，但我们进一步提出了一种提高点云处理方法的多功能性的方法。为此，我们引入了第二个模型，该模型将我们的层组装在变压器架构中。我们评估了物体和室内场景完成任务上的两种架构，实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于三维点云的物体和场景补全方法，通过设计新颖的编码器-解码器结构及Transformer架构提升补全效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在点云补全中存在局部特征丢失、结构不适应复杂场景等问题，需提升模型对局部细节的保留能力和场景泛化性。
AI.method: 提出三种新型网络层：基于预训练局部描述符的特征提取层、保留高激活特征的邻域池化层及解码器中的上采样层，并引入Transformer架构增强模型灵活性。
AI.result: 在物体和室内场景补全任务中达到当时最先进的性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合局部特征学习与Transformer架构的混合模型显著提升了点云补全质量，为复杂场景重建提供了新思路。

Our architecture relies on three novel layers that are used successively within an encoder-decoder structure and specifically developed for the task at hand. To this aim, we introduce a second model that assembles our layers within a transformer architecture. authors_text: Ihab S. Mohamed,Kai Yin,Lantao Liu
title: Autonomous Navigation of AGVs in Unknown Cluttered Environments: log-MPPI Control Strategy
title_zh: 未知杂乱环境中 AGV 的自主导航：log-MPPI 控制策略
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) and will be presented at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022). It has 8 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) and will be presented at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022). It has 8 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables
abstract: Sampling-based model predictive control (MPC) optimization methods, such as Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI), have recently shown promising results in various robotic tasks. However, it might produce an infeasible trajectory when the distributions of all sampled trajectories are concentrated within high-cost even infeasible regions. In this study, we propose a new method called log-MPPI equipped with a more effective trajectory sampling distribution policy which significantly improves the trajectory feasibility in terms of satisfying system constraints. The key point is to draw the trajectory samples from the normal log-normal (NLN) mixture distribution, rather than from Gaussian distribution. Furthermore, this work presents a method for collision-free navigation in unknown cluttered environments by incorporating the 2D occupancy grid map into the optimization problem of the sampling-based MPC algorithm. We first validate the efficiency and robustness of our proposed control strategy through extensive simulations of 2D autonomous navigation in different types of cluttered environments as well as the cartpole swing-up task. We further demonstrate, through real-world experiments, the applicability of log-MPPI for performing a 2D grid-based collision-free navigation in an unknown cluttered environment, showing its superiority to be utilized with the local costmap without adding additional complexity to the optimization problem. A video demonstrating the real-world and simulation results is available at https://youtu.be/_uGWQEFJSN0.
summary: Sampling-based model predictive control (MPC) optimization methods, such as Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI), have recently shown promising results in various robotic tasks. However, it might produce an infeasible trajectory when the distributions of all sampled trajectories are concentrated within high-cost even infeasible regions. In this study, we propose a new method called log-MPPI equipped with a more effective trajectory sampling distribution policy which significantly improves the trajectory feasibility in terms of satisfying system constraints. The key point is to draw the trajectory samples from the normal log-normal (NLN) mixture distribution, rather than from Gaussian distribution. Furthermore, this work presents a method for collision-free navigation in unknown cluttered environments by incorporating the 2D occupancy grid map into the optimization problem of the sampling-based MPC algorithm. We first validate the efficiency and robustness of our proposed control strategy through extensive simulations of 2D autonomous navigation in different types of cluttered environments as well as the cartpole swing-up task. We further demonstrate, through real-world experiments, the applicability of log-MPPI for performing a 2D grid-based collision-free navigation in an unknown cluttered environment, showing its superiority to be utilized with the local costmap without adding additional complexity to the optimization problem. A video demonstrating the real-world and simulation results is available at https://youtu.be/_uGWQEFJSN0.
abstract_zh: 基于采样的模型预测控制（MPC）优化方法，例如模型预测路径积分（MPPI），最近在各种机器人任务中显示出了有希望的结果。然而，当所有采样轨迹的分布集中在高成本甚至不可行的区域内时，它可能会产生不可行的轨迹。在本研究中，我们提出了一种称为 log-MPPI 的新方法，该方法配备了更有效的轨迹采样分布策略，在满足系统约束方面显着提高了轨迹可行性。关键点是从正态对数正态（NLN）混合分布而不是高斯分布中绘制轨迹样本。此外，这项工作提出了一种通过将 2D 占用网格图纳入基于采样的 MPC 算法的优化问题，在未知杂乱环境中进行无碰撞导航的方法。我们首先通过对不同类型的杂乱环境中的二维自主导航以及推杆摆动任务的广泛模拟来验证我们提出的控制策略的效率和鲁棒性。通过现实世界的实验，我们进一步证明了 log-MPPI 在未知杂乱环境中执行基于 2D 网格的无碰撞导航的适用性，显示了其与本地成本图一起使用的优越性，而不会增加优化问题的额外复杂性。演示真实世界和模拟结果的视频可在 https://youtu.be/_uGWQEFJSN0 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为log-MPPI的控制策略，用于改进自动导引车（AGV）在未知复杂环境中的自主导航轨迹可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于采样的模型预测控制（如MPPI）在轨迹分布集中在高成本或不可行区域时可能导致不可行轨迹，需改进采样分布策略以提升可行性。
AI.method: 采用正态-对数正态（NLN）混合分布替代高斯分布进行轨迹采样，并将2D占用网格地图融入采样型MPC优化问题，实现无碰撞导航。
AI.result: 通过多种复杂环境的仿真和真实实验验证，log-MPPI在轨迹可行性、鲁棒性及实际应用中均优于传统方法，且无需增加优化复杂度。
AI.conclusion: log-MPPI通过改进采样分布和地图集成，在未知复杂环境中实现了高效、安全的AGV自主导航，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content_json.method: 采用正态-对数正态（NLN）混合分布替代高斯分布进行轨迹采样，并将2D占用网格地图融入采样型MPC优化问题，实现无碰撞导航。
ai_content_json.result: 通过多种复杂环境的仿真和真实实验验证，log-MPPI在轨迹可行性、鲁棒性及实际应用中均优于传统方法，且无需增加优化复杂度。
ai_content_json.conclusion: log-MPPI通过改进采样分布和地图集成，在未知复杂环境中实现了高效、安全的AGV自主导航，具有实际应用价值。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为log-MPPI的控制策略，用于改进自动导引车（AGV）在未知复杂环境中的自主导航轨迹可行性。
motivation: 传统基于采样的模型预测控制（如MPPI）在轨迹分布集中在高成本或不可行区域时可能导致不可行轨迹，需改进采样分布策略以提升可行性。
method: 采用正态-对数正态（NLN）混合分布替代高斯分布进行轨迹采样，并将2D占用网格地图融入采样型MPC优化问题，实现无碰撞导航。
result: 通过多种复杂环境的仿真和真实实验验证，log-MPPI在轨迹可行性、鲁棒性及实际应用中均优于传统方法，且无需增加优化复杂度。
conclusion: log-MPPI通过改进采样分布和地图集成，在未知复杂环境中实现了高效、安全的AGV自主导航，具有实际应用价值。
search_text: Autonomous Navigation of AGVs in Unknown Cluttered Environments: log-MPPI Control Strategy 未知杂乱环境中 AGV 的自主导航：log-MPPI 控制策略 Sampling-based model predictive control (MPC) optimization methods, such as Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI), have recently shown promising results in various robotic tasks. However, it might produce an infeasible trajectory when the distributions of all sampled trajectories are concentrated within high-cost even infeasible regions. In this study, we propose a new method called log-MPPI equipped with a more effective trajectory sampling distribution policy which significantly improves the trajectory feasibility in terms of satisfying system constraints. The key point is to draw the trajectory samples from the normal log-normal (NLN) mixture distribution, rather than from Gaussian distribution. Furthermore, this work presents a method for collision-free navigation in unknown cluttered environments by incorporating the 2D occupancy grid map into the optimization problem of the sampling-based MPC algorithm. We first validate the efficiency and robustness of our proposed control strategy through extensive simulations of 2D autonomous navigation in different types of cluttered environments as well as the cartpole swing-up task. We further demonstrate, through real-world experiments, the applicability of log-MPPI for performing a 2D grid-based collision-free navigation in an unknown cluttered environment, showing its superiority to be utilized with the local costmap without adding additional complexity to the optimization problem. A video demonstrating the real-world and simulation results is available at https://youtu.be/_uGWQEFJSN0. 基于采样的模型预测控制（MPC）优化方法，例如模型预测路径积分（MPPI），最近在各种机器人任务中显示出了有希望的结果。然而，当所有采样轨迹的分布集中在高成本甚至不可行的区域内时，它可能会产生不可行的轨迹。在本研究中，我们提出了一种称为 log-MPPI 的新方法，该方法配备了更有效的轨迹采样分布策略，在满足系统约束方面显着提高了轨迹可行性。关键点是从正态对数正态（NLN）混合分布而不是高斯分布中绘制轨迹样本。此外，这项工作提出了一种通过将 2D 占用网格图纳入基于采样的 MPC 算法的优化问题，在未知杂乱环境中进行无碰撞导航的方法。我们首先通过对不同类型的杂乱环境中的二维自主导航以及推杆摆动任务的广泛模拟来验证我们提出的控制策略的效率和鲁棒性。通过现实世界的实验，我们进一步证明了 log-MPPI 在未知杂乱环境中执行基于 2D 网格的无碰撞导航的适用性，显示了其与本地成本图一起使用的优越性，而不会增加优化问题的额外复杂性。演示真实世界和模拟结果的视频可在 https://youtu.be/_uGWQEFJSN0 上找到。 本文提出了一种名为log-MPPI的控制策略，用于改进自动导引车（AGV）在未知复杂环境中的自主导航轨迹可行性。 Ihab S. Mohamed,Kai Yin,Lantao Liu cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Ankur Dhuriya,Harveen Singh Chadha,Anirudh Gupta,Priyanshi Shah,Neeraj Chhimwal,Rishabh Gaur,Vivek Raghavan
title: Improving Speech Recognition for Indic Languages using Language Model
title_zh: 使用语言模型改进印度语言的语音识别
comment: Need to upgrade the content completely
comments: Need to upgrade the content completely
abstract: We study the effect of applying a language model (LM) on the output of Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems for Indic languages. We fine-tune wav2vec $2.0$ models for $18$ Indic languages and adjust the results with language models trained on text derived from a variety of sources. Our findings demonstrate that the average Character Error Rate (CER) decreases by over $28$ \% and the average Word Error Rate (WER) decreases by about $36$ \% after decoding with LM. We show that a large LM may not provide a substantial improvement as compared to a diverse one. We also demonstrate that high quality transcriptions can be obtained on domain-specific data without retraining the ASR model and show results on biomedical domain.
summary: We study the effect of applying a language model (LM) on the output of Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems for Indic languages. We fine-tune wav2vec $2.0$ models for $18$ Indic languages and adjust the results with language models trained on text derived from a variety of sources. Our findings demonstrate that the average Character Error Rate (CER) decreases by over $28$ \% and the average Word Error Rate (WER) decreases by about $36$ \% after decoding with LM. We show that a large LM may not provide a substantial improvement as compared to a diverse one. We also demonstrate that high quality transcriptions can be obtained on domain-specific data without retraining the ASR model and show results on biomedical domain.
abstract_zh: 我们研究应用语言模型 (LM) 对印度语言自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统输出的影响。我们针对 18 美元的印度语言微调了 2.0 美元的 wav2vec 模型，并使用在各种来源的文本上训练的语言模型来调整结果。我们的研究结果表明，使用 LM 解码后，平均字符错误率 (CER) 降低了超过 $28$ \%，平均字错误率 (WER) 降低了约 $36$ \%。我们表明，与多样化的 LM 相比，大型 LM 可能不会提供实质性的改进。我们还证明，无需重新训练 ASR 模型即可在特定领域的数据上获得高质量的转录，并显示生物医学领域的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过语言模型优化印度语言的语音识别系统，以降低错误率并提升转录质量。
AI.motivation: 印度语言的语音识别系统存在较高错误率，需探索有效方法提升识别准确率，尤其在不同领域和数据来源下的表现。
AI.method: 微调wav2vec 2.0模型用于18种印度语言，并结合多源文本训练的语言模型进行解码优化。同时对比大语言模型与多样化模型的效果，并验证特定领域数据的应用潜力。
AI.result: 使用语言模型后，字符错误率（CER）平均降低28%，词错误率（WER）平均降低36%；多样化语言模型优于单一大规模模型；特定领域数据无需重新训练ASR即可获得高质量转录。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型显著提升印度语言ASR性能，多样化模型更优，且领域适配性无需额外训练，为实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Michael Hersche,Geethan Karunaratne,Giovanni Cherubini,Luca Benini,Abu Sebastian,Abbas Rahimi
title: Constrained Few-shot Class-incremental Learning
title_zh: 约束小样本类增量学习
abstract: Continually learning new classes from fresh data without forgetting previous knowledge of old classes is a very challenging research problem. Moreover, it is imperative that such learning must respect certain memory and computational constraints such as (i) training samples are limited to only a few per class, (ii) the computational cost of learning a novel class remains constant, and (iii) the memory footprint of the model grows at most linearly with the number of classes observed. To meet the above constraints, we propose C-FSCIL, which is architecturally composed of a frozen meta-learned feature extractor, a trainable fixed-size fully connected layer, and a rewritable dynamically growing memory that stores as many vectors as the number of encountered classes. C-FSCIL provides three update modes that offer a trade-off between accuracy and compute-memory cost of learning novel classes. C-FSCIL exploits hyperdimensional embedding that allows to continually express many more classes than the fixed dimensions in the vector space, with minimal interference. The quality of class vector representations is further improved by aligning them quasi-orthogonally to each other by means of novel loss functions. Experiments on the CIFAR100, miniImageNet, and Omniglot datasets show that C-FSCIL outperforms the baselines with remarkable accuracy and compression. It also scales up to the largest problem size ever tried in this few-shot setting by learning 423 novel classes on top of 1200 base classes with less than 1.6% accuracy drop. Our code is available at https://github.com/IBM/constrained-FSCIL.
summary: Continually learning new classes from fresh data without forgetting previous knowledge of old classes is a very challenging research problem. Moreover, it is imperative that such learning must respect certain memory and computational constraints such as (i) training samples are limited to only a few per class, (ii) the computational cost of learning a novel class remains constant, and (iii) the memory footprint of the model grows at most linearly with the number of classes observed. To meet the above constraints, we propose C-FSCIL, which is architecturally composed of a frozen meta-learned feature extractor, a trainable fixed-size fully connected layer, and a rewritable dynamically growing memory that stores as many vectors as the number of encountered classes. C-FSCIL provides three update modes that offer a trade-off between accuracy and compute-memory cost of learning novel classes. C-FSCIL exploits hyperdimensional embedding that allows to continually express many more classes than the fixed dimensions in the vector space, with minimal interference. The quality of class vector representations is further improved by aligning them quasi-orthogonally to each other by means of novel loss functions. Experiments on the CIFAR100, miniImageNet, and Omniglot datasets show that C-FSCIL outperforms the baselines with remarkable accuracy and compression. It also scales up to the largest problem size ever tried in this few-shot setting by learning 423 novel classes on top of 1200 base classes with less than 1.6% accuracy drop. Our code is available at https://github.com/IBM/constrained-FSCIL.
abstract_zh: 不断地从新数据中学习新类而不忘记旧类的先前知识是一个非常具有挑战性的研究问题。此外，这种学习必须尊重某些内存和计算约束，例如（i）训练样本仅限于每个类别的几个，（ii）学习新类别的计算成本保持不变，以及（iii）模型的内存占用最多与观察到的类别数量呈线性增长。为了满足上述限制，我们提出了 C-FSCIL，它在架构上由一个冻结的元学习特征提取器、一个可训练的固定大小的全连接层和一个可重写的动态增长的存储器组成，该存储器存储与遇到的类的数量一样多的向量。 C-FSCIL 提供了三种更新模式，可以在学习新类的准确性和计算内存成本之间进行权衡。 C-FSCIL 利用超维嵌入，允许以最小的干扰连续表达比向量空间中的固定维度更多的类。通过新颖的损失函数将类向量表示彼此准正交对齐，进一步提高了类向量表示的质量。在 CIFAR100、miniImageNet 和 Omniglot 数据集上的实验表明，C-FSCIL 的性能优于基线，具有显着的准确性和压缩性。它还通过在 1200 个基类之上学习 423 个新类，以小于 1.6% 的准确率下降，将问题规模扩展到在这种少数场景中尝试过的最大问题规模。我们的代码可从 https://github.com/IBM/constrained-FSCIL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受约束的少样本类增量学习方法C-FSCIL，旨在解决在有限样本、固定计算成本和线性内存增长约束下持续学习新类别的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统增量学习面临样本稀缺、计算成本高和内存占用增长过快的问题，需在不遗忘旧知识的前提下高效学习新类别。
AI.method: C-FSCIL包含冻结的元学习特征提取器、固定尺寸全连接层及动态扩展的可重写内存，通过超维度嵌入和准正交损失函数实现类向量的高效表示与存储。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100等数据集上显著优于基线方法，支持在1200个基础类别上学习423个新类别且准确率仅下降1.6%。
AI.conclusion: C-FSCIL通过架构设计与优化策略有效平衡了精度与资源约束，为实际应用中的持续学习提供了可行方案。

Moreover, it is imperative that such learning must respect certain memory and computational constraints such as (i) training samples are limited to only a few per class, (ii) the computational cost of learning a novel class remains constant, and (iii) the memory footprint of the model grows at most linearly with the number of classes observed. To meet the above constraints, we propose C-FSCIL, which is architecturally composed of a frozen meta-learned feature extractor, a trainable fixed-size fully connected layer, and a rewritable dynamically growing memory that stores as many vectors as the number of encountered classes. C-FSCIL provides three update modes that offer a trade-off between accuracy and compute-memory cost of learning novel classes. C-FSCIL exploits hyperdimensional embedding that allows to continually express many more classes than the fixed dimensions in the vector space, with minimal interference. The quality of class vector representations is further improved by aligning them quasi-orthogonally to each other by means of novel loss functions. Experiments on the CIFAR100, miniImageNet, and Omniglot datasets show that C-FSCIL outperforms the baselines with remarkable accuracy and compression. It also scales up to the largest problem size ever tried in this few-shot setting by learning 423 novel classes on top of 1200 base classes with less than 1.6% accuracy drop. Our code is available at https://github.com/IBM/constrained-FSCIL. 不断地从新数据中学习新类而不忘记旧类的先前知识是一个非常具有挑战性的研究问题。此外，这种学习必须尊重某些内存和计算约束，例如（i）训练样本仅限于每个类别的几个，（ii）学习新类别的计算成本保持不变，以及（iii）模型的内存占用最多与观察到的类别数量呈线性增长。为了满足上述限制，我们提出了 C-FSCIL，它在架构上由一个冻结的元学习特征提取器、一个可训练的固定大小的全连接层和一个可重写的动态增长的存储器组成，该存储器存储与遇到的类的数量一样多的向量。 C-FSCIL 提供了三种更新模式，可以在学习新类的准确性和计算内存成本之间进行权衡。 C-FSCIL 利用超维嵌入，允许以最小的干扰连续表达比向量空间中的固定维度更多的类。通过新颖的损失函数将类向量表示彼此准正交对齐，进一步提高了类向量表示的质量。在 CIFAR100、miniImageNet 和 Omniglot 数据集上的实验表明，C-FSCIL 的性能优于基线，具有显着的准确性和压缩性。它还通过在 1200 个基类之上学习 423 个新类，以小于 1.6% 的准确率下降，将问题规模扩展到在这种少数场景中尝试过的最大问题规模。我们的代码可从 https://github.com/IBM/constrained-FSCIL 获取。 本文提出一种受约束的少样本类增量学习方法C-FSCIL，旨在解决在有限样本、固定计算成本和线性内存增长约束下持续学习新类别的挑战。 Michael Hersche,Geethan Karunaratne,Giovanni Cherubini,Luca Benini,Abu Sebastian,Abbas Rahimi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Hanqing Wang,Wei Liang,Jianbing Shen,Luc Van Gool,Wenguan Wang
title: Counterfactual Cycle-Consistent Learning for Instruction Following and Generation in Vision-Language Navigation
title_zh: 视觉语言导航中指令跟踪和生成的反事实循环一致学习
abstract: Since the rise of vision-language navigation (VLN), great progress has been made in instruction following -- building a follower to navigate environments under the guidance of instructions. However, far less attention has been paid to the inverse task: instruction generation -- learning a speaker~to generate grounded descriptions for navigation routes. Existing VLN methods train a speaker independently and often treat it as a data augmentation tool to strengthen the follower while ignoring rich cross-task relations. Here we describe an approach that learns the two tasks simultaneously and exploits their intrinsic correlations to boost the training of each: the follower judges whether the speaker-created instruction explains the original navigation route correctly, and vice versa. Without the need of aligned instruction-path pairs, such cycle-consistent learning scheme is complementary to task-specific training targets defined on labeled data, and can also be applied over unlabeled paths (sampled without paired instructions). Another agent, called~creator is added to generate counterfactual environments. It greatly changes current scenes yet leaves novel items -- which are vital for the execution of original instructions -- unchanged. Thus more informative training scenes are synthesized and the three agents compose a powerful VLN learning system. Extensive experiments on a standard benchmark show that our approach improves the performance of various follower models and produces accurate navigation instructions.
summary: Since the rise of vision-language navigation (VLN), great progress has been made in instruction following -- building a follower to navigate environments under the guidance of instructions. However, far less attention has been paid to the inverse task: instruction generation -- learning a speaker~to generate grounded descriptions for navigation routes. Existing VLN methods train a speaker independently and often treat it as a data augmentation tool to strengthen the follower while ignoring rich cross-task relations. Here we describe an approach that learns the two tasks simultaneously and exploits their intrinsic correlations to boost the training of each: the follower judges whether the speaker-created instruction explains the original navigation route correctly, and vice versa. Without the need of aligned instruction-path pairs, such cycle-consistent learning scheme is complementary to task-specific training targets defined on labeled data, and can also be applied over unlabeled paths (sampled without paired instructions). Another agent, called~creator is added to generate counterfactual environments. It greatly changes current scenes yet leaves novel items -- which are vital for the execution of original instructions -- unchanged. Thus more informative training scenes are synthesized and the three agents compose a powerful VLN learning system. Extensive experiments on a standard benchmark show that our approach improves the performance of various follower models and produces accurate navigation instructions.
abstract_zh: 自从视觉语言导航（VLN）兴起以来，指令跟随方面取得了巨大进展——建立一个跟随者在指令的指导下导航环境。然而，人们对逆向任务的关注却少之又少：指令生成——学习说话者——为导航路线生成有根据的描述。现有的 VLN 方法独立训练说话者，通常将其视为数据增强工具来增强跟随者，同时忽略丰富的跨任务关系。在这里，我们描述了一种同时学习这两个任务并利用它们的内在相关性来促进每个任务的训练的方法：跟随者判断说话者创建的指令是否正确解释了原始导航路线，反之亦然。不需要对齐的指令路径对，这种循环一致的学习方案是对标记数据上定义的特定于任务的训练目标的补充，并且也可以应用于未标记的路径（在没有成对指令的情况下采样）。添加另一个名为~creator 的代理来生成反事实环境。它极大地改变了当前场景，但对执行原始指令至关重要的新项目却保持不变。因此，合成了更多信息量的训练场景，三个智能体组成了强大的 VLN 学习系统。对标准基准的大量实验表明，我们的方法提高了各种跟随器模型的性能并产生准确的导航指令。

AI.tldr: 提出一种对抗性循环一致学习方法，同时提升视觉语言导航中的指令跟随和生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法独立训练说话者模型并仅作为数据增强工具，忽视了指令跟随与生成任务间的内在关联，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 通过循环一致性学习使跟随者与说话者相互验证指令与路径的合理性，引入反事实环境生成器创造新场景以增强训练数据多样性。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中显著提升多种跟随者模型性能，生成的导航指令准确度优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过任务间协同学习和反事实数据增强，有效解决了视觉语言导航中指令生成与跟随的联合优化问题。
