authors_text: Fan Feng,Biwei Huang,Kun Zhang,Sara Magliacane
title: Factored Adaptation for Non-Stationary Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 非平稳强化学习的分解适应
abstract: Dealing with non-stationarity in environments (e.g., in the transition dynamics) and objectives (e.g., in the reward functions) is a challenging problem that is crucial in real-world applications of reinforcement learning (RL). While most current approaches model the changes as a single shared embedding vector, we leverage insights from the recent causality literature to model non-stationarity in terms of individual latent change factors, and causal graphs across different environments. In particular, we propose Factored Adaptation for Non-Stationary RL (FANS-RL), a factored adaption approach that learns jointly both the causal structure in terms of a factored MDP, and a factored representation of the individual time-varying change factors. We prove that under standard assumptions, we can completely recover the causal graph representing the factored transition and reward function, as well as a partial structure between the individual change factors and the state components. Through our general framework, we can consider general non-stationary scenarios with different function types and changing frequency, including changes across episodes and within episodes. Experimental results demonstrate that FANS-RL outperforms existing approaches in terms of return, compactness of the latent state representation, and robustness to varying degrees of non-stationarity.
summary: Dealing with non-stationarity in environments (e.g., in the transition dynamics) and objectives (e.g., in the reward functions) is a challenging problem that is crucial in real-world applications of reinforcement learning (RL). While most current approaches model the changes as a single shared embedding vector, we leverage insights from the recent causality literature to model non-stationarity in terms of individual latent change factors, and causal graphs across different environments. In particular, we propose Factored Adaptation for Non-Stationary RL (FANS-RL), a factored adaption approach that learns jointly both the causal structure in terms of a factored MDP, and a factored representation of the individual time-varying change factors. We prove that under standard assumptions, we can completely recover the causal graph representing the factored transition and reward function, as well as a partial structure between the individual change factors and the state components. Through our general framework, we can consider general non-stationary scenarios with different function types and changing frequency, including changes across episodes and within episodes. Experimental results demonstrate that FANS-RL outperforms existing approaches in terms of return, compactness of the latent state representation, and robustness to varying degrees of non-stationarity.
abstract_zh: 处理环境（例如，过渡动力学）和目标（例如，奖励函数）中的非平稳性是一个具有挑战性的问题，在强化学习（RL）的现实应用中至关重要。虽然大多数当前方法将变化建模为单个共享嵌入向量，但我们利用最近的因果关系文献中的见解，根据个体潜在变化因素和不同环境的因果图来建模非平稳性。特别是，我们提出了非平稳强化学习的分解适应（FANS-RL），这是一种分解适应方法，可以联合学习分解 MDP 方面的因果结构，以及各个时变变化因素的分解表示。我们证明，在标准假设下，我们可以完全恢复表示因子转换和奖励函数的因果图，以及各个变化因子和状态组件之间的部分结构。通过我们的总体框架，我们可以考虑具有不同功能类型和变化频率的一般非平稳场景，包括情节之间和情节内的变化。实验结果表明，FANS-RL 在回报、潜在状态表示的紧凑性以及对不同程度的非平稳性的鲁棒性方面优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于非平稳强化学习的因子适应方法（FANS-RL），通过建模个体潜在变化因子和因果图来应对环境动态和目标函数的非平稳性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将环境变化建模为单一共享嵌入向量，难以捕捉不同环境下的复杂变化模式，而因果推理领域的进展为通过因子分解方式建模非平稳性提供了新思路。
AI.method: 提出FANS-RL框架，联合学习因子化MDP的因果结构及个体时变变化因子的因子化表示，并证明在标准假设下可完全恢复因果图和部分状态组件间的结构关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，FANS-RL在回报值、潜在状态表示的紧凑性和对非平稳程度的鲁棒性方面优于现有方法，适用于跨回合和回合内变化等通用非平稳场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过因子化因果建模，FANS-RL有效解决了非平稳强化学习中的动态适应问题，为复杂环境下的RL应用提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

Experimental results demonstrate that FANS-RL outperforms existing approaches in terms of return, compactness of the latent state representation, and robustness to varying degrees of non-stationarity. 处理环境（例如，过渡动力学）和目标（例如，奖励函数）中的非平稳性是一个具有挑战性的问题，在强化学习（RL）的现实应用中至关重要。虽然大多数当前方法将变化建模为单个共享嵌入向量，但我们利用最近的因果关系文献中的见解，根据个体潜在变化因素和不同环境的因果图来建模非平稳性。特别是，我们提出了非平稳强化学习的分解适应（FANS-RL），这是一种分解适应方法，可以联合学习分解 MDP 方面的因果结构，以及各个时变变化因素的分解表示。我们证明，在标准假设下，我们可以完全恢复表示因子转换和奖励函数的因果图，以及各个变化因子和状态组件之间的部分结构。通过我们的总体框架，我们可以考虑具有不同功能类型和变化频率的一般非平稳场景，包括情节之间和情节内的变化。实验结果表明，FANS-RL 在回报、潜在状态表示的紧凑性以及对不同程度的非平稳性的鲁棒性方面优于现有方法。 本文提出了一种用于非平稳强化学习的因子适应方法（FANS-RL），通过建模个体潜在变化因子和因果图来应对环境动态和目标函数的非平稳性。 Fan Feng,Biwei Huang,Kun Zhang,Sara Magliacane cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Harveen Singh Chadha,Priyanshi Shah,Ankur Dhuriya,Neeraj Chhimwal,Anirudh Gupta,Vivek Raghavan
title: Code Switched and Code Mixed Speech Recognition for Indic languages
title_zh: 印度语言的代码交换和代码混合语音识别
comment: This paper for submitted to Interspeech 2022
comments: This paper for submitted to Interspeech 2022
abstract: Training multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems is challenging because acoustic and lexical information is typically language specific. Training multilingual system for Indic languages is even more tougher due to lack of open source datasets and results on different approaches. We compare the performance of end to end multilingual speech recognition system to the performance of monolingual models conditioned on language identification (LID). The decoding information from a multilingual model is used for language identification and then combined with monolingual models to get an improvement of 50% WER across languages. We also propose a similar technique to solve the Code Switched problem and achieve a WER of 21.77 and 28.27 over Hindi-English and Bengali-English respectively. Our work talks on how transformer based ASR especially wav2vec 2.0 can be applied in developing multilingual ASR and code switched ASR for Indic languages.

Training multilingual system for Indic languages is even more tougher due to lack of open source datasets and results on different approaches. We compare the performance of end to end multilingual speech recognition system to the performance of monolingual models conditioned on language identification (LID). The decoding information from a multilingual model is used for language identification and then combined with monolingual models to get an improvement of 50% WER across languages. We also propose a similar technique to solve the Code Switched problem and achieve a WER of 21.77 and 28.27 over Hindi-English and Bengali-English respectively. Our work talks on how transformer based ASR especially wav2vec 2.0 can be applied in developing multilingual ASR and code switched ASR for Indic languages.
abstract_zh: 训练多语言自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统具有挑战性，因为声学和词汇信息通常是特定于语言的。由于缺乏开源数据集和不同方法的结果，训练印度语多语言系统更加困难。我们将端到端多语言语音识别系统的性能与以语言识别（LID）为条件的单语言模型的性能进行比较。多语言模型的解码信息用于语言识别，然后与单语言模型结合，跨语言的 WER 提高了 50%。我们还提出了一种类似的技术来解决代码交换问题，并在印地语-英语和孟加拉语-英语上分别实现了 21.77 和 28.27 的 WER。我们的工作讨论了如何将基于 Transformer 的 ASR（尤其是 wav2vec 2.0）应用于开发印度语言的多语言 ASR 和代码交换 ASR。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究针对印地语等印度语言的代码切换和代码混合语音识别技术，探索多语言自动语音识别（ASR）系统的优化方法。
AI.motivation: 由于印地语等印度语言的语音识别面临数据集稀缺、语言特定性高等挑战，且代码切换现象普遍，亟需改进多语言ASR模型以提升识别准确率。
AI.method: 对比端到端多语言ASR模型与基于语言识别（LID）的单语模型性能，结合多语言模型的解码信息优化单语模型；提出针对代码切换问题的改进技术，并采用Transformer架构（如wav2vec 2.0）实现。
AI.result: 多语言模型与单语模型结合后，词错误率（WER）降低50%；针对印地语-英语和孟加拉语-英语代码切换场景，分别达到21.77和28.27的WER。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的ASR模型（如wav2vec 2.0）能有效支持印度语言的多语言及代码切换语音识别，为相关领域提供可行方案。

authors_text: Hyungseob Shin,Hyeongyu Kim,Sewon Kim,Yohan Jun,Taejoon Eo,Dosik Hwang
title: COSMOS: Cross-Modality Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for 3D Medical Image Segmentation based on Target-aware Domain Translation and Iterative Self-Training
title_zh: COSMOS：基于目标感知域转换和迭代自训练的 3D 医学图像分割的跨模态无监督域适应
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, MICCAI 2021 Cross-Modality Domain Adaptation (crossMoDA) Challenge
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures, MICCAI 2021 Cross-Modality Domain Adaptation (crossMoDA) Challenge
abstract: Recent advances in deep learning-based medical image segmentation studies achieve nearly human-level performance when in fully supervised condition. However, acquiring pixel-level expert annotations is extremely expensive and laborious in medical imaging fields. Unsupervised domain adaptation can alleviate this problem, which makes it possible to use annotated data in one imaging modality to train a network that can successfully perform segmentation on target imaging modality with no labels. In this work, we propose a self-training based unsupervised domain adaptation framework for 3D medical image segmentation named COSMOS and validate it with automatic segmentation of Vestibular Schwannoma (VS) and cochlea on high-resolution T2 Magnetic Resonance Images (MRI). Our target-aware contrast conversion network translates source domain annotated T1 MRI to pseudo T2 MRI to enable segmentation training on target domain, while preserving important anatomical features of interest in the converted images. Iterative self-training is followed to incorporate unlabeled data to training and incrementally improve the quality of pseudo-labels, thereby leading to improved performance of segmentation. COSMOS won the 1\textsuperscript{st} place in the Cross-Modality Domain Adaptation (crossMoDA) challenge held in conjunction with the 24th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2021). It achieves mean Dice score and Average Symmetric Surface Distance of 0.871(0.063) and 0.437(0.270) for VS, and 0.842(0.020) and 0.152(0.030) for cochlea.
summary: Recent advances in deep learning-based medical image segmentation studies achieve nearly human-level performance when in fully supervised condition. However, acquiring pixel-level expert annotations is extremely expensive and laborious in medical imaging fields. Unsupervised domain adaptation can alleviate this problem, which makes it possible to use annotated data in one imaging modality to train a network that can successfully perform segmentation on target imaging modality with no labels. In this work, we propose a self-training based unsupervised domain adaptation framework for 3D medical image segmentation named COSMOS and validate it with automatic segmentation of Vestibular Schwannoma (VS) and cochlea on high-resolution T2 Magnetic Resonance Images (MRI). Our target-aware contrast conversion network translates source domain annotated T1 MRI to pseudo T2 MRI to enable segmentation training on target domain, while preserving important anatomical features of interest in the converted images. Iterative self-training is followed to incorporate unlabeled data to training and incrementally improve the quality of pseudo-labels, thereby leading to improved performance of segmentation. COSMOS won the 1\textsuperscript{st} place in the Cross-Modality Domain Adaptation (crossMoDA) challenge held in conjunction with the 24th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2021). It achieves mean Dice score and Average Symmetric Surface Distance of 0.871(0.063) and 0.437(0.270) for VS, and 0.842(0.020) and 0.152(0.030) for cochlea.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的医学图像分割研究的最新进展在完全监督的条件下实现了接近人类水平的性能。然而，在医学成像领域获取像素级专家注释是极其昂贵和费力的。无监督域适应可以缓解这个问题，这使得可以在一种成像模式中使用带注释的数据来训练网络，该网络可以在没有标签的情况下成功地对目标成像模式执行分割。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于自训练的无监督域适应框架，用于 3D 医学图像分割，名为 COSMOS，并通过高分辨率 T2 磁共振图像 (MRI) 上前庭神经鞘瘤 (VS) 和耳蜗的自动分割来验证它。我们的目标感知对比度转换网络将源域注释的 T1 MRI 转换为伪 T2 MRI，以实现目标域的分割训练，同时保留转换图像中感兴趣的重要解剖特征。随后进行迭代自我训练，将未标记的数据合并到训练中，并逐步提高伪标签的质量，从而提高分割性能。 COSMOS 在与第 24 届医学图像计算和计算机辅助干预国际会议 (MICCAI 2021) 同期举办的跨模态域适应 (crossMoDA) 挑战赛中荣获第一名。 VS 的平均 Dice 得分和平均对称表面距离为 0.871（0.063）和 0.437（0.270），耳蜗的平均 Dice 得分和平均对称表面距离为 0.842（0.020）和 0.152（0.030）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COSMOS框架，通过跨模态无监督域适应解决3D医学图像分割中目标域标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割需要大量像素级标注数据，但获取成本极高。无监督域适应可通过利用源域标注数据训练模型适应目标域，减少对目标域标注的依赖。
AI.method: 设计目标感知对比转换网络将源域T1 MRI转换为伪T2 MRI，保留关键解剖特征；结合迭代自训练逐步优化无标签目标域数据的伪标签，提升分割性能。
AI.result: 在crossMoDA挑战赛中获得第一名，VS的Dice得分为0.871，ASD为0.437；耳蜗的Dice得分为0.842，ASD为0.152。
AI.conclusion: COSMOS通过跨模态域转换与自训练有效解决了医学图像分割的域适应问题，验证了方法在高分辨率MRI上的实用性与先进性。

Iterative self-training is followed to incorporate unlabeled data to training and incrementally improve the quality of pseudo-labels, thereby leading to improved performance of segmentation. COSMOS won the 1\textsuperscript{st} place in the Cross-Modality Domain Adaptation (crossMoDA) challenge held in conjunction with the 24th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2021). It achieves mean Dice score and Average Symmetric Surface Distance of 0.871(0.063) and 0.437(0.270) for VS, and 0.842(0.020) and 0.152(0.030) for cochlea. 基于深度学习的医学图像分割研究的最新进展在完全监督的条件下实现了接近人类水平的性能。然而，在医学成像领域获取像素级专家注释是极其昂贵和费力的。无监督域适应可以缓解这个问题，这使得可以在一种成像模式中使用带注释的数据来训练网络，该网络可以在没有标签的情况下成功地对目标成像模式执行分割。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于自训练的无监督域适应框架，用于 3D 医学图像分割，名为 COSMOS，并通过高分辨率 T2 磁共振图像 (MRI) 上前庭神经鞘瘤 (VS) 和耳蜗的自动分割来验证它。我们的目标感知对比度转换网络将源域注释的 T1 MRI 转换为伪 T2 MRI，以实现目标域的分割训练，同时保留转换图像中感兴趣的重要解剖特征。随后进行迭代自我训练，将未标记的数据合并到训练中，并逐步提高伪标签的质量，从而提高分割性能。 COSMOS 在与第 24 届医学图像计算和计算机辅助干预国际会议 (MICCAI 2021) 同期举办的跨模态域适应 (crossMoDA) 挑战赛中荣获第一名。 VS 的平均 Dice 得分和平均对称表面距离为 0.871（0.063）和 0.437（0.270），耳蜗的平均 Dice 得分和平均对称表面距离为 0.842（0.020）和 0.152（0.030）。 本文提出COSMOS框架，通过跨模态无监督域适应解决3D医学图像分割中目标域标注数据不足的问题。 Hyungseob Shin,Hyeongyu Kim,Sewon Kim,Yohan Jun,Taejoon Eo,Dosik Hwang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Titus Leistner,Radek Mackowiak,Lynton Ardizzone,Ullrich Köthe,Carsten Rother
title: Towards Multimodal Depth Estimation from Light Fields
title_zh: 从光场进行多模态深度估计
abstract: Light field applications, especially light field rendering and depth estimation, developed rapidly in recent years. While state-of-the-art light field rendering methods handle semi-transparent and reflective objects well, depth estimation methods either ignore these cases altogether or only deliver a weak performance. We argue that this is due current methods only considering a single "true" depth, even when multiple objects at different depths contributed to the color of a single pixel. Based on the simple idea of outputting a posterior depth distribution instead of only a single estimate, we develop and explore several different deep-learning-based approaches to the problem. Additionally, we contribute the first "multimodal light field depth dataset" that contains the depths of all objects which contribute to the color of a pixel. This allows us to supervise the multimodal depth prediction and also validate all methods by measuring the KL divergence of the predicted posteriors. With our thorough analysis and novel dataset, we aim to start a new line of depth estimation research that overcomes some of the long-standing limitations of this field.
summary: Light field applications, especially light field rendering and depth estimation, developed rapidly in recent years. While state-of-the-art light field rendering methods handle semi-transparent and reflective objects well, depth estimation methods either ignore these cases altogether or only deliver a weak performance. We argue that this is due current methods only considering a single "true" depth, even when multiple objects at different depths contributed to the color of a single pixel. Based on the simple idea of outputting a posterior depth distribution instead of only a single estimate, we develop and explore several different deep-learning-based approaches to the problem. Additionally, we contribute the first "multimodal light field depth dataset" that contains the depths of all objects which contribute to the color of a pixel. This allows us to supervise the multimodal depth prediction and also validate all methods by measuring the KL divergence of the predicted posteriors. With our thorough analysis and novel dataset, we aim to start a new line of depth estimation research that overcomes some of the long-standing limitations of this field.
abstract_zh: 光场应用，尤其是光场渲染和深度估计，近年来发展迅速。虽然最先进的光场渲染方法可以很好地处理半透明和反射物体，但深度估计方法要么完全忽略这些情况，要么只提供较弱的性能。我们认为，这是由于当前的方法仅考虑单个“真实”深度，即使不同深度的多个对象对单个像素的颜色产生影响也是如此。基于输出后验深度分布而不是单一估计的简单想法，我们开发并探索了几种不同的基于深度学习的方法来解决该问题。此外，我们还贡献了第一个“多模态光场深度数据集”，其中包含对像素颜色有贡献的所有对象的深度。这使我们能够监督多模态深度预测，并通过测量预测后验的 KL 散度来验证所有方法。凭借我们彻底的分析和新颖的数据集，我们的目标是开始一条新的深度估计研究路线，克服该领域长期存在的一些局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于光场的多模态深度估计方法，解决传统方法无法处理单像素多深度贡献的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有光场深度估计方法在处理半透明/反射物体时表现不佳，因仅考虑单一深度而忽略多物体叠加的复杂场景。
AI.method: 通过输出后验深度分布而非单一估计值，开发多种深度学习模型，并构建首个包含多深度标注的光场数据集进行监督训练与评估。
AI.result: 提出多模态深度预测框架，创建包含像素级多物体深度信息的数据集，通过KL散度验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新方法与数据集为深度估计领域提供研究新方向，有望突破传统单深度估计的局限性。

authors_text: Jaan Aru,Aqeel Labash,Oriol Corcoll,Raul Vicente
title: Mind the gap: Challenges of deep learning approaches to Theory of Mind
title_zh: 注意差距：深度学习方法对心理理论的挑战
abstract: Theory of Mind is an essential ability of humans to infer the mental states of others. Here we provide a coherent summary of the potential, current progress, and problems of deep learning approaches to Theory of Mind. We highlight that many current findings can be explained through shortcuts. These shortcuts arise because the tasks used to investigate Theory of Mind in deep learning systems have been too narrow. Thus, we encourage researchers to investigate Theory of Mind in complex open-ended environments. Furthermore, to inspire future deep learning systems we provide a concise overview of prior work done in humans. We further argue that when studying Theory of Mind with deep learning, the research's main focus and contribution ought to be opening up the network's representations. We recommend researchers use tools from the field of interpretability of AI to study the relationship between different network components and aspects of Theory of Mind.
summary: Theory of Mind is an essential ability of humans to infer the mental states of others. Here we provide a coherent summary of the potential, current progress, and problems of deep learning approaches to Theory of Mind. We highlight that many current findings can be explained through shortcuts. These shortcuts arise because the tasks used to investigate Theory of Mind in deep learning systems have been too narrow. Thus, we encourage researchers to investigate Theory of Mind in complex open-ended environments. Furthermore, to inspire future deep learning systems we provide a concise overview of prior work done in humans. We further argue that when studying Theory of Mind with deep learning, the research's main focus and contribution ought to be opening up the network's representations. We recommend researchers use tools from the field of interpretability of AI to study the relationship between different network components and aspects of Theory of Mind.
abstract_zh: 心智理论是人类推断他人心理状态的一项重要能力。在这里，我们对心智理论深度学习方法的潜力、当前进展和问题进行了连贯的总结。我们强调，当前的许多发现都可以通过捷径来解释。这些捷径的出现是因为深度学习系统中用于研究心智理论的任务过于狭窄。因此，我们鼓励研究人员在复杂的开放环境中研究心理理论。此外，为了启发未来的深度学习系统，我们对人类之前所做的工作进行了简要概述。我们进一步认为，在利用深度学习研究心智理论时，研究的主要焦点和贡献应该是开放网络的表征。我们建议研究人员使用人工智能可解释性领域的工具来研究不同网络组件和心理理论方面之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文分析深度学习方法在理论心智任务中的挑战，指出当前研究的局限性并提出改进方向。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在理论心智任务中表现依赖于任务设计的‘快捷方式’，缺乏对复杂心理状态的真正理解。
AI.method: 综述深度学习在理论心智领域的研究进展，分析任务设计缺陷，并结合人类认知研究提出改进框架。
AI.result: 发现当前模型通过任务狭窄性实现性能，而非真正理解心智理论；建议转向开放环境并加强模型可解释性研究。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究应聚焦于解析神经网络表示，结合可解释性工具，推动深度学习系统实现真正的理论心智能力。

authors_text: Athanasios Lentzas,Dimitris Vrakas
title: Machine Learning Approaches for Non-Intrusive Home Absence Detection Based on Appliance Electrical Use
title_zh: 基于电器用电的非侵入式家庭缺勤检测的机器学习方法
abstract: Home absence detection is an emerging field on smart home installations. Identifying whether or not the residents of the house are present, is important in numerous scenarios. Possible scenarios include but are not limited to: elderly people living alone, people suffering from dementia, home quarantine. The majority of published papers focus on either pressure / door sensors or cameras in order to detect outing events. Although the aforementioned approaches provide solid results, they are intrusive and require modifications for sensor placement. In our work, appliance electrical use is investigated as a means for detecting the presence or absence of residents. The energy use is the result of power disaggregation, a non intrusive / non invasive sensing method. Since a dataset providing energy data and ground truth for home absence is not available, artificial outing events were introduced on the UK-DALE dataset, a well known dataset for Non Intrusive Load Monitoring (NILM). Several machine learning algorithms were evaluated using the generated dataset. Benchmark results have shown that home absence detection using appliance power consumption is feasible.
summary: Home absence detection is an emerging field on smart home installations. Identifying whether or not the residents of the house are present, is important in numerous scenarios. Possible scenarios include but are not limited to: elderly people living alone, people suffering from dementia, home quarantine. The majority of published papers focus on either pressure / door sensors or cameras in order to detect outing events. Although the aforementioned approaches provide solid results, they are intrusive and require modifications for sensor placement. In our work, appliance electrical use is investigated as a means for detecting the presence or absence of residents. The energy use is the result of power disaggregation, a non intrusive / non invasive sensing method. Since a dataset providing energy data and ground truth for home absence is not available, artificial outing events were introduced on the UK-DALE dataset, a well known dataset for Non Intrusive Load Monitoring (NILM). Several machine learning algorithms were evaluated using the generated dataset. Benchmark results have shown that home absence detection using appliance power consumption is feasible.
abstract_zh: 家庭缺勤检测是智能家居安装的一个新兴领域。在许多情况下，识别房屋内的居民是否在场非常重要。可能的场景包括但不限于：独居老人、痴呆症患者、居家隔离。大多数已发表的论文都集中在压力/门传感器或摄像头上，以检测外出事件。尽管上述方法提供了可靠的结果，但它们具有侵入性并且需要对传感器放置进行修改。在我们的工作中，对电器的用电情况进行调查，作为检测居民是否存在的一种手段。能源使用是功率分解的结果，这是一种非侵入式/非侵入式传感方法。由于无法提供家庭缺勤的能源数据和地面实况数据集，因此在 UK-DALE 数据集上引入了人工外出事件，该数据集是众所周知的非侵入式负载监控 (NILM) 数据集。使用生成的数据集评估了几种机器学习算法。基准测试结果表明，利用电器功耗进行家庭缺勤检测是可行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于家电用电数据的非侵入式家庭居民缺席检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有家庭缺席检测方法依赖压力/门传感器或摄像头，存在侵入性且需硬件改造，需探索无需额外传感器的替代方案。
AI.method: 利用UK-DALE数据集通过人工构造离家事件生成数据集，采用非侵入式负荷监测（NILM）获取电器用电数据，并评估多种机器学习算法性能。
AI.result: 实验表明基于家电用电数据的缺席检测方法具有可行性，机器学习模型能有效识别家庭成员离家事件。
AI.conclusion: 通过家电用电数据分析实现非侵入式家庭缺席检测是可行的，为隐私保护场景（如独居老人、居家隔离）提供新解决方案。

search_text: Machine Learning Approaches for Non-Intrusive Home Absence Detection Based on Appliance Electrical Use 基于电器用电的非侵入式家庭缺勤检测的机器学习方法 Home absence detection is an emerging field on smart home installations. Identifying whether or not the residents of the house are present, is important in numerous scenarios. Possible scenarios include but are not limited to: elderly people living alone, people suffering from dementia, home quarantine. The majority of published papers focus on either pressure / door sensors or cameras in order to detect outing events. Although the aforementioned approaches provide solid results, they are intrusive and require modifications for sensor placement. In our work, appliance electrical use is investigated as a means for detecting the presence or absence of residents. The energy use is the result of power disaggregation, a non intrusive / non invasive sensing method. Since a dataset providing energy data and ground truth for home absence is not available, artificial outing events were introduced on the UK-DALE dataset, a well known dataset for Non Intrusive Load Monitoring (NILM). Several machine learning algorithms were evaluated using the generated dataset. Benchmark results have shown that home absence detection using appliance power consumption is feasible. 家庭缺勤检测是智能家居安装的一个新兴领域。在许多情况下，识别房屋内的居民是否在场非常重要。可能的场景包括但不限于：独居老人、痴呆症患者、居家隔离。大多数已发表的论文都集中在压力/门传感器或摄像头上，以检测外出事件。尽管上述方法提供了可靠的结果，但它们具有侵入性并且需要对传感器放置进行修改。在我们的工作中，对电器的用电情况进行调查，作为检测居民是否存在的一种手段。能源使用是功率分解的结果，这是一种非侵入式/非侵入式传感方法。由于无法提供家庭缺勤的能源数据和地面实况数据集，因此在 UK-DALE 数据集上引入了人工外出事件，该数据集是众所周知的非侵入式负载监控 (NILM) 数据集。使用生成的数据集评估了几种机器学习算法。基准测试结果表明，利用电器功耗进行家庭缺勤检测是可行的。 本文提出基于家电用电数据的非侵入式家庭居民缺席检测方法。 Athanasios Lentzas,Dimitris Vrakas cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE,eess.SP

authors_text: Zhenrui Yue,Huimin Zeng,Ziyi Kou,Lanyu Shang,Dong Wang
title: Efficient Localness Transformer for Smart Sensor-Based Energy Disaggregation
title_zh: 用于基于智能传感器的能量分解的高效局部变压器
abstract: Modern smart sensor-based energy management systems leverage non-intrusive load monitoring (NILM) to predict and optimize appliance load distribution in real-time. NILM, or energy disaggregation, refers to the decomposition of electricity usage conditioned on the aggregated power signals (i.e., smart sensor on the main channel). Based on real-time appliance power prediction using sensory technology, energy disaggregation has great potential to increase electricity efficiency and reduce energy expenditure. With the introduction of transformer models, NILM has achieved significant improvements in predicting device power readings. Nevertheless, transformers are less efficient due to O(l^2) complexity w.r.t. sequence length l. Moreover, transformers can fail to capture local signal patterns in sequence-to-point settings due to the lack of inductive bias in local context. In this work, we propose an efficient localness transformer for non-intrusive load monitoring (ELTransformer). Specifically, we leverage normalization functions and switch the order of matrix multiplication to approximate self-attention and reduce computational complexity. Additionally, we introduce localness modeling with sparse local attention heads and relative position encodings to enhance the model capacity in extracting short-term local patterns. To the best of our knowledge, ELTransformer is the first NILM model that addresses computational complexity and localness modeling in NILM. With extensive experiments and quantitative analyses, we demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of the the proposed ELTransformer with considerable improvements compared to state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Modern smart sensor-based energy management systems leverage non-intrusive load monitoring (NILM) to predict and optimize appliance load distribution in real-time. NILM, or energy disaggregation, refers to the decomposition of electricity usage conditioned on the aggregated power signals (i.e., smart sensor on the main channel). Based on real-time appliance power prediction using sensory technology, energy disaggregation has great potential to increase electricity efficiency and reduce energy expenditure. With the introduction of transformer models, NILM has achieved significant improvements in predicting device power readings. Nevertheless, transformers are less efficient due to O(l^2) complexity w.r.t. sequence length l. Moreover, transformers can fail to capture local signal patterns in sequence-to-point settings due to the lack of inductive bias in local context. In this work, we propose an efficient localness transformer for non-intrusive load monitoring (ELTransformer). Specifically, we leverage normalization functions and switch the order of matrix multiplication to approximate self-attention and reduce computational complexity. Additionally, we introduce localness modeling with sparse local attention heads and relative position encodings to enhance the model capacity in extracting short-term local patterns. To the best of our knowledge, ELTransformer is the first NILM model that addresses computational complexity and localness modeling in NILM. With extensive experiments and quantitative analyses, we demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of the the proposed ELTransformer with considerable improvements compared to state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 基于现代智能传感器的能源管理系统利用非侵入式负载监控 (NILM) 来实时预测和优化设备负载分配。 NILM（即能源分解）是指根据聚合电力信号（即主通道上的智能传感器）对用电量进行分解。基于使用传感技术的实时电器功率预测，能源分解在提高用电效率和减少能源支出方面具有巨大潜力。随着变压器模型的引入，NILM 在预测设备功率读数方面取得了显着改进。然而，由于 O(l^2) 复杂度，变压器的效率较低。序列长度l。此外，由于局部上下文中缺乏感应偏置，变压器可能无法捕获序列到点设置中的局部信号模式。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于非侵入式负载监控的高效局部变压器（ELTransformer）。具体来说，我们利用归一化函数并切换矩阵乘法的顺序来近似自注意力并降低计算复杂度。此外，我们引入了具有稀疏局部注意力头和相对位置编码的局部性建模，以增强模型提取短期局部模式的能力。据我们所知，ELTransformer 是第一个解决 NILM 中计算复杂性和局部性建模问题的 NILM 模型。通过大量的实验和定量分析，我们证明了所提出的 ELTransformer 的效率和有效性，与最先进的基线相比有相当大的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效局部性Transformer（ELTransformer），用于基于智能传感器的非侵入式负载监测（NILM），以解决能源分解中的计算复杂度和局部模式捕捉问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer模型在NILM任务中存在计算复杂度高（O(l²)）且难以捕捉局部信号模式的问题，限制了其在实时能源分解中的应用。
AI.method: 通过重排矩阵乘法顺序并引入归一化函数近似自注意力机制以降低复杂度；结合稀疏局部注意力头和相对位置编码增强局部模式建模能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，ELTransformer在保持高预测精度的同时显著降低计算成本，相比现有方法在多个基准数据集上取得明显性能提升。
AI.conclusion: ELTransformer是首个同时优化NILM计算效率与局部建模能力的模型，为智能传感器能源管理提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Raphael Olivier,Bhiksha Raj
title: Recent improvements of ASR models in the face of adversarial attacks
title_zh: ASR 模型在面对对抗性攻击时的最新改进
abstract: Like many other tasks involving neural networks, Speech Recognition models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. However recent research has pointed out differences between attacks and defenses on ASR models compared to image models. Improving the robustness of ASR models requires a paradigm shift from evaluating attacks on one or a few models to a systemic approach in evaluation. We lay the ground for such research by evaluating on various architectures a representative set of adversarial attacks: targeted and untargeted, optimization and speech processing-based, white-box, black-box and targeted attacks. Our results show that the relative strengths of different attack algorithms vary considerably when changing the model architecture, and that the results of some attacks are not to be blindly trusted. They also indicate that training choices such as self-supervised pretraining can significantly impact robustness by enabling transferable perturbations. We release our source code as a package that should help future research in evaluating their attacks and defenses.
summary: Like many other tasks involving neural networks, Speech Recognition models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. However recent research has pointed out differences between attacks and defenses on ASR models compared to image models. Improving the robustness of ASR models requires a paradigm shift from evaluating attacks on one or a few models to a systemic approach in evaluation. We lay the ground for such research by evaluating on various architectures a representative set of adversarial attacks: targeted and untargeted, optimization and speech processing-based, white-box, black-box and targeted attacks. Our results show that the relative strengths of different attack algorithms vary considerably when changing the model architecture, and that the results of some attacks are not to be blindly trusted. They also indicate that training choices such as self-supervised pretraining can significantly impact robustness by enabling transferable perturbations. We release our source code as a package that should help future research in evaluating their attacks and defenses.
abstract_zh: 与涉及神经网络的许多其他任务一样，语音识别模型很容易受到对抗性攻击。然而，最近的研究指出，与图像模型相比，ASR 模型的攻击和防御之间存在差异。提高 ASR 模型的稳健性需要进行范式转变，从评估对一个或几个模型的攻击转向系统性的评估方法。我们通过评估各种架构上一组代表性的对抗性攻击，为此类研究奠定了基础：有针对性的和无针对性的、基于优化和语音处理的、白盒、黑盒和有针对性的攻击。我们的结果表明，当改变模型架构时，不同攻击算法的相对强度差异很大，并且某些攻击的结果不可盲目信任。他们还表明，诸如自监督预训练之类的训练选择可以通过实现可转移的扰动来显着影响鲁棒性。我们将源代码作为一个包发布，这应该有助于未来研究评估其攻击和防御。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了多种对抗攻击在不同语音识别模型架构上的效果，探讨了提升ASR模型鲁棒性的系统性方法。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR模型的防御策略缺乏系统性，且对抗攻击的效果受模型架构影响显著，需建立更全面的评估框架。
AI.method: 在多种模型架构上测试目标攻击、非目标攻击、优化攻击和语音处理攻击等方法，并分析预训练等训练选择的影响。
AI.result: 不同攻击算法在不同模型上的效果差异显著，部分攻击结果不可靠；自监督预训练等方法可能通过可迁移扰动影响模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 需采用系统性评估方法研究ASR模型的对抗鲁棒性，训练策略对防御能力有重要影响，开源代码可促进后续研究。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 需采用系统性评估方法研究ASR模型的对抗鲁棒性，训练策略对防御能力有重要影响，开源代码可促进后续研究。

tldr: 本文评估了多种对抗攻击在不同语音识别模型架构上的效果，探讨了提升ASR模型鲁棒性的系统性方法。
motivation: 现有ASR模型的防御策略缺乏系统性，且对抗攻击的效果受模型架构影响显著，需建立更全面的评估框架。
method: 在多种模型架构上测试目标攻击、非目标攻击、优化攻击和语音处理攻击等方法，并分析预训练等训练选择的影响。
result: 不同攻击算法在不同模型上的效果差异显著，部分攻击结果不可靠；自监督预训练等方法可能通过可迁移扰动影响模型鲁棒性。
conclusion: 需采用系统性评估方法研究ASR模型的对抗鲁棒性，训练策略对防御能力有重要影响，开源代码可促进后续研究。
search_text: Recent improvements of ASR models in the face of adversarial attacks ASR 模型在面对对抗性攻击时的最新改进 Like many other tasks involving neural networks, Speech Recognition models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. However recent research has pointed out differences between attacks and defenses on ASR models compared to image models. Improving the robustness of ASR models requires a paradigm shift from evaluating attacks on one or a few models to a systemic approach in evaluation. We lay the ground for such research by evaluating on various architectures a representative set of adversarial attacks: targeted and untargeted, optimization and speech processing-based, white-box, black-box and targeted attacks. Our results show that the relative strengths of different attack algorithms vary considerably when changing the model architecture, and that the results of some attacks are not to be blindly trusted. They also indicate that training choices such as self-supervised pretraining can significantly impact robustness by enabling transferable perturbations. We release our source code as a package that should help future research in evaluating their attacks and defenses. 与涉及神经网络的许多其他任务一样，语音识别模型很容易受到对抗性攻击。然而，最近的研究指出，与图像模型相比，ASR 模型的攻击和防御之间存在差异。提高 ASR 模型的稳健性需要进行范式转变，从评估对一个或几个模型的攻击转向系统性的评估方法。我们通过评估各种架构上一组代表性的对抗性攻击，为此类研究奠定了基础：有针对性的和无针对性的、基于优化和语音处理的、白盒、黑盒和有针对性的攻击。我们的结果表明，当改变模型架构时，不同攻击算法的相对强度差异很大，并且某些攻击的结果不可盲目信任。他们还表明，诸如自监督预训练之类的训练选择可以通过实现可转移的扰动来显着影响鲁棒性。我们将源代码作为一个包发布，这应该有助于未来研究评估其攻击和防御。 本文评估了多种对抗攻击在不同语音识别模型架构上的效果，探讨了提升ASR模型鲁棒性的系统性方法。 Raphael Olivier,Bhiksha Raj cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Dengpan Fu,Dongdong Chen,Hao Yang,Jianmin Bao,Lu Yuan,Lei Zhang,Houqiang Li,Fang Wen,Dong Chen
title: Large-Scale Pre-training for Person Re-identification with Noisy Labels
title_zh: 带噪声标签的人员重新识别的大规模预训练
comment: To Appear at CVPR 2022, code is available at https://github.com/DengpanFu/LUPerson-NL
comments: To Appear at CVPR 2022, code is available at https://github.com/DengpanFu/LUPerson-NL
abstract: This paper aims to address the problem of pre-training for person re-identification (Re-ID) with noisy labels. To setup the pre-training task, we apply a simple online multi-object tracking system on raw videos of an existing unlabeled Re-ID dataset "LUPerson" nd build the Noisy Labeled variant called "LUPerson-NL". Since theses ID labels automatically derived from tracklets inevitably contain noises, we develop a large-scale Pre-training framework utilizing Noisy Labels (PNL), which consists of three learning modules: supervised Re-ID learning, prototype-based contrastive learning, and label-guided contrastive learning. In principle, joint learning of these three modules not only clusters similar examples to one prototype, but also rectifies noisy labels based on the prototype assignment. We demonstrate that learning directly from raw videos is a promising alternative for pre-training, which utilizes spatial and temporal correlations as weak supervision. This simple pre-training task provides a scalable way to learn SOTA Re-ID representations from scratch on "LUPerson-NL" without bells and whistles. For example, by applying on the same supervised Re-ID method MGN, our pre-trained model improves the mAP over the unsupervised pre-training counterpart by 5.7%, 2.2%, 2.3% on CUHK03, DukeMTMC, and MSMT17 respectively. Under the small-scale or few-shot setting, the performance gain is even more significant, suggesting a better transferability of the learned representation. Code is available at https://github.com/DengpanFu/LUPerson-NL
summary: This paper aims to address the problem of pre-training for person re-identification (Re-ID) with noisy labels. To setup the pre-training task, we apply a simple online multi-object tracking system on raw videos of an existing unlabeled Re-ID dataset "LUPerson" nd build the Noisy Labeled variant called "LUPerson-NL". Since theses ID labels automatically derived from tracklets inevitably contain noises, we develop a large-scale Pre-training framework utilizing Noisy Labels (PNL), which consists of three learning modules: supervised Re-ID learning, prototype-based contrastive learning, and label-guided contrastive learning. In principle, joint learning of these three modules not only clusters similar examples to one prototype, but also rectifies noisy labels based on the prototype assignment. We demonstrate that learning directly from raw videos is a promising alternative for pre-training, which utilizes spatial and temporal correlations as weak supervision. This simple pre-training task provides a scalable way to learn SOTA Re-ID representations from scratch on "LUPerson-NL" without bells and whistles. For example, by applying on the same supervised Re-ID method MGN, our pre-trained model improves the mAP over the unsupervised pre-training counterpart by 5.7%, 2.2%, 2.3% on CUHK03, DukeMTMC, and MSMT17 respectively. Under the small-scale or few-shot setting, the performance gain is even more significant, suggesting a better transferability of the learned representation. Code is available at https://github.com/DengpanFu/LUPerson-NL
abstract_zh: 本文旨在解决带有噪声标签的行人重新识别（Re-ID）的预训练问题。为了设置预训练任务，我们在现有未标记 Re-ID 数据集“LUPerson”的原始视频上应用一个简单的在线多对象跟踪系统，并构建名为“LUPerson-NL”的噪声标记变体。由于这些从轨迹自动派生的 ID 标签不可避免地包含噪声，因此我们利用噪声标签（PNL）开发了一个大规模的预训练框架，该框架由三个学习模块组成：有监督的 Re-ID 学习、基于原型的对比学习和标签引导的对比学习。原则上，这三个模块的联合学习不仅将相似的示例聚类到一个原型，而且还根据原型分配纠正噪声标签。我们证明，直接从原始视频中学习是预训练的一种有前途的替代方案，它利用空间和时间相关性作为弱监督。这个简单的预训练任务提供了一种可扩展的方法，可以在“LUPerson-NL”上从头开始学习 SOTA Re-ID 表示，而无需任何附加功能。例如，通过应用相同的监督 Re-ID 方法 MGN，我们的预训练模型在 CUHK03、DukeMTMC 和 MSMT17 上的 mAP 比无监督预训练模型分别提高了 5.7%、2.2%、2.3%。在小规模或少样本设置下，性能增益更加显着，这表明学习到的表示具有更好的可迁移性。代码可在 https://github.com/DengpanFu/LUPerson-NL 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用噪声标签进行大规模预训练的行人重识别（Re-ID）方法，通过构建带有噪声标签的数据集LUPerson-NL，并设计包含三个学习模块的框架来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Re-ID预训练方法依赖干净标签，但实际数据中标签噪声普遍存在，导致模型性能受限。传统去噪方法复杂且效果有限，需探索更鲁棒的预训练策略。
AI.method: 构建LUPerson-NL噪声标签数据集，设计包含监督Re-ID学习、基于原型的对比学习和标签引导对比学习的三模块框架，通过联合学习实现噪声标签修正与特征对齐。
AI.result: 在CUHK03、DukeMTMC和MSMT17数据集上，相比无监督预训练方法，mAP分别提升5.7%、2.2%、2.3%；在小规模/少样本场景下性能增益更显著。
AI.conclusion: 直接利用原始视频进行预训练能有效捕捉时空关联作为弱监督信号，所提方法在无额外设计的情况下实现了SOTA的Re-ID表征学习，具有良好的可扩展性与迁移性。

search_text: Large-Scale Pre-training for Person Re-identification with Noisy Labels 带噪声标签的人员重新识别的大规模预训练 This paper aims to address the problem of pre-training for person re-identification (Re-ID) with noisy labels. To setup the pre-training task, we apply a simple online multi-object tracking system on raw videos of an existing unlabeled Re-ID dataset "LUPerson" nd build the Noisy Labeled variant called "LUPerson-NL". Since theses ID labels automatically derived from tracklets inevitably contain noises, we develop a large-scale Pre-training framework utilizing Noisy Labels (PNL), which consists of three learning modules: supervised Re-ID learning, prototype-based contrastive learning, and label-guided contrastive learning. In principle, joint learning of these three modules not only clusters similar examples to one prototype, but also rectifies noisy labels based on the prototype assignment. We demonstrate that learning directly from raw videos is a promising alternative for pre-training, which utilizes spatial and temporal correlations as weak supervision. This simple pre-training task provides a scalable way to learn SOTA Re-ID representations from scratch on "LUPerson-NL" without bells and whistles. For example, by applying on the same supervised Re-ID method MGN, our pre-trained model improves the mAP over the unsupervised pre-training counterpart by 5.7%, 2.2%, 2.3% on CUHK03, DukeMTMC, and MSMT17 respectively. Under the small-scale or few-shot setting, the performance gain is even more significant, suggesting a better transferability of the learned representation. authors_text: Shengyi Qian,Linyi Jin,Chris Rockwell,Siyi Chen,David F. Fouhey
title: Understanding 3D Object Articulation in Internet Videos
title_zh: 了解互联网视频中的 3D 对象清晰度
abstract: We propose to investigate detecting and characterizing the 3D planar articulation of objects from ordinary videos. While seemingly easy for humans, this problem poses many challenges for computers. We propose to approach this problem by combining a top-down detection system that finds planes that can be articulated along with an optimization approach that solves for a 3D plane that can explain a sequence of observed articulations. We show that this system can be trained on a combination of videos and 3D scan datasets. When tested on a dataset of challenging Internet videos and the Charades dataset, our approach obtains strong performance. Project site: https://jasonqsy.github.io/Articulation3D
summary: We propose to investigate detecting and characterizing the 3D planar articulation of objects from ordinary videos. While seemingly easy for humans, this problem poses many challenges for computers. We propose to approach this problem by combining a top-down detection system that finds planes that can be articulated along with an optimization approach that solves for a 3D plane that can explain a sequence of observed articulations. We show that this system can be trained on a combination of videos and 3D scan datasets. When tested on a dataset of challenging Internet videos and the Charades dataset, our approach obtains strong performance. Project site: https://jasonqsy.github.io/Articulation3D
abstract_zh: 我们建议研究检测和表征普通视频中物体的 3D 平面关节。虽然这个问题对人类来说似乎很容易，但对计算机来说却提出了许多挑战。我们建议通过结合自上而下的检测系统和优化方法来解决这个问题，该检测系统可以找到可以铰接的平面，该优化方法可以求解可以解释一系列观察到的铰接的 3D 平面。我们证明该系统可以结合视频和 3D 扫描数据集进行训练。当在具有挑战性的互联网视频数据集和 Charades 数据集上进行测试时，我们的方法获得了强大的性能。项目站点：https://jasonqsy.github.io/Articulation3D

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从互联网视频中检测和表征3D物体的平面关节运动。
AI.motivation: 尽管人类能轻松识别物体的关节运动，但计算机在此任务上面临诸多挑战，需开发有效方法进行自动分析。
AI.method: 结合自上而下的平面检测系统与优化算法，通过训练视频和3D扫描数据集实现对关节运动的建模。
AI.result: 在包含挑战性互联网视频和Charades数据集的测试中，方法表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能有效检测和表征3D物体的关节运动，适用于实际视频场景。

We show that this system can be trained on a combination of videos and 3D scan datasets. When tested on a dataset of challenging Internet videos and the Charades dataset, our approach obtains strong performance. Project site: https://jasonqsy.github.io/Articulation3D 我们建议研究检测和表征普通视频中物体的 3D 平面关节。虽然这个问题对人类来说似乎很容易，但对计算机来说却提出了许多挑战。我们建议通过结合自上而下的检测系统和优化方法来解决这个问题，该检测系统可以找到可以铰接的平面，该优化方法可以求解可以解释一系列观察到的铰接的 3D 平面。我们证明该系统可以结合视频和 3D 扫描数据集进行训练。当在具有挑战性的互联网视频数据集和 Charades 数据集上进行测试时，我们的方法获得了强大的性能。项目站点：https://jasonqsy.github.io/Articulation3D 本文旨在从互联网视频中检测和表征3D物体的平面关节运动。 Shengyi Qian,Linyi Jin,Chris Rockwell,Siyi Chen,David F. Fouhey cs.CV

authors_text: Yuliang Zou,Zizhao Zhang,Chun-Liang Li,Han Zhang,Tomas Pfister,Jia-Bin Huang
title: Learning Instance-Specific Adaptation for Cross-Domain Segmentation
title_zh: 学习特定于实例的跨域分割适应
abstract: We propose a test-time adaptation method for cross-domain image segmentation. Our method is simple: Given a new unseen instance at test time, we adapt a pre-trained model by conducting instance-specific BatchNorm (statistics) calibration. Our approach has two core components. First, we replace the manually designed BatchNorm calibration rule with a learnable module. Second, we leverage strong data augmentation to simulate random domain shifts for learning the calibration rule. In contrast to existing domain adaptation methods, our method does not require accessing the target domain data at training time or conducting computationally expensive test-time model training/optimization. Equipping our method with models trained by standard recipes achieves significant improvement, comparing favorably with several state-of-the-art domain generalization and one-shot unsupervised domain adaptation approaches. Combining our method with the domain generalization methods further improves performance, reaching a new state of the art.
summary: We propose a test-time adaptation method for cross-domain image segmentation. Our method is simple: Given a new unseen instance at test time, we adapt a pre-trained model by conducting instance-specific BatchNorm (statistics) calibration. Our approach has two core components. First, we replace the manually designed BatchNorm calibration rule with a learnable module. Second, we leverage strong data augmentation to simulate random domain shifts for learning the calibration rule. In contrast to existing domain adaptation methods, our method does not require accessing the target domain data at training time or conducting computationally expensive test-time model training/optimization. Equipping our method with models trained by standard recipes achieves significant improvement, comparing favorably with several state-of-the-art domain generalization and one-shot unsupervised domain adaptation approaches. Combining our method with the domain generalization methods further improves performance, reaching a new state of the art.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于跨域图像分割的测试时间自适应方法。我们的方法很简单：在测试时给定一个新的未见过的实例，我们通过进行特定于实例的 BatchNorm（统计）校准来调整预训练模型。我们的方法有两个核心组成部分。首先，我们用可学习的模块替换手动设计的 BatchNorm 校准规则。其次，我们利用强大的数据增强来模拟随机域移位以学习校准规则。与现有的域适应方法相比，我们的方法不需要在训练时访问目标域数据或进行计算昂贵的测试时模型训练/优化。为我们的方法配备通过标准配方训练的模型，可以实现显着的改进，与几种最先进的领域泛化和一次性无监督领域适应方法相比，效果不俗。将我们的方法与领域泛化方法相结合进一步提高了性能，达到了新的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 提出一种测试时实例特定自适应方法，用于跨领域图像分割，通过可学习的BatchNorm校准和数据增强实现领域适应。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法需目标领域数据或复杂计算，本文旨在无需目标数据且低计算量的情况下提升跨领域分割性能。
AI.method: 方法包括替换手动BatchNorm校准为可学习模块，并利用强数据增强模拟领域偏移以学习校准规则。
AI.result: 实验显示方法在多个基准上优于现有领域泛化及单次无监督自适应方法，结合后达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 提出简单高效的跨领域分割自适应方法，无需目标数据，可与领域泛化方法结合提升性能。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种测试时实例特定自适应方法，用于跨领域图像分割，通过可学习的BatchNorm校准和数据增强实现领域适应。

authors_text: Jiahui Lei,Kostas Daniilidis
title: CaDeX: Learning Canonical Deformation Coordinate Space for Dynamic Surface Representation via Neural Homeomorphism
title_zh: CaDeX：通过神经同态学习动态表面表示的规范变形坐标空间
abstract: While neural representations for static 3D shapes are widely studied, representations for deformable surfaces are limited to be template-dependent or lack efficiency. We introduce Canonical Deformation Coordinate Space (CaDeX), a unified representation of both shape and nonrigid motion. Our key insight is the factorization of the deformation between frames by continuous bijective canonical maps (homeomorphisms) and their inverses that go through a learned canonical shape. Our novel deformation representation and its implementation are simple, efficient, and guarantee cycle consistency, topology preservation, and, if needed, volume conservation. Our modelling of the learned canonical shapes provides a flexible and stable space for shape prior learning. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in modelling a wide range of deformable geometries: human bodies, animal bodies, and articulated objects.
summary: While neural representations for static 3D shapes are widely studied, representations for deformable surfaces are limited to be template-dependent or lack efficiency. We introduce Canonical Deformation Coordinate Space (CaDeX), a unified representation of both shape and nonrigid motion. Our key insight is the factorization of the deformation between frames by continuous bijective canonical maps (homeomorphisms) and their inverses that go through a learned canonical shape. Our novel deformation representation and its implementation are simple, efficient, and guarantee cycle consistency, topology preservation, and, if needed, volume conservation. Our modelling of the learned canonical shapes provides a flexible and stable space for shape prior learning. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in modelling a wide range of deformable geometries: human bodies, animal bodies, and articulated objects.
abstract_zh: 虽然静态 3D 形状的神经表示得到了广泛研究，但可变形表面的表示仅限于模板依赖或缺乏效率。我们引入规范变形坐标空间（CaDeX），它是形状和非刚性运动的统一表示。我们的主要见解是通过连续双射规范映射（同胚）及其通过学习的规范形状的逆来对帧之间的变形进行因式分解。我们新颖的变形表示及其实现简单、高效，并保证循环一致性、拓扑保存，以及（如果需要）体积守恒。我们对学习的规范形状进行建模为形状先验学习提供了灵活且稳定的空间。我们在建模各种可变形几何体方面展示了最先进的性能：人体、动物体和铰接物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CaDeX方法，通过神经同胚体学习规范变形坐标空间，实现对动态表面的统一表示，解决传统方法依赖模板或效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有可变形表面表示方法受限于模板依赖或效率不足，缺乏高效且统一的动态形状与运动建模方案。
AI.method: 通过连续双射规范映射（同胚体）及其逆映射分解帧间变形，结合学习到的规范形状空间，保证循环一致性、拓扑保持与体积守恒。
AI.result: 在人体、动物及关节物体等复杂变形场景中，CaDeX在建模精度与效率上达到当前最优水平。
AI.conclusion: CaDeX为动态表面建模提供了灵活稳定的规范空间，兼具高效性与几何保真性，适用于多类可变形物体的表示与分析。

authors_text: Osman Erman Okman,Mehmet Gorkem Ulkar,Gulnur Selda Uyanik
title: L^3U-net: Low-Latency Lightweight U-net Based Image Segmentation Model for Parallel CNN Processors
title_zh: L^3U-net：用于并行 CNN 处理器的基于低延迟轻量级 U-net 的图像分割模型
abstract: In this research, we propose a tiny image segmentation model, L^3U-net, that works on low-resource edge devices in real-time. We introduce a data folding technique that reduces inference latency by leveraging the parallel convolutional layer processing capability of the CNN accelerators. We also deploy the proposed model to such a device, MAX78000, and the results show that L^3U-net achieves more than 90% accuracy over two different segmentation datasets with 10 fps.
summary: In this research, we propose a tiny image segmentation model, L^3U-net, that works on low-resource edge devices in real-time. We introduce a data folding technique that reduces inference latency by leveraging the parallel convolutional layer processing capability of the CNN accelerators. We also deploy the proposed model to such a device, MAX78000, and the results show that L^3U-net achieves more than 90% accuracy over two different segmentation datasets with 10 fps.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们提出了一种微型图像分割模型 L^3U-net，它可以实时运行在资源匮乏的边缘设备上。我们引入了一种数据折叠技术，该技术通过利用 CNN 加速器的并行卷积层处理能力来减少推理延迟。我们还将所提出的模型部署到这样的设备 MAX78000 上，结果表明 L^3U-net 在两个不同的 10 fps 分割数据集上实现了 90% 以上的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级低延迟的图像分割模型L^3U-net，专为边缘设备的并行CNN处理器设计。
AI.motivation: 现有分割模型在资源受限的边缘设备上难以实现实时处理，需优化模型效率与硬件适配性。
AI.method: 引入数据折叠技术，结合并行卷积层处理能力，设计轻量化网络结构以降低推理延迟。
AI.result: 在MAX78000设备上达到10fps实时分割，两个数据集准确率均超90%。
AI.conclusion: L^3U-net通过硬件感知设计有效平衡了分割精度与边缘设备的计算资源限制。

search_text: L^3U-net: Low-Latency Lightweight U-net Based Image Segmentation Model for Parallel CNN Processors L^3U-net：用于并行 CNN 处理器的基于低延迟轻量级 U-net 的图像分割模型 In this research, we propose a tiny image segmentation model, L^3U-net, that works on low-resource edge devices in real-time. We introduce a data folding technique that reduces inference latency by leveraging the parallel convolutional layer processing capability of the CNN accelerators. We also deploy the proposed model to such a device, MAX78000, and the results show that L^3U-net achieves more than 90% accuracy over two different segmentation datasets with 10 fps. 在这项研究中，我们提出了一种微型图像分割模型 L^3U-net，它可以实时运行在资源匮乏的边缘设备上。我们引入了一种数据折叠技术，该技术通过利用 CNN 加速器的并行卷积层处理能力来减少推理延迟。我们还将所提出的模型部署到这样的设备 MAX78000 上，结果表明 L^3U-net 在两个不同的 10 fps 分割数据集上实现了 90% 以上的准确率。 本文提出一种轻量级低延迟的图像分割模型L^3U-net，专为边缘设备的并行CNN处理器设计。 Osman Erman Okman,Mehmet Gorkem Ulkar,Gulnur Selda Uyanik cs.CV,cs.AI,eess.IV

authors_text: Yanghao Li,Hanzi Mao,Ross Girshick,Kaiming He
title: Exploring Plain Vision Transformer Backbones for Object Detection
title_zh: 探索用于物体检测的普通视觉 Transformer 主干
comment: Tech report. arXiv v2: add RetinaNet results
comments: Tech report. arXiv v2: add RetinaNet results
abstract: We explore the plain, non-hierarchical Vision Transformer (ViT) as a backbone network for object detection. This design enables the original ViT architecture to be fine-tuned for object detection without needing to redesign a hierarchical backbone for pre-training. With minimal adaptations for fine-tuning, our plain-backbone detector can achieve competitive results. Surprisingly, we observe: (i) it is sufficient to build a simple feature pyramid from a single-scale feature map (without the common FPN design) and (ii) it is sufficient to use window attention (without shifting) aided with very few cross-window propagation blocks. With plain ViT backbones pre-trained as Masked Autoencoders (MAE), our detector, named ViTDet, can compete with the previous leading methods that were all based on hierarchical backbones, reaching up to 61.3 AP_box on the COCO dataset using only ImageNet-1K pre-training. We hope our study will draw attention to research on plain-backbone detectors. Code for ViTDet is available in Detectron2.
summary: We explore the plain, non-hierarchical Vision Transformer (ViT) as a backbone network for object detection. This design enables the original ViT architecture to be fine-tuned for object detection without needing to redesign a hierarchical backbone for pre-training. With minimal adaptations for fine-tuning, our plain-backbone detector can achieve competitive results. Surprisingly, we observe: (i) it is sufficient to build a simple feature pyramid from a single-scale feature map (without the common FPN design) and (ii) it is sufficient to use window attention (without shifting) aided with very few cross-window propagation blocks. With plain ViT backbones pre-trained as Masked Autoencoders (MAE), our detector, named ViTDet, can compete with the previous leading methods that were all based on hierarchical backbones, reaching up to 61.3 AP_box on the COCO dataset using only ImageNet-1K pre-training. We hope our study will draw attention to research on plain-backbone detectors. Code for ViTDet is available in Detectron2.
abstract_zh: 我们探索简单的、非分层的 Vision Transformer (ViT) 作为对象检测的骨干网络。这种设计使得原始 ViT 架构能够针对对象检测进行微调，而无需重新设计用于预训练的分层主干。通过最小程度的微调，我们的普通骨干检测器可以获得有竞争力的结果。令人惊讶的是，我们观察到：（i）从单尺度特征图（没有常见的 FPN 设计）构建一个简单的特征金字塔就足够了，（ii）在很少的跨窗口传播块的辅助下使用窗口注意力（不移位）就足够了。通过将普通 ViT 主干预训练为 Masked Autoencoders (MAE)，我们的检测器（名为 ViTDet）可以与之前所有基于分层主干的领先方法竞争，仅使用 ImageNet-1K 预训练即可在 COCO 数据集上达到 61.3 AP_box。我们希望我们的研究能够引起人们对普通骨干探测器研究的关注。 ViTDet 的代码可在 Detectron2 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文探索了非分层的视觉Transformer（ViT）作为目标检测的骨干网络，无需重新设计分层结构即可实现竞争力结果。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测方法依赖分层骨干网络，而ViT的原始设计未针对检测优化。作者希望验证简单ViT结构是否能直接用于检测任务，减少对复杂架构的依赖。
AI.method: 采用单尺度特征图构建简单特征金字塔（无需FPN），结合窗口注意力机制与少量跨窗口传播块。使用MAE预训练的ViT作为骨干，集成至Detectron2框架。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上，仅使用ImageNet-1K预训练的ViTDet达到61.3 AP_box，性能与基于分层骨干的领先方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 证明了非分层ViT骨干在目标检测中的有效性，为简化检测模型设计提供了新方向。

This design enables the original ViT architecture to be fine-tuned for object detection without needing to redesign a hierarchical backbone for pre-training. With minimal adaptations for fine-tuning, our plain-backbone detector can achieve competitive results. Surprisingly, we observe: (i) it is sufficient to build a simple feature pyramid from a single-scale feature map (without the common FPN design) and (ii) it is sufficient to use window attention (without shifting) aided with very few cross-window propagation blocks. We hope our study will draw attention to research on plain-backbone detectors. authors_text: Jiteng Mu,Shalini De Mello,Zhiding Yu,Nuno Vasconcelos,Xiaolong Wang,Jan Kautz,Sifei Liu
title: CoordGAN: Self-Supervised Dense Correspondences Emerge from GANs
title_zh: CoordGAN：GAN 产生自监督密集对应
abstract: Recent advances show that Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) can synthesize images with smooth variations along semantically meaningful latent directions, such as pose, expression, layout, etc. While this indicates that GANs implicitly learn pixel-level correspondences across images, few studies explored how to extract them explicitly. In this work, we introduce Coordinate GAN (CoordGAN), a structure-texture disentangled GAN that learns a dense correspondence map for each generated image. We represent the correspondence maps of different images as warped coordinate frames transformed from a canonical coordinate frame, i.e., the correspondence map, which describes the structure (e.g., the shape of a face), is controlled via a transformation. Hence, finding correspondences boils down to locating the same coordinate in different correspondence maps. In CoordGAN, we sample a transformation to represent the structure of a synthesized instance, while an independent texture branch is responsible for rendering appearance details orthogonal to the structure. Our approach can also extract dense correspondence maps for real images by adding an encoder on top of the generator. We quantitatively demonstrate the quality of the learned dense correspondences through segmentation mask transfer on multiple datasets. We also show that the proposed generator achieves better structure and texture disentanglement compared to existing approaches. Project page: https://jitengmu.github.io/CoordGAN/
summary: Recent advances show that Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) can synthesize images with smooth variations along semantically meaningful latent directions, such as pose, expression, layout, etc. While this indicates that GANs implicitly learn pixel-level correspondences across images, few studies explored how to extract them explicitly. In this work, we introduce Coordinate GAN (CoordGAN), a structure-texture disentangled GAN that learns a dense correspondence map for each generated image. We represent the correspondence maps of different images as warped coordinate frames transformed from a canonical coordinate frame, i.e., the correspondence map, which describes the structure (e.g., the shape of a face), is controlled via a transformation. Hence, finding correspondences boils down to locating the same coordinate in different correspondence maps. In CoordGAN, we sample a transformation to represent the structure of a synthesized instance, while an independent texture branch is responsible for rendering appearance details orthogonal to the structure. Our approach can also extract dense correspondence maps for real images by adding an encoder on top of the generator. We quantitatively demonstrate the quality of the learned dense correspondences through segmentation mask transfer on multiple datasets. We also show that the proposed generator achieves better structure and texture disentanglement compared to existing approaches. Project page: https://jitengmu.github.io/CoordGAN/
abstract_zh: 最近的进展表明，生成对抗网络 (GAN) 可以沿着语义上有意义的潜在方向（例如姿势、表达、布局等）合成具有平滑变化的图像。虽然这表明 GAN 隐式地学习图像之间的像素级对应关系，但很少有研究探索如何显式地提取它们。在这项工作中，我们引入了坐标 GAN (CoordGAN)，这是一种结构-纹理解缠结的 GAN，可以为每个生成的图像学习密集对应图。我们将不同图像的对应图表示为从规范坐标系转换而来的扭曲坐标系，即描述结构（例如面部形状）的对应图是通过变换来控制的。因此，寻找对应关系归结为在不同的对应图中定位相同的坐标。在 CoordGAN 中，我们对变换进行采样来表示合成实例的结构，而独立的纹理分支负责渲染与结构正交的外观细节。我们的方法还可以通过在生成器顶部添加编码器来提取真实图像的密集对应图。我们通过多个数据集上的分段掩码传输定量地证明了所学习的密集对应关系的质量。我们还表明，与现有方法相比，所提出的生成器实现了更好的结构和纹理解缠结。项目页面：https://jitengmu.github.io/CoordGAN/

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoordGAN，一种结构-纹理解耦的生成对抗网络，通过学习密集对应图来生成图像并实现跨图像的像素级对应关系提取。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成对抗网络（GANs）能沿语义潜在方向生成平滑变化的图像，但现有研究尚未有效提取其隐含的像素级对应关系，亟需一种显式学习密集对应图的方法。
AI.method: CoordGAN通过将不同图像的对应图表示为从规范坐标系变换而来的扭曲坐标框架，利用结构变换控制形状信息，独立纹理分支生成外观细节，并通过编码器扩展至真实图像。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上通过分割掩码迁移验证了密集对应图的质量，且生成器在结构与纹理解耦效果上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CoordGAN成功实现了自监督的密集对应关系学习，为图像生成与编辑提供了更精细的结构-纹理控制能力。

authors_text: Jennifer Pearl Smith,John I. Bailey,III.,Benjamin A. Mazin
title: Highly-Multiplexed Superconducting Detector Readout: Approachable High-Speed FPGA Design
title_zh: 高度复用的超导探测器读出：平易近人的高速 FPGA 设计
comment: 30th IEEE International Symposium On Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (accepted as poster)
comments: 30th IEEE International Symposium On Field-Programmable Custom Computing Machines (accepted as poster)
abstract: This work presents the design and preliminary performance of a highly-multiplexed superconducting detector readout. The readout system is implemented on the Xilinx ZCU111 RFSoC Evaluation Board. The current design uses 12% of the DSPs, 60% of the LUTs, 20% of the FFs, and 30% of the BRAM and makes timing at 512 MHz. The system uses two integrated ADCs and DACs running at 4.096 GSPS to read out 2,048 superconducting detectors. This work targets a 2x increase in the number of superconducting detectors processed per board with 80% less power than previous readout schemes. The open-source design leverages modern FPGA productivity tools including Vivado High-Level Synthesis to create all custom IP blocks, PYNQ to test and verify individual IP and develop Python drivers, and Vivado ML Intelligent Design Runs to close timing. We emphasize strategies for achieving timing closure without custom HDL which we expect to be useful for superconducting device groups looking to utilize FPGAs in high-performance applications without specialized knowledge in FPGA design.
summary: This work presents the design and preliminary performance of a highly-multiplexed superconducting detector readout. The readout system is implemented on the Xilinx ZCU111 RFSoC Evaluation Board. The current design uses 12% of the DSPs, 60% of the LUTs, 20% of the FFs, and 30% of the BRAM and makes timing at 512 MHz. The system uses two integrated ADCs and DACs running at 4.096 GSPS to read out 2,048 superconducting detectors. This work targets a 2x increase in the number of superconducting detectors processed per board with 80% less power than previous readout schemes. The open-source design leverages modern FPGA productivity tools including Vivado High-Level Synthesis to create all custom IP blocks, PYNQ to test and verify individual IP and develop Python drivers, and Vivado ML Intelligent Design Runs to close timing. We emphasize strategies for achieving timing closure without custom HDL which we expect to be useful for superconducting device groups looking to utilize FPGAs in high-performance applications without specialized knowledge in FPGA design.
abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了高度多路复用超导探测器读数的设计和初步性能。读出系统在 Xilinx ZCU111 RFSoC 评估板上实现。当前设计使用 12% 的 DSP、60% 的 LUT、20% 的 FF 和 30% 的 BRAM，并且定时频率为 512 MHz。该系统使用两个以 4.096 GSPS 运行的集成 ADC 和 DAC 来读取 2,048 个超导探测器。这项工作的目标是将每块板处理的超导探测器数量增加 2 倍，同时比以前的读出方案减少 80% 的功耗。该开源设计利用现代 FPGA 生产力工具，包括用于创建所有自定义 IP 块的 Vivado High Level Synthesis、用于测试和验证单个 IP 并开发 Python 驱动程序的 PYNQ，以及用于关闭时序的 Vivado ML 智能设计运行。我们强调无需定制 HDL 即可实现时序收敛的策略，我们希望这对于希望在高性能应用中使用 FPGA 且无需 FPGA 设计专业知识的超导器件组非常有用。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了基于Xilinx ZCU111 RFSoC评估板的高复用超导探测器读取系统，通过FPGA技术实现2048个探测器的高速读取。
AI.motivation: 旨在提升超导探测器读取系统的处理能力与能效比，同时降低对专业FPGA设计知识的依赖，推动超导设备在高性能应用中的普及。
AI.method: 采用Vivado高级综合工具生成定制IP块，结合PYNQ进行测试验证及Python驱动开发，并利用Vivado ML实现时序闭合，无需定制HDL代码。
AI.result: 系统在512 MHz时钟下运行，使用两个4.096 GSPS ADC/DAC，实现2048个探测器读取，相比传统方案处理能力提升2倍且功耗降低80%。
AI.conclusion: 该开源设计为超导设备研究者提供了高效、低功耗且易于实现的FPGA读取方案，为未来大规模超导探测系统开发奠定基础。

search_text: Highly-Multiplexed Superconducting Detector Readout: Approachable High-Speed FPGA Design 高度复用的超导探测器读出：平易近人的高速 FPGA 设计 This work presents the design and preliminary performance of a highly-multiplexed superconducting detector readout. The readout system is implemented on the Xilinx ZCU111 RFSoC Evaluation Board. The current design uses 12% of the DSPs, 60% of the LUTs, 20% of the FFs, and 30% of the BRAM and makes timing at 512 MHz. The system uses two integrated ADCs and DACs running at 4.096 GSPS to read out 2,048 superconducting detectors. The open-source design leverages modern FPGA productivity tools including Vivado High-Level Synthesis to create all custom IP blocks, PYNQ to test and verify individual IP and develop Python drivers, and Vivado ML Intelligent Design Runs to close timing. authors_text: Junhyeong Cho,Youngseok Yoon,Suha Kwak
title: Collaborative Transformers for Grounded Situation Recognition
title_zh: 用于接地情况识别的协作变压器
abstract: Grounded situation recognition is the task of predicting the main activity, entities playing certain roles within the activity, and bounding-box groundings of the entities in the given image. To effectively deal with this challenging task, we introduce a novel approach where the two processes for activity classification and entity estimation are interactive and complementary. To implement this idea, we propose Collaborative Glance-Gaze TransFormer (CoFormer) that consists of two modules: Glance transformer for activity classification and Gaze transformer for entity estimation. Glance transformer predicts the main activity with the help of Gaze transformer that analyzes entities and their relations, while Gaze transformer estimates the grounded entities by focusing only on the entities relevant to the activity predicted by Glance transformer. Our CoFormer achieves the state of the art in all evaluation metrics on the SWiG dataset. Training code and model weights are available at https://github.com/jhcho99/CoFormer.
summary: Grounded situation recognition is the task of predicting the main activity, entities playing certain roles within the activity, and bounding-box groundings of the entities in the given image. To effectively deal with this challenging task, we introduce a novel approach where the two processes for activity classification and entity estimation are interactive and complementary. To implement this idea, we propose Collaborative Glance-Gaze TransFormer (CoFormer) that consists of two modules: Glance transformer for activity classification and Gaze transformer for entity estimation. Glance transformer predicts the main activity with the help of Gaze transformer that analyzes entities and their relations, while Gaze transformer estimates the grounded entities by focusing only on the entities relevant to the activity predicted by Glance transformer. Our CoFormer achieves the state of the art in all evaluation metrics on the SWiG dataset. Training code and model weights are available at https://github.com/jhcho99/CoFormer.
abstract_zh: 扎根情境识别是预测主要活动、在活动中扮演某些角色的实体以及给定图像中实体的边界框扎根的任务。为了有效地处理这一具有挑战性的任务，我们引入了一种新颖的方法，其中活动分类和实体估计的两个过程是交互和互补的。为了实现这个想法，我们提出了协作式凝视变换器（CoFormer），它由两个模块组成：用于活动分类的凝视变换器和用于实体估计的凝视变换器。 Glance Transformer 借助分析实体及其关系的 Gaze Transformer 来预测主要活动，而 Gaze Transformer 通过仅关注与 Glance Transformer 预测的活动相关的实体来估计接地实体。我们的 CoFormer 在 SWiG 数据集的所有评估指标上都达到了最先进的水平。训练代码和模型权重可在 https://github.com/jhcho99/CoFormer 获取。

AI.tldr: 基于场景的活动识别，预测图像中的主要活动、实体角色及其边界框。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在活动分类和实体估计之间缺乏有效交互，导致信息利用不充分，需设计协同机制提升性能。
AI.method: 提出CoFormer模型，包含Glance Transformer（活动分类）和Gaze Transformer（实体估计），两者通过交互实现互补，前者利用后者分析实体关系，后者专注于与活动相关的实体。
AI.result: 在SWiG数据集上达到所有评估指标的最先进水平，开源代码与模型权重。
AI.conclusion: 协作机制有效提升模型性能，验证了交互式模块设计在场景识别中的优势。

authors_text: Hari Chandana Kuchibhotla,Sumitra S Malagi,Shivam Chandhok,Vineeth N Balasubramanian
title: Unseen Classes at a Later Time? No Problem
title_zh: 以后看不到的课程？没问题
comment: To appear in CVPR 2022. Code is available @ (https://github.com/sumitramalagi/Unseen-classes-at-a-later-time)
comments: To appear in CVPR 2022. Code is available @ (https://github.com/sumitramalagi/Unseen-classes-at-a-later-time)
abstract: Recent progress towards learning from limited supervision has encouraged efforts towards designing models that can recognize novel classes at test time (generalized zero-shot learning or GZSL). GZSL approaches assume knowledge of all classes, with or without labeled data, beforehand. However, practical scenarios demand models that are adaptable and can handle dynamic addition of new seen and unseen classes on the fly (that is continual generalized zero-shot learning or CGZSL). One solution is to sequentially retrain and reuse conventional GZSL methods, however, such an approach suffers from catastrophic forgetting leading to suboptimal generalization performance. A few recent efforts towards tackling CGZSL have been limited by difference in settings, practicality, data splits and protocols followed-inhibiting fair comparison and a clear direction forward. Motivated from these observations, in this work, we firstly consolidate the different CGZSL setting variants and propose a new Online-CGZSL setting which is more practical and flexible. Secondly, we introduce a unified feature-generative framework for CGZSL that leverages bi-directional incremental alignment to dynamically adapt to addition of new classes, with or without labeled data, that arrive over time in any of these CGZSL settings. Our comprehensive experiments and analysis on five benchmark datasets and comparison with baselines show that our approach consistently outperforms existing methods, especially on the more practical Online setting.
summary: Recent progress towards learning from limited supervision has encouraged efforts towards designing models that can recognize novel classes at test time (generalized zero-shot learning or GZSL). GZSL approaches assume knowledge of all classes, with or without labeled data, beforehand. However, practical scenarios demand models that are adaptable and can handle dynamic addition of new seen and unseen classes on the fly (that is continual generalized zero-shot learning or CGZSL). One solution is to sequentially retrain and reuse conventional GZSL methods, however, such an approach suffers from catastrophic forgetting leading to suboptimal generalization performance. A few recent efforts towards tackling CGZSL have been limited by difference in settings, practicality, data splits and protocols followed-inhibiting fair comparison and a clear direction forward. Motivated from these observations, in this work, we firstly consolidate the different CGZSL setting variants and propose a new Online-CGZSL setting which is more practical and flexible. Secondly, we introduce a unified feature-generative framework for CGZSL that leverages bi-directional incremental alignment to dynamically adapt to addition of new classes, with or without labeled data, that arrive over time in any of these CGZSL settings. Our comprehensive experiments and analysis on five benchmark datasets and comparison with baselines show that our approach consistently outperforms existing methods, especially on the more practical Online setting.
abstract_zh: 最近在有限监督学习方面取得的进展鼓励人们努力设计能够在测试时识别新类别的模型（广义零样本学习或 GZSL）。 GZSL 方法预先假设所有类别的知识，无论是否有标记数据。然而，实际场景需要模型具有适应性，并且能够动态添加新的可见和未见的类（即持续广义零样本学习或 CGZSL）。一种解决方案是依次重新训练和重用传统的 GZSL 方法，然而，这种方法会遭受灾难性遗忘，导致泛化性能不佳。最近解决 CGZSL 问题的一些努力受到了设置、实用性、数据分割和遵循的协议方面的差异的限制，阻碍了公平比较和明确的前进方向。受这些观察的启发，在这项工作中，我们首先整合了不同的 CGZSL 设置变体，并提出了一种更实用、更灵活的新 Online-CGZSL 设置。其次，我们为 CGZSL 引入了一个统一的特征生成框架，该框架利用双向增量对齐来动态适应新类的添加，无论有或没有标记数据，这些新类都会随着时间的推移在任何这些 CGZSL 设置中到达。我们对五个基准数据集的全面实验和分析以及与基线的比较表明，我们的方法始终优于现有方法，特别是在更实用的在线设置上。

AI.tldr: 本文研究持续广义零样本学习（CGZSL），旨在解决模型在动态新增已见和未见类别时的适应性问题，避免灾难性遗忘并提升泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CGZSL方法受限于设置差异、实用性不足及数据划分不统一，导致公平比较困难；传统顺序重训练方法易引发灾难性遗忘，性能不佳。
AI.method: 提出更实用的Online-CGZSL设置，并设计统一的特征生成框架，通过双向增量对齐动态适应新类别，支持有无标签数据的场景。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在多种CGZSL设置中均优于现有方法，尤其在更贴近实际的Online设置中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了CGZSL中的动态类别增量问题，为实际应用提供了灵活且性能优越的解决方案。

tldr: 本文研究持续广义零样本学习（CGZSL），旨在解决模型在动态新增已见和未见类别时的适应性问题，避免灾难性遗忘并提升泛化性能。
motivation: 现有CGZSL方法受限于设置差异、实用性不足及数据划分不统一，导致公平比较困难；传统顺序重训练方法易引发灾难性遗忘，性能不佳。
method: 提出更实用的Online-CGZSL设置，并设计统一的特征生成框架，通过双向增量对齐动态适应新类别，支持有无标签数据的场景。
result: 在五个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在多种CGZSL设置中均优于现有方法，尤其在更贴近实际的Online设置中表现突出。

search_text: Unseen Classes at a Later Time? No Problem 以后看不到的课程？没问题 Recent progress towards learning from limited supervision has encouraged efforts towards designing models that can recognize novel classes at test time (generalized zero-shot learning or GZSL). GZSL approaches assume knowledge of all classes, with or without labeled data, beforehand. However, practical scenarios demand models that are adaptable and can handle dynamic addition of new seen and unseen classes on the fly (that is continual generalized zero-shot learning or CGZSL). One solution is to sequentially retrain and reuse conventional GZSL methods, however, such an approach suffers from catastrophic forgetting leading to suboptimal generalization performance. A few recent efforts towards tackling CGZSL have been limited by difference in settings, practicality, data splits and protocols followed-inhibiting fair comparison and a clear direction forward. Motivated from these observations, in this work, we firstly consolidate the different CGZSL setting variants and propose a new Online-CGZSL setting which is more practical and flexible. Secondly, we introduce a unified feature-generative framework for CGZSL that leverages bi-directional incremental alignment to dynamically adapt to addition of new classes, with or without labeled data, that arrive over time in any of these CGZSL settings. Our comprehensive experiments and analysis on five benchmark datasets and comparison with baselines show that our approach consistently outperforms existing methods, especially on the more practical Online setting. 最近在有限监督学习方面取得的进展鼓励人们努力设计能够在测试时识别新类别的模型（广义零样本学习或 GZSL）。 GZSL 方法预先假设所有类别的知识，无论是否有标记数据。然而，实际场景需要模型具有适应性，并且能够动态添加新的可见和未见的类（即持续广义零样本学习或 CGZSL）。一种解决方案是依次重新训练和重用传统的 GZSL 方法，然而，这种方法会遭受灾难性遗忘，导致泛化性能不佳。最近解决 CGZSL 问题的一些努力受到了设置、实用性、数据分割和遵循的协议方面的差异的限制，阻碍了公平比较和明确的前进方向。受这些观察的启发，在这项工作中，我们首先整合了不同的 CGZSL 设置变体，并提出了一种更实用、更灵活的新 Online-CGZSL 设置。其次，我们为 CGZSL 引入了一个统一的特征生成框架，该框架利用双向增量对齐来动态适应新类的添加，无论有或没有标记数据，这些新类都会随着时间的推移在任何这些 CGZSL 设置中到达。我们对五个基准数据集的全面实验和分析以及与基线的比较表明，我们的方法始终优于现有方法，特别是在更实用的在线设置上。 本文研究持续广义零样本学习（CGZSL），旨在解决模型在动态新增已见和未见类别时的适应性问题，避免灾难性遗忘并提升泛化性能。 Hari Chandana Kuchibhotla,Sumitra S Malagi,Shivam Chandhok,Vineeth N Balasubramanian cs.CV

authors_text: Daniel Lichy,Soumyadip Sengupta,David W. Jacobs
title: Fast Light-Weight Near-Field Photometric Stereo
title_zh: 快速轻型近场光度立体
abstract: We introduce the first end-to-end learning-based solution to near-field Photometric Stereo (PS), where the light sources are close to the object of interest. This setup is especially useful for reconstructing large immobile objects. Our method is fast, producing a mesh from 52 512$\times$384 resolution images in about 1 second on a commodity GPU, thus potentially unlocking several AR/VR applications. Existing approaches rely on optimization coupled with a far-field PS network operating on pixels or small patches. Using optimization makes these approaches slow and memory intensive (requiring 17GB GPU and 27GB of CPU memory) while using only pixels or patches makes them highly susceptible to noise and calibration errors. To address these issues, we develop a recursive multi-resolution scheme to estimate surface normal and depth maps of the whole image at each step. The predicted depth map at each scale is then used to estimate `per-pixel lighting' for the next scale. This design makes our approach almost 45$\times$ faster and 2$^{\circ}$ more accurate (11.3$^{\circ}$ vs. 13.3$^{\circ}$ Mean Angular Error) than the state-of-the-art near-field PS reconstruction technique, which uses iterative optimization.
summary: We introduce the first end-to-end learning-based solution to near-field Photometric Stereo (PS), where the light sources are close to the object of interest. This setup is especially useful for reconstructing large immobile objects. Our method is fast, producing a mesh from 52 512$\times$384 resolution images in about 1 second on a commodity GPU, thus potentially unlocking several AR/VR applications. Existing approaches rely on optimization coupled with a far-field PS network operating on pixels or small patches. Using optimization makes these approaches slow and memory intensive (requiring 17GB GPU and 27GB of CPU memory) while using only pixels or patches makes them highly susceptible to noise and calibration errors. To address these issues, we develop a recursive multi-resolution scheme to estimate surface normal and depth maps of the whole image at each step. The predicted depth map at each scale is then used to estimate `per-pixel lighting' for the next scale. This design makes our approach almost 45$\times$ faster and 2$^{\circ}$ more accurate (11.3$^{\circ}$ vs. 13.3$^{\circ}$ Mean Angular Error) than the state-of-the-art near-field PS reconstruction technique, which uses iterative optimization.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了第一个基于端到端学习的近场光度立体（PS）解决方案，其中光源靠近感兴趣的物体。此设置对于重建大型固定物体特别有用。我们的方法速度很快，在商用 GPU 上大约 1 秒内即可从 52 512 美元\乘以 384 美元的分辨率图像生成网格，从而有可能解锁多个 AR/VR 应用程序。现有方法依赖于优化以及在像素或小块上运行的远场 PS 网络。使用优化会使这些方法速度缓慢且占用大量内存（需要 17GB GPU 和 27GB CPU 内存），而仅使用像素或补丁则使它们极易受到噪声和校准错误的影响。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一种递归多分辨率方案来估计整个图像每一步的表面法线和深度图。然后使用每个尺度的预测深度图来估计下一个尺度的“每像素照明”。这种设计使我们的方法比使用迭代优化的最先进的近场 PS 重建技术快了近 45$\times$，准确度提高了 2$^{\circ}$（11.3$^{\circ}$ 与 13.3$^{\circ}$ 平均角度误差）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于端到端学习的近场光度立体视觉解决方案，用于快速重建大型不可移动物体的三维模型。
AI.motivation: 现有近场光度立体视觉方法依赖优化算法和像素/小块处理，导致计算速度慢（需17GB显存和27GB内存）、内存占用高且易受噪声和校准误差影响。
AI.method: 设计递归多分辨率方案，逐级估计整张图像的表面法线和深度图，并利用当前尺度的深度图预测下一尺度的'逐像素光照'，替代传统优化与局部处理。
AI.result: 在普通GPU上处理52张512×384分辨率图像仅需1秒，速度比现有方法快45倍，平均角度误差从13.3°降至11.3°。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多尺度递归策略显著提升了近场光度立体视觉的效率和精度，为AR/VR等应用提供了可行的实时重建方案。

Jacobs cs.CV

authors_text: Chengjian Feng,Yujie Zhong,Zequn Jie,Xiangxiang Chu,Haibing Ren,Xiaolin Wei,Weidi Xie,Lin Ma
title: PromptDet: Towards Open-vocabulary Detection using Uncurated Images
title_zh: PromptDet：使用未经整理的图像进行开放词汇检测
abstract: The goal of this work is to establish a scalable pipeline for expanding an object detector towards novel/unseen categories, using zero manual annotations. To achieve that, we make the following four contributions: (i) in pursuit of generalisation, we propose a two-stage open-vocabulary object detector, where the class-agnostic object proposals are classified with a text encoder from pre-trained visual-language model; (ii) To pair the visual latent space (of RPN box proposals) with that of the pre-trained text encoder, we propose the idea of regional prompt learning to align the textual embedding space with regional visual object features; (iii) To scale up the learning procedure towards detecting a wider spectrum of objects, we exploit the available online resource via a novel self-training framework, which allows to train the proposed detector on a large corpus of noisy uncurated web images. Lastly, (iv) to evaluate our proposed detector, termed as PromptDet, we conduct extensive experiments on the challenging LVIS and MS-COCO dataset. PromptDet shows superior performance over existing approaches with fewer additional training images and zero manual annotations whatsoever. Project page with code: https://fcjian.github.io/promptdet.
summary: The goal of this work is to establish a scalable pipeline for expanding an object detector towards novel/unseen categories, using zero manual annotations. To achieve that, we make the following four contributions: (i) in pursuit of generalisation, we propose a two-stage open-vocabulary object detector, where the class-agnostic object proposals are classified with a text encoder from pre-trained visual-language model; (ii) To pair the visual latent space (of RPN box proposals) with that of the pre-trained text encoder, we propose the idea of regional prompt learning to align the textual embedding space with regional visual object features; (iii) To scale up the learning procedure towards detecting a wider spectrum of objects, we exploit the available online resource via a novel self-training framework, which allows to train the proposed detector on a large corpus of noisy uncurated web images. Lastly, (iv) to evaluate our proposed detector, termed as PromptDet, we conduct extensive experiments on the challenging LVIS and MS-COCO dataset. PromptDet shows superior performance over existing approaches with fewer additional training images and zero manual annotations whatsoever. Project page with code: https://fcjian.github.io/promptdet.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是建立一个可扩展的管道，使用零手动注释将对象检测器扩展到新颖/看不见的类别。为了实现这一目标，我们做出了以下四个贡献：（i）为了追求泛化，我们提出了一个两阶段开放词汇对象检测器，其中与类无关的对象提案使用来自预训练视觉语言模型的文本编码器进行分类； (ii)为了将视觉潜在空间（RPN框提议的）与预训练文本编码器的视觉潜在空间配对，我们提出了区域提示学习的思想，以将文本嵌入空间与区域视觉对象特征对齐； （iii）为了扩大学习过程以检测更广泛的对象，我们通过新颖的自我训练框架利用可用的在线资源，该框架允许在大量嘈杂的未经整理的网络图像上训练所提出的检测器。最后，(iv) 为了评估我们提出的检测器（称为 PromptDet），我们在具有挑战性的 LVIS 和 MS-COCO 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。 PromptDet 显示出优于现有方法的卓越性能，并且附加训练图像更少且手动注释为零。包含代码的项目页面：https://fcjian.github.io/promptdet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PromptDet的开放词汇检测方法，旨在利用未标注的网络图像对目标检测器进行扩展，以检测新的未见过的类别。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测方法通常依赖于手动标注的数据，难以扩展到新的类别。本文旨在构建一个无需手动标注即可扩展检测器的可扩展管道。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种两阶段的开放词汇目标检测器，利用预训练视觉-语言模型的文本编码器对类别无关的候选框进行分类，并通过区域提示学习对齐文本嵌入空间与区域视觉特征。此外，还提出了一种自训练框架，利用网络上的大量未标注图像进行训练。
AI.result: 在LVIS和MS-COCO数据集上进行了广泛的实验，PromptDet在使用更少的额外训练图像和零手动标注的情况下，表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: PromptDet提供了一种无需手动标注即可扩展目标检测器到新类别的有效方法，具有广泛的应用前景。
