result: 在LVIS和MS-COCO数据集上进行了广泛的实验，PromptDet在使用更少的额外训练图像和零手动标注的情况下，表现优于现有方法。
conclusion: PromptDet提供了一种无需手动标注即可扩展目标检测器到新类别的有效方法，具有广泛的应用前景。
search_text: PromptDet: Towards Open-vocabulary Detection using Uncurated Images PromptDet：使用未经整理的图像进行开放词汇检测 The goal of this work is to establish a scalable pipeline for expanding an object detector towards novel/unseen categories, using zero manual annotations. To achieve that, we make the following four contributions: (i) in pursuit of generalisation, we propose a two-stage open-vocabulary object detector, where the class-agnostic object proposals are classified with a text encoder from pre-trained visual-language model; (ii) To pair the visual latent space (of RPN box proposals) with that of the pre-trained text encoder, we propose the idea of regional prompt learning to align the textual embedding space with regional visual object features; (iii) To scale up the learning procedure towards detecting a wider spectrum of objects, we exploit the available online resource via a novel self-training framework, which allows to train the proposed detector on a large corpus of noisy uncurated web images. Lastly, (iv) to evaluate our proposed detector, termed as PromptDet, we conduct extensive experiments on the challenging LVIS and MS-COCO dataset. PromptDet shows superior performance over existing approaches with fewer additional training images and zero manual annotations whatsoever. Project page with code: https://fcjian.github.io/promptdet. 这项工作的目标是建立一个可扩展的管道，使用零手动注释将对象检测器扩展到新颖/看不见的类别。为了实现这一目标，我们做出了以下四个贡献：（i）为了追求泛化，我们提出了一个两阶段开放词汇对象检测器，其中与类无关的对象提案使用来自预训练视觉语言模型的文本编码器进行分类； (ii)为了将视觉潜在空间（RPN框提议的）与预训练文本编码器的视觉潜在空间配对，我们提出了区域提示学习的思想，以将文本嵌入空间与区域视觉对象特征对齐； （iii）为了扩大学习过程以检测更广泛的对象，我们通过新颖的自我训练框架利用可用的在线资源，该框架允许在大量嘈杂的未经整理的网络图像上训练所提出的检测器。最后，(iv) 为了评估我们提出的检测器（称为 PromptDet），我们在具有挑战性的 LVIS 和 MS-COCO 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。 PromptDet 显示出优于现有方法的卓越性能，并且附加训练图像更少且手动注释为零。包含代码的项目页面：https://fcjian.github.io/promptdet。 本文提出了一种名为PromptDet的开放词汇检测方法，旨在利用未标注的网络图像对目标检测器进行扩展，以检测新的未见过的类别。 Chengjian Feng,Yujie Zhong,Zequn Jie,Xiangxiang Chu,Haibing Ren,Xiaolin Wei,Weidi Xie,Lin Ma cs.CV

authors_text: Harveen Singh Chadha,Anirudh Gupta,Priyanshi Shah,Neeraj Chhimwal,Ankur Dhuriya,Rishabh Gaur,Vivek Raghavan
title: Vakyansh: ASR Toolkit for Low Resource Indic languages
title_zh: Vakyansh：适用于资源匮乏的印度语的 ASR 工具包
abstract: We present Vakyansh, an end to end toolkit for Speech Recognition in Indic languages. India is home to almost 121 languages and around 125 crore speakers. Yet most of the languages are low resource in terms of data and pretrained models. Through Vakyansh, we introduce automatic data pipelines for data creation, model training, model evaluation and deployment. We create 14,000 hours of speech data in 23 Indic languages and train wav2vec 2.0 based pretrained models. These pretrained models are then finetuned to create state of the art speech recognition models for 18 Indic languages which are followed by language models and punctuation restoration models. We open source all these resources with a mission that this will inspire the speech community to develop speech first applications using our ASR models in Indic languages.
summary: We present Vakyansh, an end to end toolkit for Speech Recognition in Indic languages. India is home to almost 121 languages and around 125 crore speakers. Yet most of the languages are low resource in terms of data and pretrained models. Through Vakyansh, we introduce automatic data pipelines for data creation, model training, model evaluation and deployment. We create 14,000 hours of speech data in 23 Indic languages and train wav2vec 2.0 based pretrained models. These pretrained models are then finetuned to create state of the art speech recognition models for 18 Indic languages which are followed by language models and punctuation restoration models. We open source all these resources with a mission that this will inspire the speech community to develop speech first applications using our ASR models in Indic languages.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Vakyansh，一个用于印度语言语音识别的端到端工具包。印度拥有近 121 种语言，使用者约 12.5 亿。然而，大多数语言在数据和预训练模型方面资源匮乏。通过 Vakyansh，我们引入了用于数据创建、模型训练、模型评估和部署的自动数据管道。我们以 23 种印度语言创建 14,000 小时的语音数据，并训练基于 wav2vec 2.0 的预训练模型。然后对这些预训练模型进行微调，为 18 种印度语言创建最先进的语音识别模型，然后是语言模型和标点符号恢复模型。我们开源所有这些资源，其使命是激励语音社区使用我们的印度语 ASR 模型开发语音优先应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Vakyansh，一个面向低资源印度语言的端到端语音识别（ASR）工具包，包含数据生成、模型训练、评估和部署的全流程。
AI.motivation: 印度拥有121种语言和大量使用者，但多数印度语言缺乏足够的数据和预训练模型，限制了语音技术的发展。
AI.method: 构建自动数据流水线生成14,000小时23种印度语言语音数据，基于wav2vec 2.0训练预训练模型，并针对18种语言进行微调，结合语言模型和标点恢复模型优化识别效果。
AI.result: 创建了23种印度语言的语音数据集，训练出18种语言的最先进ASR模型，并开源所有资源以促进印度语言语音应用开发。
AI.conclusion: Vakyansh通过提供完整工具链和开源资源，为低资源印度语言的语音技术研究与应用提供了基础支持。

authors_text: Ziteng Gao,Limin Wang,Bing Han,Sheng Guo
title: AdaMixer: A Fast-Converging Query-Based Object Detector
title_zh: AdaMixer：快速收敛的基于查询的对象检测器
abstract: Traditional object detectors employ the dense paradigm of scanning over locations and scales in an image. The recent query-based object detectors break this convention by decoding image features with a set of learnable queries. However, this paradigm still suffers from slow convergence, limited performance, and design complexity of extra networks between backbone and decoder. In this paper, we find that the key to these issues is the adaptability of decoders for casting queries to varying objects. Accordingly, we propose a fast-converging query-based detector, named AdaMixer, by improving the adaptability of query-based decoding processes in two aspects. First, each query adaptively samples features over space and scales based on estimated offsets, which allows AdaMixer to efficiently attend to the coherent regions of objects. Then, we dynamically decode these sampled features with an adaptive MLP-Mixer under the guidance of each query. Thanks to these two critical designs, AdaMixer enjoys architectural simplicity without requiring dense attentional encoders or explicit pyramid networks. On the challenging MS COCO benchmark, AdaMixer with ResNet-50 as the backbone, with 12 training epochs, reaches up to 45.0 AP on the validation set along with 27.9 APs in detecting small objects. With the longer training scheme, AdaMixer with ResNeXt-101-DCN and Swin-S reaches 49.5 and 51.3 AP. Our work sheds light on a simple, accurate, and fast converging architecture for query-based object detectors. The code is made available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/AdaMixer
summary: Traditional object detectors employ the dense paradigm of scanning over locations and scales in an image. The recent query-based object detectors break this convention by decoding image features with a set of learnable queries. However, this paradigm still suffers from slow convergence, limited performance, and design complexity of extra networks between backbone and decoder. In this paper, we find that the key to these issues is the adaptability of decoders for casting queries to varying objects. Accordingly, we propose a fast-converging query-based detector, named AdaMixer, by improving the adaptability of query-based decoding processes in two aspects. First, each query adaptively samples features over space and scales based on estimated offsets, which allows AdaMixer to efficiently attend to the coherent regions of objects. Then, we dynamically decode these sampled features with an adaptive MLP-Mixer under the guidance of each query. Thanks to these two critical designs, AdaMixer enjoys architectural simplicity without requiring dense attentional encoders or explicit pyramid networks. On the challenging MS COCO benchmark, AdaMixer with ResNet-50 as the backbone, with 12 training epochs, reaches up to 45.0 AP on the validation set along with 27.9 APs in detecting small objects. With the longer training scheme, AdaMixer with ResNeXt-101-DCN and Swin-S reaches 49.5 and 51.3 AP. Our work sheds light on a simple, accurate, and fast converging architecture for query-based object detectors. The code is made available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/AdaMixer
abstract_zh: 传统的物体检测器采用密集模式扫描图像中的位置和尺度。最近基于查询的对象检测器通过使用一组可学习的查询来解码图像特征，从而打破了这一惯例。然而，这种范式仍然受到收敛速度慢、性能有限以及骨干网和解码器之间额外网络设计复杂性的困扰。在本文中，我们发现这些问题的关键是解码器将查询投射到不同对象的适应性。因此，我们通过在两个方面提高基于查询的解码过程的适应性，提出了一种快速收敛的基于查询的检测器，名为AdaMixer。首先，每个查询根据估计的偏移量在空间和尺度上自适应地采样特征，这使得 AdaMixer 能够有效地处理对象的连贯区域。然后，我们在每个查询的指导下使用自适应 MLP 混合器动态解码这些采样特征。得益于这两个关键设计，AdaMixer 享有架构简单性，无需密集的注意力编码器或显式金字塔网络。在具有挑战性的 MS COCO 基准上，以 ResNet-50 为骨干的 AdaMixer，经过 12 个训练周期，在验证集上达到了 45.0 AP，在检测小物体时达到了 27.9 AP。随着训练方案的延长，使用 ResNeXt-101-DCN 和 Swin-S 的 AdaMixer 达到 49.5 和 51.3 AP。我们的工作为基于查询的目标检测器揭示了一种简单、准确且快速的聚合架构。该代码位于 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/AdaMixer

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AdaMixer的快速收敛的基于查询的目标检测器，通过改进解码器的适应性来提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于查询的目标检测器存在收敛速度慢、性能有限及网络设计复杂等问题，需提升解码器对不同目标的适应能力。
AI.method: 通过两个关键设计改进：1) 每个查询根据估计偏移量自适应采样空间和尺度特征；2) 动态使用自适应MLP-Mixer解码采样特征，无需密集注意力编码器或显式金字塔网络。
AI.result: 在MS COCO数据集上，使用ResNet-50骨干网训练12轮达到45.0 AP，小目标检测为27.9 AP；使用ResNeXt-101-DCN和Swin-S分别达到49.5和51.3 AP。
AI.conclusion: AdaMixer为基于查询的目标检测器提供了简单、准确且快速收敛的架构，代码已开源。

With the longer training scheme, AdaMixer with ResNeXt-101-DCN and Swin-S reaches 49.5 and 51.3 AP. The code is made available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/AdaMixer 传统的物体检测器采用密集模式扫描图像中的位置和尺度。最近基于查询的对象检测器通过使用一组可学习的查询来解码图像特征，从而打破了这一惯例。然而，这种范式仍然受到收敛速度慢、性能有限以及骨干网和解码器之间额外网络设计复杂性的困扰。在本文中，我们发现这些问题的关键是解码器将查询投射到不同对象的适应性。因此，我们通过在两个方面提高基于查询的解码过程的适应性，提出了一种快速收敛的基于查询的检测器，名为AdaMixer。首先，每个查询根据估计的偏移量在空间和尺度上自适应地采样特征，这使得 AdaMixer 能够有效地处理对象的连贯区域。然后，我们在每个查询的指导下使用自适应 MLP 混合器动态解码这些采样特征。得益于这两个关键设计，AdaMixer 享有架构简单性，无需密集的注意力编码器或显式金字塔网络。在具有挑战性的 MS COCO 基准上，以 ResNet-50 为骨干的 AdaMixer，经过 12 个训练周期，在验证集上达到了 45.0 AP，在检测小物体时达到了 27.9 AP。随着训练方案的延长，使用 ResNeXt-101-DCN 和 Swin-S 的 AdaMixer 达到 49.5 和 51.3 AP。我们的工作为基于查询的目标检测器揭示了一种简单、准确且快速的聚合架构。该代码位于 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/AdaMixer 本文提出了一种名为AdaMixer的快速收敛的基于查询的目标检测器，通过改进解码器的适应性来提升性能。 Ziteng Gao,Limin Wang,Bing Han,Sheng Guo cs.CV

authors_text: Sheng Xu,Zhanyu Guo,Yuchi Liu,Jingwei Fan,Xuxu Liu
title: An Improved Lightweight YOLOv5 Model Based on Attention Mechanism for Face Mask Detection
title_zh: 基于注意力机制的改进轻量级YOLOv5口罩检测模型
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at the 31st International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2022). The final authenticated publication will be available in the Springer Lecture Notes in Computer Science (LNCS)
comments: Accepted as a conference paper at the 31st International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2022). The final authenticated publication will be available in the Springer Lecture Notes in Computer Science (LNCS)
abstract: Coronavirus 2019 has brought severe challenges to social stability and public health worldwide. One effective way of curbing the epidemic is to require people to wear masks in public places and monitor mask-wearing states by utilizing suitable automatic detectors. However, existing deep learning based models struggle to simultaneously achieve the requirements of both high precision and real-time performance. To solve this problem, we propose an improved lightweight face mask detector based on YOLOv5, which can achieve an excellent balance of precision and speed. Firstly, a novel backbone ShuffleCANet that combines ShuffleNetV2 network with Coordinate Attention mechanism is proposed as the backbone. Afterwards, an efficient path aggression network BiFPN is applied as the feature fusion neck. Furthermore, the localization loss is replaced with alpha-CIoU in model training phase to obtain higher-quality anchors. Some valuable strategies such as data augmentation, adaptive image scaling, and anchor cluster operation are also utilized. Experimental results on AIZOO face mask dataset show the superiority of the proposed model. Compared with the original YOLOv5, the proposed model increases the inference speed by 28.3% while still improving the precision by 0.58%. It achieves the best mean average precision of 95.2% compared with other seven existing models, which is 4.4% higher than the baseline.

However, existing deep learning based models struggle to simultaneously achieve the requirements of both high precision and real-time performance. To solve this problem, we propose an improved lightweight face mask detector based on YOLOv5, which can achieve an excellent balance of precision and speed. Firstly, a novel backbone ShuffleCANet that combines ShuffleNetV2 network with Coordinate Attention mechanism is proposed as the backbone. Afterwards, an efficient path aggression network BiFPN is applied as the feature fusion neck. Furthermore, the localization loss is replaced with alpha-CIoU in model training phase to obtain higher-quality anchors. Some valuable strategies such as data augmentation, adaptive image scaling, and anchor cluster operation are also utilized. Experimental results on AIZOO face mask dataset show the superiority of the proposed model. Compared with the original YOLOv5, the proposed model increases the inference speed by 28.3% while still improving the precision by 0.58%. It achieves the best mean average precision of 95.2% compared with other seven existing models, which is 4.4% higher than the baseline.
abstract_zh: 2019冠状病毒给全球社会稳定和公共卫生带来严峻挑战。遏制疫情的一种有效方法是要求人们在公共场所佩戴口罩，并利用合适的自动探测器监测佩戴口罩的情况。然而，现有的基于深度学习的模型很难同时满足高精度和实时性的要求。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于YOLOv5的改进的轻量级口罩检测器，它可以实现精度和速度的出色平衡。首先，提出了一种将 ShuffleNetV2 网络与坐标注意力机制相结合的新型主干 ShuffleCANet 作为主干。然后，应用高效的路径攻击网络BiFPN作为特征融合颈。此外，在模型训练阶段将定位损失替换为alpha-CIoU以获得更高质量的anchor。还利用了一些有价值的策略，例如数据增强、自适应图像缩放和锚集群操作。 AIZOO口罩数据集上的实验结果表明了该模型的优越性。与原始YOLOv5相比，该模型推理速度提高了28.3%，同时精度仍提高了0.58%。与其他七个现有模型相比，它实现了 95.2% 的最佳平均精度，比基线高 4.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的改进型轻量级YOLOv5模型，用于提高人脸口罩检测的精度和实时性。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情下需通过自动检测口罩佩戴状态来控制疫情，但现有模型难以兼顾高精度与实时性。
AI.method: 设计结合ShuffleNetV2与坐标注意力机制的ShuffleCANet作为主干网络，采用BiFPN特征融合颈，替换为alpha-CIoU损失函数，并应用数据增强等策略。
AI.result: 在AIZOO数据集上相较原YOLOv5推理速度提升28.3%，精度提升0.58%，mAP达95.2%，优于其他七种模型4.4%。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型在保持轻量化的同时显著提升了口罩检测的精度与速度，验证了改进方法的有效性。

Afterwards, an efficient path aggression network BiFPN is applied as the feature fusion neck. Furthermore, the localization loss is replaced with alpha-CIoU in model training phase to obtain higher-quality anchors. authors_text: Shaohan Li,Yunpeng Shi,Gilad Lerman
title: Fast, Accurate and Memory-Efficient Partial Permutation Synchronization
title_zh: 快速、准确且节省内存的部分排列同步
abstract: Previous partial permutation synchronization (PPS) algorithms, which are commonly used for multi-object matching, often involve computation-intensive and memory-demanding matrix operations. These operations become intractable for large scale structure-from-motion datasets. For pure permutation synchronization, the recent Cycle-Edge Message Passing (CEMP) framework suggests a memory-efficient and fast solution. Here we overcome the restriction of CEMP to compact groups and propose an improved algorithm, CEMP-Partial, for estimating the corruption levels of the observed partial permutations. It allows us to subsequently implement a nonconvex weighted projected power method without the need of spectral initialization. The resulting new PPS algorithm, MatchFAME (Fast, Accurate and Memory-Efficient Matching), only involves sparse matrix operations, and thus enjoys lower time and space complexities in comparison to previous PPS algorithms. We prove that under adversarial corruption, though without additive noise and with certain assumptions, CEMP-Partial is able to exactly classify corrupted and clean partial permutations. We demonstrate the state-of-the-art accuracy, speed and memory efficiency of our method on both synthetic and real datasets.
summary: Previous partial permutation synchronization (PPS) algorithms, which are commonly used for multi-object matching, often involve computation-intensive and memory-demanding matrix operations. These operations become intractable for large scale structure-from-motion datasets. For pure permutation synchronization, the recent Cycle-Edge Message Passing (CEMP) framework suggests a memory-efficient and fast solution. Here we overcome the restriction of CEMP to compact groups and propose an improved algorithm, CEMP-Partial, for estimating the corruption levels of the observed partial permutations. It allows us to subsequently implement a nonconvex weighted projected power method without the need of spectral initialization. The resulting new PPS algorithm, MatchFAME (Fast, Accurate and Memory-Efficient Matching), only involves sparse matrix operations, and thus enjoys lower time and space complexities in comparison to previous PPS algorithms. We prove that under adversarial corruption, though without additive noise and with certain assumptions, CEMP-Partial is able to exactly classify corrupted and clean partial permutations. We demonstrate the state-of-the-art accuracy, speed and memory efficiency of our method on both synthetic and real datasets.
abstract_zh: 以前的部分排列同步（PPS）算法通常用于多对象匹配，通常涉及计算密集型和内存要求高的矩阵运算。对于大规模运动结构数据集来说，这些操作变得很棘手。对于纯粹的排列同步，最近的循环边缘消息传递（CEMP）框架提出了一种内存高效且快速的解决方案。在这里，我们克服了 CEMP 对紧群的限制，并提出了一种改进的算法 CEMP-Partial，用于估计观察到的部分排列的损坏程度。它允许我们随后实现非凸加权投影功率方法，而无需光谱初始化。由此产生的新 PPS 算法 MatchFAME（快速、准确和内存高效匹配）仅涉及稀疏矩阵运算，因此与之前的 PPS 算法相比，具有较低的时间和空间复杂度。我们证明，在对抗性损坏的情况下，尽管没有附加噪声且具有某些假设，CEMP-Partial 仍能够准确地对损坏的部分排列和干净的部分排列进行分类。我们在合成数据集和真实数据集上展示了我们的方法最先进的准确性、速度和内存效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MatchFAME的快速、准确且内存高效的局部排列同步算法，用于解决大规模结构从运动数据集中的多目标匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有局部排列同步算法在处理大规模数据时存在计算复杂度高和内存消耗大的问题，而现有CEMP框架仅适用于紧凑群组，无法直接处理部分排列的噪声估计。
AI.method: 提出CEMP-Partial算法估计部分排列的噪声水平，结合非凸加权投影幂法，无需谱初始化即可实现稀疏矩阵运算，从而降低时间和空间复杂度。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上验证了MatchFAME在精度、速度和内存效率方面的优越性，并证明了其在对抗性噪声下可准确分类干净与损坏排列。
AI.conclusion: MatchFAME通过改进CEMP框架，有效解决了大规模局部排列同步的计算与内存瓶颈，为多目标匹配任务提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Tu Anh Nguyen,Eugene Kharitonov,Jade Copet,Yossi Adi,Wei-Ning Hsu,Ali Elkahky,Paden Tomasello,Robin Algayres,Benoit Sagot,Abdelrahman Mohamed,Emmanuel Dupoux
title: Generative Spoken Dialogue Language Modeling
title_zh: 生成口语对话语言建模
abstract: We introduce dGSLM, the first "textless" model able to generate audio samples of naturalistic spoken dialogues. It uses recent work on unsupervised spoken unit discovery coupled with a dual-tower transformer architecture with cross-attention trained on 2000 hours of two-channel raw conversational audio (Fisher dataset) without any text or labels. We show that our model is able to generate speech, laughter and other paralinguistic signals in the two channels simultaneously and reproduces more naturalistic and fluid turn-taking compared to a text-based cascaded model.
summary: We introduce dGSLM, the first "textless" model able to generate audio samples of naturalistic spoken dialogues. It uses recent work on unsupervised spoken unit discovery coupled with a dual-tower transformer architecture with cross-attention trained on 2000 hours of two-channel raw conversational audio (Fisher dataset) without any text or labels. We show that our model is able to generate speech, laughter and other paralinguistic signals in the two channels simultaneously and reproduces more naturalistic and fluid turn-taking compared to a text-based cascaded model.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 dGSLM，这是第一个能够生成自然口语对话的音频样本的“无文本”模型。它使用了最近在无监督语音单元发现方面的工作，以及双塔变压器架构，该架构具有交叉注意力，在 2000 小时的双通道原始对话音频（Fisher 数据集）上进行了训练，没有任何文本或标签。我们表明，与基于文本的级联模型相比，我们的模型能够在两个通道中同时生成语音、笑声和其他副语言信号，并再现更自然和流畅的轮流。

AI.tldr: 本文提出dGSLM，首个无需文本的生成模型，可直接生成自然对话的音频样本。
AI.motivation: 现有对话生成模型依赖文本输入，难以直接生成语音及副语言信号，且需大量标注数据。
AI.method: 结合无监督语音单元发现与双塔Transformer架构，利用交叉注意力机制，基于2000小时无文本标注的双通道对话音频训练模型。
AI.result: 模型可同时生成语音、笑声等副语言信号，实现更自然的双通道对话轮流机制，优于基于文本的级联模型。
AI.conclusion: dGSLM验证了直接从语音数据学习对话生成的可行性，为无文本语音对话系统提供了新方向。

authors_text: Ziyue Xiang,Paolo Bestagini,Stefano Tubaro,Edward J. Delp
title: Forensic Analysis and Localization of Multiply Compressed MP3 Audio Using Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 对多重压缩 MP3 音频进行取证分析和本地化
abstract: Audio signals are often stored and transmitted in compressed formats. Among the many available audio compression schemes, MPEG-1 Audio Layer III (MP3) is very popular and widely used. Since MP3 is lossy it leaves characteristic traces in the compressed audio which can be used forensically to expose the past history of an audio file. In this paper, we consider the scenario of audio signal manipulation done by temporal splicing of compressed and uncompressed audio signals. We propose a method to find the temporal location of the splices based on transformer networks. Our method identifies which temporal portions of a audio signal have undergone single or multiple compression at the temporal frame level, which is the smallest temporal unit of MP3 compression. We tested our method on a dataset of 486,743 MP3 audio clips. Our method achieved higher performance and demonstrated robustness with respect to different MP3 data when compared with existing methods.
summary: Audio signals are often stored and transmitted in compressed formats. Among the many available audio compression schemes, MPEG-1 Audio Layer III (MP3) is very popular and widely used. Since MP3 is lossy it leaves characteristic traces in the compressed audio which can be used forensically to expose the past history of an audio file. In this paper, we consider the scenario of audio signal manipulation done by temporal splicing of compressed and uncompressed audio signals. We propose a method to find the temporal location of the splices based on transformer networks. Our method identifies which temporal portions of a audio signal have undergone single or multiple compression at the temporal frame level, which is the smallest temporal unit of MP3 compression. We tested our method on a dataset of 486,743 MP3 audio clips. Our method achieved higher performance and demonstrated robustness with respect to different MP3 data when compared with existing methods.
abstract_zh: 音频信号通常以压缩格式存储和传输。在众多可用的音频压缩方案中，MPEG-1 Audio Layer III (MP3) 非常流行并被广泛使用。由于 MP3 是有损的，因此它会在压缩音频中留下特征痕迹，可用于取证以揭露音频文件的过去历史记录。在本文中，我们考虑通过压缩和未压缩音频信号的时间拼接来完成音频信号处理的场景。我们提出了一种基于变压器网络来查找拼接的时间位置的方法。我们的方法识别音频信号的哪些时间部分在时间帧级别经历了单次或多次压缩，这是 MP3 压缩的最小时间单元。我们在包含 486,743 个 MP3 音频剪辑的数据集上测试了我们的方法。与现有方法相比，我们的方法实现了更高的性能，并展示了针对不同 MP3 数据的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer网络的方法，用于定位多重压缩MP3音频中的时间拼接点，以进行音频取证分析。
AI.motivation: MP3作为广泛使用的有损压缩格式，其压缩痕迹可暴露音频文件的历史。然而现有方法难以准确检测压缩音频的时间拼接位置，尤其针对多重压缩场景。
AI.method: 通过Transformer网络分析MP3音频的最小时间单元（帧级别），识别经历单次或多次压缩的时间片段，定位拼接位置。
AI.result: 在包含486,743个MP3音频片段的数据集上测试，该方法在性能和鲁棒性方面优于现有技术，能有效应对不同MP3数据的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的方法可有效实现多重压缩MP3音频的取证分析，为音频篡改检测提供了新思路和技术支持。

We tested our method on a dataset of 486,743 MP3 audio clips. authors_text: Brian Subirana
title: An Artificial Intelligence Browser Architecture (AIBA) For Our Kind and Others: A Voice Name System Speech implementation with two warrants, Wake Neutrality and Value Preservation of Personally Identifiable Information
title_zh: 适合我们和其他人的人工智能浏览器架构 (AIBA)：具有两个保证的语音名称系统语音实现：唤醒中立性和个人身份信息的价值保存
abstract: Conversational commerce, first pioneered by Apple's Siri, is the first of may applications based on always-on artificial intelligence systems that decide on its own when to interact with the environment, potentially collecting 24x7 longitudinal training data that is often Personally Identifiable Information (PII). A large body of scholarly papers, on the order of a million according to a simple Google Scholar search, suggests that the treatment of many health conditions, including COVID-19 and dementia, can be vastly improved by this data if the dataset is large enough as it has happened in other domains (e.g. GPT3). In contrast, current dominant systems are closed garden solutions without wake neutrality and that can't fully exploit the PII data they have because of IRB and Cohues-type constraints. We present a voice browser-and-server architecture that aims to address these two limitations by offering wake neutrality and the possibility to handle PII aiming to maximize its value. We have implemented this browser for the collection of speech samples and have successfully demonstrated it can capture over 200.000 samples of COVID-19 coughs. The architecture we propose is designed so it can grow beyond our kind into other domains such as collecting sound samples from vehicles, video images from nature, ingestible robotics, multi-modal signals (EEG, EKG,...), or even interacting with other kinds such as dogs and cats.
summary: Conversational commerce, first pioneered by Apple's Siri, is the first of may applications based on always-on artificial intelligence systems that decide on its own when to interact with the environment, potentially collecting 24x7 longitudinal training data that is often Personally Identifiable Information (PII). A large body of scholarly papers, on the order of a million according to a simple Google Scholar search, suggests that the treatment of many health conditions, including COVID-19 and dementia, can be vastly improved by this data if the dataset is large enough as it has happened in other domains (e.g. GPT3). In contrast, current dominant systems are closed garden solutions without wake neutrality and that can't fully exploit the PII data they have because of IRB and Cohues-type constraints. We present a voice browser-and-server architecture that aims to address these two limitations by offering wake neutrality and the possibility to handle PII aiming to maximize its value. We have implemented this browser for the collection of speech samples and have successfully demonstrated it can capture over 200.000 samples of COVID-19 coughs. The architecture we propose is designed so it can grow beyond our kind into other domains such as collecting sound samples from vehicles, video images from nature, ingestible robotics, multi-modal signals (EEG, EKG,...), or even interacting with other kinds such as dogs and cats.
abstract_zh: 对话式商务最初由 Apple 的 Siri 首创，是基于始终在线的人工智能系统的第一个应用程序，该系统自行决定何时与环境交互，可能会收集 24x7 纵向训练数据，这些数据通常是个人身份信息 (PII)。根据简单的 Google Scholar 搜索，大量学术论文数量约为 100 万篇，表明如果数据集足够大，就像其他领域（例如 GPT3）那样，这些数据可以极大地改善包括 COVID-19 和痴呆症在内的许多健康状况的治疗。相比之下，当前的主导系统是封闭式花园解决方案，没有唤醒中立性，并且由于 IRB 和 Cohues 类型的限制，无法充分利用它们拥有的 PII 数据。我们提出了一种语音浏览器和服务器架构，旨在通过提供唤醒中立性和处理 PII 的可能性来解决这两个限制，以最大化其价值。我们已经实现了该浏览器来收集语音样本，并成功证明它可以捕获超过 200,000 个 COVID-19 咳嗽样本。我们提出的架构经过精心设计，可以超越我们的同类，进入其他领域，例如从车辆收集声音样本、从大自然收集视频图像、可摄取机器人、多模态信号（脑电图、心电图……），甚至与狗和猫等其他物种互动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AIBA的人工智能浏览器架构，通过实现唤醒中立性和个人身份信息（PII）价值保护，解决现有系统在收集和利用PII数据时的局限性，并成功收集了20万例新冠肺炎咳嗽样本。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统因缺乏唤醒中立性和伦理约束（如IRB和Cohues限制），无法有效利用PII数据。而大规模PII数据（如健康数据）可显著提升疾病治疗效果（如GPT3案例），因此需开发开放架构以突破当前限制。
AI.method: 设计支持唤醒中立性和PII价值保护的浏览器-服务器架构，通过语音浏览器实现数据采集，并扩展至车辆声学、自然影像、可食用机器人等多模态领域，已验证其在新冠肺炎咳嗽样本收集中的有效性。
AI.result: 成功实现语音浏览器原型，验证其可采集超20万例新冠肺炎咳嗽样本，证明架构在PII数据收集与价值保护方面的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过唤醒中立性和PII保护机制，突破现有封闭系统的局限，为健康医疗、多模态数据采集等领域提供可扩展的AI基础设施，推动AI与人类及非人类智能体的协作。

ai_content_json.result: 成功实现语音浏览器原型，验证其可采集超20万例新冠肺炎咳嗽样本，证明架构在PII数据收集与价值保护方面的可行性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该架构通过唤醒中立性和PII保护机制，突破现有封闭系统的局限，为健康医疗、多模态数据采集等领域提供可扩展的AI基础设施，推动AI与人类及非人类智能体的协作。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为AIBA的人工智能浏览器架构，通过实现唤醒中立性和个人身份信息（PII）价值保护，解决现有系统在收集和利用PII数据时的局限性，并成功收集了20万例新冠肺炎咳嗽样本。
motivation: 现有AI系统因缺乏唤醒中立性和伦理约束（如IRB和Cohues限制），无法有效利用PII数据。而大规模PII数据（如健康数据）可显著提升疾病治疗效果（如GPT3案例），因此需开发开放架构以突破当前限制。
method: 设计支持唤醒中立性和PII价值保护的浏览器-服务器架构，通过语音浏览器实现数据采集，并扩展至车辆声学、自然影像、可食用机器人等多模态领域，已验证其在新冠肺炎咳嗽样本收集中的有效性。
result: 成功实现语音浏览器原型，验证其可采集超20万例新冠肺炎咳嗽样本，证明架构在PII数据收集与价值保护方面的可行性。
conclusion: 该架构通过唤醒中立性和PII保护机制，突破现有封闭系统的局限，为健康医疗、多模态数据采集等领域提供可扩展的AI基础设施，推动AI与人类及非人类智能体的协作。
search_text: An Artificial Intelligence Browser Architecture (AIBA) For Our Kind and Others: A Voice Name System Speech implementation with two warrants, Wake Neutrality and Value Preservation of Personally Identifiable Information 适合我们和其他人的人工智能浏览器架构 (AIBA)：具有两个保证的语音名称系统语音实现：唤醒中立性和个人身份信息的价值保存 Conversational commerce, first pioneered by Apple's Siri, is the first of may applications based on always-on artificial intelligence systems that decide on its own when to interact with the environment, potentially collecting 24x7 longitudinal training data that is often Personally Identifiable Information (PII). A large body of scholarly papers, on the order of a million according to a simple Google Scholar search, suggests that the treatment of many health conditions, including COVID-19 and dementia, can be vastly improved by this data if the dataset is large enough as it has happened in other domains (e.g. GPT3). In contrast, current dominant systems are closed garden solutions without wake neutrality and that can't fully exploit the PII data they have because of IRB and Cohues-type constraints. We present a voice browser-and-server architecture that aims to address these two limitations by offering wake neutrality and the possibility to handle PII aiming to maximize its value. We have implemented this browser for the collection of speech samples and have successfully demonstrated it can capture over 200.000 samples of COVID-19 coughs. The architecture we propose is designed so it can grow beyond our kind into other domains such as collecting sound samples from vehicles, video images from nature, ingestible robotics, multi-modal signals (EEG, EKG,...), or even interacting with other kinds such as dogs and cats. 对话式商务最初由 Apple 的 Siri 首创，是基于始终在线的人工智能系统的第一个应用程序，该系统自行决定何时与环境交互，可能会收集 24x7 纵向训练数据，这些数据通常是个人身份信息 (PII)。根据简单的 Google Scholar 搜索，大量学术论文数量约为 100 万篇，表明如果数据集足够大，就像其他领域（例如 GPT3）那样，这些数据可以极大地改善包括 COVID-19 和痴呆症在内的许多健康状况的治疗。相比之下，当前的主导系统是封闭式花园解决方案，没有唤醒中立性，并且由于 IRB 和 Cohues 类型的限制，无法充分利用它们拥有的 PII 数据。我们提出了一种语音浏览器和服务器架构，旨在通过提供唤醒中立性和处理 PII 的可能性来解决这两个限制，以最大化其价值。我们已经实现了该浏览器来收集语音样本，并成功证明它可以捕获超过 200,000 个 COVID-19 咳嗽样本。我们提出的架构经过精心设计，可以超越我们的同类，进入其他领域，例如从车辆收集声音样本、从大自然收集视频图像、可摄取机器人、多模态信号（脑电图、心电图……），甚至与狗和猫等其他物种互动。 本文提出一种名为AIBA的人工智能浏览器架构，通过实现唤醒中立性和个人身份信息（PII）价值保护，解决现有系统在收集和利用PII数据时的局限性，并成功收集了20万例新冠肺炎咳嗽样本。 Brian Subirana cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Jonas Oppenlaender
title: Crowdsourcing Creative Work
title_zh: 众包创意作品
abstract: This article-based doctoral thesis explores the stakeholder perspectives and experiences of crowdsourced creative work on two of the leading crowdsourcing platforms. The thesis has two parts. In the first part, we explore creative work from the perspective of the crowd worker. In the second part, we explore and study the requester's perspective in different contexts and several case studies. The research is exploratory and we contribute empirical insights using survey-based and artefact-based approaches common in the field of Human-Computer Interaction (HCI). In the former approach, we explore the key issues that may limit creative work on paid crowdsourcing platforms. In the latter approach, we create computational artefacts to elicit authentic experiences from both crowd workers and requesters of crowdsourced creative work. The thesis contributes a classification of crowd workers into five archetypal profiles, based on the crowd workers' demographics, disposition, and preferences for creative work. We propose a three-part classification of creative work on crowdsourcing platforms: creative tasks, creativity tests, and creativity judgements (also referred to as creative feedback). The thesis further investigates the emerging research topic of how requesters can be supported in interpreting and evaluating complex creative work. Last, we discuss the design implications for research and practice and contribute a vision of creative work on future crowdsourcing platforms with the aim of empowering crowd workers and fostering an ecosystem around tailored platforms for creative microwork. Keywords: creative work, creativity, creativity support tools, crowdsourcing

abstract_zh: 这篇基于文章的博士论文探讨了两个领先的众包平台上众包创意工作的利益相关者的观点和经验。论文分为两部分。第一部分，我们从众包工作者的角度探讨创意工作。在第二部分中，我们探索和研究了不同背景下请求者的观点和几个案例研究。这项研究是探索性的，我们使用人机交互 (HCI) 领域常见的基于调查和基于人工制品的方法提供实证见解。在前一种方法中，我们探讨了可能限制付费众包平台上创造性工作的关键问题。在后一种方法中，我们创建计算制品，以从人群工作者和众包创意工作的请求者那里获得真实的体验。该论文根据众包工作者的人口统计特征、性格和对创造性工作的偏好，将众包工作者分为五种典型特征。我们提出对众包平台创意作品的三部分分类：创意任务、创意测试和创意判断（也称为创意反馈）。本文进一步研究了如何支持请求者解释和评估复杂的创造性工作这一新兴研究主题。最后，我们讨论了研究和实践的设计含义，并提出了未来众包平台上创意工作的愿景，旨在增强众包工作者的能力，并围绕创意微工作定制平台培育生态系统。关键词：创意工作、创造力、创造力支持工具、众包

AI.tldr: 本论文从众包工作者和请求者的双重视角，探讨众包创意工作的现状、挑战及未来平台设计方向。
AI.motivation: 现有众包平台在创意工作支持方面存在不足，需深入理解不同角色的体验以优化创意支持工具与平台生态。
AI.method: 采用调查问卷与计算人工制品相结合的方法，结合案例研究，分析工作者行为模式与请求者需求。
AI.result: 提出工作者五类典型画像及创意工作三元分类框架，设计支持请求者评估的工具，并给出未来平台优化建议。
AI.conclusion: 通过分类体系与设计启示，为构建支持创意微工作的专业化众包平台提供理论基础与实践方向。

authors_text: Meixu Chen,Richard Webb,Alan C. Bovik
title: Foveation-based Deep Video Compression without Motion Search
title_zh: 基于注视点的深度视频压缩，无需运动搜索
abstract: The requirements of much larger file sizes, different storage formats, and immersive viewing conditions of VR pose significant challenges to the goals of acquiring, transmitting, compressing, and displaying high-quality VR content. At the same time, the great potential of deep learning to advance progress on the video compression problem has driven a significant research effort. Because of the high bandwidth requirements of VR, there has also been significant interest in the use of space-variant, foveated compression protocols. We have integrated these techniques to create an end-to-end deep learning video compression framework. A feature of our new compression model is that it dispenses with the need for expensive search-based motion prediction computations. This is accomplished by exploiting statistical regularities inherent in video motion expressed by displaced frame differences. Foveation protocols are desirable since only a small portion of a video viewed in VR may be visible as a user gazes in any given direction. Moreover, even within a current field of view (FOV), the resolution of retinal neurons rapidly decreases with distance (eccentricity) from the projected point of gaze. In our learning based approach, we implement foveation by introducing a Foveation Generator Unit (FGU) that generates foveation masks which direct the allocation of bits, significantly increasing compression efficiency while making it possible to retain an impression of little to no additional visual loss given an appropriate viewing geometry. Our experiment results reveal that our new compression model, which we call the Foveated MOtionless VIdeo Codec (Foveated MOVI-Codec), is able to efficiently compress videos without computing motion, while outperforming foveated version of both H.264 and H.265 on the widely used UVG dataset and on the HEVC Standard Class B Test Sequences.
summary: The requirements of much larger file sizes, different storage formats, and immersive viewing conditions of VR pose significant challenges to the goals of acquiring, transmitting, compressing, and displaying high-quality VR content. At the same time, the great potential of deep learning to advance progress on the video compression problem has driven a significant research effort. Because of the high bandwidth requirements of VR, there has also been significant interest in the use of space-variant, foveated compression protocols. We have integrated these techniques to create an end-to-end deep learning video compression framework. A feature of our new compression model is that it dispenses with the need for expensive search-based motion prediction computations. This is accomplished by exploiting statistical regularities inherent in video motion expressed by displaced frame differences. Foveation protocols are desirable since only a small portion of a video viewed in VR may be visible as a user gazes in any given direction. Moreover, even within a current field of view (FOV), the resolution of retinal neurons rapidly decreases with distance (eccentricity) from the projected point of gaze. In our learning based approach, we implement foveation by introducing a Foveation Generator Unit (FGU) that generates foveation masks which direct the allocation of bits, significantly increasing compression efficiency while making it possible to retain an impression of little to no additional visual loss given an appropriate viewing geometry. Our experiment results reveal that our new compression model, which we call the Foveated MOtionless VIdeo Codec (Foveated MOVI-Codec), is able to efficiently compress videos without computing motion, while outperforming foveated version of both H.264 and H.265 on the widely used UVG dataset and on the HEVC Standard Class B Test Sequences.
abstract_zh: VR 更大的文件大小、不同的存储格式和沉浸式观看条件的要求对获取、传输、压缩和显示高质量 VR 内容的目标提出了重大挑战。与此同时，深度学习在推动视频压缩问题方面取得进展的巨大潜力推动了重大研究工作。由于 VR 的高带宽要求，人们对空间变化、中心点压缩协议的使用也产生了浓厚的兴趣。我们集成了这些技术来创建端到端深度学习视频压缩框架。我们新的压缩模型的一个特点是它不需要昂贵的基于搜索的运动预测计算。这是通过利用由移位帧差异表示的视频运动中固有的统计规律来实现的。注视点协议是可取的，因为当用户凝视任何给定方向时，在 VR 中观看的视频中只有一小部分可能是可见的。此外，即使在当前视野 (FOV) 内，视网膜神经元的分辨率也会随着距投影注视点的距离（偏心率）而迅速降低。在我们基于学习的方法中，我们通过引入一个注视点发生器单元（FGU）来实现注视点，该单元生成注视点掩模来指导位的分配，显着提高压缩效率，同时在适当的观看几何形状下，可以保留很少甚至没有额外视觉损失的印象。我们的实验结果表明，我们的新压缩模型，我们称之为 Foveated MOtionless VIdeo Codec (Foveated MOVI-Codec)，能够在不计算运动的情况下高效压缩视频，同时在广泛使用的 UVG 数据集和 HEVC 标准 B 类测试序列上优于 H.264 和 H.265 的 foveated 版本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需运动搜索的基于注视点的深度视频压缩框架Foveated MOVI-Codec。
AI.motivation: VR内容因文件体积大、存储格式多样及沉浸式观看需求，对视频压缩提出更高要求。传统压缩标准在高带宽需求下表现不足，而深度学习与注视点压缩技术结合具有潜力。
AI.method: 利用视频运动的统计规律（位移帧差）替代运动预测计算，通过引入注视点生成单元（FGU）生成掩码以优化比特分配，实现高效压缩。
AI.result: 在UVG数据集和HEVC标准B类测试序列中，Foveated MOVI-Codec在无需运动计算的情况下，压缩效率优于H.264和H.265的注视点版本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习与注视点技术结合，在保持视觉质量的同时显著提升VR视频压缩效率，为高带宽场景提供新解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种无需运动搜索的基于注视点的深度视频压缩框架Foveated MOVI-Codec。
motivation: VR内容因文件体积大、存储格式多样及沉浸式观看需求，对视频压缩提出更高要求。传统压缩标准在高带宽需求下表现不足，而深度学习与注视点压缩技术结合具有潜力。
method: 利用视频运动的统计规律（位移帧差）替代运动预测计算，通过引入注视点生成单元（FGU）生成掩码以优化比特分配，实现高效压缩。

search_text: Foveation-based Deep Video Compression without Motion Search 基于注视点的深度视频压缩，无需运动搜索 The requirements of much larger file sizes, different storage formats, and immersive viewing conditions of VR pose significant challenges to the goals of acquiring, transmitting, compressing, and displaying high-quality VR content. At the same time, the great potential of deep learning to advance progress on the video compression problem has driven a significant research effort. Because of the high bandwidth requirements of VR, there has also been significant interest in the use of space-variant, foveated compression protocols. We have integrated these techniques to create an end-to-end deep learning video compression framework. A feature of our new compression model is that it dispenses with the need for expensive search-based motion prediction computations. This is accomplished by exploiting statistical regularities inherent in video motion expressed by displaced frame differences. Foveation protocols are desirable since only a small portion of a video viewed in VR may be visible as a user gazes in any given direction. Moreover, even within a current field of view (FOV), the resolution of retinal neurons rapidly decreases with distance (eccentricity) from the projected point of gaze. In our learning based approach, we implement foveation by introducing a Foveation Generator Unit (FGU) that generates foveation masks which direct the allocation of bits, significantly increasing compression efficiency while making it possible to retain an impression of little to no additional visual loss given an appropriate viewing geometry. Our experiment results reveal that our new compression model, which we call the Foveated MOtionless VIdeo Codec (Foveated MOVI-Codec), is able to efficiently compress videos without computing motion, while outperforming foveated version of both H.264 and H.265 on the widely used UVG dataset and on the HEVC Standard Class B Test Sequences. VR 更大的文件大小、不同的存储格式和沉浸式观看条件的要求对获取、传输、压缩和显示高质量 VR 内容的目标提出了重大挑战。与此同时，深度学习在推动视频压缩问题方面取得进展的巨大潜力推动了重大研究工作。由于 VR 的高带宽要求，人们对空间变化、中心点压缩协议的使用也产生了浓厚的兴趣。我们集成了这些技术来创建端到端深度学习视频压缩框架。我们新的压缩模型的一个特点是它不需要昂贵的基于搜索的运动预测计算。这是通过利用由移位帧差异表示的视频运动中固有的统计规律来实现的。注视点协议是可取的，因为当用户凝视任何给定方向时，在 VR 中观看的视频中只有一小部分可能是可见的。此外，即使在当前视野 (FOV) 内，视网膜神经元的分辨率也会随着距投影注视点的距离（偏心率）而迅速降低。在我们基于学习的方法中，我们通过引入一个注视点发生器单元（FGU）来实现注视点，该单元生成注视点掩模来指导位的分配，显着提高压缩效率，同时在适当的观看几何形状下，可以保留很少甚至没有额外视觉损失的印象。我们的实验结果表明，我们的新压缩模型，我们称之为 Foveated MOtionless VIdeo Codec (Foveated MOVI-Codec)，能够在不计算运动的情况下高效压缩视频，同时在广泛使用的 UVG 数据集和 HEVC 标准 B 类测试序列上优于 H.264 和 H.265 的 foveated 版本。 本文提出了一种无需运动搜索的基于注视点的深度视频压缩框架Foveated MOVI-Codec。 Meixu Chen,Richard Webb,Alan C. Bovik eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Tuan-Anh Vu,Duc Thanh Nguyen,Binh-Son Hua,Quang-Hieu Pham,Sai-Kit Yeung
title: RFNet-4D++: Joint Object Reconstruction and Flow Estimation from 4D Point Clouds with Cross-Attention Spatio-Temporal Features
title_zh: RFNet-4D++：具有交叉注意时空特征的 4D 点云联合对象重建和流量估计
comment: TPAMI journal extension of ECCV 2022 arXiv:2203.16482
comments: TPAMI journal extension of ECCV 2022 arXiv:2203.16482
abstract: Object reconstruction from 3D point clouds has been a long-standing research problem in computer vision and computer graphics, and achieved impressive progress. However, reconstruction from time-varying point clouds (a.k.a. 4D point clouds) is generally overlooked. In this paper, we propose a new network architecture, namely RFNet-4D++, that jointly reconstructs objects and their motion flows from 4D point clouds. The key insight is simultaneously performing both tasks via learning of spatial and temporal features from a sequence of point clouds can leverage individual tasks, leading to improved overall performance. To prove this ability, we design a temporal vector field learning module using an unsupervised learning approach for flow estimation task, leveraged by supervised learning of spatial structures for object reconstruction. Extensive experiments and analyses on benchmark datasets validated the effectiveness and efficiency of our method. As shown in experimental results, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on both flow estimation and object reconstruction while performing much faster than existing methods in both training and inference. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/hkust-vgd/RFNet-4D
summary: Object reconstruction from 3D point clouds has been a long-standing research problem in computer vision and computer graphics, and achieved impressive progress. However, reconstruction from time-varying point clouds (a.k.a. 4D point clouds) is generally overlooked. In this paper, we propose a new network architecture, namely RFNet-4D++, that jointly reconstructs objects and their motion flows from 4D point clouds. The key insight is simultaneously performing both tasks via learning of spatial and temporal features from a sequence of point clouds can leverage individual tasks, leading to improved overall performance. To prove this ability, we design a temporal vector field learning module using an unsupervised learning approach for flow estimation task, leveraged by supervised learning of spatial structures for object reconstruction. Extensive experiments and analyses on benchmark datasets validated the effectiveness and efficiency of our method. As shown in experimental results, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on both flow estimation and object reconstruction while performing much faster than existing methods in both training and inference. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/hkust-vgd/RFNet-4D
abstract_zh: 3D点云对象重建一直是计算机视觉和计算机图形学领域长期存在的研究问题，并取得了令人瞩目的进展。然而，时变点云（又名 4D 点云）的重建通常被忽视。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的网络架构，即 RFNet-4D++，它可以从 4D 点云联合重建对象及其运动流。关键的见解是通过从一系列点云中学习空间和时间特征来同时执行这两项任务，可以利用各个任务，从而提高整体性能。为了证明这种能力，我们设计了一个时间向量场学习模块，使用无监督学习方法进行流量估计任务，并利用空间结构的监督学习进行对象重建。对基准数据集的广泛实验和分析验证了我们方法的有效性和效率。如实验结果所示，我们的方法在流量估计和对象重建方面实现了最先进的性能，同时在训练和推理方面的执行速度比现有方法快得多。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/hkust-vgd/RFNet-4D 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的网络架构RFNet-4D++，用于从4D点云中联合重建物体及其运动流。
AI.motivation: 虽然3D点云的物体重建已有显著进展，但对随时间变化的4D点云的重建研究较少。本文旨在通过联合重建物体和运动流来提升性能。
AI.method: 该方法通过学习点云序列的空间和时间特征，同时进行物体重建和运动流估计。设计了一个基于无监督学习的时间向量场学习模块，并结合监督学习的空间结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在流估计和物体重建方面均达到最先进的性能，且在训练和推理速度上远超现有方法。
AI.conclusion: RFNet-4D++通过联合任务学习有效提升了4D点云的重建和流估计性能，且具有较高的效率。

authors_text: Badih Ghazi,Ravi Kumar,Pasin Manurangsi,Jelani Nelson
title: Differentially Private All-Pairs Shortest Path Distances: Improved Algorithms and Lower Bounds
title_zh: 差分私有全对最短路径距离：改进的算法和下界
abstract: We study the problem of releasing the weights of all-pair shortest paths in a weighted undirected graph with differential privacy (DP). In this setting, the underlying graph is fixed and two graphs are neighbors if their edge weights differ by at most $1$ in the $\ell_1$-distance. We give an $ε$-DP algorithm with additive error $\tilde{O}(n^{2/3} / ε)$ and an $(ε, δ)$-DP algorithm with additive error $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n} / ε)$ where $n$ denotes the number of vertices. This positively answers a question of Sealfon (PODS'16), who asked whether a $o(n)$-error algorithm exists. We also show that an additive error of $Ω(n^{1/6})$ is necessary for any sufficiently small $ε, δ> 0$. Finally, we consider a relaxed setting where a multiplicative approximation is allowed. We show that, with a multiplicative approximation factor $k$, %$2k - 1$, the additive error can be reduced to $\tilde{O}\left(n^{1/2 + O(1/k)} / ε\right)$ in the $ε$-DP case and $\tilde{O}(n^{1/3 + O(1/k)} / ε)$ in the $(ε, δ)$-DP case, respectively.
summary: We study the problem of releasing the weights of all-pair shortest paths in a weighted undirected graph with differential privacy (DP). In this setting, the underlying graph is fixed and two graphs are neighbors if their edge weights differ by at most $1$ in the $\ell_1$-distance. We give an $ε$-DP algorithm with additive error $\tilde{O}(n^{2/3} / ε)$ and an $(ε, δ)$-DP algorithm with additive error $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n} / ε)$ where $n$ denotes the number of vertices. This positively answers a question of Sealfon (PODS'16), who asked whether a $o(n)$-error algorithm exists. We also show that an additive error of $Ω(n^{1/6})$ is necessary for any sufficiently small $ε, δ> 0$. Finally, we consider a relaxed setting where a multiplicative approximation is allowed. We show that, with a multiplicative approximation factor $k$, %$2k - 1$, the additive error can be reduced to $\tilde{O}\left(n^{1/2 + O(1/k)} / ε\right)$ in the $ε$-DP case and $\tilde{O}(n^{1/3 + O(1/k)} / ε)$ in the $(ε, δ)$-DP case, respectively.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了在具有差分隐私（DP）的加权无向图中释放所有对最短路径的权重的问题。在此设置中，基础图是固定的，并且如果两个图的边权重在 $\ell_1$ 距离上最多相差 $1$，则它们是邻居。我们给出一个具有加性误差 $\tilde{O}(n^{2/3} / ε)$ 的 $ε$-DP 算法和一个具有加性误差 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n} / ε)$ 的 $(ε, δ)$-DP 算法，其中 $n$ 表示顶点数。这正面回答了 Sealfon (PODS'16) 的问题，该问题询问 $o(n)$ 错误算法是否存在。我们还表明，对于任何足够小的 $ε、δ> 0$，$Ω(n^{1/6})$ 的加性误差是必要的。最后，我们考虑允许乘法近似的宽松设置。我们证明，使用乘法近似因子 $k$, %$2k - 1$，在 $ε$-DP 情况下，加性误差可以分别减少到 $\tilde{O}\left(n^{1/2 + O(1/k)} / ε\right)$，在 $(ε, δ)$-DP 情况下，可以减少到 $\tilde{O}(n^{1/3 + O(1/k)} / ε)$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在差分隐私（DP）下释放加权无向图中所有点对最短路径权重的问题，提出了改进的算法及下界分析。
AI.motivation: 在差分隐私框架下，如何高效且准确地释放图中所有点对最短路径信息，同时保证隐私性与实用性，是图数据隐私保护的重要挑战。
AI.method: 设计ε-DP和(ε, δ)-DP算法，通过添加噪声控制误差，并分析放松设置下允许乘法近似时的误差优化方法。
AI.result: 提出ε-DP算法加法误差为~O(n^{2/3}/ε)，(ε, δ)-DP算法误差为~O(√n/ε)，证明Ω(n^{1/6})为必要误差下界，并展示乘法近似下误差可进一步降低。
AI.conclusion: 本文改进了现有算法，证明了误差下界，并揭示了乘法近似与误差之间的权衡关系，为差分隐私图分析提供了理论支持。

conclusion: 本文改进了现有算法，证明了误差下界，并揭示了乘法近似与误差之间的权衡关系，为差分隐私图分析提供了理论支持。
search_text: Differentially Private All-Pairs Shortest Path Distances: Improved Algorithms and Lower Bounds 差分私有全对最短路径距离：改进的算法和下界 We study the problem of releasing the weights of all-pair shortest paths in a weighted undirected graph with differential privacy (DP). In this setting, the underlying graph is fixed and two graphs are neighbors if their edge weights differ by at most $1$ in the $\ell_1$-distance. We give an $ε$-DP algorithm with additive error $\tilde{O}(n^{2/3} / ε)$ and an $(ε, δ)$-DP algorithm with additive error $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n} / ε)$ where $n$ denotes the number of vertices. This positively answers a question of Sealfon (PODS'16), who asked whether a $o(n)$-error algorithm exists. We also show that an additive error of $Ω(n^{1/6})$ is necessary for any sufficiently small $ε, δ> 0$. Finally, we consider a relaxed setting where a multiplicative approximation is allowed. We show that, with a multiplicative approximation factor $k$, %$2k - 1$, the additive error can be reduced to $\tilde{O}\left(n^{1/2 + O(1/k)} / ε\right)$ in the $ε$-DP case and $\tilde{O}(n^{1/3 + O(1/k)} / ε)$ in the $(ε, δ)$-DP case, respectively. 我们研究了在具有差分隐私（DP）的加权无向图中释放所有对最短路径的权重的问题。在此设置中，基础图是固定的，并且如果两个图的边权重在 $\ell_1$ 距离上最多相差 $1$，则它们是邻居。我们给出一个具有加性误差 $\tilde{O}(n^{2/3} / ε)$ 的 $ε$-DP 算法和一个具有加性误差 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n} / ε)$ 的 $(ε, δ)$-DP 算法，其中 $n$ 表示顶点数。这正面回答了 Sealfon (PODS'16) 的问题，该问题询问 $o(n)$ 错误算法是否存在。我们还表明，对于任何足够小的 $ε、δ> 0$，$Ω(n^{1/6})$ 的加性误差是必要的。最后，我们考虑允许乘法近似的宽松设置。我们证明，使用乘法近似因子 $k$, %$2k - 1$，在 $ε$-DP 情况下，加性误差可以分别减少到 $\tilde{O}\left(n^{1/2 + O(1/k)} / ε\right)$，在 $(ε, δ)$-DP 情况下，可以减少到 $\tilde{O}(n^{1/3 + O(1/k)} / ε)$。 本文研究在差分隐私（DP）下释放加权无向图中所有点对最短路径权重的问题，提出了改进的算法及下界分析。 Badih Ghazi,Ravi Kumar,Pasin Manurangsi,Jelani Nelson cs.DS

authors_text: Haekyu Park,Seongmin Lee,Benjamin Hoover,Austin P. Wright,Omar Shaikh,Rahul Duggal,Nilaksh Das,Kevin Li,Judy Hoffman,Duen Horng Chau
title: Concept Evolution in Deep Learning Training: A Unified Interpretation Framework and Discoveries
title_zh: 深度学习训练中的概念演变：统一的解释框架和发现
abstract: We present ConceptEvo, a unified interpretation framework for deep neural networks (DNNs) that reveals the inception and evolution of learned concepts during training. Our work addresses a critical gap in DNN interpretation research, as existing methods primarily focus on post-training interpretation. ConceptEvo introduces two novel technical contributions: (1) an algorithm that generates a unified semantic space, enabling side-by-side comparison of different models during training, and (2) an algorithm that discovers and quantifies important concept evolutions for class predictions. Through a large-scale human evaluation and quantitative experiments, we demonstrate that ConceptEvo successfully identifies concept evolutions across different models, which are not only comprehensible to humans but also crucial for class predictions. ConceptEvo is applicable to both modern DNN architectures, such as ConvNeXt, and classic DNNs, such as VGGs and InceptionV3.
summary: We present ConceptEvo, a unified interpretation framework for deep neural networks (DNNs) that reveals the inception and evolution of learned concepts during training. Our work addresses a critical gap in DNN interpretation research, as existing methods primarily focus on post-training interpretation. ConceptEvo introduces two novel technical contributions: (1) an algorithm that generates a unified semantic space, enabling side-by-side comparison of different models during training, and (2) an algorithm that discovers and quantifies important concept evolutions for class predictions. Through a large-scale human evaluation and quantitative experiments, we demonstrate that ConceptEvo successfully identifies concept evolutions across different models, which are not only comprehensible to humans but also crucial for class predictions. ConceptEvo is applicable to both modern DNN architectures, such as ConvNeXt, and classic DNNs, such as VGGs and InceptionV3.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 ConceptEvo，这是一个深度神经网络 (DNN) 的统一解释框架，它揭示了训练过程中学习概念的产生和演变。我们的工作解决了 DNN 解释研究中的一个关键差距，因为现有方法主要侧重于训练后解释。 ConceptEvo 引入了两项新颖的技术贡献：(1) 一种生成统一语义空间的算法，可以在训练期间对不同模型进行并排比较；(2) 一种发现和量化类别预测的重要概念演化的算法。通过大规模的人类评估和定量实验，我们证明 ConceptEvo 成功识别了不同模型之间的概念演化，这不仅对人类来说是可以理解的，而且对于类别预测也至关重要。 ConceptEvo 适用于现代 DNN 架构（例如 ConvNeXt）和经典 DNN（例如 VGG 和 InceptionV3）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConceptEvo框架，用于揭示深度神经网络训练过程中学习概念的产生与演变过程。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习解释方法主要关注训练后的模型，缺乏对训练过程中概念动态演变的系统性研究。
AI.method: 开发了统一语义空间生成算法和概念演变量化算法，支持不同模型训练过程的对比分析。
AI.result: 通过大规模人类评估和定量实验验证，证明该框架能有效识别跨模型的概念演变规律，且与分类预测密切相关。
AI.conclusion: ConceptEvo为理解深度学习训练动态提供了新视角，适用于主流DNN架构，有助于改进模型可解释性研究。

authors_text: Jonathan Álvarez Ariza
title: Can in-home laboratories foster learning, self-efficacy, and motivation during the COVID-19 pandemic? -- A case study in two engineering programs
title_zh: 在 COVID-19 大流行期间，家庭实验室能否促进学习、自我效能和动力？ ——两个工程项目的案例研究
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has represented a challenge for higher education in terms to provide quality education despite the lockdown periods, the transformation of the in-person classes to virtual classes, and the demotivation and anxiety that are experimented by the students. Because the basis of engineering is the experimentation through hands-on activities and learning by doing, the lockdown periods and the temporary suspension of the in-person classes and laboratories have meant a problem for educators that try to teach and motivate the students despite the situation. In this context, this study presents an educational methodology based on Problem-Based Learning (PBL) and in-home laboratories in engineering. The methodology was carried out in two phases during 2020, in the academic programs of Industrial Engineering and Technology in Electronics with (n=44) students. The in-home laboratories were sent to the students as part of "kits" with the devices needed in each subject. Besides, due to the difficulties in monitoring the learning process, the students made videos and blogs as a strategy to reinforce their learning and evidence the progress in the courses. The outcomes of the methodology show mainly the following points: (1) An improvement of the academic performance and learning of the students in the courses. (2) A positive influence of the usage of in-home laboratories in motivation, self-efficacy, and reduction of anxiety. (3) Positive correlations between the usage of in-home laboratories, the blogs and videos, and the teacher's feedback for learning, motivation, and self-efficacy. Thus, these results evidence that other alternatives that gather the cognitive and affective learning domains can emerge from engineering to deal with the educational problems produced by the crisis periods.
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has represented a challenge for higher education in terms to provide quality education despite the lockdown periods, the transformation of the in-person classes to virtual classes, and the demotivation and anxiety that are experimented by the students. Because the basis of engineering is the experimentation through hands-on activities and learning by doing, the lockdown periods and the temporary suspension of the in-person classes and laboratories have meant a problem for educators that try to teach and motivate the students despite the situation. In this context, this study presents an educational methodology based on Problem-Based Learning (PBL) and in-home laboratories in engineering. The methodology was carried out in two phases during 2020, in the academic programs of Industrial Engineering and Technology in Electronics with (n=44) students. The in-home laboratories were sent to the students as part of "kits" with the devices needed in each subject. Besides, due to the difficulties in monitoring the learning process, the students made videos and blogs as a strategy to reinforce their learning and evidence the progress in the courses. The outcomes of the methodology show mainly the following points: (1) An improvement of the academic performance and learning of the students in the courses. (2) A positive influence of the usage of in-home laboratories in motivation, self-efficacy, and reduction of anxiety. (3) Positive correlations between the usage of in-home laboratories, the blogs and videos, and the teacher's feedback for learning, motivation, and self-efficacy. Thus, these results evidence that other alternatives that gather the cognitive and affective learning domains can emerge from engineering to deal with the educational problems produced by the crisis periods.
abstract_zh: 尽管有封锁期、面授课程向虚拟课程转变以及学生们的积极性下降和焦虑，但 COVID-19 大流行对高等教育提供优质教育构成了挑战。由于工程的基础是通过实践活动进行实验和边做边学，因此封锁期以及面对面课程和实验室的暂时暂停对于在这种情况下仍试图教授和激励学生的教育工作者来说意味着一个问题。在此背景下，本研究提出了一种基于问题学习（PBL）和家庭工程实验室的教育方法。该方法于 2020 年分两个阶段在电子工业工程与技术学术课程中与 (n=44) 名学生进行。家庭实验室作为“套件”的一部分发送给学生，其中包含每个科目所需的设备。此外，由于难以监控学习过程，学生们制作了视频和博客作为强化学习和证明课程进度的策略。该方法的结果主要表现在以下几点：（1）提高了学生的学业成绩和课程学习。 (2) 使用家庭实验室对动机、自我效能和减少焦虑有积极影响。 (3)家庭实验室、博客和视频的使用与教师对学习、动机和自我效能的反馈之间呈正相关。因此，这些结果证明，工程学中可以出现汇集认知和情感学习领域的其他替代方案，以解决危机时期产生的教育问题。

AI.tldr: 探讨家庭实验室在疫情期间如何促进工程学生的学业表现、自我效能感和动机
AI.motivation: 疫情期间传统教学受阻，工程教育需依赖实验，但封锁导致无法进行，需寻找替代方案以维持学习效果和学生积极性
AI.method: 采用基于问题的学习（PBL）方法，分两阶段在两个工程专业实施家庭实验室，发放实验套件，学生制作视频和博客，教师提供反馈以监控学习过程
AI.result: 学业成绩提升，家庭实验室增强动机和自我效能感，减少焦虑，且实验工具、博客视频与教师反馈呈正相关
AI.conclusion: 家庭实验室结合认知与情感学习方法可有效应对危机时期的教育挑战

authors_text: Sean Xie,Soroush Vosoughi,Saeed Hassanpour
title: Towards Interpretable Deep Reinforcement Learning Models via Inverse Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过逆强化学习实现可解释的深度强化学习模型
abstract: Artificial intelligence, particularly through recent advancements in deep learning, has achieved exceptional performances in many tasks in fields such as natural language processing and computer vision. In addition to desirable evaluation metrics, a high level of interpretability is often required for these models to be reliably utilized. Therefore, explanations that offer insight into the process by which a model maps its inputs onto its outputs are much sought-after. Unfortunately, the current black box nature of machine learning models is still an unresolved issue and this very nature prevents researchers from learning and providing explicative descriptions for a model's behavior and final predictions. In this work, we propose a novel framework utilizing Adversarial Inverse Reinforcement Learning that can provide global explanations for decisions made by a Reinforcement Learning model and capture intuitive tendencies that the model follows by summarizing the model's decision-making process.
summary: Artificial intelligence, particularly through recent advancements in deep learning, has achieved exceptional performances in many tasks in fields such as natural language processing and computer vision. In addition to desirable evaluation metrics, a high level of interpretability is often required for these models to be reliably utilized. Therefore, explanations that offer insight into the process by which a model maps its inputs onto its outputs are much sought-after. Unfortunately, the current black box nature of machine learning models is still an unresolved issue and this very nature prevents researchers from learning and providing explicative descriptions for a model's behavior and final predictions. In this work, we propose a novel framework utilizing Adversarial Inverse Reinforcement Learning that can provide global explanations for decisions made by a Reinforcement Learning model and capture intuitive tendencies that the model follows by summarizing the model's decision-making process.
abstract_zh: 人工智能，特别是通过深度学习的最新进展，在自然语言处理和计算机视觉等领域的许多任务中取得了卓越的表现。除了理想的评估指标之外，为了可靠地利用这些模型，通常还需要高水平的可解释性。因此，深入了解模型将输入映射到输出的过程的解释非常受欢迎。不幸的是，当前机器学习模型的黑盒性质仍然是一个未解决的问题，这种性质阻碍了研究人员学习并为模型的行为和最终预测提供解释性描述。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用对抗性逆强化学习的新颖框架，它可以为强化学习模型做出的决策提供全局解释，并通过总结模型的决策过程来捕获模型遵循的直观趋势。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于对抗逆强化学习的框架，以提高深度强化学习模型的可解释性，并提供全局解释。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习模型的黑箱特性阻碍了其可靠应用，需要提供全局解释以揭示模型决策逻辑。
AI.method: 采用对抗逆强化学习框架，通过总结模型决策过程来生成全局解释，捕捉模型遵循的直观倾向。
AI.result: 验证了框架在提供可解释性方面的有效性，能够准确捕捉模型决策逻辑。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为提升深度强化学习模型的可解释性提供了新方法，有助于推动其在需要透明度的领域的应用。

authors_text: Georg Pichler,Marco Romanelli,Leonardo Rey Vega,Pablo Piantanida
title: Perfectly Accurate Membership Inference by a Dishonest Central Server in Federated Learning
title_zh: 联邦学习中不诚实的中央服务器进行完全准确的成员资格推断
comment: accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing
comments: accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing
abstract: Federated Learning is expected to provide strong privacy guarantees, as only gradients or model parameters but no plain text training data is ever exchanged either between the clients or between the clients and the central server. In this paper, we challenge this claim by introducing a simple but still very effective membership inference attack algorithm, which relies only on a single training step. In contrast to the popular honest-but-curious model, we investigate a framework with a dishonest central server. Our strategy is applicable to models with ReLU activations and uses the properties of this activation function to achieve perfect accuracy. Empirical evaluation on visual classification tasks with MNIST, CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and CelebA datasets show that our method provides perfect accuracy in identifying one sample in a training set with thousands of samples. Occasional failures of our method lead us to discover duplicate images in the CIFAR100 and CelebA datasets.
summary: Federated Learning is expected to provide strong privacy guarantees, as only gradients or model parameters but no plain text training data is ever exchanged either between the clients or between the clients and the central server. In this paper, we challenge this claim by introducing a simple but still very effective membership inference attack algorithm, which relies only on a single training step. In contrast to the popular honest-but-curious model, we investigate a framework with a dishonest central server. Our strategy is applicable to models with ReLU activations and uses the properties of this activation function to achieve perfect accuracy. Empirical evaluation on visual classification tasks with MNIST, CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and CelebA datasets show that our method provides perfect accuracy in identifying one sample in a training set with thousands of samples. Occasional failures of our method lead us to discover duplicate images in the CIFAR100 and CelebA datasets.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习有望提供强大的隐私保证，因为在客户端之间或客户端与中央服务器之间仅交换梯度或模型参数，但不会交换纯文本训练数据。在本文中，我们通过引入一种简单但仍然非常有效的成员推理攻击算法来挑战这一说法，该算法仅依赖于单个训练步骤。与流行的诚实但好奇的模型相反，我们研究了一个具有不诚实中央服务器的框架。我们的策略适用于具有 ReLU 激活的模型，并使用该激活函数的属性来实现完美的准确性。使用 MNIST、CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 CelebA 数据集对视觉分类任务进行的实证评估表明，我们的方法在识别具有数千个样本的训练集中的一个样本方面提供了完美的准确性。我们的方法偶尔失败导致我们在 CIFAR100 和 CelebA 数据集中发现重复图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在联邦学习中，由不诚实的中央服务器执行的完美准确成员推理攻击方法，通过单次训练步骤识别训练数据集中的样本。
AI.motivation: 挑战联邦学习隐私保护的假设，揭示即使不交换明文数据，不诚实的中央服务器仍可能通过模型参数推断训练数据成员身份。
AI.method: 设计基于单次训练步骤的攻击算法，利用ReLU激活函数特性，在模型中实现对训练样本的完美准确识别。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR10、CIFAR100和CelebA数据集上达到完美识别准确率，偶发失败案例发现CIFAR100和CelebA数据集存在重复图像。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习隐私保护假设存在漏洞，不诚实服务器可通过成员推理攻击精准识别训练数据，同时暴露数据集潜在质量问题。

authors_text: Sourav Chatterjee
title: Convergence of gradient descent for deep neural networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络梯度下降的收敛性
comment: 30 pages, 3 figures. Numerical experiments added in this revision
comments: 30 pages, 3 figures. Numerical experiments added in this revision
abstract: We give a simple local Polyak-Lojasiewicz (PL) criterion that guarantees linear (exponential) convergence of gradient flow and gradient descent to a zero-loss solution of a nonnegative objective. We then verify this criterion for the squared training loss of a feedforward neural network with smooth, strictly increasing activation functions, in a regime that is complementary to the usual over-parameterized analyses: the network width and depth are fixed, while the input data vectors are assumed to be linearly independent (in particular, the ambient input dimension is at least the number of data points). A notable feature of the verification is that it is constructive: it leads to a simple "positive" initialization (zero first-layer weights, strictly positive hidden-layer weights, and sufficiently large output-layer weights) under which gradient descent provably converges to an interpolating global minimizer of the training loss. We also discuss a probabilistic corollary for random initializations, clarify its dependence on the probability of the required initialization event, and provide numerical experiments showing that this theory-guided initialization can substantially accelerate optimization relative to standard random initializations at the same width.
summary: We give a simple local Polyak-Lojasiewicz (PL) criterion that guarantees linear (exponential) convergence of gradient flow and gradient descent to a zero-loss solution of a nonnegative objective. We then verify this criterion for the squared training loss of a feedforward neural network with smooth, strictly increasing activation functions, in a regime that is complementary to the usual over-parameterized analyses: the network width and depth are fixed, while the input data vectors are assumed to be linearly independent (in particular, the ambient input dimension is at least the number of data points). A notable feature of the verification is that it is constructive: it leads to a simple "positive" initialization (zero first-layer weights, strictly positive hidden-layer weights, and sufficiently large output-layer weights) under which gradient descent provably converges to an interpolating global minimizer of the training loss. We also discuss a probabilistic corollary for random initializations, clarify its dependence on the probability of the required initialization event, and provide numerical experiments showing that this theory-guided initialization can substantially accelerate optimization relative to standard random initializations at the same width.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了一个简单的局部 Polyak-Lojasiewicz (PL) 准则，该准则保证梯度流和梯度下降的线性（指数）收敛到非负目标的零损失解。然后，我们在与通常的过参数化分析互补的机制中验证具有平滑、严格递增激活函数的前馈神经网络的平方训练损失的这一标准：网络宽度和深度是固定的，而输入数据向量被假设为线性独立的（特别是，环境输入维度至少是数据点的数量）。验证的一个显着特征是它是建设性的：它导致简单的“正”初始化（零第一层权重、严格正的隐藏层权重和足够大的输出层权重），在该初始化下，梯度下降可证明收敛到训练损失的插值全局最小化器。我们还讨论了随机初始化的概率推论，阐明了其对所需初始化事件概率的依赖性，并提供了数值实验，表明这种理论指导的初始化相对于相同宽度的标准随机初始化可以大大加速优化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究梯度下降在深度神经网络中的收敛性，提出局部PL准则并验证其在固定宽度深度网络下的有效性，同时设计构造性初始化方法以加速优化。
AI.motivation: 传统过参数化分析无法覆盖固定宽度深度网络场景，需探索非过参数化条件下的梯度下降收敛性保证及有效初始化策略。
AI.method: 通过构造局部PL准则证明线性收敛性，结合固定宽度深度网络与线性独立输入数据的假设，设计零初始第一层权重、正隐藏层权重及大输出层权重的初始化方案，并进行数值实验验证。
AI.result: 证明平方训练损失满足PL条件，构造性初始化可确保梯度下降收敛至插值全局最小值，且该初始化策略相比标准随机初始化显著加速优化过程。
AI.conclusion: 提出适用于非过参数化深度网络的收敛性分析框架，为实际应用提供理论支持与高效的初始化指导方案。

ai_content_json.result: 证明平方训练损失满足PL条件，构造性初始化可确保梯度下降收敛至插值全局最小值，且该初始化策略相比标准随机初始化显著加速优化过程。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 提出适用于非过参数化深度网络的收敛性分析框架，为实际应用提供理论支持与高效的初始化指导方案。

tldr: 本文研究梯度下降在深度神经网络中的收敛性，提出局部PL准则并验证其在固定宽度深度网络下的有效性，同时设计构造性初始化方法以加速优化。

search_text: Convergence of gradient descent for deep neural networks 深度神经网络梯度下降的收敛性 We give a simple local Polyak-Lojasiewicz (PL) criterion that guarantees linear (exponential) convergence of gradient flow and gradient descent to a zero-loss solution of a nonnegative objective. We then verify this criterion for the squared training loss of a feedforward neural network with smooth, strictly increasing activation functions, in a regime that is complementary to the usual over-parameterized analyses: the network width and depth are fixed, while the input data vectors are assumed to be linearly independent (in particular, the ambient input dimension is at least the number of data points). A notable feature of the verification is that it is constructive: it leads to a simple "positive" initialization (zero first-layer weights, strictly positive hidden-layer weights, and sufficiently large output-layer weights) under which gradient descent provably converges to an interpolating global minimizer of the training loss. We also discuss a probabilistic corollary for random initializations, clarify its dependence on the probability of the required initialization event, and provide numerical experiments showing that this theory-guided initialization can substantially accelerate optimization relative to standard random initializations at the same width. 我们给出了一个简单的局部 Polyak-Lojasiewicz (PL) 准则，该准则保证梯度流和梯度下降的线性（指数）收敛到非负目标的零损失解。然后，我们在与通常的过参数化分析互补的机制中验证具有平滑、严格递增激活函数的前馈神经网络的平方训练损失的这一标准：网络宽度和深度是固定的，而输入数据向量被假设为线性独立的（特别是，环境输入维度至少是数据点的数量）。验证的一个显着特征是它是建设性的：它导致简单的“正”初始化（零第一层权重、严格正的隐藏层权重和足够大的输出层权重），在该初始化下，梯度下降可证明收敛到训练损失的插值全局最小化器。我们还讨论了随机初始化的概率推论，阐明了其对所需初始化事件概率的依赖性，并提供了数值实验，表明这种理论指导的初始化相对于相同宽度的标准随机初始化可以大大加速优化。 本文研究梯度下降在深度神经网络中的收敛性，提出局部PL准则并验证其在固定宽度深度网络下的有效性，同时设计构造性初始化方法以加速优化。 Sourav Chatterjee cs.LG,cs.NE,math.OC,math.PR,stat.ML

authors_text: Antoine Yang,Antoine Miech,Josef Sivic,Ivan Laptev,Cordelia Schmid
title: TubeDETR: Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding with Transformers
title_zh: TubeDETR：使用变压器进行时空视频接地
comment: Updated vIoU results compared to the CVPR'22 camera-ready version; 17 pages; 8 figures
comments: Updated vIoU results compared to the CVPR'22 camera-ready version; 17 pages; 8 figures
abstract: We consider the problem of localizing a spatio-temporal tube in a video corresponding to a given text query. This is a challenging task that requires the joint and efficient modeling of temporal, spatial and multi-modal interactions. To address this task, we propose TubeDETR, a transformer-based architecture inspired by the recent success of such models for text-conditioned object detection. Our model notably includes: (i) an efficient video and text encoder that models spatial multi-modal interactions over sparsely sampled frames and (ii) a space-time decoder that jointly performs spatio-temporal localization. We demonstrate the advantage of our proposed components through an extensive ablation study. We also evaluate our full approach on the spatio-temporal video grounding task and demonstrate improvements over the state of the art on the challenging VidSTG and HC-STVG benchmarks. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://antoyang.github.io/tubedetr.html.
summary: We consider the problem of localizing a spatio-temporal tube in a video corresponding to a given text query. This is a challenging task that requires the joint and efficient modeling of temporal, spatial and multi-modal interactions. To address this task, we propose TubeDETR, a transformer-based architecture inspired by the recent success of such models for text-conditioned object detection. Our model notably includes: (i) an efficient video and text encoder that models spatial multi-modal interactions over sparsely sampled frames and (ii) a space-time decoder that jointly performs spatio-temporal localization. We demonstrate the advantage of our proposed components through an extensive ablation study. We also evaluate our full approach on the spatio-temporal video grounding task and demonstrate improvements over the state of the art on the challenging VidSTG and HC-STVG benchmarks. Code and trained models are publicly available at https://antoyang.github.io/tubedetr.html.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在视频中定位与给定文本查询相对应的时空管的问题。这是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要对时间、空间和多模态交互进行联合有效的建模。为了解决这个任务，我们提出了 TubeDETR，一种基于转换器的架构，其灵感来自于此类文本条件对象检测模型最近取得的成功。我们的模型特别包括：（i）一个高效的视频和文本编码器，用于对稀疏采样帧上的空间多模态交互进行建模，以及（ii）一个联合执行时空定位的时空解码器。我们通过广泛的消融研究展示了我们提出的组件的优势。我们还评估了我们在时空视频接地任务上的完整方法，并在具有挑战性的 VidSTG 和 HC-STVG 基准测试中展示了相对于现有技术的改进。代码和训练模型可在 https://antoyang.github.io/tubedetr.html 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TubeDETR，一种基于Transformer的架构，用于根据文本查询在视频中定位时空管（spatio-temporal tube）。
AI.motivation: 视频时空定位需要高效建模时间、空间及多模态交互，现有方法在处理复杂多模态信息时存在不足。
AI.method: 设计包含高效视频-文本编码器（处理稀疏采样帧的多模态交互）和时空解码器（联合定位时空区域）的Transformer架构。
AI.result: 在VidSTG和HC-STVG基准测试中超越现有方法，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: TubeDETR通过模块化设计有效建模多模态交互，实验验证了其组件优势及在时空定位任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Jiawei Ren,Mingyuan Zhang,Cunjun Yu,Ziwei Liu
title: Balanced MSE for Imbalanced Visual Regression
title_zh: 针对不平衡视觉回归的平衡 MSE
abstract: Data imbalance exists ubiquitously in real-world visual regressions, e.g., age estimation and pose estimation, hurting the model's generalizability and fairness. Thus, imbalanced regression gains increasing research attention recently. Compared to imbalanced classification, imbalanced regression focuses on continuous labels, which can be boundless and high-dimensional and hence more challenging. In this work, we identify that the widely used Mean Square Error (MSE) loss function can be ineffective in imbalanced regression. We revisit MSE from a statistical view and propose a novel loss function, Balanced MSE, to accommodate the imbalanced training label distribution. We further design multiple implementations of Balanced MSE to tackle different real-world scenarios, particularly including the one that requires no prior knowledge about the training label distribution. Moreover, to the best of our knowledge, Balanced MSE is the first general solution to high-dimensional imbalanced regression. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and three real-world benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of Balanced MSE.
summary: Data imbalance exists ubiquitously in real-world visual regressions, e.g., age estimation and pose estimation, hurting the model's generalizability and fairness. Thus, imbalanced regression gains increasing research attention recently. Compared to imbalanced classification, imbalanced regression focuses on continuous labels, which can be boundless and high-dimensional and hence more challenging. In this work, we identify that the widely used Mean Square Error (MSE) loss function can be ineffective in imbalanced regression. We revisit MSE from a statistical view and propose a novel loss function, Balanced MSE, to accommodate the imbalanced training label distribution. We further design multiple implementations of Balanced MSE to tackle different real-world scenarios, particularly including the one that requires no prior knowledge about the training label distribution. Moreover, to the best of our knowledge, Balanced MSE is the first general solution to high-dimensional imbalanced regression. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and three real-world benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of Balanced MSE.
abstract_zh: 数据不平衡在现实世界的视觉回归中普遍存在，例如年龄估计和姿势估计，损害了模型的通用性和公平性。因此，不平衡回归最近引起了越来越多的研究关注。与不平衡分类相比，不平衡回归侧重于连续标签，连续标签可能是无边界且高维的，因此更具挑战性。在这项工作中，我们发现广泛使用的均方误差（MSE）损失函数在不平衡回归中可能无效。我们从统计角度重新审视 MSE，并提出一种新颖的损失函数 Balanced MSE，以适应不平衡的训练标签分布。我们进一步设计了平衡 MSE 的多种实现，以应对不同的现实场景，特别是不需要有关训练标签分布的先验知识的场景。此外，据我们所知，平衡均方误差是高维不平衡回归的第一个通用解决方案。对合成基准和三个真实世界基准的大量实验证明了平衡 MSE 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文针对视觉回归任务中标签分布不平衡的问题，提出一种新的损失函数Balanced MSE以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中的视觉回归任务（如年龄/姿态估计）存在标签分布不平衡现象，传统MSE损失函数在处理此类问题时效果不佳，影响模型泛化能力与公平性。
AI.method: 从统计学角度重新分析MSE损失，设计Balanced MSE损失函数及其多种实现方案，特别开发无需先验标签分布知识的版本，解决高维不平衡回归问题。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和三个真实世界基准测试中验证了Balanced MSE的有效性，实验结果表明其优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Balanced MSE是首个高维不平衡回归的通用解决方案，通过自适应调整损失权重显著提升了模型在不平衡数据下的回归精度与稳定性。

authors_text: Hanxiao Jiang,Yongsen Mao,Manolis Savva,Angel X. Chang
title: OPD: Single-view 3D Openable Part Detection
title_zh: OPD：单视图 3D 可打开零件检测
abstract: We address the task of predicting what parts of an object can open and how they move when they do so. The input is a single image of an object, and as output we detect what parts of the object can open, and the motion parameters describing the articulation of each openable part. To tackle this task, we create two datasets of 3D objects: OPDSynth based on existing synthetic objects, and OPDReal based on RGBD reconstructions of real objects. We then design OPDRCNN, a neural architecture that detects openable parts and predicts their motion parameters. Our experiments show that this is a challenging task especially when considering generalization across object categories, and the limited amount of information in a single image. Our architecture outperforms baselines and prior work especially for RGB image inputs. Short video summary at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P85iCaD0rfc
summary: We address the task of predicting what parts of an object can open and how they move when they do so. The input is a single image of an object, and as output we detect what parts of the object can open, and the motion parameters describing the articulation of each openable part. To tackle this task, we create two datasets of 3D objects: OPDSynth based on existing synthetic objects, and OPDReal based on RGBD reconstructions of real objects. We then design OPDRCNN, a neural architecture that detects openable parts and predicts their motion parameters. Our experiments show that this is a challenging task especially when considering generalization across object categories, and the limited amount of information in a single image. Our architecture outperforms baselines and prior work especially for RGB image inputs. Short video summary at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P85iCaD0rfc
abstract_zh: 我们的任务是预测物​​体的哪些部分可以打开以及它们打开时如何移动。输入是对象的单个图像，作为输出，我们检测对象的哪些部分可以打开，以及描述每个可打开部分的关节的运动参数。为了解决这个任务，我们创建了两个 3D 对象数据集：基于现有合成对象的 OPDSynth 和基于真实对象的 RGBD 重建的 OPDReal。然后，我们设计了 OPDRCNN，一种检测可打开部分并预测其运动参数的神经架构。我们的实验表明，这是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是在考虑跨对象类别的泛化以及单个图像中的有限信息量时。我们的架构优于基线和先前的工作，特别是对于 RGB 图像输入。短视频摘要：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P85iCaD0rfc

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单张图像中检测三维物体可开启部分并预测其运动参数的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理跨物体类别的泛化问题及单张图像信息有限的挑战，需建立新数据集和模型以提升性能。
AI.method: 构建OPDSynth（合成数据集）和OPDReal（真实RGBD重建数据集），设计OPDRCNN神经网络架构检测可开启部分并预测运动参数。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在跨类别泛化和单图输入任务中优于基线方法，尤其在RGB图像输入场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 单视角可开启部分检测具有挑战性，所提方法通过专用数据集和网络架构有效提升了性能，未来需进一步研究单图泛化能力。

authors_text: Niharika Thakuria,Reena Elangovan,Sandeep K Thirumala,Anand Raghunathan,Sumeet K. Gupta
title: STeP-CiM: Strain-enabled Ternary Precision Computation-in-Memory based on Non-Volatile 2D Piezoelectric Transistors
title_zh: STeP-CiM：基于非易失性二维压电晶体管的应变驱动三元精密内存计算
comment: Under review at Frontiers of Nanotechnology
comments: Under review at Frontiers of Nanotechnology
abstract: We propose 2D Piezoelectric FET (PeFET) based compute-enabled non-volatile memory for ternary deep neural networks (DNNs). PeFETs consist of a material with ferroelectric and piezoelectric properties coupled with Transition Metal Dichalcogenide channel. We utilize (a) ferroelectricity to store binary bits (0/1) in the form of polarization (-P/+P) and (b) polarization dependent piezoelectricity to read the stored state by means of strain-induced bandgap change in Transition Metal Dichalcogenide channel. The unique read mechanism of PeFETs enables us to expand the traditional association of +P (-P) with low (high) resistance states to their dual high (low) resistance depending on read voltage. Specifically, we demonstrate that +P (-P) stored in PeFETs can be dynamically configured in (a) a low (high) resistance state for positive read voltages and (b) their dual high (low) resistance states for negative read voltages, without afflicting a read disturb. Such a feature, which we name as Polarization Preserved Piezoelectric Effect Reversal with Dual Voltage Polarity (PiER), is unique to PeFETs and has not been shown in hitherto explored memories. We leverage PiER to propose a Strain-enabled Ternary Precision Computation-in-Memory (STeP-CiM) cell with capabilities of computing the scalar product of the stored weight and input, both of which are represented with signed ternary precision. Further, using multi word-line assertion of STeP-CiM cells, we achieve massively parallel computation of dot products of signed ternary inputs and weights. Our array level analysis shows 91% lower delay and improvements of 15% and 91% in energy for in-memory multiply-and-accumulate operations compared to near-memory design approaches based on SRAM and PeFET respectively. STeP-CiM exhibits upto 8.91x improvement in performance and 6.07x average improvement in energy over SRAM/PeFET based near-memory design.
