PeFETs consist of a material with ferroelectric and piezoelectric properties coupled with Transition Metal Dichalcogenide channel. We utilize (a) ferroelectricity to store binary bits (0/1) in the form of polarization (-P/+P) and (b) polarization dependent piezoelectricity to read the stored state by means of strain-induced bandgap change in Transition Metal Dichalcogenide channel. The unique read mechanism of PeFETs enables us to expand the traditional association of +P (-P) with low (high) resistance states to their dual high (low) resistance depending on read voltage. Specifically, we demonstrate that +P (-P) stored in PeFETs can be dynamically configured in (a) a low (high) resistance state for positive read voltages and (b) their dual high (low) resistance states for negative read voltages, without afflicting a read disturb. Such a feature, which we name as Polarization Preserved Piezoelectric Effect Reversal with Dual Voltage Polarity (PiER), is unique to PeFETs and has not been shown in hitherto explored memories. We leverage PiER to propose a Strain-enabled Ternary Precision Computation-in-Memory (STeP-CiM) cell with capabilities of computing the scalar product of the stored weight and input, both of which are represented with signed ternary precision. Further, using multi word-line assertion of STeP-CiM cells, we achieve massively parallel computation of dot products of signed ternary inputs and weights. STeP-CiM exhibits upto 8.91x improvement in performance and 6.07x average improvement in energy over SRAM/PeFET based near-memory design.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了用于三元深度神经网络 (DNN) 的基于 2D 压电 FET (PeFET) 的计算型非易失性存储器。 PeFET 由具有铁电和压电特性的材料以及过渡金属二硫族化物通道组成。我们利用（a）铁电性以极化（-P/+P）形式存储二进制位（0/1），并利用（b）极化相关压电性通过过渡金属二硫化物通道中应变引起的带隙变化来读取存储的状态。 PeFET 独特的读取机制使我们能够根据读取电压将 +P (-P) 与低（高）电阻状态的传统关联扩展到其双高（低）电阻。具体来说，我们证明存储在 PeFET 中的 +P (-P) 可以动态配置为 (a) 正读取电压的低（高）电阻状态和 (b) 负读取电压的双高（低）电阻状态，而不会影响读取干扰。我们将这种特性称为具有双电压极性的极化保留压电效应反转 (PiER)，它是 PeFET 所独有的，并且在迄今为止探索的存储器中尚未出现。我们利用 PiER 提出了一种支持应变的三元精度内存计算 (STeP-CiM) 单元，该单元具有计算存储的权重和输入的标量积的能力，两者都以带符号的三元精度表示。此外，使用 STeP-CiM 单元的多字线断言，我们实现了带符号三元输入和权重的点积的大规模并行计算。我们的阵列级分析显示，与基于 SRAM 和 PeFET 的近内存设计方法相比，内存中乘法累加运算的延迟降低了 91%，能耗提高了 15% 和 91%。与基于 SRAM/PeFET 的近存储器设计相比，STeP-CiM 的性能提高高达 8.91 倍，能耗平均提高 6.07 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于二维压电晶体管（PeFET）的非易失性计算存储器架构STeP-CiM，用于高效执行三元深度神经网络的矩阵运算。
AI.motivation: 传统存储器在处理三元神经网络计算时存在高延迟和高能耗问题，而现有PeFET技术无法动态配置电阻状态以适应三元精度计算需求。
AI.method: 设计具有铁电-压电耦合特性的PeFET结构，通过极化保持的压电效应反转（PiER）机制，利用双极性电压控制通道电阻状态，实现三元权重存储与计算，并通过多字线并行计算提升运算效率。
AI.result: 相比SRAM和PeFET近存设计，STeP-CiM在阵列级实现91%延迟降低、15%和91%的能效提升，性能提升达8.91倍，能量效率平均提升6.07倍。
AI.conclusion: STeP-CiM通过创新的物理效应与架构设计，在计算存储器领域实现了显著的能效与性能突破，为三元神经网络加速提供了新方向。

authors_text: Wen Yan,Qianye Yang,Tom Syer,Zhe Min,Shonit Punwani,Mark Emberton,Dean C. Barratt,Bernard Chiu,Yipeng Hu
title: The impact of using voxel-level segmentation metrics on evaluating multifocal prostate cancer localisation
title_zh: 使用体素级分割指标对评估多灶性前列腺癌定位的影响
abstract: Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) and Hausdorff distance (HD) are widely used for evaluating medical image segmentation. They have also been criticised, when reported alone, for their unclear or even misleading clinical interpretation. DSCs may also differ substantially from HDs, due to boundary smoothness or multiple regions of interest (ROIs) within a subject. More importantly, either metric can also have a nonlinear, non-monotonic relationship with outcomes based on Type 1 and 2 errors, designed for specific clinical decisions that use the resulting segmentation. Whilst cases causing disagreement between these metrics are not difficult to postulate. This work first proposes a new asymmetric detection metric, adapting those used in object detection, for planning prostate cancer procedures. The lesion-level metrics is then compared with the voxel-level DSC and HD, whereas a 3D UNet is used for segmenting lesions from multiparametric MR (mpMR) images. Based on experimental results we report pairwise agreement and correlation 1) between DSC and HD, and 2) between voxel-level DSC and recall-controlled precision at lesion-level, with Cohen's [0.49, 0.61] and Pearson's [0.66, 0.76] (p-values}<0.001) at varying cut-offs. However, the differences in false-positives and false-negatives, between the actual errors and the perceived counterparts if DSC is used, can be as high as 152 and 154, respectively, out of the 357 test set lesions. We therefore carefully conclude that, despite of the significant correlations, voxel-level metrics such as DSC can misrepresent lesion-level detection accuracy for evaluating localisation of multifocal prostate cancer and should be interpreted with caution.
summary: Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) and Hausdorff distance (HD) are widely used for evaluating medical image segmentation. They have also been criticised, when reported alone, for their unclear or even misleading clinical interpretation. DSCs may also differ substantially from HDs, due to boundary smoothness or multiple regions of interest (ROIs) within a subject. More importantly, either metric can also have a nonlinear, non-monotonic relationship with outcomes based on Type 1 and 2 errors, designed for specific clinical decisions that use the resulting segmentation. Whilst cases causing disagreement between these metrics are not difficult to postulate. This work first proposes a new asymmetric detection metric, adapting those used in object detection, for planning prostate cancer procedures. The lesion-level metrics is then compared with the voxel-level DSC and HD, whereas a 3D UNet is used for segmenting lesions from multiparametric MR (mpMR) images. Based on experimental results we report pairwise agreement and correlation 1) between DSC and HD, and 2) between voxel-level DSC and recall-controlled precision at lesion-level, with Cohen's [0.49, 0.61] and Pearson's [0.66, 0.76] (p-values}<0.001) at varying cut-offs. However, the differences in false-positives and false-negatives, between the actual errors and the perceived counterparts if DSC is used, can be as high as 152 and 154, respectively, out of the 357 test set lesions. We therefore carefully conclude that, despite of the significant correlations, voxel-level metrics such as DSC can misrepresent lesion-level detection accuracy for evaluating localisation of multifocal prostate cancer and should be interpreted with caution.
abstract_zh: 骰子相似系数（DSC）和豪斯多夫距离（HD）广泛用于评估医学图像分割。当它们单独报道时，也因其临床解释不明确甚至误导性而受到批评。由于对象内的边界平滑度或多个感兴趣区域 (ROI)，DSC 也可能与 HD 有很大不同。更重要的是，任一指标还可以与基于 1 型和 2 型错误的结果具有非线性、非单调关系，专为使用所得分割的特定临床决策而设计。虽然引起这些指标之间不一致的情况并不难假设。这项工作首先提出了一种新的不对称检测指标，适应对象检测中使用的指标，用于规划前列腺癌手术。然后将病变级别指标与体素级别 DSC 和 HD 进行比较，而 3D UNet 用于从多参数 MR (mpMR) 图像中分割病变。根据实验结果，我们报告了 1) DSC 和 HD 之间的成对一致性和相关性，以及 2) 体素级 DSC 和病变级召回控制精度之间的成对一致性和相关性，其中 Cohen 的 [0.49, 0.61] 和 Pearson 的 [0.66, 0.76]（p 值}<0.001）在不同的截止值下。然而，在 357 个测试集病变中，如果使用 DSC，实际错误与感知对应错误之间的假阳性和假阴性差异可能分别高达 152 和 154。因此，我们谨慎地得出结论，尽管存在显着相关性，但体素水平指标（例如 DSC）可能会歪曲病变水平检测的准确性，以评估多灶性前列腺癌的定位，因此应谨慎解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的非对称检测度量，并与传统体素级Dice相似系数（DSC）和Hausdorff距离（HD）进行比较，以评估多灶性前列腺癌定位的分割效果。
AI.motivation: 传统分割度量（如DSC和HD）在临床解释上存在模糊性，且可能因边界平滑度或多区域兴趣（ROI）导致差异，无法准确反映病变级检测精度。
AI.method: 基于3D UNet对多参数MRI图像进行病变分割，引入对象检测中的非对称度量，并通过Cohen's kappa和Pearson相关系数分析DSC/HD与新度量的关联性，同时统计假阳性和假阴性差异。
AI.result: DSC与HD在不同阈值下呈现显著相关性（Cohen's 0.49-0.61，Pearson 0.66-0.76），但DSC可能高估或低估实际误差，假阳性/假阴性差异高达152/154（357个测试病变）。
AI.conclusion: 体素级度量（如DSC）可能误导多灶性前列腺癌定位的病变级检测精度评估，需谨慎解读并结合其他指标综合分析。

authors_text: Simon Dahan,Abdulah Fawaz,Logan Z. J. Williams,Chunhui Yang,Timothy S. Coalson,Matthew F. Glasser,A. David Edwards,Daniel Rueckert,Emma C. Robinson
title: Surface Vision Transformers: Attention-Based Modelling applied to Cortical Analysis
title_zh: 表面视觉变压器：基于注意力的建模应用于皮层分析
comment: 22 pages, 6 figures, Accepted to MIDL 2022, OpenReview link https://openreview.net/forum?id=mpp843Bsf-
comments: 22 pages, 6 figures, Accepted to MIDL 2022, OpenReview link https://openreview.net/forum?id=mpp843Bsf-
abstract: The extension of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to non-Euclidean geometries has led to multiple frameworks for studying manifolds. Many of those methods have shown design limitations resulting in poor modelling of long-range associations, as the generalisation of convolutions to irregular surfaces is non-trivial. Motivated by the success of attention-modelling in computer vision, we translate convolution-free vision transformer approaches to surface data, to introduce a domain-agnostic architecture to study any surface data projected onto a spherical manifold. Here, surface patching is achieved by representing spherical data as a sequence of triangular patches, extracted from a subdivided icosphere. A transformer model encodes the sequence of patches via successive multi-head self-attention layers while preserving the sequence resolution. We validate the performance of the proposed Surface Vision Transformer (SiT) on the task of phenotype regression from cortical surface metrics derived from the Developing Human Connectome Project (dHCP). Experiments show that the SiT generally outperforms surface CNNs, while performing comparably on registered and unregistered data. Analysis of transformer attention maps offers strong potential to characterise subtle cognitive developmental patterns.
summary: The extension of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to non-Euclidean geometries has led to multiple frameworks for studying manifolds. Many of those methods have shown design limitations resulting in poor modelling of long-range associations, as the generalisation of convolutions to irregular surfaces is non-trivial. Motivated by the success of attention-modelling in computer vision, we translate convolution-free vision transformer approaches to surface data, to introduce a domain-agnostic architecture to study any surface data projected onto a spherical manifold. Here, surface patching is achieved by representing spherical data as a sequence of triangular patches, extracted from a subdivided icosphere. A transformer model encodes the sequence of patches via successive multi-head self-attention layers while preserving the sequence resolution. We validate the performance of the proposed Surface Vision Transformer (SiT) on the task of phenotype regression from cortical surface metrics derived from the Developing Human Connectome Project (dHCP). Experiments show that the SiT generally outperforms surface CNNs, while performing comparably on registered and unregistered data. Analysis of transformer attention maps offers strong potential to characterise subtle cognitive developmental patterns.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 向非欧几里得几何的扩展催生了多种研究流形的框架。其中许多方法都显示出设计局限性，导致远程关联的建模效果不佳，因为将卷积推广到不规则表面并非易事。受计算机视觉中注意力建模成功的推动，我们将无卷积视觉变换器方法转化为表面数据，引入与领域无关的架构来研究投影到球形流形上的任何表面数据。这里，表面修补是通过将球形数据表示为从细分的微球中提取的一系列三角形补片来实现的。变压器模型通过连续的多头自注意力层对补丁序列进行编码，同时保留序列分辨率。我们验证了所提出的表面视觉变换器（SiT）在根据人类连接组开发项目（dHCP）得出的皮层表面指标进行表型回归任务中的性能。实验表明，SiT 通常优于表面 CNN，而在注册和未注册数据上的表现相当。对变压器注意力图的分析为表征微妙的认知发展模式提供了强大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的Surface Vision Transformer（SiT）模型，用于处理球面流形上的皮层表面数据，以解决表型回归任务。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）在非欧几里得几何表面建模中存在长距离关联建模不足的问题，而注意力机制在计算机视觉中的成功启发了将其应用于表面数据分析。
AI.method: 将球面数据表示为细分二十面体提取的三角形补丁序列，通过多头自注意力层编码补丁序列，保持分辨率并构建领域无关的SiT架构。
AI.result: 在dHCP皮层表面指标的表型回归任务中，SiT整体优于表面CNN，且在注册和未注册数据上表现相当，注意力图分析揭示了细微的认知发育模式。
AI.conclusion: SiT模型为球面流形数据提供了有效的分析框架，在皮层分析任务中展现出优于CNN的性能，并具备通过注意力机制解析认知发育模式的潜力。

authors_text: Huaisheng Zhu,Enyan Dai,Hui Liu,Suhang Wang
title: Learning Fair Models without Sensitive Attributes: A Generative Approach
title_zh: 学习没有敏感属性的公平模型：生成方法
abstract: Most existing fair classifiers rely on sensitive attributes to achieve fairness. However, for many scenarios, we cannot obtain sensitive attributes due to privacy and legal issues. The lack of sensitive attributes challenges many existing fair classifiers. Though we lack sensitive attributes, for many applications, there usually exists features or information of various formats that are relevant to sensitive attributes. For example, purchase history of a person can reflect his or her race, which would help for learning fair classifiers on race. However, the work on exploring relevant features for learning fair models without sensitive attributes is rather limited. Therefore, in this paper, we study a novel problem of learning fair models without sensitive attributes by exploring relevant features. We propose a probabilistic generative framework to effectively estimate the sensitive attribute from the training data with relevant features in various formats and utilize the estimated sensitive attribute information to learn fair models. Experimental results on real-world datasets show the effectiveness of our framework in terms of both accuracy and fairness.
summary: Most existing fair classifiers rely on sensitive attributes to achieve fairness. However, for many scenarios, we cannot obtain sensitive attributes due to privacy and legal issues. The lack of sensitive attributes challenges many existing fair classifiers. Though we lack sensitive attributes, for many applications, there usually exists features or information of various formats that are relevant to sensitive attributes. For example, purchase history of a person can reflect his or her race, which would help for learning fair classifiers on race. However, the work on exploring relevant features for learning fair models without sensitive attributes is rather limited. Therefore, in this paper, we study a novel problem of learning fair models without sensitive attributes by exploring relevant features. We propose a probabilistic generative framework to effectively estimate the sensitive attribute from the training data with relevant features in various formats and utilize the estimated sensitive attribute information to learn fair models. Experimental results on real-world datasets show the effectiveness of our framework in terms of both accuracy and fairness.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的公平分类器依赖敏感属性来实现公平。然而，在很多场景下，由于隐私和法律问题，我们无法获取敏感属性。缺乏敏感属性对许多现有的公平分类器提出了挑战。虽然我们缺乏敏感属性，但对于许多应用来说，通常存在与敏感属性相关的各种格式的特征或信息。例如，一个人的购买历史可以反映他或她的种族，这将有助于学习种族的公平分类器。然而，探索学习没有敏感属性的公平模型的相关特征的工作相当有限。因此，在本文中，我们通过探索相关特征来研究一个新的问题，即学习没有敏感属性的公平模型。我们提出了一种概率生成框架，可以有效地从具有各种格式的相关特征的训练数据中估计敏感属性，并利用估计的敏感属性信息来学习公平模型。现实数据集上的实验结果表明了我们的框架在准确性和公平性方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需敏感属性的学习公平模型的方法，通过利用相关特征进行生成建模。
AI.motivation: 现有公平分类器依赖敏感属性，但隐私和法律问题导致无法获取，而相关特征可能隐含敏感信息，但相关研究有限。
AI.method: 提出概率生成框架，从多格式相关特征中估计敏感属性，并利用估计信息学习公平模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在多个真实数据集上同时提升了模型的准确性与公平性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效解决了在无敏感属性情况下利用相关特征学习公平模型的难题，为隐私保护下的公平AI提供了新思路。

authors_text: Heyang Xue,Xinsheng Wang,Yongmao Zhang,Lei Xie,Pengcheng Zhu,Mengxiao Bi
title: Learn2Sing 2.0: Diffusion and Mutual Information-Based Target Speaker SVS by Learning from Singing Teacher
title_zh: Learn2Sing 2.0：向声乐老师学习基于扩散和互信息的目标说话者SVS
abstract: Building a high-quality singing corpus for a person who is not good at singing is non-trivial, thus making it challenging to create a singing voice synthesizer for this person. Learn2Sing is dedicated to synthesizing the singing voice of a speaker without his or her singing data by learning from data recorded by others, i.e., the singing teacher. Inspired by the fact that pitch is the key style factor to distinguish singing from speaking voice, the proposed Learn2Sing 2.0 first generates the preliminary acoustic feature with averaged pitch value in the phone level, which allows the training of this process for different styles, i.e., speaking or singing, share same conditions except for the speaker information. Then, conditioned on the specific style, a diffusion decoder, which is accelerated by a fast sampling algorithm during the inference stage, is adopted to gradually restore the final acoustic feature. During the training, to avoid the information confusion of the speaker embedding and the style embedding, mutual information is employed to restrain the learning of speaker embedding and style embedding. Experiments show that the proposed approach is capable of synthesizing high-quality singing voice for the target speaker without singing data with 10 decoding steps.
summary: Building a high-quality singing corpus for a person who is not good at singing is non-trivial, thus making it challenging to create a singing voice synthesizer for this person. Learn2Sing is dedicated to synthesizing the singing voice of a speaker without his or her singing data by learning from data recorded by others, i.e., the singing teacher. Inspired by the fact that pitch is the key style factor to distinguish singing from speaking voice, the proposed Learn2Sing 2.0 first generates the preliminary acoustic feature with averaged pitch value in the phone level, which allows the training of this process for different styles, i.e., speaking or singing, share same conditions except for the speaker information. Then, conditioned on the specific style, a diffusion decoder, which is accelerated by a fast sampling algorithm during the inference stage, is adopted to gradually restore the final acoustic feature. During the training, to avoid the information confusion of the speaker embedding and the style embedding, mutual information is employed to restrain the learning of speaker embedding and style embedding. Experiments show that the proposed approach is capable of synthesizing high-quality singing voice for the target speaker without singing data with 10 decoding steps.
abstract_zh: 为一个不擅长唱歌的人建立一个高质量的歌唱语料库并非易事，因此为这个人创建一个歌声合成器变得具有挑战性。 Learn2Sing 致力于通过学习其他人（即歌唱老师）记录的数据来合成说话者的歌声，而无需他或她的歌唱数据。受音调是区分歌唱和说话声音的关键风格因素这一事实的启发，所提出的 Learn2Sing 2.0 首先生成具有电话级别的平均音调值的初步声学特征，这允许针对不同风格（即说话或唱歌）的此过程的训练，除了说话者信息之外共享相同的条件。然后，根据具体风格，采用扩散解码器，在推理阶段通过快速采样算法加速，逐步恢复最终的声学特征。在训练过程中，为了避免说话人嵌入和风格嵌入的信息混淆，采用互信息来约束说话人嵌入和风格嵌入的学习。实验表明，所提出的方法能够通过 10 个解码步骤在没有歌唱数据的情况下为目标说话者合成高质量的歌声。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Learn2Sing 2.0方法，通过学习其他人的歌唱数据（歌唱教师）来合成目标说话人的歌唱语音，无需目标说话人的歌唱数据。
AI.motivation: 为不具备歌唱能力的人创建高质量歌唱语料库具有挑战性，传统方法需依赖目标说话人的歌唱数据，而实际中此类数据往往难以获取。
AI.method: 基于音高作为歌唱与说话风格的关键区分因素，首先生成基于音素级平均音高的初步声学特征，再通过扩散解码器逐步恢复最终声学特征。训练中采用互信息约束说话人嵌入与风格嵌入的信息混淆。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能在10步解码步骤内合成高质量的目标说话人歌唱语音，无需其歌唱数据。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合扩散模型与互信息约束，Learn2Sing 2.0有效实现了无歌唱数据的目标说话人歌唱语音合成。

authors_text: Guan Yang,Minghuan Liu,Weijun Hong,Weinan Zhang,Fei Fang,Guangjun Zeng,Yue Lin
title: PerfectDou: Dominating DouDizhu with Perfect Information Distillation
title_zh: PerfectDou：完美信息蒸馏，称霸斗地主
comment: Fix minor errors. 23 pages, 8 figures, 13 tables. Published at NeurIPS 2022. The first two authors contribute equally. Project page at https://github.com/Netease-Games-AI-Lab-Guangzhou/PerfectDou
comments: Fix minor errors. 23 pages, 8 figures, 13 tables. Published at NeurIPS 2022. The first two authors contribute equally. Project page at https://github.com/Netease-Games-AI-Lab-Guangzhou/PerfectDou
abstract: As a challenging multi-player card game, DouDizhu has recently drawn much attention for analyzing competition and collaboration in imperfect-information games. In this paper, we propose PerfectDou, a state-of-the-art DouDizhu AI system that dominates the game, in an actor-critic framework with a proposed technique named perfect information distillation. In detail, we adopt a perfect-training-imperfect-execution framework that allows the agents to utilize the global information to guide the training of the policies as if it is a perfect information game and the trained policies can be used to play the imperfect information game during the actual gameplay. To this end, we characterize card and game features for DouDizhu to represent the perfect and imperfect information. To train our system, we adopt proximal policy optimization with generalized advantage estimation in a parallel training paradigm. In experiments we show how and why PerfectDou beats all existing AI programs, and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: As a challenging multi-player card game, DouDizhu has recently drawn much attention for analyzing competition and collaboration in imperfect-information games. In this paper, we propose PerfectDou, a state-of-the-art DouDizhu AI system that dominates the game, in an actor-critic framework with a proposed technique named perfect information distillation. In detail, we adopt a perfect-training-imperfect-execution framework that allows the agents to utilize the global information to guide the training of the policies as if it is a perfect information game and the trained policies can be used to play the imperfect information game during the actual gameplay. To this end, we characterize card and game features for DouDizhu to represent the perfect and imperfect information. To train our system, we adopt proximal policy optimization with generalized advantage estimation in a parallel training paradigm. In experiments we show how and why PerfectDou beats all existing AI programs, and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 作为一种具有挑战性的多人卡牌游戏，斗地主最近因其分析不完全信息博弈中的竞争与协作而备受关注。在本文中，我们提出了 PerfectDou，这是一种在游戏中占据主导地位的最先进的斗地主人工智能系统，在演员评论家框架中提出了一种名为完美信息蒸馏的技术。具体来说，我们采用完美训练-不完美执行框架，允许代理利用全局信息来指导策略的训练，就好像它是完美信息游戏一样，并且训练后的策略可以在实际游戏过程中用于玩不完美信息游戏。为此，我们为斗地主刻画了卡牌和游戏的特征来表示完美和不完美的信息。为了训练我们的系统，我们在并行训练范例中采用了具有广义优势估计的近端策略优化。在实验中，我们展示了 PerfectDou 如何以及为何击败所有现有的人工智能程序，并实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PerfectDou，一种基于完美信息蒸馏技术的斗地主AI系统，通过结合完美信息训练与不完美信息执行框架，在多玩家卡牌游戏中实现领先性能。
AI.motivation: 斗地主作为不完美信息博弈的典型场景，现有AI在竞争与协作策略上存在局限，需探索更有效的训练框架以提升决策能力。
AI.method: 采用Actor-Critic框架，提出完美信息蒸馏技术，通过特征工程区分游戏中的完美与不完美信息，在训练阶段利用全局信息优化策略，实际对战时适应不完美信息环境，并结合PPO与GAE实现并行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明PerfectDou超越所有现有AI程序，在斗地主游戏中达到最先进性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 完美训练-不完美执行框架有效解决了不完美信息博弈中的策略优化问题，为复杂游戏AI开发提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出PerfectDou，一种基于完美信息蒸馏技术的斗地主AI系统，通过结合完美信息训练与不完美信息执行框架，在多玩家卡牌游戏中实现领先性能。

search_text: PerfectDou: Dominating DouDizhu with Perfect Information Distillation PerfectDou：完美信息蒸馏，称霸斗地主 As a challenging multi-player card game, DouDizhu has recently drawn much attention for analyzing competition and collaboration in imperfect-information games. In this paper, we propose PerfectDou, a state-of-the-art DouDizhu AI system that dominates the game, in an actor-critic framework with a proposed technique named perfect information distillation. In detail, we adopt a perfect-training-imperfect-execution framework that allows the agents to utilize the global information to guide the training of the policies as if it is a perfect information game and the trained policies can be used to play the imperfect information game during the actual gameplay. To this end, we characterize card and game features for DouDizhu to represent the perfect and imperfect information. To train our system, we adopt proximal policy optimization with generalized advantage estimation in a parallel training paradigm. In experiments we show how and why PerfectDou beats all existing AI programs, and achieves state-of-the-art performance. 作为一种具有挑战性的多人卡牌游戏，斗地主最近因其分析不完全信息博弈中的竞争与协作而备受关注。在本文中，我们提出了 PerfectDou，这是一种在游戏中占据主导地位的最先进的斗地主人工智能系统，在演员评论家框架中提出了一种名为完美信息蒸馏的技术。具体来说，我们采用完美训练-不完美执行框架，允许代理利用全局信息来指导策略的训练，就好像它是完美信息游戏一样，并且训练后的策略可以在实际游戏过程中用于玩不完美信息游戏。为此，我们为斗地主刻画了卡牌和游戏的特征来表示完美和不完美的信息。为了训练我们的系统，我们在并行训练范例中采用了具有广义优势估计的近端策略优化。在实验中，我们展示了 PerfectDou 如何以及为何击败所有现有的人工智能程序，并实现最先进的性能。 本文提出PerfectDou，一种基于完美信息蒸馏技术的斗地主AI系统，通过结合完美信息训练与不完美信息执行框架，在多玩家卡牌游戏中实现领先性能。 Guan Yang,Minghuan Liu,Weijun Hong,Weinan Zhang,Fei Fang,Guangjun Zeng,Yue Lin cs.AI,cs.GT,cs.LG

authors_text: Jakob Grahn,Filippo Maria Bianchi
title: Recognition of polar lows in Sentinel-1 SAR images with deep learning
title_zh: 利用深度学习识别 Sentinel-1 SAR 图像中的极地低压
abstract: In this paper, we explore the possibility of detecting polar lows in C-band SAR images by means of deep learning. Specifically, we introduce a novel dataset consisting of Sentinel-1 images divided into two classes, representing the presence and absence of a maritime mesocyclone, respectively. The dataset is constructed using the ERA5 dataset as baseline and it consists of 2004 annotated images. To our knowledge, this is the first dataset of its kind to be publicly released. The dataset is used to train a deep learning model to classify the labeled images. Evaluated on an independent test set, the model yields an F-1 score of 0.95, indicating that polar lows can be consistently detected from SAR images. Interpretability techniques applied to the deep learning model reveal that atmospheric fronts and cyclonic eyes are key features in the classification. Moreover, experimental results show that the model is accurate even if: (i) such features are significantly cropped due to the limited swath width of the SAR, (ii) the features are partly covered by sea ice and (iii) land is covering significant parts of the images. By evaluating the model performance on multiple input image resolutions (pixel sizes of 500m, 1km and 2km), it is found that higher resolution yield the best performance. This emphasises the potential of using high resolution sensors like SAR for detecting polar lows, as compared to conventionally used sensors such as scatterometers.
summary: In this paper, we explore the possibility of detecting polar lows in C-band SAR images by means of deep learning. Specifically, we introduce a novel dataset consisting of Sentinel-1 images divided into two classes, representing the presence and absence of a maritime mesocyclone, respectively. The dataset is constructed using the ERA5 dataset as baseline and it consists of 2004 annotated images. To our knowledge, this is the first dataset of its kind to be publicly released. The dataset is used to train a deep learning model to classify the labeled images. Evaluated on an independent test set, the model yields an F-1 score of 0.95, indicating that polar lows can be consistently detected from SAR images. Interpretability techniques applied to the deep learning model reveal that atmospheric fronts and cyclonic eyes are key features in the classification. Moreover, experimental results show that the model is accurate even if: (i) such features are significantly cropped due to the limited swath width of the SAR, (ii) the features are partly covered by sea ice and (iii) land is covering significant parts of the images. By evaluating the model performance on multiple input image resolutions (pixel sizes of 500m, 1km and 2km), it is found that higher resolution yield the best performance. This emphasises the potential of using high resolution sensors like SAR for detecting polar lows, as compared to conventionally used sensors such as scatterometers.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探讨了通过深度学习检测 C 波段 SAR 图像中极地低压的可能性。具体来说，我们引入了一个新颖的数据集，该数据集由 Sentinel-1 图像组成，分为两类，分别代表海上中气旋的存在和不存在。该数据集是使用 ERA5 数据集作为基线构建的，由 2004 个带注释的图像组成。据我们所知，这是第一个公开发布的此类数据集。该数据集用于训练深度学习模型以对标记图像进行分类。在独立测试集上进行评估，该模型的 F-1 得分为 0.95，表明可以从 SAR 图像中一致地检测到极地低压。应用于深度学习模型的可解释性技术表明，大气锋和气旋眼是分类中的关键特征。此外，实验结果表明，即使在以下情况下，该模型也是准确的：(i) 由于 SAR 的幅宽有限，这些特征被显着裁剪；(ii) 这些特征部分被海冰覆盖；(iii) 陆地覆盖了图像的重要部分。通过评估模型在多个输入图像分辨率（像素大小为 500m、1km 和 2km）上的性能，发现较高的分辨率会产生最佳性能。与传统使用的传感器（如散射仪）相比，这强调了使用 SAR 等高分辨率传感器来检测极地低压的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，利用Sentinel-1 SAR图像识别极地低压系统，并构建了首个公开的标注数据集。
AI.motivation: 传统传感器在极地低压检测中存在局限性，而SAR图像具有高分辨率优势，但缺乏专门的标注数据集和有效检测方法。
AI.method: 基于ERA5数据构建包含2004张标注图像的数据集，采用深度学习模型进行分类训练，并通过多分辨率测试验证模型性能。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到0.95的F1分数，能有效识别被海冰覆盖或部分遮挡的极地低压，且高分辨率图像表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 高分辨率SAR传感器相比传统散射计更具极地低压检测潜力，深度学习方法可有效提取大气锋面和气旋眼等关键特征。

authors_text: Yingtian Tang,Jiangtao Liu,Cheng Zhou,Tingguang Li
title: Online Motion Style Transfer for Interactive Character Control
title_zh: 用于交互式角色控制的在线运动风格传输
abstract: Motion style transfer is highly desired for motion generation systems for gaming. Compared to its offline counterpart, the research on online motion style transfer under interactive control is limited. In this work, we propose an end-to-end neural network that can generate motions with different styles and transfer motion styles in real-time under user control. Our approach eliminates the use of handcrafted phase features, and could be easily trained and directly deployed in game systems. In the experiment part, we evaluate our approach from three aspects that are essential for industrial game design: accuracy, flexibility, and variety, and our model performs a satisfying result.
summary: Motion style transfer is highly desired for motion generation systems for gaming. Compared to its offline counterpart, the research on online motion style transfer under interactive control is limited. In this work, we propose an end-to-end neural network that can generate motions with different styles and transfer motion styles in real-time under user control. Our approach eliminates the use of handcrafted phase features, and could be easily trained and directly deployed in game systems. In the experiment part, we evaluate our approach from three aspects that are essential for industrial game design: accuracy, flexibility, and variety, and our model performs a satisfying result.
abstract_zh: 游戏运动生成系统非常需要运动风格转换。与离线相比，交互控制下在线运动风格迁移的研究还很有限。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种端到端的神经网络，它可以生成不同风格的动作，并在用户控制下实时传输动作风格。我们的方法消除了手工制作阶段特征的使用，并且可以轻松训练并直接部署在游戏系统中。在实验部分，我们从工业游戏设计所必需的三个方面评估了我们的方法：准确性、灵活性和多样性，我们的模型取得了令人满意的结果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种端到端神经网络，实现实时交互式角色控制的运动风格迁移
AI.motivation: 现有在线运动风格迁移方法在交互控制场景下存在实时性和灵活性不足的问题，需更高效的解决方案
AI.method: 设计无需手工特征的端到端神经网络架构，支持实时运动风格迁移与用户交互控制
AI.result: 在准确性、灵活性和多样性三个工业关键指标上均取得满意效果，验证方法有效性
AI.conclusion: 该方法为游戏系统提供了可部署的实时运动风格迁移方案，满足交互式角色控制需求

authors_text: Tim Bakker,Matthew Muckley,Adriana Romero-Soriano,Michal Drozdzal,Luis Pineda
title: On learning adaptive acquisition policies for undersampled multi-coil MRI reconstruction
title_zh: 学习欠采样多线圈 MRI 重建的自适应采集策略
comment: Accepted to MIDL 2022 as conference paper
comments: Accepted to MIDL 2022 as conference paper
abstract: Most current approaches to undersampled multi-coil MRI reconstruction focus on learning the reconstruction model for a fixed, equidistant acquisition trajectory. In this paper, we study the problem of joint learning of the reconstruction model together with acquisition policies. To this end, we extend the End-to-End Variational Network with learnable acquisition policies that can adapt to different data points. We validate our model on a coil-compressed version of the large scale undersampled multi-coil fastMRI dataset using two undersampling factors: $4\times$ and $8\times$. Our experiments show on-par performance with the learnable non-adaptive and handcrafted equidistant strategies at $4\times$, and an observed improvement of more than $2\%$ in SSIM at $8\times$ acceleration, suggesting that potentially-adaptive $k$-space acquisition trajectories can improve reconstructed image quality for larger acceleration factors. However, and perhaps surprisingly, our best performing policies learn to be explicitly non-adaptive.
summary: Most current approaches to undersampled multi-coil MRI reconstruction focus on learning the reconstruction model for a fixed, equidistant acquisition trajectory. In this paper, we study the problem of joint learning of the reconstruction model together with acquisition policies. To this end, we extend the End-to-End Variational Network with learnable acquisition policies that can adapt to different data points. We validate our model on a coil-compressed version of the large scale undersampled multi-coil fastMRI dataset using two undersampling factors: $4\times$ and $8\times$. Our experiments show on-par performance with the learnable non-adaptive and handcrafted equidistant strategies at $4\times$, and an observed improvement of more than $2\%$ in SSIM at $8\times$ acceleration, suggesting that potentially-adaptive $k$-space acquisition trajectories can improve reconstructed image quality for larger acceleration factors. However, and perhaps surprisingly, our best performing policies learn to be explicitly non-adaptive.
abstract_zh: 目前大多数欠采样多线圈 MRI 重建方法都侧重于学习固定、等距采集轨迹的重建模型。在本文中，我们研究了重建模型与采集策略的联合学习问题。为此，我们通过可学习的采集策略扩展了端到端变分网络，这些策略可以适应不同的数据点。我们使用两个欠采样因子：$4\times$ 和 $8\times$ 在大规模欠采样多线圈 fastMRI 数据集的线圈压缩版本上验证我们的模型。我们的实验表明，可学习的非自适应和手工制作的等距策略在 $4\times$ 下具有同等性能，并且在 $8\times$ 加速度下观察到 SSIM 的改进超过 $2\%$，这表明潜在自适应 $k$ 空间采集轨迹可以提高较大加速因子的重建图像质量。然而，也许令人惊讶的是，我们表现最好的政策显然是不具有适应性的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在欠采样多线圈MRI重建中联合学习重建模型与自适应采集策略的方法，旨在通过可学习的采集策略提升图像重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常采用固定且等距的采集轨迹，难以适应不同数据特性，导致在高加速因子下重建质量下降，需探索自适应策略以优化性能。
AI.method: 扩展端到端变分网络，引入可学习的采集策略模块，结合大规模欠采样数据集进行联合训练，并在4×和8×加速因子下验证模型效果。
AI.result: 在4×加速因子下性能与非自适应方法相当，8×加速因子下SSIM提升超2%，但最佳策略意外地表现为非自适应模式。
AI.conclusion: 自适应采集策略在高加速因子下可能提升图像质量，但实际最优策略仍需根据数据特性权衡适应性与稳定性。

search_text: On learning adaptive acquisition policies for undersampled multi-coil MRI reconstruction 学习欠采样多线圈 MRI 重建的自适应采集策略 Most current approaches to undersampled multi-coil MRI reconstruction focus on learning the reconstruction model for a fixed, equidistant acquisition trajectory. In this paper, we study the problem of joint learning of the reconstruction model together with acquisition policies. To this end, we extend the End-to-End Variational Network with learnable acquisition policies that can adapt to different data points. We validate our model on a coil-compressed version of the large scale undersampled multi-coil fastMRI dataset using two undersampling factors: $4\times$ and $8\times$. Our experiments show on-par performance with the learnable non-adaptive and handcrafted equidistant strategies at $4\times$, and an observed improvement of more than $2\%$ in SSIM at $8\times$ acceleration, suggesting that potentially-adaptive $k$-space acquisition trajectories can improve reconstructed image quality for larger acceleration factors. However, and perhaps surprisingly, our best performing policies learn to be explicitly non-adaptive. 目前大多数欠采样多线圈 MRI 重建方法都侧重于学习固定、等距采集轨迹的重建模型。在本文中，我们研究了重建模型与采集策略的联合学习问题。为此，我们通过可学习的采集策略扩展了端到端变分网络，这些策略可以适应不同的数据点。我们使用两个欠采样因子：$4\times$ 和 $8\times$ 在大规模欠采样多线圈 fastMRI 数据集的线圈压缩版本上验证我们的模型。我们的实验表明，可学习的非自适应和手工制作的等距策略在 $4\times$ 下具有同等性能，并且在 $8\times$ 加速度下观察到 SSIM 的改进超过 $2\%$，这表明潜在自适应 $k$ 空间采集轨迹可以提高较大加速因子的重建图像质量。然而，也许令人惊讶的是，我们表现最好的政策显然是不具有适应性的。 本文研究了在欠采样多线圈MRI重建中联合学习重建模型与自适应采集策略的方法，旨在通过可学习的采集策略提升图像重建质量。 Tim Bakker,Matthew Muckley,Adriana Romero-Soriano,Michal Drozdzal,Luis Pineda eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Weizheng Wang,Marco Zuniga,Qing Wang
title: CardioID: Mitigating the Effects of Irregular Cardiac Signals for Biometric Identification
title_zh: CardioID：减轻不规则心脏信号对生物特征识别的影响
abstract: Cardiac patterns are being used to obtain hard-to-forge biometric signatures and have led to high accuracy in state-of-the-art (SoA) identification applications. However, this performance is obtained under controlled scenarios where cardiac signals maintain a relatively uniform pattern, facilitating the identification process. In this work, we analyze cardiac signals collected in more realistic (uncontrolled) scenarios and show that their high signal variability (i.e., irregularity) makes it harder to obtain stable and distinct user features. Furthermore, SoA usually fails to identify specific groups of users, rendering existing identification methods futile in uncontrolled scenarios. To solve these problems, we propose a framework with three novel properties. First, we design an adaptive method that achieves stable and distinct features by tailoring the filtering spectrum to each user. Second, we show that users can have multiple cardiac morphologies, offering us a much bigger pool of cardiac signals and users compared to SoA. Third, we overcome other distortion effects present in authentication applications with a multi-cluster approach and the Mahalanobis distance. Our evaluation shows that the average balanced accuracy (BAC) of SoA drops from above 90% in controlled scenarios to 75% in uncontrolled ones, while our method maintains an average BAC above 90% in uncontrolled scenarios.
summary: Cardiac patterns are being used to obtain hard-to-forge biometric signatures and have led to high accuracy in state-of-the-art (SoA) identification applications. However, this performance is obtained under controlled scenarios where cardiac signals maintain a relatively uniform pattern, facilitating the identification process. In this work, we analyze cardiac signals collected in more realistic (uncontrolled) scenarios and show that their high signal variability (i.e., irregularity) makes it harder to obtain stable and distinct user features. Furthermore, SoA usually fails to identify specific groups of users, rendering existing identification methods futile in uncontrolled scenarios. To solve these problems, we propose a framework with three novel properties. First, we design an adaptive method that achieves stable and distinct features by tailoring the filtering spectrum to each user. Second, we show that users can have multiple cardiac morphologies, offering us a much bigger pool of cardiac signals and users compared to SoA. Third, we overcome other distortion effects present in authentication applications with a multi-cluster approach and the Mahalanobis distance. Our evaluation shows that the average balanced accuracy (BAC) of SoA drops from above 90% in controlled scenarios to 75% in uncontrolled ones, while our method maintains an average BAC above 90% in uncontrolled scenarios.
abstract_zh: 心脏模式被用来获取难以伪造的生物特征签名，并在最先进的 (SoA) 识别应用中实现了高精度。然而，这种性能是在受控场景下获得的，其中心脏信号保持相对均匀的模式，从而促进识别过程。在这项工作中，我们分析了在更现实（不受控制）的场景中收集的心脏信号，并表明它们的高信号变异性（即不规则性）使得获得稳定和独特的用户特征变得更加困难。此外，SoA通常无法识别特定的用户组，使得现有的识别方法在不受控制的场景中毫无用处。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个具有三个新颖特性的框架。首先，我们设计了一种自适应方法，通过为每个用户定制过滤频谱来实现稳定且独特的特征。其次，我们证明用户可以拥有多种心脏形态，与 SoA 相比，为我们提供了更大的心脏信号和用户池。第三，我们通过多集群方法和马哈拉诺比斯距离克服了身份验证应用中存在的其他失真效应。我们的评估表明，SoA 的平均平衡精度 (BAC) 从受控场景下的 90% 以上下降到非受控场景下的 75%，而我们的方法在非受控场景下保持平均 BAC 在 90% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CardioID的框架，用于在非受控环境中通过心脏信号进行生物特征识别。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在非受控场景下由于心脏信号的不规则性，导致识别性能下降，无法稳定识别特定用户群体。
AI.method: 设计了一种自适应方法，通过为每个用户定制滤波器频谱来提取稳定且独特的特征；同时利用多聚类方法和马氏距离克服其他失真影响。
AI.result: 在非受控场景下，现有方法的平均平衡准确率（BAC）从90%以上降至75%，而本文方法保持平均BAC在90%以上。
AI.conclusion: CardioID框架有效缓解了非受控环境中心脏信号不规则性带来的影响，提高了生物特征识别的稳定性和准确性。

However, this performance is obtained under controlled scenarios where cardiac signals maintain a relatively uniform pattern, facilitating the identification process. First, we design an adaptive method that achieves stable and distinct features by tailoring the filtering spectrum to each user. authors_text: Jan Wohlwender,Rolf Huesmann,Andreas Heinemann,Alexander Wiesmaier
title: $crypto_{lib}$: Comparing and selecting cryptography libraries (long version of EICC 2022 publication)
title_zh: $crypto_{lib}$：比较和选择密码学库（EICC 2022 出版物的长版）
comment: 12 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables, the long version of EICC 2022 publication
comments: 12 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables, the long version of EICC 2022 publication
abstract: Selecting a library out of numerous candidates can be a laborious and resource-intensive task. We present the $crypto_{lib}$ index, a tool for decision-makers to choose the best fitting cryptography library for a given context. To define our index, 15 library attributes were synthesized from findings based on a literature review and interviews with decision-makers. These attributes were afterwards validated and weighted via an online survey. In order to create the index value for a given library, the individual attributes are assessed using given evaluation criteria associated with the respective attribute. As a proof of concept and to give a practical usage example, the derivation of the $crypto_{lib}$ values for the libraries Bouncy Castle and Tink are shown in detail. Overall, by tailoring the weighting of the $crypto_{lib}$ attributes to their current use case, decision-makers are enabled to systematically select a cryptography library fitting best to their software project at hand in a guided, repeatable and reliable way.
summary: Selecting a library out of numerous candidates can be a laborious and resource-intensive task. We present the $crypto_{lib}$ index, a tool for decision-makers to choose the best fitting cryptography library for a given context. To define our index, 15 library attributes were synthesized from findings based on a literature review and interviews with decision-makers. These attributes were afterwards validated and weighted via an online survey. In order to create the index value for a given library, the individual attributes are assessed using given evaluation criteria associated with the respective attribute. As a proof of concept and to give a practical usage example, the derivation of the $crypto_{lib}$ values for the libraries Bouncy Castle and Tink are shown in detail. Overall, by tailoring the weighting of the $crypto_{lib}$ attributes to their current use case, decision-makers are enabled to systematically select a cryptography library fitting best to their software project at hand in a guided, repeatable and reliable way.
abstract_zh: 从众多候选库中选择一个库可能是一项费力且占用资源的任务。我们提出了 $crypto_{lib}$ 索引，它是决策者为给定上下文选择最合适的密码库的工具。为了定义我们的指数，我们根据文献综述和决策者访谈的结果综合了 15 个图书馆属性。这些属性随后通过在线调查进行验证和加权。为了创建给定图书馆的索引值，使用与相应属性相关联的给定评估标准来评估各个属性。作为概念证明并给出实际使用示例，详细显示了 Bouncy Castle 和 Tink 库的 $crypto_{lib}$ 值的推导。总体而言，通过根据当前用例调整 $crypto_{lib}$ 属性的权重，决策者能够以引导、可重复且可靠的方式系统地选择最适合其手头软件项目的密码库。

AI.tldr: 提出了一个名为 crypto_lib 的索引工具，帮助决策者根据具体上下文选择最合适的密码学库。
AI.motivation: 从众多候选库中选择合适的密码学库是一项耗时且资源密集的任务，缺乏系统化、可重复的选型方法。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和决策者访谈综合出15个库属性，经在线调查验证并赋予权重，再根据各属性的评估标准计算索引值，从而比较不同密码学库。
AI.result: 以 Bouncy Castle 和 Tink 为例详细展示了 crypto_lib 值的推导过程，验证了该工具的实际可用性。
AI.conclusion: 决策者可通过调整属性权重来适配当前用例，从而以引导式、可重复、可靠的方式系统性地选择最适合其软件项目的密码学库。

ai_content.tldr: 提出了一个名为 crypto_lib 的索引工具，帮助决策者根据具体上下文选择最合适的密码学库。
ai_content.motivation: 从众多候选库中选择合适的密码学库是一项耗时且资源密集的任务，缺乏系统化、可重复的选型方法。
ai_content.method: 通过文献综述和决策者访谈综合出15个库属性，经在线调查验证并赋予权重，再根据各属性的评估标准计算索引值，从而比较不同密码学库。
ai_content.result: 以 Bouncy Castle 和 Tink 为例详细展示了 crypto_lib 值的推导过程，验证了该工具的实际可用性。
ai_content.conclusion: 决策者可通过调整属性权重来适配当前用例，从而以引导式、可重复、可靠的方式系统性地选择最适合其软件项目的密码学库。

search_text: $crypto_{lib}$: Comparing and selecting cryptography libraries (long version of EICC 2022 publication) $crypto_{lib}$：比较和选择密码学库（EICC 2022 出版物的长版） Selecting a library out of numerous candidates can be a laborious and resource-intensive task. We present the $crypto_{lib}$ index, a tool for decision-makers to choose the best fitting cryptography library for a given context. To define our index, 15 library attributes were synthesized from findings based on a literature review and interviews with decision-makers. These attributes were afterwards validated and weighted via an online survey. In order to create the index value for a given library, the individual attributes are assessed using given evaluation criteria associated with the respective attribute. As a proof of concept and to give a practical usage example, the derivation of the $crypto_{lib}$ values for the libraries Bouncy Castle and Tink are shown in detail. Overall, by tailoring the weighting of the $crypto_{lib}$ attributes to their current use case, decision-makers are enabled to systematically select a cryptography library fitting best to their software project at hand in a guided, repeatable and reliable way. 从众多候选库中选择一个库可能是一项费力且占用资源的任务。我们提出了 $crypto_{lib}$ 索引，它是决策者为给定上下文选择最合适的密码库的工具。为了定义我们的指数，我们根据文献综述和决策者访谈的结果综合了 15 个图书馆属性。这些属性随后通过在线调查进行验证和加权。为了创建给定图书馆的索引值，使用与相应属性相关联的给定评估标准来评估各个属性。作为概念证明并给出实际使用示例，详细显示了 Bouncy Castle 和 Tink 库的 $crypto_{lib}$ 值的推导。总体而言，通过根据当前用例调整 $crypto_{lib}$ 属性的权重，决策者能够以引导、可重复且可靠的方式系统地选择最适合其手头软件项目的密码库。 提出了一个名为 crypto_lib 的索引工具，帮助决策者根据具体上下文选择最合适的密码学库。 Jan Wohlwender,Rolf Huesmann,Andreas Heinemann,Alexander Wiesmaier cs.CR,cs.HC

authors_text: Kai Zhang,Kun Zhang,Mengdi Zhang,Hongke Zhao,Qi Liu,Wei Wu,Enhong Chen
title: Incorporating Dynamic Semantics into Pre-Trained Language Model for Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 将动态语义纳入预先训练的语言模型中，以进行基于方面的情感分析
abstract: Aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA) predicts sentiment polarity towards a specific aspect in the given sentence. While pre-trained language models such as BERT have achieved great success, incorporating dynamic semantic changes into ABSA remains challenging. To this end, in this paper, we propose to address this problem by Dynamic Re-weighting BERT (DR-BERT), a novel method designed to learn dynamic aspect-oriented semantics for ABSA. Specifically, we first take the Stack-BERT layers as a primary encoder to grasp the overall semantic of the sentence and then fine-tune it by incorporating a lightweight Dynamic Re-weighting Adapter (DRA). Note that the DRA can pay close attention to a small region of the sentences at each step and re-weigh the vitally important words for better aspect-aware sentiment understanding. Finally, experimental results on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and the rationality of our proposed model and provide good interpretable insights for future semantic modeling.
summary: Aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA) predicts sentiment polarity towards a specific aspect in the given sentence. While pre-trained language models such as BERT have achieved great success, incorporating dynamic semantic changes into ABSA remains challenging. To this end, in this paper, we propose to address this problem by Dynamic Re-weighting BERT (DR-BERT), a novel method designed to learn dynamic aspect-oriented semantics for ABSA. Specifically, we first take the Stack-BERT layers as a primary encoder to grasp the overall semantic of the sentence and then fine-tune it by incorporating a lightweight Dynamic Re-weighting Adapter (DRA). Note that the DRA can pay close attention to a small region of the sentences at each step and re-weigh the vitally important words for better aspect-aware sentiment understanding. Finally, experimental results on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and the rationality of our proposed model and provide good interpretable insights for future semantic modeling.
abstract_zh: 基于方面的情感分析 (ABSA) 可预测给定句子中特定方面的情感极性。虽然 BERT 等预训练语言模型取得了巨大成功，但将动态语义变化纳入 ABSA 仍然具有挑战性。为此，在本文中，我们建议通过动态重新加权 BERT（DR-BERT）来解决这个问题，这是一种旨在学习 ABSA 动态面向方面语义的新方法。具体来说，我们首先将 Stack-BERT 层作为主要编码器来掌握句子的整体语义，然后通过结合轻量级动态重新加权适配器（DRA）对其进行微调。请注意，DRA 可以在每一步密切关注句子的一小部分区域，并重新权衡至关重要的单词，以更好地理解方面感知的情感。最后，三个基准数据集的实验结果证明了我们提出的模型的有效性和合理性，并为未来的语义建模提供了良好的可解释见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合动态语义的预训练语言模型（DR-BERT），用于改进面向方面的细粒度情感分析（ABSA）任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练模型（如BERT）在ABSA中表现优异，但如何捕捉句子中动态变化的语义以提升对特定方面的情感理解仍存在挑战。
AI.method: 通过Stack-BERT作为主编码器获取整体语义，并引入轻量级动态重加权适配器（DRA），在每一步聚焦关键语义区域并重新加权重要词汇以增强方面感知能力。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验验证了DR-BERT的有效性，展现了模型的合理性和良好的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 动态重加权机制能够有效提升ABSA性能，为未来语义建模提供了可解释的改进方向。

authors_text: Yang Xiao,Nana Hou,Eng Siong Chng
title: Rainbow Keywords: Efficient Incremental Learning for Online Spoken Keyword Spotting
title_zh: Rainbow Keywords：在线口语关键词识别的高效增量学习
abstract: Catastrophic forgetting is a thorny challenge when updating keyword spotting (KWS) models after deployment. This problem will be more challenging if KWS models are further required for edge devices due to their limited memory. To alleviate such an issue, we propose a novel diversity-aware incremental learning method named Rainbow Keywords (RK). Specifically, the proposed RK approach introduces a diversity-aware sampler to select a diverse set from historical and incoming keywords by calculating classification uncertainty. As a result, the RK approach can incrementally learn new tasks without forgetting prior knowledge. Besides, the RK approach also proposes data augmentation and knowledge distillation loss function for efficient memory management on the edge device. Experimental results show that the proposed RK approach achieves 4.2% absolute improvement in terms of average accuracy over the best baseline on Google Speech Command dataset with less required memory. The scripts are available on GitHub.
summary: Catastrophic forgetting is a thorny challenge when updating keyword spotting (KWS) models after deployment. This problem will be more challenging if KWS models are further required for edge devices due to their limited memory. To alleviate such an issue, we propose a novel diversity-aware incremental learning method named Rainbow Keywords (RK). Specifically, the proposed RK approach introduces a diversity-aware sampler to select a diverse set from historical and incoming keywords by calculating classification uncertainty. As a result, the RK approach can incrementally learn new tasks without forgetting prior knowledge. Besides, the RK approach also proposes data augmentation and knowledge distillation loss function for efficient memory management on the edge device. Experimental results show that the proposed RK approach achieves 4.2% absolute improvement in terms of average accuracy over the best baseline on Google Speech Command dataset with less required memory. The scripts are available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 在部署后更新关键字识别 (KWS) 模型时，灾难性遗忘是一个棘手的挑战。如果边缘设备由于内存有限而进一步需要 KWS 模型，那么这个问题将更具挑战性。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多样性感知增量学习方法，称为彩虹关键词（RK）。具体来说，所提出的 RK 方法引入了多样性感知采样器，通过计算分类不确定性从历史和传入关键词中选择不同的集合。因此，RK 方法可以增量学习新任务，而不会忘记先验知识。此外，RK方法还提出了数据增强和知识蒸馏损失函数，以实现边缘设备上的高效内存管理。实验结果表明，与 Google Speech Command 数据集上的最佳基线相比，所提出的 RK 方法在平均准确度方面实现了 4.2% 的绝对改进，且所需内存更少。这些脚本可在 GitHub 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Rainbow Keywords (RK)的增量学习方法，用于解决在线语音关键词检测（KWS）模型部署后更新时的灾难性遗忘问题，尤其针对边缘设备的内存限制。
AI.motivation: KWS模型在部署后更新时容易出现灾难性遗忘，而边缘设备的内存限制使这一问题更加严峻。现有方法难以在有限内存下高效平衡新旧知识的学习。
AI.method: RK方法通过多样性感知采样器，基于分类不确定性选择历史和新关键词的多样化样本集。结合数据增强和知识蒸馏损失函数，实现高效内存管理下的增量学习。
AI.result: 在Google Speech Command数据集上，RK方法在保持更少内存消耗的情况下，平均准确率较最佳基线提升了4.2%。
AI.conclusion: RK通过多样性感知采样与内存优化技术，有效缓解了KWS模型的灾难性遗忘问题，为边缘设备的在线增量学习提供了可行方案。

Besides, the RK approach also proposes data augmentation and knowledge distillation loss function for efficient memory management on the edge device. Experimental results show that the proposed RK approach achieves 4.2% absolute improvement in terms of average accuracy over the best baseline on Google Speech Command dataset with less required memory. The scripts are available on GitHub. 在部署后更新关键字识别 (KWS) 模型时，灾难性遗忘是一个棘手的挑战。如果边缘设备由于内存有限而进一步需要 KWS 模型，那么这个问题将更具挑战性。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多样性感知增量学习方法，称为彩虹关键词（RK）。具体来说，所提出的 RK 方法引入了多样性感知采样器，通过计算分类不确定性从历史和传入关键词中选择不同的集合。因此，RK 方法可以增量学习新任务，而不会忘记先验知识。此外，RK方法还提出了数据增强和知识蒸馏损失函数，以实现边缘设备上的高效内存管理。实验结果表明，与 Google Speech Command 数据集上的最佳基线相比，所提出的 RK 方法在平均准确度方面实现了 4.2% 的绝对改进，且所需内存更少。这些脚本可在 GitHub 上获取。 本文提出了一种名为Rainbow Keywords (RK)的增量学习方法，用于解决在线语音关键词检测（KWS）模型部署后更新时的灾难性遗忘问题，尤其针对边缘设备的内存限制。 Yang Xiao,Nana Hou,Eng Siong Chng cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Lina Guo,Xinjie Shi,Dailan He,Yuanyuan Wang,Rui Ma,Hongwei Qin,Yan Wang
title: Practical Learned Lossless JPEG Recompression with Multi-Level Cross-Channel Entropy Model in the DCT Domain
title_zh: DCT 域中多级跨通道熵模型的实用学习无损 JPEG 再压缩
abstract: JPEG is a popular image compression method widely used by individuals, data center, cloud storage and network filesystems. However, most recent progress on image compression mainly focuses on uncompressed images while ignoring trillions of already-existing JPEG images. To compress these JPEG images adequately and restore them back to JPEG format losslessly when needed, we propose a deep learning based JPEG recompression method that operates on DCT domain and propose a Multi-Level Cross-Channel Entropy Model to compress the most informative Y component. Experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance compared with traditional JPEG recompression methods including Lepton, JPEG XL and CMIX. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first learned compression method that losslessly transcodes JPEG images to more storage-saving bitstreams.
summary: JPEG is a popular image compression method widely used by individuals, data center, cloud storage and network filesystems. However, most recent progress on image compression mainly focuses on uncompressed images while ignoring trillions of already-existing JPEG images. To compress these JPEG images adequately and restore them back to JPEG format losslessly when needed, we propose a deep learning based JPEG recompression method that operates on DCT domain and propose a Multi-Level Cross-Channel Entropy Model to compress the most informative Y component. Experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance compared with traditional JPEG recompression methods including Lepton, JPEG XL and CMIX. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first learned compression method that losslessly transcodes JPEG images to more storage-saving bitstreams.
abstract_zh: JPEG 是一种流行的图像压缩方法，被个人、数据中心、云存储和网络文件系统广泛使用。然而，图像压缩方面的最新进展主要集中在未压缩图像上，而忽略了数万亿已存在的 JPEG 图像。为了充分压缩这些 JPEG 图像并在需要时将它们无损地恢复为 JPEG 格式，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的 JPEG 再压缩方法，该方法在 DCT 域上运行，并提出了一种多级跨通道熵模型来压缩信息最丰富的 Y 分量。实验表明，与 Lepton、JPEG XL 和 CMIX 等传统 JPEG 再压缩方法相比，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。据我们所知，这是第一个学习的压缩方法，可以将 JPEG 图像无损转码为更节省存储空间的比特流。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的JPEG无损重压缩方法，通过DCT域中的多级跨通道熵模型实现更高效的存储。
AI.motivation: 现有图像压缩研究多针对未压缩图像，忽视了海量已存在的JPEG图像的优化需求，需开发无损重压缩技术以节省存储空间。
AI.method: 在DCT域设计多级跨通道熵模型，聚焦Y通道信息压缩，利用深度学习实现JPEG图像到更高效比特流的无损转码。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在存储效率上优于Lepton、JPEG XL和CMIX等传统JPEG重压缩方法，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出基于学习的JPEG无损转码方法，在保持图像质量的同时显著提升存储效率，为已有JPEG图像优化提供新方案。

authors_text: Erik Wallin,Viktor Wiberg,Folke Vesterlund,Johan Holmgren,Henrik Persson,Martin Servin
title: Learning multiobjective rough terrain traversability
title_zh: 学习多目标崎岖地形的可穿越性
abstract: We present a method that uses high-resolution topography data of rough terrain, and ground vehicle simulation, to predict traversability. Traversability is expressed as three independent measures: the ability to traverse the terrain at a target speed, energy consumption, and acceleration. The measures are continuous and reflect different objectives for planning that go beyond binary classification. A deep neural network is trained to predict the traversability measures from the local heightmap and target speed. To produce training data, we use an articulated vehicle with wheeled bogie suspensions and procedurally generated terrains. We evaluate the model on laser-scanned forest terrains, previously unseen by the model. The model predicts traversability with an accuracy of 90%. Predictions rely on features from the high-dimensional terrain data that surpass local roughness and slope relative to the heading. Correlations show that the three traversability measures are complementary to each other. With an inference speed 3000 times faster than the ground truth simulation and trivially parallelizable, the model is well suited for traversability analysis and optimal path planning over large areas.
summary: We present a method that uses high-resolution topography data of rough terrain, and ground vehicle simulation, to predict traversability. Traversability is expressed as three independent measures: the ability to traverse the terrain at a target speed, energy consumption, and acceleration. The measures are continuous and reflect different objectives for planning that go beyond binary classification. A deep neural network is trained to predict the traversability measures from the local heightmap and target speed. To produce training data, we use an articulated vehicle with wheeled bogie suspensions and procedurally generated terrains. We evaluate the model on laser-scanned forest terrains, previously unseen by the model. The model predicts traversability with an accuracy of 90%. Predictions rely on features from the high-dimensional terrain data that surpass local roughness and slope relative to the heading. Correlations show that the three traversability measures are complementary to each other. With an inference speed 3000 times faster than the ground truth simulation and trivially parallelizable, the model is well suited for traversability analysis and optimal path planning over large areas.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用崎岖地形的高分辨率地形数据和地面车辆模拟来预测可通行性的方法。可穿越性用三个独立的指标来表示：以目标速度穿越地形的能力、能量消耗和加速度。这些措施是连续的，反映了超越二元分类的不同规划目标。深度神经网络经过训练，可以根据局部高度图和目标速度来预测可穿越性测量。为了生成训练数据，我们使用带有轮式转向架悬架和程序生成地形的铰接式车辆。我们在激光扫描的森林地形上评估了该模型，这是该模型以前未见过的。该模型预测可通行性的准确度为 90%。预测依赖于高维地形数据的特征，这些特征超越了相对于航向的局部粗糙度和坡度。相关性表明，三种可通行性度量是相互补充的。该模型的推理速度比地面实况模拟快 3000 倍，并且可轻松并行化，非常适合大面积的可遍历性分析和最佳路径规划。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种基于高分辨率地形数据和车辆模拟的深度学习方法，用于预测粗糙地形的多目标可穿越性。
AI.motivation: 传统二元分类方法无法满足复杂地形规划需求，需考虑速度、能耗和加速度等多维度指标以支持更优路径规划。
AI.method: 构建深度神经网络，输入局部高度图和目标速度，输出三个连续可穿越性指标；通过轮式悬挂车辆仿真生成训练数据。
AI.result: 模型在未见激光扫描森林地形数据上达到90%准确率，推理速度较仿真快3000倍且支持并行计算。
AI.conclusion: 该模型能有效提取高维地形特征，互补的多目标指标可提升大范围地形分析与路径规划效率。

authors_text: Ezana N. Beyenne,Hai-Feng Guo
title: Enhanced Spreadsheet Computing with Finite-Domain Constraint Satisfaction
title_zh: 具有有限域约束满足的增强电子表格计算
abstract: The spreadsheet application is among the most widely used computing tools in modern society. It provides excellent usability and usefulness, and it easily enables a non-programmer to perform programming-like tasks in a visual tabular "pen and paper" approach. However, spreadsheets are mostly limited to bookkeeping-like applications due to their mono-directional data flow. This paper shows how the spreadsheet computing paradigm is extended to break this limitation for solving constraint satisfaction problems. We present an enhanced spreadsheet system where finite-domain constraint solving is well supported in a visual environment. Furthermore, a spreadsheet-specific constraint language is constructed for general users to specify constraints among data cells in a declarative and scalable way. The new spreadsheet system significantly simplifies the development of many constraint-based applications using a visual tabular interface. Examples are given to illustrate the usability and usefulness of the extended spreadsheet paradigm. KEYWORDS: Spreadsheet computing, Finite-domain constraint satisfaction, Constraint logic programming
summary: The spreadsheet application is among the most widely used computing tools in modern society. It provides excellent usability and usefulness, and it easily enables a non-programmer to perform programming-like tasks in a visual tabular "pen and paper" approach. However, spreadsheets are mostly limited to bookkeeping-like applications due to their mono-directional data flow. This paper shows how the spreadsheet computing paradigm is extended to break this limitation for solving constraint satisfaction problems. We present an enhanced spreadsheet system where finite-domain constraint solving is well supported in a visual environment. Furthermore, a spreadsheet-specific constraint language is constructed for general users to specify constraints among data cells in a declarative and scalable way. The new spreadsheet system significantly simplifies the development of many constraint-based applications using a visual tabular interface. Examples are given to illustrate the usability and usefulness of the extended spreadsheet paradigm. KEYWORDS: Spreadsheet computing, Finite-domain constraint satisfaction, Constraint logic programming
abstract_zh: 电子表格应用程序是现代社会中使用最广泛的计算工具之一。它提供了出色的可用性和实用性，并且可以轻松地使非程序员能够以可视化表格“笔和纸”方法执行类似编程的任务。然而，由于其单向数据流，电子表格大多仅限于类似簿记的应用程序。本文展示了如何扩展电子表格计算范式以打破解决约束满足问题的限制。我们提出了一个增强的电子表格系统，其中有限域约束求解在视觉环境中得到了很好的支持。此外，为普通用户构建了电子表格特定的约束语言，以声明性和可扩展的方式指定数据单元格之间的约束。新的电子表格系统使用可视表格界面显着简化了许多基于约束的应用程序的开发。给出的例子说明了扩展电子表格范式的可用性和实用性。关键词: 电子表格计算, 有限域约束满足, 约束逻辑编程

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强的电子表格计算方法，通过引入有限域约束满足技术，扩展电子表格解决约束满足问题的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统电子表格因单向数据流限制，难以处理复杂的约束满足问题，限制了其在更广泛应用场景中的使用。
AI.method: 构建支持有限域约束求解的增强型电子表格系统，并设计一种面向用户的声明式约束语言，以可视化方式定义数据单元格间的约束关系。
AI.result: 新系统通过可视化表格界面显著简化了基于约束的应用开发，示例验证了扩展后电子表格范式的实用性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过将约束逻辑编程与电子表格结合，为非专业用户提供了更强大的可视化约束求解工具，拓展了电子表格的应用边界。

search_text: Enhanced Spreadsheet Computing with Finite-Domain Constraint Satisfaction 具有有限域约束满足的增强电子表格计算 The spreadsheet application is among the most widely used computing tools in modern society. It provides excellent usability and usefulness, and it easily enables a non-programmer to perform programming-like tasks in a visual tabular "pen and paper" approach. However, spreadsheets are mostly limited to bookkeeping-like applications due to their mono-directional data flow. This paper shows how the spreadsheet computing paradigm is extended to break this limitation for solving constraint satisfaction problems. We present an enhanced spreadsheet system where finite-domain constraint solving is well supported in a visual environment. Furthermore, a spreadsheet-specific constraint language is constructed for general users to specify constraints among data cells in a declarative and scalable way. The new spreadsheet system significantly simplifies the development of many constraint-based applications using a visual tabular interface. Examples are given to illustrate the usability and usefulness of the extended spreadsheet paradigm. KEYWORDS: Spreadsheet computing, Finite-domain constraint satisfaction, Constraint logic programming 电子表格应用程序是现代社会中使用最广泛的计算工具之一。它提供了出色的可用性和实用性，并且可以轻松地使非程序员能够以可视化表格“笔和纸”方法执行类似编程的任务。然而，由于其单向数据流，电子表格大多仅限于类似簿记的应用程序。本文展示了如何扩展电子表格计算范式以打破解决约束满足问题的限制。我们提出了一个增强的电子表格系统，其中有限域约束求解在视觉环境中得到了很好的支持。此外，为普通用户构建了电子表格特定的约束语言，以声明性和可扩展的方式指定数据单元格之间的约束。新的电子表格系统使用可视表格界面显着简化了许多基于约束的应用程序的开发。给出的例子说明了扩展电子表格范式的可用性和实用性。关键词: 电子表格计算, 有限域约束满足, 约束逻辑编程 本文提出了一种增强的电子表格计算方法，通过引入有限域约束满足技术，扩展电子表格解决约束满足问题的能力。 Ezana N. Beyenne,Hai-Feng Guo cs.PL,cs.AI

authors_text: Tianning Zhang,Tianqi Chen,Erping Li,Bo Yang,L. K. Ang
title: Stack operation of tensor networks
title_zh: 张量网络的堆栈运算
comment: 9 pages, 10 figures, close to the online published version, for the code on Github, see this https://github.com/veya2ztn/Stack_of_Tensor_Network
comments: 9 pages, 10 figures, close to the online published version, for the code on Github, see this https://github.com/veya2ztn/Stack_of_Tensor_Network
abstract: The tensor network, as a facterization of tensors, aims at performing the operations that are common for normal tensors, such as addition, contraction and stacking. However, due to its non-unique network structure, only the tensor network contraction is so far well defined. In this paper, we propose a mathematically rigorous definition for the tensor network stack approach, that compress a large amount of tensor networks into a single one without changing their structures and configurations. We illustrate the main ideas with the matrix product states based machine learning as an example. Our results are compared with the for loop and the efficient coding method on both CPU and GPU.
summary: The tensor network, as a facterization of tensors, aims at performing the operations that are common for normal tensors, such as addition, contraction and stacking. However, due to its non-unique network structure, only the tensor network contraction is so far well defined. In this paper, we propose a mathematically rigorous definition for the tensor network stack approach, that compress a large amount of tensor networks into a single one without changing their structures and configurations. We illustrate the main ideas with the matrix product states based machine learning as an example. Our results are compared with the for loop and the efficient coding method on both CPU and GPU.
abstract_zh: 张量网络作为张量的分解，旨在执行普通张量常见的操作，例如加法、收缩和堆叠。然而，由于其非独特的网络结构，迄今为止只有张量网络收缩得到了明确的定义。在本文中，我们为张量网络堆栈方法提出了一种严格的数学定义，该方法将大量张量网络压缩为单个张量网络，而不改变其结构和配置。我们以基于矩阵乘积状态的机器学习为例来说明主要思想。我们的结果与 for 循环以及 CPU 和 GPU 上的高效编码方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数学上严谨的张量网络堆叠方法，将多个张量网络压缩为单一网络而不改变其结构和配置，并通过矩阵乘积状态机器学习示例验证了该方法的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有张量网络堆叠操作缺乏严格定义，导致处理大规模网络时效率低下且难以保持结构完整性，需建立统一数学框架以提升计算效率。
AI.method: 通过构建数学定义实现张量网络堆叠，利用矩阵乘积状态（MPS）作为案例，对比for循环和高效编码方法在CPU/GPU上的性能表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法在保持网络结构的前提下，显著优于传统for循环和现有编码方法，在CPU和GPU上均展现出更高的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文为张量网络堆叠操作提供了理论定义和实践方案，为大规模张量网络的高效处理及机器学习应用奠定了基础。

authors_text: Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Olga Brotons-Rufes,Carles Paul-Recarens,Réjean Plamondon
title: On handwriting pressure normalization for interoperability of different acquisition stylus
title_zh: 不同采集笔互操作性的手写压力标准化
comment: 11 pages, published in IEEE Access, vol. 9, pp. 18443-18453, 2021
comments: 11 pages, published in IEEE Access, vol. 9, pp. 18443-18453, 2021
abstract: In this paper, we present a pressure characterization and normalization procedure for online handwritten acquisition. Normalization process has been tested in biometric recognition experiments (identification and verification) using online signature database MCYT, which consists of the signatures from 330 users. The goal is to analyze the real mismatch scenarios where users are enrolled with one stylus and then, later on, they produce some testing samples using a different stylus model with different pressure response. Experimental results show: 1) a saturation behavior in pressure signal 2) different dynamic ranges in the different stylus studied 3) improved biometric recognition accuracy by means of pressure signal normalization as well as a performance degradation in mismatched conditions 4) interoperability between different stylus can be obtained by means of pressure normalization. Normalization produces an improvement in signature identification rates higher than 7% (absolute value) when compared with mismatched scenarios.
summary: In this paper, we present a pressure characterization and normalization procedure for online handwritten acquisition. Normalization process has been tested in biometric recognition experiments (identification and verification) using online signature database MCYT, which consists of the signatures from 330 users. The goal is to analyze the real mismatch scenarios where users are enrolled with one stylus and then, later on, they produce some testing samples using a different stylus model with different pressure response. Experimental results show: 1) a saturation behavior in pressure signal 2) different dynamic ranges in the different stylus studied 3) improved biometric recognition accuracy by means of pressure signal normalization as well as a performance degradation in mismatched conditions 4) interoperability between different stylus can be obtained by means of pressure normalization. Normalization produces an improvement in signature identification rates higher than 7% (absolute value) when compared with mismatched scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了在线手写采集的压力表征和标准化程序。使用在线签名数据库 MCYT（由 330 个用户的签名组成），在生物识别实验（识别和验证）中测试了标准化过程。目标是分析真实的不匹配场景，即用户使用一支手写笔注册，然后使用具有不同压力响应的不同手写笔模型生成一些测试样本。实验结果表明：1) 压力信号的饱和行为 2) 研究的不同手写笔的动态范围不同 3) 通过压力信号归一化提高了生物特征识别精度，但在不匹配条件下性能下降 4) 通过压力归一化可以获得不同手写笔之间的互操作性。与不匹配的场景相比，标准化使签名识别率提高了 7%（绝对值）以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种手写压力归一化方法，以解决不同采集笔之间的互操作性问题。
AI.motivation: 不同压力感应笔的动态范围和饱和特性差异会导致生物特征识别性能下降，需通过归一化解决跨设备不匹配问题。
AI.method: 基于MCYT签名数据库，对330名用户的签名进行压力信号特征分析，设计归一化算法并测试其在识别与验证任务中的效果。
AI.result: 发现压力信号饱和现象及设备间动态范围差异，归一化使识别率提升超7%，并有效改善跨笔互操作性。
AI.conclusion: 压力归一化能显著提升跨设备签名识别性能，为多设备生物特征系统提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Xuehai He,Chunyuan Li,Pengchuan Zhang,Jianwei Yang,Xin Eric Wang
title: Parameter-efficient Model Adaptation for Vision Transformers
title_zh: 视觉变压器的参数高效模型自适应
abstract: In computer vision, it has achieved great transfer learning performance via adapting large-scale pretrained vision models (e.g., vision transformers) to downstream tasks. Common approaches for model adaptation either update all model parameters or leverage linear probes. In this paper, we aim to study parameter-efficient model adaptation strategies for vision transformers on the image classification task. We formulate efficient model adaptation as a subspace training problem and perform a comprehensive benchmarking over different efficient adaptation methods. We conduct an empirical study on each efficient model adaptation method focusing on its performance alongside parameter cost. Furthermore, we propose a parameter-efficient model adaptation framework, which first selects submodules by measuring local intrinsic dimensions and then projects them into subspace for further decomposition via a novel Kronecker Adaptation (KAdaptation) method. We analyze and compare our method with a diverse set of baseline model adaptation methods (including state-of-the-art methods for pretrained language models). Our method performs the best in terms of the tradeoff between accuracy and parameter efficiency across 20 image classification datasets under the few-shot setting and 7 image classification datasets under the full-shot setting.
summary: In computer vision, it has achieved great transfer learning performance via adapting large-scale pretrained vision models (e.g., vision transformers) to downstream tasks. Common approaches for model adaptation either update all model parameters or leverage linear probes. In this paper, we aim to study parameter-efficient model adaptation strategies for vision transformers on the image classification task. We formulate efficient model adaptation as a subspace training problem and perform a comprehensive benchmarking over different efficient adaptation methods. We conduct an empirical study on each efficient model adaptation method focusing on its performance alongside parameter cost. Furthermore, we propose a parameter-efficient model adaptation framework, which first selects submodules by measuring local intrinsic dimensions and then projects them into subspace for further decomposition via a novel Kronecker Adaptation (KAdaptation) method. We analyze and compare our method with a diverse set of baseline model adaptation methods (including state-of-the-art methods for pretrained language models). Our method performs the best in terms of the tradeoff between accuracy and parameter efficiency across 20 image classification datasets under the few-shot setting and 7 image classification datasets under the full-shot setting.
abstract_zh: 在计算机视觉领域，它通过将大规模预训练视觉模型（例如视觉变换器）适应下游任务，实现了出色的迁移学习性能。模型适应的常见方法要么更新所有模型参数，要么利用线性探针。在本文中，我们的目标是研究图像分类任务中视觉变换器的参数有效模型适应策略。我们将有效的模型适应制定为子空间训练问题，并对不同的有效适应方法进行全面的基准测试。我们对每种有效的模型自适应方法进行了实证研究，重点关注其性能和参数成本。此外，我们提出了一种参数有效的模型自适应框架，该框架首先通过测量局部固有维度来选择子模块，然后将它们投影到子空间中，通过一种新颖的克罗内克自适应（KAdaptation）方法进一步分解。我们将我们的方法与一组不同的基线模型适应方法（包括预训练语言模型的最先进方法）进行分析和比较。我们的方法在少样本设置下的 20 个图像分类数据集和全样本设置下的 7 个图像分类数据集上，在准确性和参数效率之间的权衡方面表现最好。

AI.tldr: 研究视觉Transformer的参数高效模型适应方法，以在图像分类任务中实现高准确率与低参数成本的平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在适应视觉Transformer时要么更新所有参数导致计算成本高，要么使用线性探针限制性能，需探索更高效的参数适应策略。
AI.method: 提出一种参数高效框架，通过测量局部内在维度选择子模块，并采用Kronecker Adaptation方法进行子空间分解，实现参数高效适应。
AI.result: 在20个少样本和7个全样本图像分类数据集上，方法在准确率与参数效率的权衡中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 提出的Kronecker Adaptation方法在多种图像分类任务中展现出优越的参数效率与准确率平衡，为视觉Transformer的适应提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Bo Shen,Weijun Xie,Zhenyu Kong
title: Smooth Robust Tensor Completion for Background/Foreground Separation with Missing Pixels: Novel Algorithm with Convergence Guarantee
title_zh: 具有缺失像素的背景/前景分离的平滑鲁棒张量补全：具有收敛保证的新颖算法
abstract: The objective of this study is to address the problem of background/foreground separation with missing pixels by combining the video acquisition, video recovery, background/foreground separation into a single framework. To achieve this, a smooth robust tensor completion (SRTC) model is proposed to recover the data and decompose it into the static background and smooth foreground, respectively. Specifically, the static background is modeled by the low-rank tucker decomposition and the smooth foreground (moving objects) is modeled by the spatiotemporal continuity, which is enforced by the total variation regularization. An efficient algorithm based on tensor proximal alternating minimization (tenPAM) is implemented to solve the proposed model with global convergence guarantee under very mild conditions. Extensive experiments on real data demonstrate that the proposed method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches for background/foreground separation with missing pixels.
summary: The objective of this study is to address the problem of background/foreground separation with missing pixels by combining the video acquisition, video recovery, background/foreground separation into a single framework. To achieve this, a smooth robust tensor completion (SRTC) model is proposed to recover the data and decompose it into the static background and smooth foreground, respectively. Specifically, the static background is modeled by the low-rank tucker decomposition and the smooth foreground (moving objects) is modeled by the spatiotemporal continuity, which is enforced by the total variation regularization. An efficient algorithm based on tensor proximal alternating minimization (tenPAM) is implemented to solve the proposed model with global convergence guarantee under very mild conditions. Extensive experiments on real data demonstrate that the proposed method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches for background/foreground separation with missing pixels.
abstract_zh: 本研究的目的是通过将视频采集、视频恢复、背景/前景分离结合到一个框架中来解决丢失像素的背景/前景分离问题。为了实现这一目标，提出了一种平滑鲁棒张量补全（SRTC）模型来恢复数据并将其分别分解为静态背景和平滑前景。具体来说，静态背景通过低秩塔克分解建模，平滑前景（移动对象）通过时空连续性建模，时空连续性由全变分正则化强制执行。实现了一种基于张量近端交替最小化（tenPAM）的有效算法，以在非常温和的条件下求解具有全局收敛保证的所提出的模型。对真实数据的大量实验表明，所提出的方法明显优于丢失像素的背景/前景分离的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合视频采集、恢复和背景/前景分离的统一框架，用于解决缺失像素情况下的背景/前景分离问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理视频缺失像素的背景/前景分离时，通常需要分步处理且效果不佳，缺乏统一框架和收敛性保证。
AI.method: 提出平滑鲁棒张量补全（SRTC）模型，利用低秩 Tucker 分解建模静态背景，通过时空连续性总变分正则化建模平滑前景，并采用张量近端交替最小化（tenPAM）算法求解。
AI.result: 在真实数据上的实验表明，该方法在缺失像素的背景/前景分离任务中显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SRTC 模型通过统一框架和收敛性保证，有效解决了缺失像素下的视频分离问题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jingjun Yi,Beichen Zhou
title: A Multi-Stage Duplex Fusion ConvNet for Aerial Scene Classification
title_zh: 用于航空场景分类的多级双工融合卷积网络
abstract: Existing deep learning based methods effectively prompt the performance of aerial scene classification. However, due to the large amount of parameters and computational cost, it is rather difficult to apply these methods to multiple real-time remote sensing applications such as on-board data preception on drones and satellites. In this paper, we address this task by developing a light-weight ConvNet named multi-stage duplex fusion network (MSDF-Net). The key idea is to use parameters as little as possible while obtaining as strong as possible scene representation capability. To this end, a residual-dense duplex fusion strategy is developed to enhance the feature propagation while re-using parameters as much as possible, and is realized by our duplex fusion block (DFblock). Specifically, our MSDF-Net consists of multi-stage structures with DFblock. Moreover, duplex semantic aggregation (DSA) module is developed to mine the remote sensing scene information from extracted convolutional features, which also contains two parallel branches for semantic description. Extensive experiments are conducted on three widely-used aerial scene classification benchmarks, and reflect that our MSDF-Net can achieve a competitive performance against the recent state-of-art while reducing up to 80% parameter numbers. Particularly, an accuracy of 92.96% is achieved on AID with only 0.49M parameters.
summary: Existing deep learning based methods effectively prompt the performance of aerial scene classification. However, due to the large amount of parameters and computational cost, it is rather difficult to apply these methods to multiple real-time remote sensing applications such as on-board data preception on drones and satellites. In this paper, we address this task by developing a light-weight ConvNet named multi-stage duplex fusion network (MSDF-Net). The key idea is to use parameters as little as possible while obtaining as strong as possible scene representation capability. To this end, a residual-dense duplex fusion strategy is developed to enhance the feature propagation while re-using parameters as much as possible, and is realized by our duplex fusion block (DFblock). Specifically, our MSDF-Net consists of multi-stage structures with DFblock. Moreover, duplex semantic aggregation (DSA) module is developed to mine the remote sensing scene information from extracted convolutional features, which also contains two parallel branches for semantic description. Extensive experiments are conducted on three widely-used aerial scene classification benchmarks, and reflect that our MSDF-Net can achieve a competitive performance against the recent state-of-art while reducing up to 80% parameter numbers. Particularly, an accuracy of 92.96% is achieved on AID with only 0.49M parameters.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于深度学习的方法有效地提高了航空场景分类的性能。然而，由于参数量大、计算成本大，这些方法很难应用于多种实时遥感应用，例如无人机和卫星上的机载数据预处理。在本文中，我们通过开发一种名为多级双工融合网络（MSDF-Net）的轻量级 ConvNet 来解决此任务。关键思想是在获得尽可能强的场景表示能力的同时，使用尽可能少的参数。为此，开发了一种残差密集双工融合策略，以在尽可能多地重复使用参数的同时增强特征传播，并通过我们的双工融合块（DFblock）实现。具体来说，我们的 MSDF-Net 由带有 DFblock 的多级结构组成。此外，还开发了双工语义聚合（DSA）模块，用于从提取的卷积特征中挖掘遥感场景信息，该模块还包含两个用于语义描述的并行分支。在三个广泛使用的航空场景分类基准上进行了大量的实验，表明我们的 MSDF-Net 可以在减少高达 80% 的参数数量的同时，实现与最新技术相比具有竞争力的性能。特别是，仅用 0.49M 个参数，AID 的准确率就达到了 92.96%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级卷积网络MSDF-Net，用于提高遥感场景分类的实时性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法参数量大、计算成本高，难以满足无人机和卫星等实时遥感应用需求。
AI.method: 设计多阶段双路融合网络结构（DFblock），结合残差密集双路融合策略与双语义聚合模块（DSA），通过参数复用和特征重用降低模型复杂度。
AI.result: 在AID数据集上以0.49M参数达到92.96%分类准确率，参数量较先进方法减少80%。
AI.conclusion: MSDF-Net在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算开销，适用于资源受限的遥感场景分类任务。

ai_content.result: 在AID数据集上以0.49M参数达到92.96%分类准确率，参数量较先进方法减少80%。
ai_content.conclusion: MSDF-Net在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算开销，适用于资源受限的遥感场景分类任务。
